title: Jake Stewart - State Farm Insurance Agent
address: 490 Post St Suite 1606, San Francisco, CA 94102, United States
plus_code: QHQR+83 Union Square, San Francisco, CA, USA

owner.name: Jake Stewart - State Farm Insurance Agent (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Laura Perell
user_reviews.Description: Joni at Jake Stewart St Farm was excellent on the phone today! She helped me insure our home for the best value and explained all the little details of our policy that I did not completely understand. She took the time to make sure I was secure with my final decision. She gave great examples of what umbrella policies actually covered as well. Joni was gracious and very knowledgeable.

user_reviews.Name: Jim Robertson
user_reviews.Description: We have been a Dave Stewart client for over 30+ years.  I don’t write a lot of these reviews but Stewart State Farm deserves it given their performance. They are like small local business backed by a major insurance company.  They pay on claims immediately (had one). They turn around requests for information and documents in minutes and they even send birthday cards. All at a reasonable price.  I highly recommend this team to anyone looking to many types of insurance. Friendly too!

user_reviews.Name: Kim Dang
user_reviews.Description: I had the pleasure of working with Sarah Vasquez while updating my renter’s policy. She was quick to respond, provided great options, and went out of her way to help transfer my previous renter’s insurance to my new apartment so I wouldn't have to pay twice (although this wasn't possible, she still tried! Much appreciated). She also offered clear quotes for everything I needed.

user_reviews.Name: Lea Mitchell
user_reviews.Description: Jake Stewart has been my agent for over 5+ years, and we've been so happy with the service we've received. Cherisse used to support us, and now we've most recently been supported by Dawn, and both of these reps responded quickly and professionally and have provided the most excellent service! Happy customer over here.

user_reviews.Name: Michelle
user_reviews.Description: State  Farm, specifically Kelly, has been the most honest, helpful, down to earth, professional agent i have EVER worked with.  I put the safety of my children's future in her hands and it was the best thing i ever did.  This has been the worst 2 years, and climbing, of my life, and the ONLY thing that has made it possible to keep going is the few experts who are also genuine and compassionate i have met during this time .  Kelly / State Farm is at the TOP of that list.  Thank you for everything you have done to keep my house safe, my children's future secure, my cars safe - EVERYONE should get to feel safe.  Thank you for making this happen for me.

user_reviews.Name: Johnathan Horn
user_reviews.Description: Working with Kelly to obtain life insurance was a great experience. Friendly and easy to talk to, she makes you feel as if you are family or a very close friend. Statefarm is lucky to have her, she is through and answered all my questions. Thanks Kelly!

user_reviews.Name: Dana Allen
user_reviews.Description: I have been a customer for over a year and have had nothing but positive experiences. Maribel is who I've worked with most and she's very responsive, answers my questions finds the information I'm in need of. I was able to save greatly by moving over to State Farm for my auto insurance and it's been a wonderful experience with Jake Stewart's office!

user_reviews.Name: George Dobbins
user_reviews.Description:
We are long time clients of Dave Stewart and It has always been a pleasure to deal with his staff. A special shout out to Joni, who just helped adjust our home insurance and made it
fast, easy and fully understandable.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Laura Perell

fast, easy and fully understandable.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Matthew Stewart
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have had policies with Jake and Dave Stewart for many years now and can say nothing but great things about the level of support I receive from them and State Farm on the whole. Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: mark gonzales
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Kelly was great a great representative for your company! She was extremely helpful and  professional. I look forward to speaking to her again when I renew my other insurance policies with State Farm.
Thanks again Kelly!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rachael Harvey
user_reviews_extended.Description: The agents here have always been very available and communicative. Knock on wood - I have not processed any large claims, so I can't speak to that, but State Farm has been good to work with over the years.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Doli G
user_reviews_extended.Description: Maribel has been such a great help with my personal lines insurance policies! She’s always quick to respond, very attentive, and takes the time to make sure everything is clear and taken care of. I really appreciate her professionalism, friendly attitude, and the way she provides service with a smile. She makes the whole process easy and stress-free every time.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Wendy Buscaglia
user_reviews_extended.Description: We experienced a frustrating issue when renewing our home owners policy. Sarah went the extra mile to insure that the issue was properly resolved. Jake Stewart also was involved which was appreciated.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Charles
user_reviews_extended.Description: Essentially my battery died and I called my State farm roadside service and within an hour the tow truck driver Ramon showed up and fixed everything. It played out a lot better than I had anticipated. Thank you State farm you are the best 😉

user_reviews_extended.Name: James Corbeil
user_reviews_extended.Description: Everyone I talked to at State Farm Jake Stewart was more than helpful. They were also extremely kind and patient with me and my needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Timothy Ross
user_reviews_extended.Description: This office is great! Kelly & the entire team provide excellent customer service. This office is always quick to respond & the staff is very knowledgable.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael Vargas
user_reviews_extended.Description: I should start by saying that I have been a customer of this State Farm office since 1987. I have had a variety of insurance needs and policies in that time. Today I needed to insure a “new to me” used car. I had started the process of adding the car online over the weekend and today received a couple of calls from Kelly. As as I have come to expect from other staff from this office, Kelly was both friendly and helpful, and handled finalizing coverage efficiently. I appreciate being treated so well over the years and today was no exception. I highly recommend Dave Stewart’s office and staff for your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rosa Romero
user_reviews_extended.Description: Every time when I call to do my cars insurance payment they are very polite and sweet person at the phone,when I ask for something they send it to me right away and explain every details and very easy to understand,they are the best team.Thanks a lot Jake for your wonderful workers.Shawna thanks for your help today your very kind!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Eric Rubin
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have been working with the caring, helpful and professional staff at Jake Stewart's State Farm office for over 2 decades. They have helped me through life's challenges, big and small, involving my home, vehicles and business. These people have really made a difference in my life when the chips are down,  helping me navigate accidents and disasters that are already upsetting without having to worry about my insurance.
I would recommend Jake Stewart's office and staff to anyone looking for an insurer who goes above and beyond!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Christine Shiu
user_reviews_extended.Description: I spoke to Shawna at Jake Stewart’s office. She was very helpful and answered all of my questions. I really appreciated her responsiveness and friendly tone.

user_reviews_extended.Name: H
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kelly at Jake Stewart’s Office is fantastic. She answered every question I had and make the addition of a vehicle seamless. A+ all across the board

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kimberlee Jeanes
user_reviews_extended.Description: All office staff, most recently Joni, were professional and pleasant when helping me with policy questions.  Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sandra Erickson
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I was one of the many in California who were faced with a non renewable insurance policy.  Needless to say a very stressful situation.
I did due diligence and checked into my options.  I was getting no where fast until I called State Farm and was fortunate to find Maribel Palma!
She is extremely knowledgeable, understanding , and dependable.
She always answered my texts and calls quickly and with a caring attitude!
She and State Farm have been fantastic during this difficult time with Insurance in California.
SD Erickson

user_reviews_extended.Name: Amber Engelmann
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jake Stewart and his team have been terrific. I have appreciated their prompt professional and kind service over the last 20 years.

user_reviews_extended.Name: M.A. Andras
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been a customer of Dave Stewart - State Farm since the 1980’s. From Day 1 they’ve provided great service, are very helpful and super friendly. So, I started with auto insurance but later added Renter’s Insurance. When I phoned today to inquire about an email from State Farm I received that puzzled me, Shawna Pence (Agent Team Member) took the time to clarify everything for me in a professional yet friendly manner.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brooke Feinerman
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jake and his team are always incredibly helpful and timely in their response to any communications. Additionally, Jake and his team are very kind and always go the extra mile to make you feel valued as a customer! Jake and his team are thoughtful, intelligent and provide important information to help you make the best choices for you and your family.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jim Horvath
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kelly Madril @ Jake Stewart State Farm Agency is a Rockstar.  Every category of "great" she hits.

user_reviews_extended.Name: B Killingsworth
user_reviews_extended.Description: I found that when I had an issue with billing I was able to get it taken care of immediately by the first person who answered the phone! I’m very happy with that!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Barbara Wille
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jake Stewart and his team have been extremely helpful and kind to us during this time of uncertainty with our homeowners insurance. I want to give special recognition to Maribel Palma, who has given us exceptional service with a somewhat complicated situation. Maribel explains complex (to me!) topics very clearly, is meticulously detail-oriented, and always responsive to our needs. In addition to being very efficient, she spent extra time correcting an online form error I made and did so patiently and kindly. I highly recommend Jake Stewart and his team.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Noris Larkin
user_reviews_extended.Description: Spoke to Maribel and had an excellent experience. She explained my new car coverage and followed up as promised. I appreciate her expertise. Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kenneth Denow
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great friendly service. Communication was excellent. They quickly responded to all my questions and concerns. I WOULD STAY with State Farm if they insured my townhouse

user_reviews_extended.Name: Pauline Jue
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've always received prompt and professional responses from Jake and his staff. Recently I had a complicated situation with my late husband's rental property and Dawn Mann did a stellar job working through it on my behalf. I am so appreciative of the thoughtfulness and professionalism of this entire staff.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bill Buessing
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had a great experience getting insurance on my motorhome. Maribel was a fantastic agent that went out of her way to find the right policy for me. She is a great asset to State Farm insurance, Thank You Maribel

user_reviews_extended.Name: Claire McAuliffe
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jake’s staff were immensely helpful.  I am a new client and was extremely pleased that a actual person actually answered my call, had all of my files instantly available, devised a creative solution to my situation and was extremely pleasant at all times.    I feel in very good hands with Jake and his staff.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tristen Dixon
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kelly set us up and worked fast to get us a much better rate than we had been paying for quite some time with another insurer. She provided a personable and friendly experience and got stuff done. We are now bundled with all our insurance in one place and will be for the foreseeable future. Thanks guys for being easy :)

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brian Hayle
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been a long-time customer of Jake Stewart, and his service is exceptional!  He has been a great help esp. with some challenging insurance issues.  Highly recommended!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Celina Arzola
user_reviews_extended.Description: Maribel Palma was my Agent & was very professional & kind as she walked me through every step of the way of my auto & life insurance enrollment. She has made it a breeze & I can say that I am happy & satisfied in my switch in companies. Thank you Maribel

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ruben Sumera
user_reviews_extended.Description:
JP Mourad (Lafayette office) is a valuable asset to State Farm Insurance Company.  He deserves a 5 out of 5 stars.

JP was easy to deal with.  He understands the customers needs, explained and answered all my questions clearly so I can understand it.  He does his job very well.  I have dealt with him several times (the last time was on August 6, 2024.  Keep up the good work JP!  You the man.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Govind Lingam
user_reviews_extended.Description: Shoutout to Kelly at State Farm! Her positivity and prompt customer service made my insurance shopping experience easy, fun and painless. Kelly answered all my questions and took the time to find the best options for me. Working with her was such a pleasure! If you’re in the market for insurance, definitely reach out to Kelly — she works well to understand your needs, gives good advice and ensures you’ve a great experience! Thanks again, happy to have made the switch to StateFarm!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sarah Kaplowitz
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I love working with Dave and Jake Stewart and have been with them for a few years, now. They always take great care of their clients and have such a personal, relational touch.

I’ve recently worked with Kelly and she has been amazing; when I needed to add an auto policy and submitted a request late in the day, she responded the same day and I had a temporary insurance card issued the next morning which was a super fast turnaround!

Great rates, responsive and friendly staff makes for a great insurance company! Thank you all at Dave and Jake State Farm!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nathalie Kim Lieber
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Not only was Jake's team super friendly and responsive, they were proactive on the timelines that I had lost track of and really stayed on me to complete all the steps without stress.Maribel especially  always answer my Qs, they seem to have fair prices and were
great all around.  Love Jake and his team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jennifer Perez-Campbell
user_reviews_extended.Description: Sarah from state farm was amazing. Not only was she very knowledgeable, but she was very kind and sweet and most importantly very patient with me.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Maribel Palma
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love this office! Great service and amazing people.

user_reviews_extended.Name: KG Chua
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Jake Stewart and his team at State Farm are very professional and attentive to my questions.
Reply to my questions are prompt. I have been with State Farm since 1976 initially in Chicago and now in San Francisco, I am very happy with the service provided to me. I insured my home and car with Jake.
I have no hesitation in recommending Jake Stewart.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Martin Atkinson
user_reviews_extended.Description:
12/5/25:  just a quick update to reiterate how awesome Jake Stewart’s State Farm office is. Today I had a wonderful experience from Kelly who reached out to catch up, not to sell me more insurance, but rather give some good news on a life policy that is nearing maturity, and also an opportunity to reduce the premium on one of our auto policies.  Kelly and the entire team here are amazing.  Can’t recommend them enough.

I've been a State Farm customer with Jake Stewart's office for almost 15 years.  Jake and his team are absolutely fantastic.  Friendly, honest, reasonably priced - they truly are the best in the business.  I just recently had my first auto claim due to a catalytic converter theft, and I was back on the road in two days, with the claim paid in full within a week.  Just excellent service from an excellent team.  If you're searching for the best insurance provider, look no further than Jake and his team at State Farm.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Aaron Secrest
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jake and the State Farm team have been wonderful to work with for 9+ years. The team is very prompt, provide quality insurance products at competitive prices, and are willing to go the extra mile to ensure our family’s needs are met without overselling policies that aren’t necessary.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ruth Kershaw
user_reviews_extended.Description: My husband and I have had an excellent experience with this State Farm. Cherisse was extremely helpful and thorough guiding us with our initial policies. She took the time to answer all of our questions and create a bundle that worked well for us. She has also been very responsive and timely when we needed policy updates. Will continue to use them in the future!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Samantha Nobles-Block
user_reviews_extended.Description: We’ve worked with Jake Stewart’s office for all our insurance needs for many, many years. They have always provided stellar service and quick responses.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shawanna Brown
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kelly was so quick and efficient with helping me add a new vehicle to my policy. She was able to find me a really good quote and also made sure I wasn’t missing out on any discounts in about 15 minutes at the most. customer service was 10 out of 10 answered all of my questions quickly and was so sweet

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tyler Piña
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Dani was incredible! She helped me get the insurance I needed in just minutes and at a super affordable price. Very satisfied!

8/3/21 UPDATE

I have continued to love my experience with this team at State Farm. I've been working directly with Lou Ann for the past couple years, who has provided excellent service for me. She is so sweet and works diligently to make sure that I'm continuing to get the best rates and service. I can tell that she genuinely cares about me and has my best interests at heart. Would definitely recommend these agents if you're in the market for any of the offered insurance policies.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jo Blo
user_reviews_extended.Description: I spoke with JP from a well-established State Farm agency, and he went above and beyond to answer all my questions and concerns. Despite the numerous queries I had, he remained exceptionally professional and thorough in addressing each one. I was truly impressed with his customer service and highly recommend this agency.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Christian
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have had an excellent experience with Jake and his team at State Farm.  I have called him when I've had a claim and he always picks up and helps no matter the time.  His team including Dawn are very responsive, helpful, and looking at what is in my interest and not for extra premiums.  I will also say Jake did a comprehensive insurance review that showed me some coverage gaps I needed to understand.  I appreciate the hard work Jake and his team do for us.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sara Bunting
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have been a customer of Jake Stewart’s for over 20 years. He is always so pleasant and professional. I actually look forward to dealing with my insurance issues! In addition when I called his office, they always know who I am and take care of my problems right away. For example, today I realized I didn’t have my proof of insurance cards for my car. I called and spoke to Don. She knew who I was and emailed me the cards so I could access them right away.

Whenever I had to make a claim, it’s gone very smoothly and I’ve been pleased with the service and the outcome. I highly recommend Jake Stewart and his State Farm office for all your insurance needs!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ray Skinner
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Kelly is very knowledgeable, responsive, and professional.  She took the time to understand my situation and provide the best possible solution.
The service is outstanding, and I highly recommend it.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kristine Ramirez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Crystal really helped me find the coverage that I needed. Not only did she provide the best coverage possible, but she also helped me understand the importance of insurance. She always responds quickly and answers all my questions. If you’re looking for a trustworthy office who will provide the best coverage and service, call Jake Stewart’s State Farm Office and ask for CRYSTAL.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jetta
user_reviews_extended.Description: Got a call from an agency that connected me with StateFarm.. Got connected with Erica from the bay, she gave me quotes and when I realized she was like A Good Neighbor StateFarm is there I was pleased to say she was quick nice friendly got the best quotes and even spoke with a few of my neighbors.. Lol this was the best decision I made in a while and plus My mom and dad is going to be pleased I'm going through a mom and pop company

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dawn Johnsen
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Jake and his team are amazing!
They have been so patient and helpful during the 5 years that I've been with them! They have helped me navigate starting my own business, and are always there to answer any questions I have.
The team feels like a family and I feel so comfortable and confident having them as part of my life.
They are better than a good neighbor, they are a great neighbor!
10/10 would recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Robert Tom
user_reviews_extended.Description:
At State Farm Insurances, Agents, Jake Stewart & Maribel Palma really understood my situation and needs. They treated me like a loving family member would and were able to assist and help me with everything I was looking for. Thank you so much! … These guys are awesome!
Sincerely, Robert Tom

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kris Van Stralen
user_reviews_extended.Description: Maribel Palma friendly and timely help enhance Jake Stewart's State Farm team.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alec Naugle
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jake recently became our agent after Judy Francis retired after 20+ years as our agent. Jake took the time to get to know us and made some good policy recommendations to help save us money and focus coverage based on the latest trends. He and his team have been super responsive via email, phone, and text to our questions and getting the changes implemented. We’re looking forward to a continued relationship and peace of mind!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nick Burtner
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have never felt the need to make a google review, but I must say, I was in the market for insurance, evaluating a few options; Dave & Jake's team helped me at every step of the process without bias.

Ultimately Kelly with their team helped me find the policy that both made sense from a budget perspective but also a coverage perspective, more than Liberty Mutual or any other competitor I talked to.

I would not look anywhere else when shopping for insurance!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Phu Hoang
user_reviews_extended.Description: Dave, Dawn, Amy and Cherisse have been great to work with.  I have been with StateFarm for so many years.  They take the time to explain all the coverages and make sure we don’t ever pay anymore than the product that we want.  They are responsive and always try to give me the best value while helping me have the right coverage that I need.  I appreciate the trust and relationship I have with David and his team.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Richard Lo
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have been with the Stewart’s for 3 generations starting with Dave’s father and now Dave’s son Jake. Must be over 30 years. They have always been there for us in times of need. I really admire how the business is being passed from one generation to the next. State Farm has 100% of our insurance policies. Very satisfied and happy with how they have and are treating us. Customer service is #1 if you want to sustain a great business and they have proven that to us over the years.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tracy Damiano
user_reviews_extended.Description: Just bought our first home and was shopping around for insurance.  Called Jake Stewart’s office and immediately spoke to a warm and friendly person who passed me along to one of the office agents Nayeli.  She did a fantastic job putting together a bundled insurance package for auto, home and umbrella and patiently explaining all the details to me as a first time homeowner.  She was also extremely fast and responsive by email and phone with any questions.  Although they were a tad pricier than another option, I decided to go with them for their great service and local knowledge and look forward to working with them.

user_reviews_extended.Name: JP Stoops
user_reviews_extended.Description: Hands down, this is one of the best insurance agencies in the bay.  It's great to be able to pick up the phone and have someone there to help and answer questions.  I love the fact that you can have a local/ individual experience with the backing of a well-rated insurance company like State Farm. Jake and his team helped me save money with different tips on how to submit my application.  I can tell that they genuinely care and I'm happy to grow my coverage with them as my family grows.  Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: MICHAEL TUNG
user_reviews_extended.Description: Recently purchased my first home and had the pleasure of being introduced to the Dave and Jake Stewart team. They are consummate professionals, extremely responsive, and have great knowledge on the various insurance products and offerings. Most importantly, they took the time to really understand my profile and goals, and educated me in a manner such that i could make the best coverage decisions. For example, I had never heard of umbrella coverage, but realized quickly that it was highly irresponsible not to have any. I was able to sign up for auto/home/umbrella and put together a policy that is affordable and provides the proper coverage. Their entire staff is excellent!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: vikram malhotra
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jake and his team are fantastic. Super responsive and I can’t recall a single time I was not connected with a live person. Over time I have migrated all my insurance needs to this office and I have nothing but positive things to say for the entire staff. Aside from being responsive they also ensured I got the best rates. Highly recommended!

user_reviews_extended.Name: MaryLou Corrigan
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have been clients of the Dave and Jake Stewart for many many years. They are our agents for our car and home insurance, and we have always been able to get our needs met quickly and accurately. They are always available to answer complex questions as well as recommend solutions for changing life circumstances. The office staff is professional and extremely competent. We have been so happy withDave and Jake's  service that our daughter followed our recommendation and insured her condo with Dave and Jake as well.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rich Koch
user_reviews_extended.Description: Amazing customer service.  Jake was great in helping me get a supplemental insurance plan for Medicare.  Lou Ann came to the rescue with making sure we got insurance for condos in San Francisco before the insurance crisis hit in California. They definitely go the extra mile for their clients.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stacey Martin
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have been with Jake Stewart for many years, and are very pleased with the service we receive. He and his staff answer questions promptly, and Jake has been great to work with on updates and changes to our policies as our needs have changed over the years. Definitely trust Jake from State Farm!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Andrew Nakagawa
user_reviews_extended.Description: This State Farm office was very helpful with all of my insurance questions. I spoke to JP, who gave me a few options on how to get better coverage with some great benefits. Very professional.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Roberta Abel
user_reviews_extended.Description:
We have used Dave and Jake Stewart for our car and home insurance (renter's and homeowners) since 1994. (It was just Dave back then.)We've always gotten great service. Always. From the Stewarts. From the staff. Very friendly, very helpful, very nice people. Why go to anyone else?
I also am a loyal State Farm client. So, I was glad when I found them when we moved to San Francisco.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michelle Elkins
user_reviews_extended.Description: My state farm agent Kelly Madril was excellent. She was very helpful fast and efficient. She was very patient and professional. I left an insurance company that I’ve been with for 13 years and I was apprehensive about it. She assured me that I would be able to get my car insurance, life insurance, and renters insurance for half of what I was paying for just car insurance. There was no turning back after receiving that info. The process was very fast and easy.I would recommend her to anyone.

user_reviews_extended.Name: A Mukkavilli
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kelly was excellent to work with and so helpful for condo insurance!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lee Sparling
user_reviews_extended.Description: My husband and I have insured our home and vehicles with Dave Stewart State Farm for over 20 years, and we have always been very happy with the services received.  Agents are responsive and reliable.  The very few times we have had claims we have been happy with how they were handled.  We do not hesitate to recommend Dave & Jake Stewart State Farm.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rebecca Young
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kelly was always so wonderful when answering my questions about my policy and keeping me informed on any updates! Thank you State Farm!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Judi Hinkson
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have had the pleasure of being a customer for longer than I'll admit. Over these many years I've had the standard insurance issues. A fender bender, stolen purse, storm damage and life insurance updates. Recently though I was informed my home is now in a flood zone. The forms and documentation involved were daunting to try and navigate. I reached out to Dani and she has cut through all of it for me. She updates on its steady progress and explains everything. I'm very thankful to her for dealing with this issue and would recommend Dave and Jake Stewart to anyone looking for any type of insurance.  Everyone at their office is friendly and attentive.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jim Christensen
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have been a State Farm customer with Dave and Jake Stewart for many years and have always received exceptional service. That being said I feel that a situation I found myself in with a lender and specific verbiage on my COI that needed to be corrected is being handled above and beyond by JP Mourad.
JP contacted a senior executive at JPMORGAN Chase who in turn contacted me directly at home to discuss the situation and assist with getting it resolved. I am a firm believer in "you get what you pay for" and in this situation I would say I  received much more than that. Yes I am continuously contacted for cheaper this and cheaper that but in the long run it's all about service.

Jim Christensen

user_reviews_extended.Name: Paws
user_reviews_extended.Description: I don't usually do reviews but I am going to do one now and it's about insurance of all things.  I will cut to the chase,  Dave and Jake Stewart State Farm Insurance has the best customer service around.  Period.   Their business is family owned and they treat their clients like family.  The staff is friendly, courteous, knowledgeable and will take the time to go over any questions you may have.  They pick up calls and return your calls - a rare thing these days.   Give them a call, you won't regret it.  Five Stars.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ellen Kelly
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have used Jake and Dave Stewart's insurance office for 17+ years, and they have always exhibited excellent customer service, from calling me back right away to making all of policies easy to update and maintain. In addition the staff is super friendly and expeditious.  I highly recommend using them for all of your insurance needs!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kerry Laws
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've worked with Jake for about 10 years and have always received great service. Over the years he's given me detailed quotes for various insurance options and walked me through them both over email and phone. I had a car accident a few years ago and it was hassle free to get the repairs paid for by the insurance policy. I highly recommend working with him.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Klasicole
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a client of State Farm for decades. Initially began with Dave for car and home insurance and then over the years added life insurance and education accounts with Jake. They are both extremely responsive and helpful as my needs have evolved over time. Great people, great service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tanya Zeno
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have to give Jake Stewarts office a five star review because of the amazing experience I have every time I call or need help. I’ve been with State Farm for years but no matter where I go I will stay with this office. I especially recommend Dani To help with any of your life insurance means she is amazing. Hands-down best customer service I have ever had.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jim Mamay
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a customer of State Farm for the last 25 years. Wherever I have lived I've received excellent service. 10 years ago I moved to Richmond and used Jake Stewart and his team in San Francisco. They are great. When I sold my house in Richmond after 6 years and moved to Vista and bought a new house I stayed with Jake remotely. 3 years. I have had many policies, personal, earthquake, auto - all handled by Jake. I sold the house in Vista and moved to Murrieta. Unfortunately StateFarm does not offer fire insurance for my new house so I went with another carrier. It was very sad. Jake asked if StateFarm changes their fire insurance policy would I return as a customer? Absolutely. I'd move all my policies right back. Even though StateFarm does not cover fire I still have non house/auto policies handled by Jake.  Great relationships are worth their weight in gold. I highly recommend Jake and his team and wish them great opportunities.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bridgette Howard
user_reviews_extended.Description: Since, my Aunt told me to use State Farm Insurance, I have been a over satisfied customer.  Crystal, Dawn and Tim the claim specialist have been sufficient, competent, patience  and knowledgeable pertaining to the type of services I needed help with.  They made the process easy especially after my car was stolen.  Thank you Crystal and the rest of the State Farm team

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ted Ray
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've worked with Jake and his team for over 10 years and have nothing but good things to say. He has always been responsive and helpful and has helped me with both my auto and home insurance needs. Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ann Barbe
user_reviews_extended.Description: My husband and I have been insured with State Farm since the 1980's. When our original agent of many years retired, our accounts were placed with Dave and Jake Stewart's agency, a smooth and effortless transition. Not only have Dave and Jake provided us with excellent service over the years, their entire staff has always been helpful, efficient and friendly. As their "jingle" says, "Like a good neighbor, State Farm is there!" And Dave and Jake Stewart's entire office lives up to that promise. Did you know my favorite singer, Barry Manilow, wrote that jingle, among others, before he started his rise to fame?! Just a bit of fun trivia!😊

user_reviews_extended.Name: Toni Lewis
user_reviews_extended.Description: My husband and I have been clients of Dave and Jake Stewart for over 25 years. They have taken care of all of our insurance needs with professionalism but have also treated us like family members wanting to make sure we have the best product for our particular needs. Yesterday I had the pleasure of working with Tilly to secure financing for a new car along with making sure we were properly insured. I had a terrible cold and had lost my voice so Tilly made all the necessary phone calls to the car company. She worked all afternoon to help me out!  Tilly, you were exceptional!  You went above and beyond to get the job done!  We highly recommend Dave and Jake Stewart’s State Farm Agency!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Natalie Stewart
user_reviews_extended.Description: Amazing state farm agents! Both Jake and Dave! So detailed and thorough. Very genuine and personable but got the job done. Their team was great too. Highly recommend if you are looking for a State Farm agent in Bay Area.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lesley Milstead
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jake has been my agent for nearly 20 years. If it were not for my leaving the state, I would keep him forever! He has been a joy to work with and I only hope to find someone as wonderful as him when I get settled in my new state. I HIGHLY recommend him. 5 stars. A+.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Darius Fewlass
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a client of Dave and Jake Stewart State Farm Insurance for 4+ years. They have always been responsive to my needs whether for a vehicle claim or a new policy for our family's first home. It feels good to be cared for and protected. I highly recommend this office for your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Steve Siino
user_reviews_extended.Description: My wife and I had all of our policies through Jake for over 10 years. He and his team were fantastic. Unfortunately, due to an employer policy requiring us to have our insurance  policies through my employer, I was forced to switch. If that employer policy ever changed we would go back to Jake and his team in a heart beat. I highly recommend Jake and his team! - June 2022 (San Francisco, CA)

user_reviews_extended.Name: Anthony Sanchez
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've always had amazing customer service through Dave and Jake, would recommend them to anyone. I've only had to file a claim once, but it was quick and easy and they helped me through out the whole process. The State farm app also made my claim filing super convenient.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dani Raye
user_reviews_extended.Description: Dave and Jake are two of the most knowledgeable and well respected Agents I’ve had the pleasure of knowing. Over the years They have truly assembled a a dream team of Staff that are extremely hardworking, knowledgeable, trustworthy and we are all one big State Farm Family here!  shout out to Dave, Jake, Lou Ann, Cherisse, Adrianne, Amy, Kelly, Jessica and Myself  for making this agency the best place not only to work but to keep my own policies with. There is no where else I’d rather be as a client! I sleep better at night knowing my family and I are protected. I cannot recommend this agency enough! I have recommended friends and family here ever since I’ve joined this team and couldn’t be prouder of the job we do for our clients!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dylan Mote
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jake Stewart State Farm is great! I really appreciated the time Kelly took to explain & review my options for life insurance. I know she & the entire office always have my best interest mind. This is an office you can trust.

user_reviews_extended.Name: ck Kuhlman
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been coming to Jake for over 3 years now for my insurance needs. He and his staff have been great to work with; very accommodating, quick with communication and reliable. If you live in the San Francisco Bay Area, I would highly recommend doing business with this knowledgeable team. I just wish I could continue to use their services as I move to New York.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mimi
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been working with Erika to get a quote for my home and vehicles and she has been wonderful. She's been available to answer questions and tweak the policies to meet my needs. The prices at State farm have beat all the other quotes I've received.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dan Walsh
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a State Farm client and policyholder for over 20yrs. The Stewart State Farm agency provides excellent service to their clients, and employ knowledgeable, caring support staff people.  I highly recommend them for your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Natan Daskal
user_reviews_extended.Description: I NEVER write reviews, but I just got off the phone with them and want people to know how wonderful my experience has been. I've been a customer with this agent for about six years and every single time I have ever had an issue or question, no matter how big or small, I was helped by the friendliest staff EVER. Every single person who I have ever spoken to was completely competent and professional, and incredibly friendly and personable -- even during COVID when I'm sure they're buried with extra complications. I can't say enough good things about this office and want to express my gratitude to each of you -- it truly makes a difference.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Elliot Franks
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have been insured by State Farm (Dave & Jake Stewart’s office, San Francisco) ever since I became “grown up”, and bought my first home 25 years ago.  I am covered by them for both my home insurance and my auto insurance.

I have never considered going elsewhere because, without exception, every time I call I get a pleasant and kind reception, and fast and effective service.  I always feel as if they do actually care about me and about my well-being.

They have fielded all sorts of “dumb” inquiries from me without ever making me feel stupid or irrelevant, and I truly trust them to help me make the best decisions for my personal situation in terms of insurance coverage and cost.

I recommend Dave & Jake Stewart’s office without reservation. Their staff are top notch, honest and trustworthy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: MacKenzi Simpson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Love working with Dawn - she’s the best!! 10/10 customer service, always available for a call. Really helped walk me through buying my first ever auto insurance!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Adam Powers
user_reviews_extended.Description: At Dave and Jake Stewart State Farm Insurance my family and I have never felt like a number, rather, we have felt like people with a history, with wants and needs. Jake has personally taken a great deal of time to get to know my family and me to better understand exactly what products and services are the best for us and what products and services we actually need. We currently use multiple products, ranging from life insurance to renter's insurance and soon auto insurance as well.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joy Liebl
user_reviews_extended.Description: My late son worked with this State Farm Agency for many, many years and always spoke highly of them.  They have been wonderful working with me and his estate to make sure his property, earthquake and auto insurance if kept up-to-date until things are sold.  Highly recommend using this Agency.  Friendly, helpful and polite.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nason Landreneau
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jake Stewart’s office has always gone above and beyond to give me the best service possible. I have both my car insurance and renters insurance with them and I have always had the best service from everyone I have come in contact with. Kelly Madril has been exceptional to deal with in their office and was a great help in getting me renter’s insurance.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Matt Martin
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've worked with Jake's team for over a decade, and they're consistently helpful, thoughtful, and quick. Great team; highly recommended. (Plus, their rates are the best.)

user_reviews_extended.Name: Trish J.
user_reviews_extended.Description: Maribel was most helpful with decisions for increasing my home insurance coverage. If she did not know an answer she confirmed it and followed up in a timely manner. She was eager to ensure I was informed to make a comfortable decision.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mark Kuperschmid
user_reviews_extended.Description: When I moved to San Francisco in 1988, I found this agency in the yellow pages and have been with them for all of my insurance needs since then!  Their customer service is top notch and their pricing has always been better than the competition.  I have friends who are insurance agents and they have never been able to convince me to leave Dave and Jake Stewart State Farm - just not as good service and always more expensive!   I highly recommend them.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mary Grace Calanog
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a long-time client of Dave and Jake Stewart (close to 10 years) and they provided amazing service for all my insurance needs. I have my home, auto and long term life insurance bundled and getting loyalty discount. Thanks fir taking care of my family’s needs!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alexander Soto
user_reviews_extended.Description: Awesome agent. Been a customer for 6 years and it's been a wonderful experience. My insurance needs have changed a number of times in that period and every time I called in they were responsive, knowledgeable, and great to talk to. Any changes I requested were implemented very quickly. Would recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joseph
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I’ve been with Jake/Dave Stewart for 15 years+.  They are consummate professionals and their expertise is unparalleled.

Great agents are made from great teams!  Lou Ann (one of several of their amazing staff) is consistently knowledgable, efficient and always focused on attention to detail.

If you’re insured anywhere but this Stewart State Farm office, you’re missing the seamless experience of buying something you need but hope to never use.

Thanks to all at Jake/Dave State Farm in SF.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Daniel Dunphy
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I rate Maribel Palma’s performance as 5 star *****
Maribel communicated, listened and responded to my concerns, questions and requests with intelligence, kindness and professionalism. I couldn’t have received better attention to detail, all with an amiable manner.
Thank you to Maribel and to State Farm.
Sincerely,
Daniel Dunphy

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rob Kline
user_reviews_extended.Description: My experience with the Jake Stewart State Farm Agency and their agent Cherisse was first rate.  I chose State Farm to bundle Home and Auto insurance. Every interaction, whether by phone or through email was handled promptly, courteously, professionally, and with a high degree of industry knowledge.  Their pricing is competitive, and their customer service is second to none.  I confidently recommend the Jake Stewart Agency and Cherisse.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sumo
user_reviews_extended.Description: Dave, Kelly and rest of his Team are awesome !!! They helped me each step of the way for home owners insurance. I chose Dave, Kelly and his Team because I have auto insurance with them. Insured with them for a long time.  I recommend them to my family and friends

user_reviews_extended.Name: Anthony Calmerin
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been a policy holder with Dave Stewart for many years. I've dealt with plenty of claims with their office. The staff has always been professional, courteous, and prompt with all my interactions with the office. I recommend Dave Stewart State Farm Insurance to all my friends and family.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Victoria Smith
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been with this branch of State Farm since 2009. I use them for my two vehicles, property and renters insurance and they now also insure my photography business. Clients can be particular what they want to see on your business insurance documents and I must give Kelly major kudos for adjusting and delivering. Always helpful, pleasant and patient. Love them.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dan Fost
user_reviews_extended.Description: I absolutely love Jake Stewart and his team.  Every time I call the office, everyone is so cheerful and helpful. They readily have answers to any questions and if they don’t, they can get them quickly.  And they always know how to help me save money. I have such peace of mind having them on my side!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ross Yeo
user_reviews_extended.Description: Hard working office! I received a quote for an insurance policy over the weekend when I applied for it and Jake replied to a question I had over the weekend as well. Then the accounts manager worked late with me on a Friday to get a couple policies set up. Very knowledgable and responsive!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jacqueline Vargas
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have nothing but wonderful things to say about this office. I recently relocated to California, and had to get my policies switched from Salt Lake City to San Francisco. I expected the transition to be a hassle, but Nayeli was extremely helpful every step of the way. She provided me a breakdown of my services, premium options, and a great rate that made me switch over my own renters policy and rental home insurance as well. I highly recommend their services and congratulate them for being extremely efficient.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Max Maloney
user_reviews_extended.Description: We've been customers of this agency for many years. We have multiple automotive policies, homeowners, business insurance, and umbrella coverage. The team here has always been lightning-fast to respond to any questions or issues we've had. They've always been looking out for us on how to save money and get the appropriate coverage for our needs. In addition, we had to file one claim a few years ago when our garage was broken into, and the process was extremely smooth. All in all, we've never had a reason to look elsewhere! I'd recommend them highly.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shirley Kay Smith
user_reviews_extended.Description: JP did a great job setting up our insurance and was immediately responsive any time we needed something. We highly recommend using him as your agent! :-)

user_reviews_extended.Name: Peter Kriss
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been a customer of Dave and Jake Stewart State Farm for many years and have had uniformly good experiences. The few claims I've had have been remarkable easy. Just worked with Cherisse on an earthquake policy and that was simple and easy as well. Couldn't ask for more!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kirk Pascal
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I recently acquired a motorcycle and started looking around for Insurance quotes. Upon speaking with Dani, she walked me through what all of the insurance components were, which was extremely helpful for someone who isn't from the United States originally. She was extremely patient and thoughtful of my needs and did not try to sell me additional items or push more expensive options on me - she plainly and simply explained what everything was and why I might consider specific options.

Overall my experience with Dave and Jake Stewart's Insurance firm was extremely pleasant.

Further - out of 3 quotes I received, they offered me the lowest rate for what turned out to be a better overall insurance plan.

The only downfall I found was that insurance plans are only offered on a semi-annual basis, which is not the end of the world but would be nice if there was an annual plan. Just one less thing to think about.

I would recommend calling if you are interested in getting a quote and I am sure you will receive the same experience as I did.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jennifer Wolff
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Dear Dave and Jake Stewart State Farm Insurance,

You are quite fortunate to have Lou Ann Mazzetti on your team.  Not only is Lou Ann an exceedingly nice person to work with, (which is quite notable vs. today’s business environment) she is exceedingly knowledgeable and skilled.

In each phone call and email conversation, Lou Ann went above and beyond to ensure that I was completely satisfied.  She provided rapid responses which comprised more information and optionality than I had asked for.  She even answered questions before I had asked them.

Everyone is different. It is clear that Lou Ann studies spends a great deal of time to study each client’s unique set of circumstances to properly construct the best possible products befitting one’s needs.

We all know insurance coverage is essential, but few of us are experts in knowing exactly what we are supposed to do to protect ourselves and sleep better at night.  Thanks to Lou Ann, I am more than satisfied and relieved that she is in my corner.

Sincerely, Jennifer

user_reviews_extended.Name: Richard Swan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Dave and Jake Stewart have supported my family's insurance for decades. My agent, Lou Anne, has led us through the  home, automobile,  umbrella liability, medicare, and earthquake insurance. State Farm have promptly and cheerfully paid out on some substantial claims. State Farm and this agency have treated us fairly and with exceptional service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Darryl Raszl
user_reviews_extended.Description: For many years my husband and I have been covered by State Farm Insurance, business, home and auto, initially with Dave Stewart, and now with his son, Jake Stewart. Dave is now retired. Dave and Jake and their staff have always given us prompt, expert and friendly service for all of our insurance news. I can recommend the Jake Stewart Insurance Agency, Inc. without reservation.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Scott Singh
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jake and his team were great to work with in helping my wife and I insure our rental and auto.  Both Jake and his colleague Kelly walked me through the quote details and answered all my questions.  Very pleased with my experience.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Roxanne Richards
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jake (and before him his father Dave) and his entire crew, Lou Ann, Ann, Jillian have been on top of handling our insurance coverage for more than 25 years. They have been unfailingly responsive to our every need, including texting back late in the evening when we needed proof of insurance. We always enjoy our time spent with them!

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Gray
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a customer of this State Farm office for 20 years. They are fantastic at providing clear explanations of coverages across a wide variety of products. Cherisse helped us add umbrella liability coverage today, and we switched our auto insurance back to them as well. Wonderful and helpful!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bob Stein
user_reviews_extended.Description: I was a client of this State Farm agency for several years and couldn’t have been happier. They provided great service, went above and beyond to help in several situations and had outstanding customer service. The only reason that I am no longer a client is that we moved abroad, but plan to use them again if and when we return to the US.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Danny Greens
user_reviews_extended.Description: These guys are the best. I have been with them for almost three years and have had no issue with getting any claim or change resolved. I could talk for ever but best way to put it is I had them when I was in San Francisco and was told I had to swap to a different provider in my area when I moved. I spoke with another branch in my area and after a brief conversation I had decided I was staying with them or swapping insurance agencies.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Hollis Pierce-Jenkins
user_reviews_extended.Description: Like a good neighbor, State Farm is there! This is not just a slogan, but speaks to my personal experience. Raymond Stewart was my parent’s Insurance Agent. He handled their homeowners, and automobile insurance. He was the epitome of customer service during a time when the agent made house calls. As I became an adult, Dave Stewart took over the business and that same standard of care continues. Now my daughter is of age and Jake Stewart as well as the entire State Farm team continues the tradition of excellence. I highly recommend this firm for all insurance needs. They are also excellent in financial planning and always provide best practices on the best products to fit the needs of their clients. Dr. Hollis Pierce-Jenkins

user_reviews_extended.Name: HEAVENSENT415
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been with Jake and Stewart's office now for over 10 years.  I just love and enjoy how professional, with keep my account updated with great afforadable quotes for my insurance. I have even recommended family and friends.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Edwin Ramirez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Trust, respect and honesty. I’ve known Dave and Jake Stewart since I was in elementary school and they’ve been nothing but loving and caring. Now that I have my own family and wanted life insurance it was easy asked for their help. I felt informed to make the best decision for my family and grateful for their honest approach. I’m very lucky to have them as my agent.

user_reviews_extended.Name: zara muren
user_reviews_extended.Description: Over 40 years of carrying insurance, Jake is hands down the best Agent we have known - extremely professional and good communicator, prompt in getting back to us and thoughtful in fitting our policies to our needs. Thank you Jake, Cherisse and Dani for your fantastic care!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mike Arnold
user_reviews_extended.Description:
We have been customers of Dave’s (snd now Jake’s)  close to 20 years now - always an incredibly responsive insurance team. Always forthcoming and informative on our options, keep us safely but not redundantly insured.
Thank you Dave, Jake, and your amazing team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Scott Andreas
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been a customer of the Dave and Jake Stewart agency for 8.5 years. They’re incredibly helpful. Following a robbery, they processed a claim very quickly. More recently, Dani and others were extremely helpful toward issuing a new policy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jewel
user_reviews_extended.Description: State Farm has been a part of My Family for many years. Customer Service is truly top notch!! Personal and cares about your needs. If you are looking for insurance, I suggest State Farm Jake and Dave Stewart!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: khi boren
user_reviews_extended.Description: Absolutely loved my experience here. I have thoroughly enjoyed working with Kelly M. She was kind, courteous  and always made sure my family had the best policy. We look forward to working with her again!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Blair Kellison
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great rates and A+ customer service. I have several properties and vehicles with State Farm and seem to be consistently in need of info and documents from them and they are unbelievably responsive - starting with Jake Stewart down to every team member.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lynn Altshuler
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have been clients for over 30 years. The best way to evaluate insurance agents is by their actions when there is a problem, accident or need for service/info.  Jake and Dave's office has always responded promptly and in a friendly way.  Issues were always resolved in a timely and professional manner.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Taveren Tech
user_reviews_extended.Description: When I left San Francisco, and then San Bruno to continue move towards south bay, I thought I'd have to switch agents to get someone closer to home.... however, Jake and his staff have never let me down.  They are polite, responsive, detailed when needed ( I asked a lot of specific questions), and helpful in structuring multiple policies to get best value.   I now have home, 3 cars, motorcycle, home owners, and have never had a complaint.    Its been 10 yeas and I won't be changing agents anytime soon, even if there is one in my zip code.

user_reviews_extended.Name: bianca gruetter
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have used Dave and Jake Stewart for all our insurance needs for the past 15+ years.  Everyone in their office is fantastic and their customer service is amazing.    I would highly recommend contacting them for any insurance that you need.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mary Rodriguez Gaval
user_reviews_extended.Description: Have had insurance with State Farm forever but has to give some credit to Kelly Madril for being so helpful and professional to deal with on my new auto insurance. They will take good care of you. Thank you.

user_reviews_extended.Name: C Castillo
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kelly was great . Very friendly. Fast and prompt service . I needed insurance to drive off the lot with my new car and she got me a quote , and then set me up ready with everything I needed , plus a good monthly rate. Would recommend to anyone that needs car insurance. Yea

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mike Bailey
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been using Dave and Jake Stewart for all my insurance needs since 2012. I couldn’t be happier. Everyone there is professional, knowledgeable and very pleasant. They always promptly resolve issues and fully answer all of my questions. I highly recommend them.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Thomas Chupein
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had a really good experience with their home insurance for over 10 years.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sabrina Brogren
user_reviews_extended.Description: I recently started a policy with State Farm and had lots of questions. Kelly was super helpful with getting things set up for me (after I messed up some things online), and was very nice as well! She got back to me in a timely manner with my updated policy so I could send it to my landlord ASAP.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Justin Bloch
user_reviews_extended.Description: Both Jake and Kelly are quick to respond with all insurance questions…autos, motorcycles & house!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Enzo Lombard
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have used Dave Stewart's State Farm for 21 years, since first forming our business, for both business and renters including liability and have never ONCE had anything REMOTELY negative to say.  Fantastic prices, great service, flexible, informed, patient (God knows I'd never get a five star as a client cuz I'm all over the place, so I'm not the easiest) and we've never once considered even looking into any other option.

user_reviews_extended.Name: p wisnyi
user_reviews_extended.Description:
dave and jake's state farm insurance group is really the best.
all of his employees are very nice, very well informed, and always very helpful. it is a pleasure doing business with this group of very knowledgeable agents. you will not find a more helpful courteous group of people.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Melissa Yuan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kelly Madril has been incredibly helpful and friendly while helping me in the moving process from Georgia to California, especially when in short of support from her colleagues. No wonder why Dave and Jake Stewart has obtained so much positive feedback. Much appreciated, Kelly!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Justin S
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve used this office for the last 8 years and have nothing but the best to say about this team.  They are absolutely amazing.  I always get a holiday card and who else can say they have Jake from State Farm as their agent!  Keep up the great customer service!

user_reviews_extended.Name: gennavie novella
user_reviews_extended.Description: Thank you to Crystal Escalera for your kindness and patience during the entire process of getting my whole life set up. You have made the experience easy and simple to understand. Thanks to you my home, life, and car are covered. I highly recommend her to all of my friends and family.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Holly Fitz
user_reviews_extended.Description: Excellent customer service, user friendly app, claims are easy to submit, fast turnaround time and happy with the results. Dave, Jake and their team are very responsive and helpful, highly recommend!  Thank you for everything, I’ll be a life long customer.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Roberto Aimi
user_reviews_extended.Description: Dani Raye-Schmuck has been incredibly helpful with our homeowners insurance.  She did a great job of explaining the options and making sure the paperwork was flowing to the right places.  Post-closing she helped us with some more tricky detail questions.  Highly recommended!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alex Ramirez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Our business has been working with they’re team for years now and our agent Amy is the BEST. Always goes the extra mile for us and is really quick to get back to us. We know she reflects the absolute best of her fellow colleagues.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Keyvan Berenjian
user_reviews_extended.Description: Working with Jake has not only better educated me on home and auto insurance, it's empowered me to make informed decisions about my coverage and not feel in the dark anymore. They really care about their client's needs and take the time to understand them before making recommendations.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Derik Poquiz
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love the care and personal touch Jake Stewart's staff provides.  Life gets busy and they're always there to assist when I need it.  While many premium insurance brands have similar rates and policies - I'm still with State Farm because of Jake Stewart's staff!

user_reviews_extended.Name: marlis bruns
user_reviews_extended.Description: Amy - who is the engine of this office IMHO - is wonderful. We have been with this office for years - and Amy is responsive, kind, patient and knowledgeable. She knows her job and does it well. I’m never left on hold and my emails are answered fast. She’s a gem!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dave Bonaccorso
user_reviews_extended.Description: Long time customer with many policies.  Jake's office does a great job and State Farm has taken good care of us over the years.  I strongly endorse this agency!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Greg Hart
user_reviews_extended.Description: Dawn quickly helped me resolve my transfer issue, and was very pleasant and professional.  She's an awesome rep for the company and gives GREAT customer service!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Javin
user_reviews_extended.Description: Dani provided great customer service helping me with a property I had sold, which was not even insured with her office. She went above and beyond to locate the policy, the agent that was handling it, and get it retroactively canceled. It was a pleasure to work with her and my needs were taken care of seamlessly.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tina Pak
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've had the pleasure of working with Dawn in transferring my auto insurance from a different state to California as well as getting renters insurance and I very much appreciate her kindness and professionalism. I highly recommend this office to everyone!

user_reviews_extended.Description: Nayeli was quick to respond to my emails and also very easy to talk to over the phone! She helped answer all the questions I had about the insurance proposal she had provided. I hope their service is just as great if things go awry and we need to make claims!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brithania Alvarado
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kelly helped me getting life insurance. She has great, amazing, friendly, and enthusiastic attitude! Definitely recommend! Won’t leave you waiting at all for a response!

user_reviews_extended.Name: William Morin
user_reviews_extended.Description: Every time I've contacted the wonderful people at this office, I've gotten courteous, efficient service. user_reviews_extended.Name: Valerie Barntsen
user_reviews_extended.Description: Each and everyone of the agents are courteous, always helpful and friendly as well as answering questions as soon as they can! user_reviews_extended.Description: Excellent service from Kelly. She helped me understand the components of renters insurance and helped me pick the best option for me. She was quick to respond to email and phone, making getting insurance a painless experience.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joshua Burket
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jake and his team at State Farm have always been incredibly helpful and responsive to any and all of my questions. We hold several accounts through their branch and have never been any less than 100% satisfied with the service we have received.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Zimian Huang
user_reviews_extended.Description: Everyone who picks up the phone at Jake Stewart State Farm Office is courteous, helpful and efficient. I have been very happy with their service for the past 5years. Keep up the good work guys!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Claudia Cowan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jake has handled my home and auto insurance needs for more than a decade. He and his staff are consistently friendly and helpful. I can't recommend their office highly enough.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marnette Ellenbrook

user_reviews_extended.Name: Samuel Koch

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ryan Klafuric

Thanks for making this process quick and easy Anne :)

user_reviews_extended.Description: We have worked with Jake Stewart on home, vehicle, rental property, and business insurance policies. We have found Jake to be honest and insightful. His staff is very friendly and responsive as well. We fully recommend working with their office.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nancy Shanahan

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brian W

I will recommend State Farm insurance to anyone that needs insurance

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cindy Fassler
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Jessica Rider
During this  difficult time when you rarely get a live person to help you. Once you do  get a live person   they have an attitude that they are doing you a favor by talking to you.  That was not my experience with Jessica Rider.
I had a situation with State Farm Bank that I was not able to get any resolution with them. I called Jessica and told her what had happened.  She went the EXTRA mile  researched my problem and felt my frustration first hand. Jessica was able to find out what happened and gave me a solution to rectify  my problem with State Farm Bank.  ( I would never go to State Farm Bank again)
Jessica was pleasant,  calm and was a pleasure  to work with. She is a GEM!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tara H

user_reviews_extended.Name: Julie Miller
user_reviews_extended.Description: I highly recommend this State Farm team! I am grateful to have worked with them for so many years on home, auto, umbrella and rental property insurance. They are consummate professionals and kind human beings. They are experts in their field and explain insurance policy nuances and fine print in simple terms the layperson can easily understand. They been extremely helpful in educating me on the trends and changes in the insurance industry in both California and nationwide. Everyone in the office is helpful. When call, I don’t have to wait to talk with my account representative to receive answers - all the agents and support team members are able to help me. user_reviews.Name: Venetia
user_reviews.Description: Richard Villanueva at Greenspan Co. Adjusters Intl. is exceptional. I had an excellent experience working with him. He is incredibly thorough, detail-oriented, and was consistently professional throughout the entire process. He handled everything with care and precision and took the time to explain everything clearly and ensured nothing was overlooked. His communication is out of this world. He’s focused, no nonsense, and does NOT miss the mark. It was a complete blessing to meet him. I highly recommend him to anyone looking for a reliable and effective loss adjuster. A true champion.

user_reviews.Name: Dale M
user_reviews.Description: Not a good experience. They dropped the ball on far too many things, left us hanging, the inventory process after house fire was a complete disaster. Daniel, I think was his name, rummaged through items we clearly and specifically told him not to touch and that we were keeping and literally piled everything in a horrible broken mess mixed in with damaged, unsalvageable items. Nightmare. Artwork put aside was damaged, frames and glass broken, etc. I would not recommend Greenspan due to my personal experience with them. Some adjusters are certainly better than others, but we went through two and still very unhappy. Losing our home and everything in it is bad enough, but paying a huge amount of money to continue to suffer is too painful.

user_reviews.Name: Fred kaviani
user_reviews.Description: My experience with Greenspan company was PERFECT.  Tony spent over half an hour of his time guiding me about my options.   Although his company does not specialize in this line of work.  He took my problem to heart and liked a true professional.

user_reviews.Name: 01sshannon
user_reviews.Description:
My family could not be happier that we found and had Greenspan represent us after we lost our home in a wildfire. We suffered a complete loss and after a few days of getting the run around from the insurance company, we realized the claim process would not be easy or fair and that representation was in our best interest. Greenspan worked diligently with my family to complete a fair claim which eventually far exceeded what we would have received on our own.

My wife calls them a "blessing" and we both agree that we would hire them every time, even if it we went through that tragedy a hundred times over. The representation and communication that comes from using Greenspan to represent you in your claim is an invaluable asset. The cost it takes to hire them is far less than what your insurance company won't pay you by the end of your claim. From my experience, the insurance companies put on a good face in the beginning, acting as though they only want to help you. You will soon realize that is not the case as they begin depreciating your property and making excuses why they don't have to pay certain expenses.

Do yourself and your family a favor, hire Greenspan to help you put your life back together. I know many fire victims that are personal friends whom wish they would have listened to this advice.

We have been with Jessica Liu insurance many years and we are greatly impressed and happy of the most amazing customers service they provide for us. user_reviews.Name: James Gregory Mitchell
user_reviews.Description:
Outstanding Service from Jessica Liu Insurance Services!

We’ve entrusted Jessica Liu Insurance Services with both our home and business insurance, and we couldn’t be more satisfied.

Last year, during the renewal of our home insurance, my wife mistakenly checked a box indicating that we use space heaters, thinking it applied to portable electric heaters. Shortly after, we received a letter from the insurance company stating they couldn’t renew our policy due to this detail.

Panicked, we reached out to Jessica Liu Insurance Services to explain the situation. Their team was incredible—they listened to our concerns, understood the misunderstanding, and worked tirelessly to advocate on our behalf. They convinced the insurer that it was an honest oversight, and as a result, we were able to keep our home insurance with the same rate.

The professionalism, dedication, and expertise Jessica Liu and her team displayed were exceptional. They went above and beyond to resolve what felt like an impossible situation.

We wholeheartedly recommend Jessica Liu Insurance Services to anyone looking for reliable and personalized insurance support. Thank you, Jessica Liu and team, for your outstanding service!

user_reviews.Name: Fernando Rigonan
user_reviews.Description:
I highly recommend Jessica Liu Insurance Services! I reached out to them on December 18 for a quote on building insurance for a property that had been uninsured for years and is currently in probate. They immediately started working on it, even during the busy holiday season. By December 26, I had a detailed quote, and they took the time to call me and explain everything thoroughly.

They were incredibly helpful, professional, and honest throughout the entire process. I finalized and signed everything today, and I’m impressed with how efficient and dedicated they were, even with the Christmas holiday in the middle of it all.

If you’re looking for an insurance provider that is fast, reliable, and trustworthy, Jessica Liu Insurance Services is the one to choose!
