We had a great experience with Jessica and Xylia. Allstate kept jacking up our premiums without notice (literally told us "we don't have to give any reasons" when we called) to a point where we were paying almost double at the end 2024 than at the beginning of the year.

Came to Jessica Liu Insurance Services since we wanted to support a local business and they seemed to have great reviews on Google. Really glad we did because with Xylia and Jessica's help, we were able to slash our premiums literally 56% of what they were AND our coverage was even more comprehensive and our deductibles lower. The turnaround was so fast -- from walking in, filling out the forms, and having quotes by the next day.

They made the process so easy and seamless. Definitely recommend giving them a try if you're fed up with dealing with your car insurance companies. They also help with other forms of insurance (like renter's) as well.

I recently had the pleasure of working with JLIS for my business insurance needs, and I am thoroughly impressed with the level of service and expertise I received.

I must also highlight the professionalism and responsiveness of Sweedie at JLIS. Whether it was via phone calls or emails, they always made themselves available to address any concerns or queries I had, ensuring that I felt valued as a client.

In conclusion, I wholeheartedly recommend JLIS and Jessica to any business owner seeking top-notch insurance brokerage services. Their expertise, personalized approach, and unwavering commitment to client satisfaction make them an invaluable partner in navigating the complex world of business insurance. Working with JLIS has provided me with peace of mind, knowing that my business is well-protected.

user_reviews_extended.Description: I highly recommend Jessica and Xylia who wrote me a homeowner policy last year. My locked mortgage rate would expire in 1 hour, and I was prepared to pay $100+ to extend it, then came Jessica to put out the fire. She and Xylia quickly wrote me a policy (in less than 20 minutes!!!), and we were able to get the loan funded on time. Phew! I am very impressed with their professionalism and attentiveness. user_reviews_extended.Name: Gary Qiu
user_reviews_extended.Description: Vinna have definitely gone out of her way to help me. My family used Farmers for years, and their premium keeps increasing. I asked my friends and a lot of them were using Safeco. Was then referred to Vinna at Jessica Liu Insurance for a quote. I work 9-5, so Vinna called me after hours for the whole process. Am so glad that I called because Vinna not only save me money, she also explained each and every coverage to me in details. So, I know what is being cover and what not. Vinna quoted me 4  different insurance companies; Traveler, Mercury, Progressive and Safeco and we end up choose Safeco. Vinna also gave me a follow up call in 2 weeks to ensure ID cards have arrived, and the old policies are cancel. This is the kind of sales and services I always appreciate. Thanks Vinna!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Hmb Accounting
user_reviews_extended.Description:
By profession, I am an accountant, I meet a great numbers of insurance practices. Jessica Liu Insurance Services is the best insurance practice I have encounter. That's why I choose to do business with Jessica.

Instead of just having my firm's insurance needs covered by Jessica. Whenever a client of mine has the need of insurance, she's the person I turn to. All of my clients said amazing things about Jessica and her team. My clients always tell me that "They are great! Her team is very professional and friendly!"

From my experience working with Jessica. Jessica and her team are so responsive, whenever I or my client reaches out to them, an almost immediate respond from them.

Also, it is almost unbelievable how competitive the rates they quoted are.

All things are great with her practice and the most admirable aspect of her practice is how much she and her team care about the appropriate coverage for client. Never quote excessive coverage that results in extra money spent or shortage in coverage that results in unprotected asset. Client's always first.

In modem days with countless individuals joining the insurance industry, it is hard to find honest practices like Jessica Liu Insurance.

I highly recommend everyone to visit their locations and experience the "nordstrom service" from best insurance practice in the bay area.

title: ESI Insurance Brokers
address: 2085 Van Ness Ave, San Francisco, CA 94109, United States
plus_code: QHVG+QF Pacific Heights, San Francisco, CA, USA

user_reviews.Name: John Tsai
user_reviews.Description:
I reached out to Igor recently because my rates with another insurance company went up significantly recently. He got back to me immediately. He got on the phone with me and gave me some quick quotes, but also educated me about the current state of homeowners insurance in California -- which is a mess. He was super up-to-date on the latest legislative and policy developments. He ended up recommending I stay where I was, and re-evaluate later once the homeowners insurance mess settles down. I really appreciated his time and the fact that he wasn't trying to sell me something that would have cost more or similar to what I have now.

If you need someone that you can trust, I definitely recommend Igor!

user_reviews.Name: Shay Tiziano
user_reviews.Description: Thank you so much for your help! They spent a lot of time with our case and were so kind and responsive. Really appreciated the solution-oriented and professional assistance. We worked with Daniel, who is knowledgeable and a true problem solver. My emails and calls were promptly answered, and they were always available to address any questions. I wholeheartedly recommend their services—they've earned my trust and my business for years to come. Thanks again!

user_reviews.Name: nelli korzhenkova
user_reviews.Description: My family has worked with Igor for over 20 years! He is very client focused and has always tailored the insurance to our needs! 15 years ago when we purchased our home he advised me to get a certain type of insurance coverage I never considered getting. I am very  grateful that he advised me to get it because the insurance came to be very valuable to us when we had issues with the property. It would have cost us a significant amount of money out of pocket but the insurance covered the payments. He has also insured all our cars which has great coverage and a good price!

user_reviews.Name: Kulali C Epwell
user_reviews.Description: Igor is the BEST. Any time we have an insurance question - for car or home - he is so quick to respond, finds us the best possible deal, and is no-nonsense. He lets us know exactly the information he needs and acts quickly. Insurance is super easy with him on our team. I can't recommend Igor and Express Service Insurance highly enough.

user_reviews.Name: Sarah Sherwood
user_reviews.Description: I went shopping for a homeowners policy when I was having trouble with my current insurance being unresponsive and dragging on months of not submitting our updated policy to our mortgage company. I was so HAPPY to work with Express Service Insurance. Daniel is always professional, responsive, reliable, and affordable. Lorie is fantastic about updating our mortgage every year. I have never had to ask for it. This team is fantastic, and I highly recommend them!

user_reviews.Description: I have been working with Igor for a few years. He's very quick to respond to any questions I have, and he always explains eveything with great detail. I really appreciate his responsiveness and attention to detail. I would highly recommend him for any and all insurance needs!

I highly recommend them as an insurance broker.

Finding a great insurance agent is incredibly challenging, but as a co-founder of a Silicon Valley–based B2B SaaS company, I can say firsthand how critical it is to have a knowledgeable and highly responsive insurance broker—especially when working with Fortune 500 customers that have complex and demanding insurance requirements.

Broad Spectrum Insurance has been outstanding to work with. They truly understand our business, respond quickly, and consistently source coverage that fits our needs precisely while fully satisfying our customers’ insurance requirements.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Samuel Geller
user_reviews_extended.Description: A few days ago I decided to look at my insurance bill that's been on auto pay for years. Turns out, my auto insurance hiked my premium for 4 cards by almost double what I was supposed to pay. Naturally, I needed to figure out what happened and contacted Dima at Broad Spectrum after a friend referred him. Within a few minutes of getting my current premiums and contracts, Dima was able to figure out the problem and correct my policy. I was using the same insurance company for auto insurance, home insurance, home owners insurance for a rental property, umbrella and professional liability insurance for my business. I ended up switching everything over to Broad Spectrum and stopped getting ripped off. For what it's worth, the best part is that now I can contact someone directly and I know someone is looking out of for me to make sure I get good coverage and not get ripped off the in process.

Talk about hassle free service! I can't recommend Broad Spectrum Insurance enough!

user_reviews_extended.Description:

Dmitriy took the time to thoroughly educate me on the various coverages I needed, ensuring I was fully informed and confident in my decisions. He explained everything in a clear and concise manner, making what could have been a complex and overwhelming process feel straightforward and manageable.

What stood out the most was Dmitriy's dedication to customer service. He was always available to answer my questions, promptly returning calls and emails. user_reviews_extended.Name: Vlad Cood
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ive been in show-business and have owned/operated dozens of entertainment venues and produced thousands of special events over the past 40 years.   over the decades, Ive worked with numerous brokers, and each one was a great relationship, including my last broker that I was with for 2 decades till she retired.   And as a creature of habit it was hard to leave her, but when I had no choice, I went directly to Broad Spectrum due to their solid industry reputation, and ive never felt as comfortable, as informed, and as secure in coverage as I am now that Ive been working with their highly knowledgeable and informative staff.   Every year when my policy is up for renewal, the shop for the best rates and resubmit to many other carriers to ensure I'm getting the best possible deal.   They don't just make excuses as to why I need to pay more, they shop opportunities to figure out how I can pay less, because their commitment is to me, their client, not to their transient carriers... but to those that matter... the business.    I highly recommend you make the move now if you're on the fence and stuck in your comfort zone the way I was.   I only wish Id made the switch sooner.

Broad Spectrum is a one-stop shop for all your insurance needs.  They truly treat their customers like family and are always quick to respond to any questions or requests. user_reviews.Name: Esther Lee
user_reviews.Description: Geoff Herman (formerly Irene Herman Insurance) has provided my business liability insurance needs since 2011.  He is professional and always responds promptly to accommodate  varying circumstances in my business.  My policy just came up for renewal with a startling increase in premium.  Like so many others, my thriving business has dwindled since 2020.  I was actually considering cancelling insurance and closing up business.  I called Geoff yesterday with my dilemma.  Geoff called me at 9-ish this morning with the name of my new liability insurance carrier at less than 40% of my old policy!!  Call Geoff..you will be glad you did!!

user_reviews.Name: Wes Leslie
user_reviews.Description: Christine has been a great help for our company's workers comp plan, and advocates for us to get the best rates and coverage possible. Thank you!

user_reviews.Name: Olga
user_reviews.Description: I've been with Riskguard for years and I am very happy with the level of consistent service that has been provided. I've purchased insurance policies for both my home and business through Riskguard.  Everyone I've worked with is professional, courteous and works diligently to provide the best service. The people are the best here and it's why I continue to do business with them. Could not recommend more!

user_reviews.Name: Simon Redmond
user_reviews.Description:
This is a very long overdue review for Riskguard as I have been a client of theirs for over 20 years!

Home insurance, family health insurance, Business liability and workers comp policies - Riskguard have got me covered in all of them.

And it's really a pleasure to still see a family run operation thriving in SF these days. Geoff, Christine, Kelson and the whole Riskguard team are all absolutely amazingly helpful. I really enjoy working with them, because not only do offer excellent customer service (they shop around to get their clients the best possible coverage at the best possible pricing) - they actually go above and beyond and make my family feel like part of their family.

They pick up the phone (what a novel concept!) and answer your questions right away, they will call or email your insurance carrier on your behalf if you have any issues - the team are just incredibly helpful.

It's a side of business that sadly is lacking from many companies these days.

As said I've been with them 20 years - shame on me for not writing about them sooner - I plan on being with them for another 20 plus!

Thanks Geoff, Christine and Kelson and all!

user_reviews.Name: Eric Olson
user_reviews.Description: I've worked with Riskguard for over 13 years and they've always been fantastic for all of my insurance needs!  They are amazing, responsive, friendly, and I highly recommend them to anyone needing an insurance broker.

user_reviews.Name: Art Simon
user_reviews.Description: Excellent customer service for an umbrella policy. I contacted Riskguard via email and they got back to me in a couple of hours. We sent a half dozen emails back and forth clarifying details. Kelson provided quotes for 2 different companies and I purchased my policy that day. I had contacted many agents previously and most never got back to me. The ones that did were more expensive or only offered umbrella coverage to existing customers. I'll recommend Riskguard and Kelson for purchasing umbrella insurance to anyone who asks! Thank you!

user_reviews.Name: robert goddard
user_reviews.Description: Recently the company that insured our building in SF notified us that they were cancelling our insurance. I was referred to Geoff Herman at Riskguard Insurance Solutions and our journey began. He was very knowledgeable in our building ownership structure and guided me through the complete long and complicated process. He was available for questions constantly along with revisions to the policy possibilities as they were requested by our ownership group. As I said to him in our last conversation when our insurance was finalized, I would highly recommend him and his team. Thanks Geoff! it was a pleasure!

user_reviews.Name: Kate Ellis-Hill
user_reviews.Description: We found Kelson Herman at Riskguard when our realtor's insurance agent fell through, and we were in a big time crunch just as a lot of insurers were pulling out of California. We were worried about facing delays in closing or other obstacles, but as soon as we got in touch with Kelson everything went extremely smoothly and quickly. He is responsive, thorough, knowledgeable and gave us good options and information to help us make the best decision. Our entire homebuying process because smoother and better as soon as we got in touch with him. Highly recommend Riskguard for your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Calvin Hom
user_reviews_extended.Description: Riskguard is a one stop shop for all your insurance needs. They are a family owned company whom I've known for years. Kelson helped me find a great rate on auto and homeowners insurance and helped explain all the different types of coverages. I worked with Irene on life insurance. She took the time to come over to my home and presented different options and help us decide on a coverage that made the best sense for our family. Both Kelson and Irene were very responsive and answered all my questions.  I would highly recommend Riskguard to all my friends and family.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Andrea Jesse
user_reviews_extended.Description: This place caused me to drive without insurance for two months   My car registration was due.  I sent in my payment, but the DMV said they had no proof of insurance.  I checked my card and, sure enough, it had expired months before.  When I called Riskguard Insurance Solutions, they said they had sent me a renewal notice, but never heard from me.  This is a lie.  I never received a notice from them.  Irene Herman never returned my calls.  I was polite on the phone with her associates.  That got me nowhere.  They have behaved recklessly and irresponsibly.  I am glad to have the opportunity to publicly shame these people.  If you are driving uninsured (which is against the law), that's your tough luck.  Your insurance agent doesn't care if you are with Riskguard Insurance Solutions.

user_reviews_extended.Name: soe lwin
user_reviews_extended.Description: They provide an excellent insurance service in the Bay Area. Iris helped me to find the great insurance for my automobile. She explained all the detail about the coverage and the things I need to know. She has been helping me for three years and I have a positive experience with her. So, I highly recommend Riskguard to all of you.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael Grippi McQuaid
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I had a very positive experience working with Matt Gray.  I needed business insurance for my IT company and had called around to a few different places.  After wasting my time for a couple days with people who didn't know what they were talking about, I found Matt.  24 hours later, my company is bound and insured with a policy that meets my needs.

Highly recommend.

user_reviews.Name: Roberto Guerrero
user_reviews.Description:
Had an amazing experience with John regarding assisting me with my drivers license and proof of insurance.  I called John and he was able to assist me and reassure me that my issue would be resolved.

John was very pleasant and was able to wal me though a process I wasn’t familiar with in obtaining the documentation and insurance needed.

Great to have a friendly neighborhood business still providing service for the community.

Highly recommend John to everyone.

user_reviews.Name: Alex Duran
user_reviews.Description: I’ve known John Morton  for about 10 years. He is extremely professional on all his work and delivers results right away. When I say right away, I really mean it. Never procrastinates on his work, you can count on him 100% of the time. He is always available to our calls. The most important is that John is just a great and fun person to be around.

user_reviews.Name: molly watson
user_reviews.Description: John is THE BEST. Friendly, trustworthy, and truly works hard for your business and for your needs. I've been with him for years and plan to keep it that way as long as he's in the business. I very highly recommend giving him a call for all your insurance needs.

user_reviews.Name: john templeman
user_reviews.Description: John Morton has been my go-to insurer for decades.  Any problems or issues have been immediately addressed and satisfied.  He is very smart, informed,  and focused; yet witty and personable.  Would that all my business contacts were this professional!

user_reviews.Name: R. Paul McCloskey
user_reviews.Description: The cast and crew of John Morton are the best I've ever dealt with in my 48 years of driving. Their friendly professionalism is topped only by the quality off their service. Is in and out in less than 27 minutes. At my age I'm keen on timev so that's important to me. Not only that but Gabriela is smokin' hot.

user_reviews.Name: John Templeman
user_reviews.Description:
Even though I was his first motorcycle customer on some glitchy new software, John  soldiered on, and got me a policy at an affordable price for an older bike (2004).
I've been with him for 30 or 40 years of inciteful, diligent, and above all, intelligent, insurance stuff. The man's an insurance beacon, and a fine human being.

user_reviews.Name: Mo Davis
user_reviews.Description:
I called looking for a new policy and John answered himself!  Not only that but at the end of the call he suggested I add my new car to my current policy which saved me a ton but made him nothing which says a lot. I suggest anyone who’s looking to change give him a call

Morgan.

user_reviews.Name: Chi Hieu Nguyen
user_reviews.Description: I had trouble getting insurance for my rental house from another agency. Then I called Robert E Kenedy  . Within short time my house has insurance from Robert Kennedy Insurance agency . ! And after that my daughter ( Anh Thy Truong) bought new house and had insurance from Robert Kennedy agency too . So happy and highly recommended 😂👍🏻

user_reviews.Name: M P
user_reviews.Description: Robert Kennedy Insurance has been a friendly and efficient broker for our needs. We began our relationship last year during a stressful time of closing on a condo and having to switch insurance carriers because our current one ceased writing new policies in CA. Angie was amazing in getting all of our personal policies moved over to a new insurer and, later on, we worked with Robert who was also amazing when it finally came time to do the same for our business policies. What an awesome team and I'm glad to have their help during these tough insurance times.

user_reviews.Name: FNL
user_reviews.Description: Amazing service. Needed an office insurance ASAP as we were moving to a new business location and my insurance company was not able to transfer our policy even thought the new and old offices were in the same building. I contacted Robert and Amy and they assisted us to get the a new policy on time. They even coordinated with the building management throughout the process and showed proof we were in compliance with the insurance requirements and able to move in. Highly recommended insurance agency.

user_reviews.Name: Mikey Sheahan
user_reviews.Description: After trying to obtain a liability umbrella policy for multiple rental properties over a two year period, Robert Kennedy was able to instate a policy within a few weeks of supplying him all the information.  As always, be sure you submit your requests with detailed supporting documentation.  Thank you, Robert!

user_reviews.Name: yvonne fong
user_reviews.Description: I have a great experience with this Insurance Company.  A Few months ago that we got a notices that the State Farm Insurance will no longer extended our policy for properties more than 3 units.   However, they are nice enough to recommended us to a few insurance agents that maybe able to help us.  We check out all three Insurance Agent.  Robert is very helpful and immediately, he got a quote and we were able get a policy for our properties.  We are greatly appreciated for his help.  I will defiantly recommend him to my friends.

user_reviews.Name: Jeannie Lim
user_reviews.Description: Mr. Kennedy was very prompt in answering my questions throughout the entire process.  I needed to secure a new fire insurance policy when my old company informed that they would not renew my policy.  He was quick to recommended two insurance companies for me to review, promptly and patiently answered my many questions.  His office staff is very courteous, efficient, and quick to follow-up with me so the process went smoothly.  I highly recommend this insurance agency.

user_reviews.Name: Kristin Scagliotti
user_reviews.Description: I have been working with Robert E. Kennedy Insurance for many years now and I have been incredibly happy!  They are knowledgeable, respond quickly and very professional.  I know that I am in good hands with Robert E.Kennedy Insurance!

user_reviews.Name: Ellen McLean
user_reviews.Description: Robert Kennedy really came through for us in helping to find an insurance policy for our 3 unit Condo building in San Francisco.  Our previous insurance carrier did not renew our policy because they are downsizing their exposure in California by no longer insuring older buildings.  I contacted several insurance brokers/agents but Robert was the only one who responded quickly and successfully found us acceptable coverage for our HOA.    He was easy to work with and I feel that I will be in good hands if we ever have a claim.

user_reviews_extended.Description: I have a great experience with this Insurance Company.  A Few months ago that we got a notices that the State Farm Insurance will no longer extended our policy for properties more than 3 units.   However, they are nice enough to recommended us to a few insurance agents that maybe able to help us.  We check out all three Insurance Agent.  Robert is very helpful and immediately, he got a quote and we were able get a policy for our properties.  We are greatly appreciated for his help.  I will defiantly recommend him to my friends.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jeannie Lim
user_reviews_extended.Description: Mr. Kennedy was very prompt in answering my questions throughout the entire process.  I needed to secure a new fire insurance policy when my old company informed that they would not renew my policy.  He was quick to recommended two insurance companies for me to review, promptly and patiently answered my many questions.  His office staff is very courteous, efficient, and quick to follow-up with me so the process went smoothly.  I highly recommend this insurance agency.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kristin Scagliotti
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been working with Robert E. Kennedy Insurance for many years now and I have been incredibly happy!  They are knowledgeable, respond quickly and very professional.  I know that I am in good hands with Robert E.Kennedy Insurance!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ellen McLean
user_reviews_extended.Description: Robert Kennedy really came through for us in helping to find an insurance policy for our 3 unit Condo building in San Francisco.  Our previous insurance carrier did not renew our policy because they are downsizing their exposure in California by no longer insuring older buildings.  I contacted several insurance brokers/agents but Robert was the only one who responded quickly and successfully found us acceptable coverage for our HOA.    He was easy to work with and I feel that I will be in good hands if we ever have a claim.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Donna Schumacher
user_reviews_extended.Description: Robert Kennedy Insurance has been my agent for many many years!  I love that i can trust them to jump in and fill my insurance needs quickly, and with my best interest in mind.  From my recently stolen iphone, to my most recent quick auto policy so i could pick up my new car, they have always come through for me with a smile.  Well done!  A big Thank you Robert and the gang.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Steven Lewis
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have relied on Kennedy Insurance services for over 15 years.  Robert Kennedy and others have always been available, quick and diligent with respect to getting the right insurance at the best price.  I have always been able to get whatever level of service or explanation I need over the years.  I recommend them without reservation if you want the job done well and efficiently.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ramon David Zaniba
user_reviews_extended.Description: Working with Robert Kennedy was a pleasure. During our first interaction, he anticipated everything that I needed and delivered on everything, just as he said he would - in only one day. I am happy that I found someone whom I trust to represent me from now into the future.

user_reviews_extended.Name: linda scharg
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very efficient and quickly quoted and procured Homeowners Insurance at a good rate. Both Robert and his Co worker were respectful and insured me in a timely manner.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marina G
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great service.  Robert did a lot of research and was able to locate for me the insurance package that was reasonable and appropriate.  He is also was always available and willing to answer all the questions that I had.   In fact, I reached out to many insurance brokers and Robert was the ONLY one who came back to me with most reasonable coverage that was specific for my situations and he guided me through all the way.  Highly recommended.

user_reviews_extended.Name: jerry marymont
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve used Kennedy insurance for over 10 years. They gave me the best rates for all my insurance needs: personal, business, auto, home umbrella etc. and they’re always there to guide me whenever I had an insurance question. Excellent customer service…thanks Robert and your team

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ramon Marquez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Robert Kennedy,Helped me and my wife find Homeowner and Auto Insurance  better coverage. He was very professional. Whenever we had questions he responded promptly.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kenny Walker
user_reviews_extended.Description: Robert has been my insurance guy for 14 years. My business has grown and he has helped me along . I appreciate how easy it is to get things done and answer questions quickly. I'm grateful to have him and his great staff! Couldn't be happier. :-)

user_reviews_extended.Name: Seamus McDonagh
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have been a very grateful customer of Robert E Kennedy insurance for over 23 years. They have guided and advised me in many difficult situations and I’ve always benefited greatly from their experience. I recommend them and consider them to the best in the business.
Seamus McDonagh

user_reviews_extended.Name: William Morrissey
user_reviews_extended.Description: Agency and specifically Amy worked with me and secured flexibility on remedial sidewalk repair required by insurer due to delayed SF permit issuance. Great service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nicole Minor
user_reviews_extended.Description:

I would recommend them to anyone needing insurance.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Pierre Grenier
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kennedy insurance is very responsive to my questions and requests.  Also they are very knowledgeable about the marketplace and has became a go-to for insurance advices.

user_reviews_extended.Name: James Michel
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have trusted Robert E. Kennedy Insurance Agency with my family's insurance for at least twenty years now.  I have found that it is well worth it to use an agent for insurance issues, and Robert E. Kennedy's office provides expert advice and guidance.

user_reviews_extended.Description: Kennedy Insurance went the extra mile and helped us get coverage when other insurance companies just weren't willing to help us work through the complexities of our coverage needs. I highly recommend Robert and team.

user_reviews_extended.Description:
This company sold me a fraudulent auto policy that didn't cover the things they said it would. They refused to take responsibility for it. I am making a complaint to the relevant authorities.

Very unsatisfied!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Yana Nur
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very good experience! Robert help me with the information regarding the home insurance and the process went very smooth. I highly recommend Robert Kennedy Jr. company!

user_reviews_extended.Description: I could not be happier with the service i get from Robert.   He is always available (a lot of times after hours and weekends), very responsive and knowledgeable.   I really appreciate hi work and i have recommended him to friends,

user_reviews_extended.Description: Robert was able to get me a great low rate on my insurance. He is very professional and personable. Highly recommended!

user_reviews_extended.Name: gene fong
user_reviews_extended.Description: Fast and attentive service with competitive pricing, it's reassuring to have Robert in these crazy times of trying to obtain insurance.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sasha Waniewski
user_reviews_extended.Description: Robert E Kennedy helped us find insurance coverage for a unique situation when no one else could. They are kind and professional and I would recommend them to anyone.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Paula Mc Cabe
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kennedy Insurance have been great to work with - quick, helpful and affordable! Very happy with their work.

user_reviews_extended.Name: William Ho

user_reviews_extended.Name: tom difrancesco
user_reviews_extended.Description: They do a great job and saved us money on our fire policy.  Very responsive.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mat Gilbert
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very prompt and effective responses to all my policy updates, certificates of insurance, etc... I wouldn't work with anybody else.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Denise Matlow
user_reviews_extended.Description: Our questions are always answered quickly and completely.  We know that the rates are fair for all of the coverage we have.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Darlene Hill
user_reviews_extended.Description: They have been my insurance company for decades and are very responsive to all my inquiries.

title: Wang Insurance
address: 2620 Judah St, San Francisco, CA 94122, United States
plus_code: QG65+GW Outer Sunset, San Francisco, CA, USA

user_reviews.Name: David Corrie Jr.
user_reviews.Description:
I had an excellent experience working with Tiffany Wang and her insurance company. As this is my first business venture, I had a lot of questions, and Tiffany made the entire process incredibly smooth and stress-free. She went above and beyond to make sure I understood everything and felt confident in my coverage.

Not only was she extremely responsive and professional, but she also provided a very competitive rate that fit my budget. I truly appreciate her attention to detail and willingness to accommodate my specific needs.

I will definitely be using her services again in the future and highly recommend her to anyone looking for reliable and knowledgeable insurance support!

user_reviews.Name: A.J. Nakphong
user_reviews.Description:
Great service, great price.

We always received great services from Wang Insurance. We got our auto and home insurance from them. All staff are nice and kind. Recently, I also got commercial insurance from Wang Insurance. Shawn helped me through the whole process. The price is very good. Highly recommend.

user_reviews.Name: Carrie Leung
user_reviews.Description: Amazingly friendly, supportive, and communicative every step of the way. Our micro nonprofit experienced a billing issue that affected the funding of our programs and they made sure we got our refund. Thank you!

user_reviews.Name: Sha Yu
user_reviews.Description: I have been working with Sharon for years. She is very knowledgeable, professional and patient. She is definitely my go-to person for any insurance needs.

user_reviews.Name: Chris Alvarado
user_reviews.Description: We were looking for general insurance for my business. We were recommended by a friend. excellent customer service Tiffany Wang thank you so much for the help. five stars in my book.

user_reviews.Name: Connor Skelly
user_reviews.Description:
We are so happy we've switched over to Cyn and her team at Wang Insurance! I'm the COO at Perez Construction here in San Francisco, and we've switched our General Liability and Workers Comp insurance over to Wang.
They went above and beyond to get us quotes from multiple carriers and clearly explained the coverage, which can be confusing, given all our various exposures (multiple projects, 29 employees, etc.).
Insurance is a big line item for our business, and also can be confusing. We feel like we are in great hands with Wang Insurance. Thank you, Cyn and Team!

user_reviews.Description: We have a nonprofit sports team and Wang Insurance has helped us with all our insurance needs for the past two years.  They are super responsive and easy to work with!

user_reviews_extended.Description: Carleen did a great job getting us property insurance for our  home, which is owned by a Christian ministry. I contacted several agents, but she was the only one to get me affordable insurance during California's current insurance crisis.

user_reviews_extended.Description: Zoe Is amazing! I'm a ' high risk' insurance person in a 'high risk' state. Zoe got me insured for less than I was paying before!  She was so fast and kind such a fantastic experience🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

user_reviews_extended.Description: Carleen has been so proactive and patient in working with me through my insurance woes.  I would be so lost without her. Carleen is the only insurance agent I have ever worked with that cares to explain what's going on and what you actually need.  That type of honesty is rare in this industry.

user_reviews_extended.Name: John Zhong
user_reviews_extended.Description: 我上周五早上找到Shawn要为我的发廊买商业保险，他非常高效，下午5点下班前就完成了所有事情，而且保费很便宜，第二天我才能顺利和房东签约，非常感谢Shawn！

title: Traci Hollander - State Farm Insurance Agent
address: 556 Castro St, San Francisco, CA 94114, United States
plus_code: QH57+XW The Castro, San Francisco, CA, USA

owner.name: Traci Hollander - State Farm Insurance Agent (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Kuilani Robinson
user_reviews.Description: Heather at State Farm is absolutely fantastic! She's always super helpful, incredibly knowledgeable, and makes the whole insurance process so much easier to understand. I really appreciate her friendly and professional approach. Highly recommend!

user_reviews.Name: Nuno e Carmem
user_reviews.Description: I’ve been working with Eva Lee at State Farm for many years, and she has consistently been outstanding. Eva is extremely knowledgeable, responsive, and genuinely helpful whenever I have questions or need support. She’s always available, proactive, and makes complex insurance topics easy to understand. It’s rare to find an agent who combines professionalism with such a personal, trustworthy approach. I highly recommend Eva to anyone looking for a reliable and attentive insurance agent.

user_reviews.Name: elliekla
user_reviews.Description: I have been with State Farm/Traci Hollander for over 25 years, even after I moved out of SF. She and her team have consistently been helpful, friendly, and professional, personalizing my coverage according to my needs. Heather Love recently assisted me update insurance for a new car, and she made the process incredibly easy, providing me with individual and total costs before I could even ask. Heather has been a pleasure to work with, and I can't say enough good things about her and the entire office.

user_reviews.Name: Katie Olson
user_reviews.Description: Heather was the best! She broke down my coverage and exactly what I’m paying for. I even was able to get life insurance for less than $15 a month! Win win!

user_reviews.Name: June Hew
user_reviews.Description: I have been a customer of Traci Hollander State Farm and her dedicated team for a long time.  They continue to provide great customer service and prompt response time to my requests and questions.  Her team (Rocio & Dehlia) are great especially in my most recent inquiry.

user_reviews.Name: Ray C.
user_reviews.Description:
Great, just don’t expect white-glove service

I’ve been with them for a few years now. This office is better than most State Farm agents in the area. Expect some sales pressure from them from time to time, and you need to decide what’s right for you. They are usually well staffed and responsive if you have the right contact information. I tried to email a past agent from their office who I don’t know if they still work there or not because there was no email bounce back. Eventually, I emailed their main address and got Rocio to help me out. She helped replace a vehicle on my policy and she was professional to work with. She provided me as much detail as I needed and she is more responsive than most and not shy to take your question. She also tries to provide you the most accurate information. Thanks Rocio!

user_reviews.Name: John P
user_reviews.Description: Rocio from Traci Hollander's State Farm Insurance agency Is extremely knowledgeable and efficient. She answered all of our questions promptly and was able to help adjust our policy in very short order.

user_reviews.Name: Atsuko Williams
user_reviews.Description:
I was looking for a better car insurance rate since my existing premium kept going up every 6 months last three times.  I called State Farm office in my neighborhood and got in touch with Eva Lee.  She was very prompt providing me with the  information and the quote via email and it turned out to be less than my present rate for the next 6 months (saving of $120) and plus better coverage.

Eva is very pleasant to do business with, she will tell how many emails and when she'll be sending  them and she instructs what to do with them.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Matt A
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been working with Eva Lee for sometime now for my various insurance needs and I've been doing business with Traci's office for longer than I can remember! user_reviews_extended.Name: Glen Larson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Having property in a different state can be very hard if you don't usually know or are living in the same state 24/7. In search for an agent I came across Heather that was very well recommended by someone I trust. She made everything so simple and explain everything so well. Thank you for having so much patience with my wife and I. I will definitely recommend Heather and this branch to others.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Darrin Short
user_reviews_extended.Description: Eva Lee has helped me many times with auto, home, rental and other policies, often requiring a short turn around times.  She is always so helpful, thorough and responsive!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Victor Vazquez (Vic Vazquez)
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather was amazing! She was able to insure my property and gave me an amazing quote.  She also took the time to make sure everything was properly done and in order. Every time I had a question, she was there to answer and also made me feel like I could call her anytime.  If you are looking for a great insurance agent, don’t hesitate to call Heather.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kim T
user_reviews_extended.Description: Desy and Rosio were quick to respond to my requests and questions. They were both very professional and knowledgeable. I appreciated Rosio's insights into the insurance process and things that needed to be considered.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Amy Rees
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather Love at Traci Hollander's agency was simply a lifesaver for our Homeowners Association when we found ourselves in an unexpected administrative snafu. Our HOA's relationship with State Farm goes back more than 30 years, and today they were simply heroic for us! Personal service at its best!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tommy Cho
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I recently had some questions about my insurance policy and reached out to my agent Rocio Jimenez, and I couldn’t be happier with the help I received. They were knowledgeable, patient, and took the time to explain everything in a clear and easy-to-understand way.

What really stood out was how responsive and professional they were—no long waits, no confusion, just straightforward answers that gave me peace of mind. It's reassuring to know I have someone reliable I can count on when it comes to something as important as insurance.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joan Skinner
user_reviews_extended.Description: As a long time customer of State Farm I was pleased to see their high level of customer service continues! Had a number of questions regarding home owners insurance and Rocio Jimenez, Traci Hollander's operations manager, did an excellent job of answering my questions and providing me with follow-up information I needed. Truly an excellent team at this office.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Emily Guzzardi
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been with State Farm and Traci Hollander’s office for years, and recently I’ve needed to reach out for support more often. The office has been responsive and helpful when I've called, and it's so nice to have Rocio's consistency when I have called the office.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shay T.
user_reviews_extended.Description: Had an amazing experience getting car and life insurance for my move to California. Heather Love made everything quick, easy, and stress-free. Super helpful, professional, and got me great coverage at a great rate. Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kate DeWald
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had a great experience with Rocio. She was incredibly knowledgeable and responsive and she was able to help me get setup promptly. I would highly recommend Tracy and Rocio for all your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Vincent Dunlap
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a long standing customer with Traci Hollander - State Farm Insurance Agency Inc.  As the company (State Farm Insurance) moves more to an automated AI system, I found the staff especially Vincent Martini (Office Associate) extremely friendly, helpful and professional in assisting me file a recent claim and understanding the process.  Not all claims fit a "cookie cutter" process and he understood this. I was able to quickly schedule an in office  appointment due to the uniqueness of the accident reporting process.  Mr. Martini connected me to right State Farm staff personnel to handling my claim which greatly eased my anxiety.   His customer service skill are commendable and reflects most positively on the agency and company.  He made feel like  I was not just a number, but an appreciated customer.  As the world changes, I know that Traci Hollander's staff will take the time to maintain that human contact that identifies a great business.   Keep up the good work and you will always have my business.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dae Lee
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been with this team for well over 15 years and primarily because of the excellent and dependable service by agent Eva Eng who works with Traci. Eva is extremely knowledgeable and responds to any need I have in a very timely manner. She also explains things very clearly in lay-man's terms such that I come away feeling confident with her explanations which is why I have expanded my insurance needs beyond just car insurance. I trust her advice and look to her for guidance in all my insurance needs. I highly recommend Eva Eng for any of your insurance requirements.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sean Morgan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather Love is a top notch professional. She guided me through everything and was exceptional in answering any questions I had. Thank you for your help! I have been a customer of State Farm for 40 years and working with Heather the last couple days in transitioning my insurance needs has, once again, shown me why I stay. Well done.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jonathan Dolan
user_reviews_extended.Description: I needed to change up a few things on my coverage.  Eve Lee followed up with me promptly and guided me through the things I needed help with.  I have been with State Farm for many, many years, always satisfied.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Robert Hainer
user_reviews_extended.Description: Traci and her team, especially Rocio, provide excellent customer service. They communicate promptly and effectively whenever I need help with a policy issue.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Charles Piggee
user_reviews_extended.Description:
5 Stars Plus – Outstanding Service from Eva Lee at State Farm! Truly Fantastic on Purpose!
I recently had the absolute pleasure of working with Eva Lee at State Farm Insurance, and I must say, her service was nothing short of exceptional. From the moment I reached out, Eva demonstrated professionalism, efficiency, and a genuine commitment to my needs.

What stood out the most was her dedication to going above and beyond. She took the time to thoroughly explain every detail of my policy, ensuring I fully understood my coverage and options. Her responsiveness was remarkable—providing quick answers, clear communication, and a willingness to assist with any concerns I had.

It’s rare to find someone who combines outstanding customer service with real integrity, but Eva Lee does exactly that. She made me feel truly valued as a customer, and I greatly appreciate the fantastic, on-purpose service I received.

If you’re looking for reliable coverage and a dedicated agent who truly cares, I highly recommend Eva Lee at State Farm Insurance! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐+

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tracy Todd
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been with Traci Hollander's office for over 25 years.  They have handled all of my insurance needs - HOA, car, rental, life - you name it.  They are the best.  Eva, in particiular, has provided amazing customer support.  She is patient, thorough and incredibly responsive.  I can't recommend this office highly enough.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jennie Kajiko
user_reviews_extended.Description: I just bought a new car but am holding onto the old one for a month until my son can buy it from me.  Eva Lee worked with me and answered all my questions very quickly.  She took the extra effort to give me two quotes based on different deductibles and even offered to help my son with his insurance...such good service and a pleasure to work with!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rick Mason
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been with Traci Hollander's State Farm office for about 8 years now.  Always much more helpful than I had come to expect from other insurance companies--available and personal service.  A shout-out to Rocio for consistently responsive and smart help!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Laura D
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've used this office for years and have always received great service. Eva Lee is terrific - always responds quickly,  answers questions thoroughly,  a pleasure to work with.

user_reviews_extended.Name: BRendeysia THurston
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather Love provided exceptional service and helped me secure a great rate on life insurance to protect my family. She was knowledgeable, responsive, and a pleasure to work with throughout the entire process. I truly appreciate her dedication and support.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Will Stewart
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had a wonderful experience working with Eva Lee on a new auto policy! Super responsive, moved quickly, and a pleasure to speak with - made for a painless customer experience. Very lucky to have been connected with Eva!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rick clarke
user_reviews_extended.Description:
We have been with Traci Hollander for many years. This year we dealt with Eva Lee who was amazingly professional and helpful

It’s wonderful to work with suck a terrific office staff. We’re wonderfully happy with your service

Rick and Ann Clarke
San Rafael

user_reviews_extended.Name: amoniz1000
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather Love helped me with car insurance and i had the best phone call experience i think I have ever had with a over the phone representative! Heather was so nice, I would refer to anyone out there that needs car or life insurance she's just amazing!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: jeffrey pink
user_reviews_extended.Description: This agency goes the extra distance for their clients. Although Traci normally does not do health insurance she took the time to walk me through the best providers. Heather Love knows her game better than Jake and is available to answer your important insurance questions.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Carmen White
user_reviews_extended.Description: Desy Velazquez was helpful and courteous! She made sure I was able to update my documents in a timely manner!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michelle Clingan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather love did a terrific job helping me insure my car.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michele Worthington
user_reviews_extended.Description: This office insured me for both my home and car. I trust them to be honest, forthcoming and deliver which is what you need from your insurance company - not excuses nor the inability to be there when you call with questions. I highly recommend commend them if you live in California.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mark Robertson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Eva Lee was a terrific help in providing new competitive quotes for my insurance needs and subsequently getting new policies in place. She was always helpful, always patient, always responsive and a delight to work with. I'm happy to be a new client.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Erwin T
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I've worked with Traci Hollander's office for 10 years and it has been awesome. As I'm writing this review, I'm realizing that I have never stepped foot in that office, but have had multiple claims/quotes through phone and email. It's been great working with Traci's staff through the past decade.

My recent inquiry with Traci's office landed me in contact with Heather Love. Heather's excellent level of service compelled me to write a review. I had a last-minute request for car insurance, and before I knew it, I was fully setup. She couldn't have made it any easier! The communication was initially through email, then phone when the quote was being finalized. She also gave me some optional recommendations, which I appreciate.

Thanks to Heather Love and the staff out of the local Traci Hollander's office. This review was long overdue.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Angie Sticher
user_reviews_extended.Description: Traci acquired our accounts when our old agent retired and we have been very happy with our service since. Recently we had to increase coverage to add a new vehicle and had a great and seamless experience to get the best rate from Heather Love. Highly recommend this office for your State Farm needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dan Orseck
user_reviews_extended.Description: Traci and her team have helped me with home, auto and a bunch of other lines of coverage for years and have always been extremely helpful and responsive.  Diana Lima bailed me out of a tricky situation just yesterday!  Highly recommend.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tekla Helprin
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Alyssa!
She is a major asset to State Farm as an agent! She went the extra mile with her kind consideration and patience with any and all of my questions about my quote. So much so, that Ivebever been happier and felt so cared for with an auto insurance agent! And I must say, she along with her personalized Customer Service was the reason I signed up with State Farm for my new auto policy. She has a gift for truly listening to all of my concerns before I signed up.And til this day, is here for me at a moments call for any of my concerns no matter how small. She is an invaluable asset to State Farm! Thank you Alyssa from the bottom of my heart!
Tekla Helprin

user_reviews_extended.Name: LO BLOUSTEIN
user_reviews_extended.Description:
my partner and i have had excellent service on our auto policy with this san francisco agency. giving a special shout-out to Alyssa Anderson who is knowledgable, responsive and empathic.
thanks!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ann Marie Mellott
user_reviews_extended.Description: I Highly recommend this agency. I have been a State Farm customer for many years in a few states and this is the most knowledgeable, friendly, and efficient office by far! If you’re like me, you don’t understand all the insurance lingo. Heather Love cuts through the jargon and makes it easy to understand! She made sure I had the right coverage, looked for discounts, AND got me Life insurance! I’m telling you and all my friends to call Traci Hollander’s office for your insurance needs. You won’t be disappointed!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jim Moe
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a client of Traci's since 1995.  We have always received excellent and fast service from them, but this past week Eva was exceptional as we switched from State Farm to the CA Fair Plan.  I had procrastinated but when I finally got going, Eva got it all done for us in just a couple of days.  Eva is efficient and a joy to work with.

user_reviews_extended.Name: didier foulon
user_reviews_extended.Description: Thank you to Norma Michihira for her professionalism. She is always available to answer questions clearly and patiently. These files are well managed. It's a pleasure.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sam Lee
user_reviews_extended.Description: This review is a long time coming.  I'm a very happy long time client of Traci Hollander State Farm.  She and her team, people like Heather Love, are the best. I have my auto and home with them and have referred more than 100 friends and clients to them over the years.  They always do what is right for the client, even if it is to recommend someone else.  Traci has great character and this flows throughout her team.  My highest recommendation.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Junior Corcuchia
user_reviews_extended.Description:
My name is Vicky Corcuchia and I have been with State Farm for at least 30 plus years with Marilyn Wong. We had an unfortunate incident, our vehicle was stolen and State Farm as a whole from our agent to the claims department were amazing! Than I was told I could go to any State Farm office to get some documents signed and also someone there to witness myself sign the documents. I went to the office of Traci Hollander and this wonderful person assisted me Rocio Jimenez and my God could my experience get any better! Rocio was just as amazing as everyone else who is affiliated with State Farm, simply made my experience painless and stress free. The level of service provided was outstanding.

With much gratitude

Vicky Corcuchia

user_reviews_extended.Name: Allyson Hobbs
user_reviews_extended.Description: Eva Lee has been so helpful to me! She made sure that I got earthquake insurance and we have also scheduled a call to discuss life insurance. I am very grateful for her and her hard work!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Robert Gregory
user_reviews_extended.Description: I'm prompted to post after another case of predictably customer-focused, effective support from this (Tracy Hollander's) State Farm agency based in the Castro and Noe Valley neighborhoods. I've had two occasions to work with the office this year - the first time with Vincent and now a few months later with Rocio Jimenez.  Both times, these customer service pros have not only addressed my reason for calling but found ways to solve problems or tweak my coverages in ways that were better for me (without any hint of the typical insurance agent push to buy for amorphous "security" because it's good for you but, instead, genuine empathy for a customer's desire to limit nonessential cost). Plus, they're just very friendly people who work efficiently out of respect for the time and preferences of others. Great agency!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tony Poer
user_reviews_extended.Description: In the many years we've been with Traci Hollander's office, she's had a great team of State Farm colleagues. Heather Love is yet another very professional and friendly insurance expert. It was a pleasure to work with her recently on some car and life insurance changes we needed to make. High marks for Heather!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stephen Lathbury
user_reviews_extended.Description: I needed updating to my current renter’s policy. Eva Lee was extremely helpful completing the changes and emailing the policy updates quickly. Thanks so much!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kyle Foley
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I had a very disappointing experience with Traci Hollander and her team. The closing process was incredibly frustrating, with constant delays and a lack of clear communication. Every time I reached out for updates, I either received no response or had to wait far too long for basic information.

The lack of professionalism and responsiveness made this an unnecessarily stressful process. I would not recommend this agent to anyone looking for a smooth and efficient insurance experience.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gene May
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I am absolutely delighted to share my experience with Eva Lee at Traci Hollander State Farm Insurance office. Eva's remarkable attention to detail is truly commendable. She not only understands her clients' needs but goes the extra mile to ensure that every aspect is taken care of meticulously.

The personable nature of everyone in this office immediately puts you at ease. The team is incredibly friendly and approachable, creating an environment where you feel comfortable discussing your insurance matters. The team's willingness to help and genuine concern for your well-being make the entire process seamless and stress-free.

Even after relocating to Southern California, my loyalty remains with Traci Hollander's agency, all thanks to the unparalleled personal service that Eva and the team consistently deliver. It's rare to find professionals who prioritize building strong relationships and providing top-notch assistance like Traci Hollander's team does. I wholeheartedly recommend this agency to anyone seeking exceptional insurance service with a personal touch.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Liliana Miramontes0l v acceesshe
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather Love at State Farm provided an exceptional experience for my insurance needs. Her professionalism, attention to detail, and dedication to finding the best coverage were impressive. She guided me through the process with ease and ensured I understood all my options. I highly recommend Heather Love for anyone seeking reliable insurance assistance.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jeff Gotts
user_reviews_extended.Description: Just want to rave about how great the service has been as we have navigated a recent out-of-state home purchase and various other insurance needs over the last few years. Heather Love has just been amazing--fast, thorough, responsive, friendly, and effective. Best interactions with any insurance agency I've ever had. Thank you!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: John W
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I had contact with Eva Lee during my transition to California this past Summer about transferring and updating my insurance. She helped me with "All Aspects" of my insurance, she followed up, she kept it on my terms so I understood, she made recommendations that fit, and she was very personable and professional throughout the move. Eva, will be my Insurance agent for along time. I totally recommend and trust Eva, the agency she represents, along with her colleagues that helped with the process as well!!!

Update: 01-10-23
Just needed to update and get some additional insurance. Called Eva, my call was returned promptly, questions answered, questions asked about coverage and what we needed. She explained the new policy, asked how we were doing on our other insurance policies . The new policy was written and emailed shortly after. Eva is a great agent, if you need one, I recommend you contact her!!!! That’s all!!

Update: 07-14-25
Just got contacted by Traci’s office. Spoke with Rocio Jimenez to update some information and she did us right. She needed some information on drivers and vehicles, she ran the information saving us a considerable amount of money. I am grateful to the call from them, and I feel that they have the best interest always for me and their clients. I have been with State Farm for many years and would not give up the company or this agency. Thank you all. Every agent I’ve dealt with is very professional and know their stuff. Shout outs to all, especially Rocio, and Eva Lee who was my original contact in the Bay Area. If you need a professional and knowledgeable insurance agency, contact Traci Hollander State Farm.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Eric Toscano
user_reviews_extended.Description: Fantastic!  My wife and I have worked with Traci Hollander's Office for the past several years and have State Farm home, auto, umbrella, and renters policies.  We've always been pleased with the service we've received but we wanted to specifically acknowledge and thank Eva Lee, who has been nothing short of amazing.  Not only has she been incredibly patient in helping us identify insurance policies that meet our particular needs, she has also been super responsive and, most importantly, has always put our needs first, recommending policy combinations that deliver the best value for our needs.  Thanks so much, Eva!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Inna Yesayants
user_reviews_extended.Description: I recently called the insurance company for my new car, and Rosio assisted me over the phone. She was incredibly polite, patient, and knowledgeable, taking the time to explain everything clearly. As this was my first time dealing with insurance, I had many questions, and Rosio made sure I understood all the details. I was especially impressed by her efforts to find the best options for me. Her exceptional customer service made the experience a positive one, and I truly appreciate her help. Thanks to Rocio Jimenez!  I’m happy to continue working with State Farm and Traci Hollander's team.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rebecca Hoover
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been with State Farm forever and couldn't be happier with Traci Hollander's team. Eva Lee has helped me on numerous occasions and always provides detailed answers. Between helping me when I moved to Oregon, ensuring my renter's and auto insurance protect me, and providing detailed quotes and information about a personal life insurance policy, I know I can count on this team.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Irma Duafala
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been using the insurance services and Heather Love is beyond knowledgeable, competent, and caring .  If you are looking for a company that has your back , will educate you , will answer all your questions, YOU need to call Heather!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rene Polanco
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather Love was very informative and was able to get me better rates with savings as well. Thank you Heather.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jeffy Chang
user_reviews_extended.Description: We’ve been with Traci’s State Farm office for over 20 years and have been extremely happy with their support all this time.  Recently, had to insure one of the kids to drive their own vehicle  and Heather was really great in stepping us through the options as well as getting us squared away.  Thanks Heather and the rest of the team for your efforts!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Crystal Clayton
user_reviews_extended.Description: We’ve been with this branch for many years and plan to use them for many more. Very attentive, knowledgeable, caring, and willing to do all they can to get you the best rates for coverage. We’ve been working with Heather Love who is an absolute GEM! 10/10 folks.

user_reviews_extended.Name: LRN Dividend
user_reviews_extended.Description: I was in a real pickle financially and never thought I'd be able to afford security for my family if anything ever happened. Heather Love took so much time to navigate my specific situation and educated me on options I never knew were available. She goes above and beyond !!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lindsey Huebner
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather Love recently provided outstanding service for our family as we worked to add some auto insurance to our policy.  She was responsive, diligent and understood our needs.  Traci Hollander continues to have a solid team which I’ve worked with over many years.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kim Appleby
user_reviews_extended.Description: State Farm has been helping my family for decades. Working with Tracy Hollander's team in the Bay Area was an outstanding experience. When we moved to Scottsdale, I was delighted to learn that we could continue working withTracy through her Arizona team member, Alyssa Anderson. Alyssa is always responsive to any need or request; she's kind, professional, and knows her stuff.  We're grateful to Tracy and Alyssa for their continued full-service support!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ashley Black
user_reviews_extended.Description: We buy all our insurance with State Farm. Their customer service is outstanding, which we learned after we had a major fire in our SF home. After that, we went to Traci Hollander's team for everything. Rocio Jimenez has especially given us the kind of responsive and careful attention that is difficult to find today. I can compare this service with our State Farm coverage in Seattle, which is clearly inferior. There are a lot of choices, State Farm is our choice in California, and Traci Hollander's agency is the best State Farm has to offer largely because of Rocio.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Merryl Terry
user_reviews_extended.Description:
2022: From start to finish, Kendall provided friendly, efficient, helpful service. She is knowledgeable, professional, and prompt. She made our move to CA smooth and easy. I highly recommend her!

2024 Update: Eva did a terrific job updating our policies. She was friendly and efficient and I enjoyed working with her. I continue to be pleased with Traci Hollander State Farm Insurance.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jack Bewley [Lin]
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I can't say enough good things about Traci Hollander - my State Farm insurance Agency and the great team of people there, especially Heather Love. She went so far above and beyond when clearing up a policy issue (that was entirely 100% my fault). In the end, I am paying about the same a last year even though rates, on the whole, have gone up!

Purely magical...

Thank you!
They're the best.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ruby Avalos
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather Love provided an exceptional service. Her attention to detail as well as her dedication in finding the best coverage was impressive. She guided me through out the whole process and helped me understand what my best options where and why. I will highly recommend her services.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Anthony Marzo
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I had a great experience with Heather Love, one of  Traci's account associates, getting my insurance set up on my new car and talking about other insurance options.  She was extremely helpful, responsive, knowledgeable and personable.

I strongly recommend Traci and her agency and State Farm, although I wish rates would level out in the industry.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kevin Brennan
user_reviews_extended.Description: My experience with Alyssa Anderson via Traci Hollander was seamless and exceptional. She guided me through the hurdles of switching carriers for my auto policy (I was sticking it to the company that canceled our home insurance!) and helped me make informed decisions with perfect timing. We're saving some $$$ too! Thanks, Alyssa!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Justin Kikuchi
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been using Traci's office for a few years and wanted to say - Diana helped me get the correct forms after my home remodel to make sure the utilities were correctly rated. This resulted in a big savings on my home insurance premium, thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jill
user_reviews_extended.Description: We had some questions regarding our policies and Rocio not only took the time to sit with us and clearly explain everything but also wrote it all down in an email for our records.  We have experienced nothing but excellent customer service from Rocio and this office over the years.  Highly recommend their services.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jory Martin
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a customer for over 22 years with Traci Hollander's office.  It's a relationship that is, for the most part, on auto-pilot:  I pay and they are there to help when I need it.  On occasion, I need to change coverage or add/remove a car, I've primarily (and most recently) worked with Heather Love.  Heather makes this an easy process and she's always looking for ways to better protect me and save some money.  I guess this is why I've stayed with State Farm and the Traci Hollander's office.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alex C
user_reviews_extended.Description: I spoke to Eva Lee at Traci Hollander's office. Eva was very upbeat, nice and helpful. She got me a great price for auto insurance on my new car at a time when I really needed it because my previous provider had raised my rates really high. I recommend Traci Hollander, State Farm. And ask for Eva.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ehren Seybert
user_reviews_extended.Description: Eva Lee is amazing. In considering whether to take out a new life insurance policy, I found Eva to be extremely helpful, responsive, and thoughtful throughout the entire process (she even provided important information that I did not think to ask).  I'm grateful for the excellent customer service, and happy to be a State Farm customer.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Eugene Liang
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather Love did a complete analysis of my home and auto insurance.  She also recommended areas to increase or decrease coverage based on my current situation.  Very thoughtful and detailed in making sure the insurance levels meet my needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marc Stiglitz
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have worked with Traci and her team for all my insurance needs over the last 29 years. I recently held a call with Vincent and he, Diana, Delia and Traci are all so wonderful, attentive, responsive and helpful in managing all my needs and they even support me beyond what State Farm offers. They just provided me with strong referrals for my potential business, personal articles and even current Family Law needs, despite them not providing any policies themselves. Traci and team do a phenomenal job of always adding value to crisis support moments as well as long-term partnership value again even beyond what they directly offer. Thank you Vincent, Delia, Diana and Traci! Marc

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sarah Franz
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been with Traci Hollander since I  moved to San Francisco in 2004 and have always had the best service. My last interaction with Eva Lee was so helpful to review and better understand my policies but also very informative at other possible policies with State Farm. Answered all my questions and provided me with a detailed follow-up email. I have been with State Farm since I was 16 yrs old and I stay because of fantastic service and coverage.

user_reviews_extended.Name: K Murphy
user_reviews_extended.Description: Eva Lee is a great asset to your team. She found a way to get me a great discount on my two homeowners policies by combining with a non-owned auto insurance policy. Two thumbs up, way up !

user_reviews_extended.Name: sammy kim
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been with Traci Hollander’s office for many years now. I’ve always dealt with Eva Lee and she is always wonderful to work with. There insurance quotes are very competitive and their customer service is the best. They are very responsive and always quick to call you back when you leave a message during off hours. We have auto, home and life insurance through them. I highly recommend their office for all your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brent Hughey
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Alyssa was extremely professional and had a deep understanding of State Farm's insurance policies. From our first interaction, her goal was clear - to ensure that I received a policy that was tailored to my needs. Her patience and attention to detail in explaining the policy details were truly commendable. Her ability to clarify all of my questions reflected both her expertise and commitment to customer satisfaction.

The service was exceptional, and I give it a rating of 5/5.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Danielle Supyk
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather Love made buying life insurance easy and I now have peace of mind for my family’s financial protection after I’m gone. She’s knowledgeable, professional and caring. Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Krista Miyashiro
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've worked with Traci Hollander's team for years, covering my condo and car insurance. They have always been helpful, friendly and professional. When it was time to find a new insurance provider for our building's HOA, I called Traci's office first. I had the pleasure of working with Eva, who made setting up a policy super easy and quick. She offered us various options to meet our needs, providing expert guidance along the way. To top it off, Eva took care of all this for us right before Christmas as our old policy was about to expire. Eva is a lifesaver! I'm thankful to have such a skilled and thoughtful partner in Eva and feel at ease knowing we're in good hands with Traci's team at State Farm. Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Terry Soto
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been with this agency for 10 years and they are always helpful. Heather recently helped me get insurance on my new car.  Thank you for your efficiency.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gary Armstrong
user_reviews_extended.Description: Talked to a gal by the name of Heather Love. Gave me a great rate on my side by side. Very pleasant to speak with! Great customer service. Will reach out for other insurances.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Meg Wong
user_reviews_extended.Description: Our car was stolen and when we were able to get a replacement, Heather Love of Traci Hollander's State Farm office helped us adding the new policy.  She was very sympathetic to the loss of our beloved vehicle, and she worked diligently to set up the right policy for our needs.  She was an absolute delight to talk with.  The same review applies to the agent (Dahlia?) at Traci's office to whom we reported the theft.  It's comforting to know that we can count on these agents to help us when the need arises.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Claire Baggao
user_reviews_extended.Description: As a financial advisor, I know how important it is to have the proper protection in place. So when I launched my own firm this year, one of my first orders of business was to get good life insurance. Enter Heather Love at State Farm. She made the process of underwriting incredibly easy for me. She was SO good in fact, I tell all my clients (and friends, and friends of friends, and neighbor, and hairdresser) they need to go see Heather. Thank you Heather!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Larry White
