user_reviews_extended.Description: Norma Michihira of this office was very proactive in monitoring and resolving a billing issue we had with our earthquake insurance.  Once the issue was brought to her attention she looked into it, told us what she would do and KEPT ON IT.  We never had to nag at all.  She just kept it in her sights and kept us informed of what she was doing, the current status, and what to expect next.  Thank you, Norma!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: M Weil
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been with Traci Hollander's State Farm Office for 20 years now. They have always been responsive and helped me understand my policies and changes to them. I want to give a special thanks to Rocio Jimenez, who solves problems with speed and grace!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Isabel Sobozinsky-Wall
user_reviews_extended.Description: Over the years, I have had excellent customer service from Traci Hollander's staff, including Rocio, Diana and now Vincent!  My recent experience with Vincent highlights the strengths of the team overall.  He was courteous, professional, respectful and very attentive during our communication.  I can say it is a pleasure for me to have such confidence with Vincent and the group.  Kudos!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Roderick Smith
user_reviews_extended.Description: I switched from a different State Farm agent to Traci Hollander a few years ago because I could not understand my previous agent's explanations. Insurance is both important and hard to understand, so it's critical to have agents who can clearly explain what the policies mean. Traci's office has delivered what I was looking for. Most recently I needed a lot of help understanding my nonowned auto insurance policy, and sent a list of questions to Rocio Jimenez in Traci's office. She checked with underwriting on a few points and then got back to me with very clear, detailed answers to each of my questions -- and did that within a week, a timing which I greatly appreciated because the conclusion that I was fully covered for a car rental on an upcoming trip allowed me to save $300 insurance charges from the rental company. Rocio and the entire team that I have dealt with at Traci's office have the ability to clarify the most opaque insurance language, and for this I highly recommend them.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jason R
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've used Traci Hollander & State Farm for over three years across multiple insurance policies. They've been great to work with and I am very happy with the cost and coverage of my insurance policies. Eva Lee was especially helpful as I was getting a new policy set up. She was responsive in answering all of my questions and made the entire process very easy!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rachel Long
user_reviews_extended.Description: Diana Lima was such a great help - she helped us navigate the billing system and more! She was so friendly and patient!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Andi Winnette
user_reviews_extended.Description: Working with Eva is great! She has endless patience for discussing various options and providing quotes, and she always follows up to make sure we've gotten what we needed.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Carol Berghen
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been with State Farm for many years. There are a number of different assistants but I always hope to get Rocio when I call. She is friendly, always helpful with my many questions, efficient, and just takes care of whatevever I am in need of with ease. How lucky Traci is to have her.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kellam Nelson
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I've worked with Traci and her team for nearly 6 years now and they've always been great to work with. From car insurance, to renters insurance, and unfortunately even car accident events, they have helped me through it all.

I recently had to insure an engagement ring and watch and Eva was a pleasure to work with! She was very responsive, helpful guiding me through the process, and most importantly, patient! She even went above and beyond to provide recommendations regarding future appraisals that I should be thinking about every few years to ensure my property is insured for the appropriate amounts as they appreciate in value. I highly recommend Eva and Traci's team for any insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sahil Agarwal
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather has been a tremendous help throughout my insurance process. She has taken an extra step on each stage of the policy, from explaining each thing in great detail to answering all my questions. I have been part of state farm for about 3 months now and my experience has been great. Heather is a wonderful person and will go out of her way to help you and get you the best deal possible. I highly recommend getting in touch with her and her firm and get yourself the best customer service possible.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Scott Jacobs
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Heather Love is a wonderful insurance agent. She's helped me, our clients and the community understand the always confusing and ever- changing landscape of Insurance.
If you need someone to co-pilot and help you navigate auto, life or health... Heather is your girl!
Thank you Heather for all that you do.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Quin Pompi
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Only great things to say about my experience with Traci Hollander's office!! I've been living in SF for 3 years but am finally bringing my car out from PA. I shopped around a bit for auto insurance but ultimately landed back at State Farm, my current provider, due to customer service and great incentives.

In particular, Eva Lee made the transition as seamless as possible answering my countless questions, and even went the extra mile to contact my State Farm agent back in Pennsylvania to make sure I was getting the best rate possible. Great to know I'm in kind and capable hands if something were to happen.

user_reviews_extended.Name: April Mason
user_reviews_extended.Description: My wife has been with Traci Hollander for many years.  I have been with them since we've been together and purchased vehicles together - maybe 33 years?  Their service has always been top notch.  Recently we got a notice that our homeowner's insurance (with another good company) was going to go up about 65%, so we contacted Traci's office to see what they could do.  Kendall Rhodes got back to me and was very helpful!  She answered all my questions, and our new homeowner's policy with State Farm will have similar coverage, but will be much less than our policy was going to be with the other company!  I would recommend State Farm and Traci's office to anyone!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lindsay Tyson
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I've been a client with Traci's office for 10 years and I find her staff to be consistently knowledgeable and easy to communicate with.

Most recently, Heather Love spent over an hour on the phone with me, setting up a new auto auto policy and life insurance policies basically for free with bundled discounts, while also educating me about a bunch of nuances that were really helpful to me as a consumer of this often opaque product (insurance). Thank you so much, Heather!

In the past, Beau helped me figure out how to get an umbrella policy even though I don't own a car, then turned around and re-did those policies for me again a week later, when my situation changed again (and gave me a full refund for the previous policy). He made sure I got the best rate on my new auto plan by asking about my driving habits to give me a low mileage discount. Thanks, Beau!

user_reviews_extended.Name: A Taylor
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been with State Farm for decades.  I switched years ago to Tracy's Office, because it is by far The Best. Tracy Hollander's office never ceases to amaze me.  They are always professional, fast, efficient & friendly, whether it's processing a claim, answering a question or making an update.  Most recently, I worked with their Account Associate, Eva Lee to get quotes & ultimately set up 2 additional policies.  She is the kind of agent you DREAM OF!  She answered endless questions for me, explained many things, was patient, understanding, very knowledgeable, great follow thru & and always thorough in her work. The State Farm prices were more than competitive.  I ended up with much better coverage at a much lower price.  Thank you, Eva!!!! & Thank you Tracy Hollander's Office.  I'm glad to be with State Farm :)

user_reviews_extended.Name: Robert Rios
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather Love is Amazing. She provided me with all the information I needed to know for the insurance of my car and how they benefit me. She was very clear and explained everything perfectly so that I could grasp the full information with no confusion. I 100% recommend Heather.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Young Yoo
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a State Farm customer for the last couple of years with Traci Hollander's team and been very happy with the service/level of responsiveness.  I recently had to change an existing policy and had the pleasure of working with Kendall - she was informative and very helpful in deciding which one to get, and the whole process was super fast & efficient.  I've consistently had a great experience with the team at Traci Hollander - highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rechelle Benge
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I had some questions about my auto and
homeowners coverage and spoke with Heather Love. She was very helpful and put my mind at ease. I would recommend her and this agency to anyone needing help with coverage. Thank you Heather!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Yolanda Mooney
user_reviews_extended.Description: Had many questions regarding life ins. And Heather Love was very informative and helpful with which steps to take and what would be best for my wife and I. She really knows how to make us understand what's best for us all around.. Thank you Heather.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Elizabeth Ross
user_reviews_extended.Description: I am so pleased with the excellent service I received from the Traci Hollander team. It's refreshing to work with an agency that has time to return my calls and cares enough to make sure I have the correct coverages.  Heather Love walked me through the steps needed to make some changes, kept me updated on the process and was patient with my questions.  She was very thorough and took extra care to make sure my coverages were correct.  Thank you Heather and the team at Traci Hollander.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jason Willebeek-LeMair
user_reviews_extended.Description:
So, I was dissatisfied with my previous insurance company, so I decided to switch. I had State Farm previously, so decided to switch back.

My fiancée was happy with her agent so I gave her a try. What a wonderful experience.

I worked with her Account Associate Heather to get my coverage set up. She was fantastic. She answered all of my questions thoroughly and promptly and I had my new policy set up and insurance cards in my inbox in no time.

I highly recommend this office. Very competent. Very efficient. And super friendly.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Scott
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been with State Farm / Traci Hollander for more than 10+ years now and the service has always been amazing. I've never experienced any mistakes or had any issues whatsoever with Traci's office, and they have always gone above and beyond if I have a question, or need to add or remove vehicles from my policy. Today, Eva helped get my new boat added to my policy, even emailing after hours to confirm some last details. Very rare to find that kind of service nowadays, and is very appreciated!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kristin Papierski
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had a wonderful experience transferring my car insurance to California. Alyssa Anderson was able to quickly help me with the transfer, helped me understand questions I had about my coverage and helped me talk through various options and implications for my premium. She was very knowledgeable and helped me streamline my coverage that was previously across three states so that it would be easy for me to make payments. Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jed Lau
user_reviews_extended.Description: Eva Lee in Traci's office was very helpful in helping us with our insurance policies. Would highly recommend working with her!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ilona & Ilya
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather Love is an expert in auto and life insurance.  She is always guided by doing what's right for the client, and will say if State Farm is not a good fit.  I highly recommend her.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Danny Winokur
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've head excellent experience with Traci Hollander's State Farm office since we transferred our policies to them a few years ago.  Most recently, I've had a lot of changes to manage across multiple policies, including a number of complex additions to a personal articles policy and some policy transfers to another State Farm agent out of state because of a move.  Vincent Martini worked diligently with me over weeks, was highly responsive, showed enormous attention to detail (and patience), and was highly competent and careful in making sure everything got done and was resolved in a timely manner, including clear status updates when he was dependent on underwriting or other departments.  I highly recommend him and this office.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stephanie Bass
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather has been my go to insurance expert for many years now. I'll follow her where ever she goes. I love working with her and she always answers my questions in the best way, in a way a person who knows nothing about insurance will understand. She's the best!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Scott Martini
user_reviews_extended.Description: Vincent did an outstanding job in getting my life insurance needs met.  He was professional, efficient, and most conscientious in the use of my time. I will definitely go back to see him for another policy in the event of my untimely demise.

user_reviews_extended.Name: C R
user_reviews_extended.Description: New college graduate moved to SF and needed car insurance and renters insurance. Eva Lee was great in walking through the options and was able to offer savings by bundling renters ins and car insurance. She was patient and kind to explain the options. She ran a number options so I could make the best decision for me. Great service and really appreciated her guidance. Love State Farm and this office!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Glenn Stover
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have had fraud on my credit card several times in the past few months, which resulted in my payment to State Farm for homeowners insurance being declined.  I called up Tracy Hollander's office and spoke with Vincent Martini who took the time to listen to the problem, reassure me that we could solve it, and followed up -- after the call -- to make sure that my account was paid in full and that my newly-minted credit card was charged for all future charges.

FOLKS: this is why it makes sense to get insurance from a national company that has LOCAL agents to whom you can speak in person!  Tracy Hollander's office -- and her employee, the estimable Vincent Martini -- is always on hand to deal, in person and right away, with any issues that arise in the course of managing insurance policies.  THANKS to Tracy and Vincent for their excellent service!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Samuel Bishop
user_reviews_extended.Description: Eva Lee did a great job securing discounts for me and unwinding my complex situation that straddled multiple states and policies. She was very patient even as I was having phone troubles and difficulty locating information. Highly recommend

user_reviews_extended.Name: Antonio Silva
user_reviews_extended.Description: I never knew the difference between the different life insurance plans. Luckily, the passion that Heather had for her job, really made the process of getting a life insurance policy simple and easy. I didn’t feel like she was just itching to sell me life insurance, she provided details and gave me advice on how to best insure myself, and my assets. Additionally, she also provided information that the life insurance policy I was getting also benefited me for discounts on my car insurance, which I never knew! I really enjoyed talking with Heather and I know that whenever I have questions or want to add any additional life policies, Heather will be the one I go to.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Wendy Hu
user_reviews_extended.Description: I contacted Eva Lee from Traci's office due to a change of insurance needs. Eva took the time to understand my situation, explained product details in an easy to understand manner, and iteratively revised the details based on an improved understanding of each other. The end result is that she processed everything efficiently with great professionalism and knowledge and my insurance needs are fully met. I appreciated all of her help and her answers to my questions with a why.

user_reviews_extended.Name: A. Sparks
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've worked with Traci Hollander's office for over 10 years and have several policies with them (auto, earthquake, condo, life, etc.). They helped me out and made the process stress-free when I went through a motorcycle accident back in 2010 and just this year when a rental car agency filed a totally bogus claim. I've always felt like they're "on my side" and really appreciate how they're available and responsive when I have any questions that come up. In short, they're great! I would highly recommend Traci and her staff to anyone who's looking for an insurance agency to build a lasting and supportive relationship.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jazlyn Gonzalez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather Love's knowledge of the different policy types and their benefits for life insurance was insightful and helped us make the right decision. I didn't know there was more than just whole and term. Additionally, she gave me better information regarding our current car coverage in CA, and she's a NV agent. It really makes me question whether our current agents are fully equipped to understand and give you advice about what you really need to protect yourself and your assets. Definitely didn't feel like I was, "being sold."

user_reviews_extended.Name: Varun N Wadhwa
user_reviews_extended.Description: I'm a first time car buyer, and I have been comparing auto insurance quotes across various insurance providers over the past couple weeks. I wasn't convinced that State Farm was for me (since I'm so young and other insurance providers were offering my more affordable quotes for the same coverage) until I hopped on a call with Kendall, and she convinced me to choose State Farm. She was extremely helpful and accommodating. I had an overall great experience with her!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sarah Deigert
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Thank you seems such a small thing to say to Tracy Hollander group. They went above and beyond to help me with solving an unexpected and challenging insurance issue. They were responsive, cordial, went way above and beyond to get all my information sorted and so very quickly. I am extremely Grateful to Alyssa, Dannika, and in fact everyone at that office who helped me out! You’re a bright spot for any small business owner who is in need of support and insurance.
Once again Thank you!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ali Alavi
user_reviews_extended.Description: Traci’s staff is amazing and I’ve been working with them x 7-8 years. Recently I’ve had the privilege of working with Heather Love Who thoroughly evaluated all my policies and help me make some adjustments and I have been meeting to do for a while. Much appreciate her and her time and commitment and excellent communication skills via email and phone. Thank you Heather!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ellen Rush
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have used this agent for many years and always have had polite, helpful service. Recently Heather Love and Vincent Martini helped me with insurance for a couple of family cars. They were both very patient even though I am sure this is a busy time for them. I've also been helped in the past by Rocio. Everyone has been wonderful.

user_reviews_extended.Name: John Manrique
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather Love is terrific with Life and Health Insurance! She has helped my clients find the best solution for their Life Insurance Needs! Whether it was Family Protection, Mortgage Protection, Accidental Death, she has the best solutions for your insurance needs!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Aaron Gan
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I was referred to Heather Love who works with Traci Hollander's office, and the experience was awesome. Heather was patient and helpful, and helped me get the most appropriate policies for me. She jumped through many hoops for me!

Thanks to Heather Love and the staff out of the local Traci Hollander's office. Highly recommend.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alexander Cheng
user_reviews_extended.Description: Fabulous customer service experience! I called their number - and Eva Lee picked up the phone right away (no wait at all) and helped me with quote for a non-owner's auto insurance policy, which I had never done myself before. Eva explained my options to me in plain English - explaining anything that I didn't understand. She helped me weigh the pros and cons of coverage options - and gave me a quote within minutes over the phone with a tone of kindness and patience. It felt like you could hear her smile over the phone. :) Thank you StateFarm - and especially Eva Lee for the personal touch. Insurance feels less scary and more approachable with you around!

user_reviews_extended.Name: nicole atkinson
user_reviews_extended.Description: The woman who helped me sort out my semi difficult policy was very thorough and patient . I will recommend Traci Hollander/State Farm insurance to my friends and family. Very competitive rates. The most painless over the phone insurance experience I’ve ever had. Thanks Alyssa!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Warren Dean
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather Love was a perfect example of why I use Traci Hollander office for my insurance needs. I called at the end of the office day but she returned my call after hours to make sure. received a response the same day. She made sure I had my Nevada insurance card in plenty of time to apply for my Nevada driver's license. I have always been impressed by the service I receive whenever I call Traci's office.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mike Eshleman
user_reviews_extended.Description: I reached out to Traci's office about getting auto insurance on short notice and Alyssa was fantastic! She was able to get me a quote at a fantastic rate and made the whole process so easy. Had already also worked with Beau on our Home policy. No doubt Traci's office is now the go-to for our insurance needs!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Matthew
user_reviews_extended.Description: Eva from Traci Hollander's SF agency helped make setting up my auto and renter insurance for the first time seamless and smooth. She was very prompt with my requests/calls and was super pleasant to talk to. Eva provided some of the best customer service I've experienced.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Patrick Kinnunen
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Moving to SF and had to switch car and renters insurance providers. Eva gave me a much lower quote than competitors, and very patiently walked me through all the aspects of the quote. She's super organized and kind.

Haven't had to use the insurance yet (hopefully never will!) but so far they've been great.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ted Getten
user_reviews_extended.Description: Beau Harshman in Traci's office was incredible to work with in setting up a new homeowners, auto and umbrella policy. He walked me through all of my options, worked incredibly quickly to provide multiple rounds of quotes, then was very communicative in next steps. He even reached out when my lender requested evidence of insurance a day later than I said he would! I felt like Beau wasn't just providing insurance coverage, but was looking out for me as he guided me through this process. I can't recommend him and Traci Hollander's office enough. Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Robin phillips
user_reviews_extended.Description: Diana Lima was excellent in helping us adjust our coverage to fit our needs! I look forward to working with her again!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kat DeGuzman
user_reviews_extended.Description:
February 2022 update: I worked with Delia and Beau to start a new renters insurance policy. Both were prompt, kind, and supportive. The Traci Hollander State Farm team really makes insurance a smooth and efficient process!

I worked with Eva via email and phone to transfer a renters policy from Oregon to California in preparation for my return to the Bay Area. Eva was clear, professional, and friendly in our correspondences. Amid a stressful time (moving during a pandemic!), Eva exuded patience and kindness!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sandy K.
user_reviews_extended.Description: After several years, it was time to get new quote for my condo policy. I received quotes from all the major carriers, and State Farm had by far the best prices for coverage that was even better than that provided by my previous carrier. Beau Harshman was the agent in this office that I worked with, and the process was quick, easy, professional, and he promptly responded to all my inquiries as we looked at policy options. I have already recommended this office to others.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sam Jones
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've had a great experience with Traci Hollander's office - have been a customer for the last ~4 years and have been through multiple vehicles, moves, and coverage levels (including renters, jewelry, etc.). The team (specifically Eva, Diana, and Dannika) is very responsive and has a client-first mentality.

user_reviews_extended.Name: S M
user_reviews_extended.Description: Superb Service and Attention to Detail!  Several  months ago a dear friend passed away and I've had to manage his Estate and the multiple policies he had with this office.  Every single individual that I've interacted with at this office has been incredible!  They were  all professional, patient, knowledgeable and incredibly kind, a truly  rare combination. Thank you Alyssa, Cindy, Vicki, Norma and Delia.  I couldn't have done this without you. I can rest more easily now that I know my friend's Estate is in good hands.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kimberly Shafer
user_reviews_extended.Description: Alyssa provided outstanding service to help get me set up with new auto and renters insurance following my recent move to San Francisco. She took the time to run through my options so I could determine the best coverage for my needs. I really appreciated her pleasant, professional, and knowledgeable service. Highly recommended!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nick Sincere
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather was a life saver. I had an auto claim that was hitting a snag. She listened to my story with empathy and responsiveness. She leveraged her deep industry experience to advise on a path forward. Within the same day, she called back to let me know she mobilized resources to escalate the review, and within hours the adjuster called to let me know the claim had been approved. Heather was with me every step of the way, and followed up over the next days to ensure the claim was moving forward. Her quality service and personal interest in my wellbeing saved me thousands of dollars and fully delivered on the State Farm quality service and care.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Troy Henry
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have had State Farm for about 10 years and in that time I had never had anyone call me to talk about lowering my insurance. I bought a home about 2 years ago, and had a different insurance company for the house. Kendall from State Farm Insurance called me to see if I wanted to bundle my insurance for my house and car. I pessimitically told her to send me a qoute and low and behold, I was amazed at the service she provided. Not only were we able to lower my car insurance, but for the same price I was paying for my house, I was able to double the insurance. She was amazing! She walked me through the process and literally did all the work. It was the easiest most customer centric service I have received in a long time. If you looking for insurance and someone who actually cares, reach out to Kendall at Traci Hollander's office. It will be well worth the call!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brad Nichols
user_reviews_extended.Description: Fantastic experience insuring a new home purchase with Traci Hollander's State Farm agency recently.  In particular, Kendall Sanderson was extremely knowledgeable, responsive, and proactive coordinating with my lender.  Being able to communicate with an actual person in order to dial in coverage specifics was tremendously helpful - especially when most the carriers tend to rely on some automated and impersonal underwriting service which, in my experience, makes it more difficult to secure the specific coverages we needed.  Would definitely recommend for a homeowners/condo policy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Yao
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have had my insurance with this office for years. I would recommend them highly. Their responsiveness and customer service support are fantastic. Alyssa Anderson from the office is great. Whenever I have a question or need anything, she is helpful, professional and very fast at replying. Overall, great service from this team.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alex Rybak
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been working with Traci and her team for many years now, and have set up all my insurance policies through this office. Traci, Diana, and the rest of the team are fantastic and are always available to help me make changes or answer any questions. Highly recommend this office!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Isabel Kazemi
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have worked with Traci and her wonderful staff for over 25 years. Everyone that we come in contact with at the office has been professional, efficient, and responsive to all of our insurance needs!  Thank you to Heather this week for helping us with our recent request.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lara Morgan
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Thank you to Norma @Traci Hollander's office for quick response and professional services

Updating review in November 2022.  Still am 100% satisfied with Traci Hollander's office.  Today, had the fortunate opportunity to connect with Heather Love (love her name).  She was friendly, kind, personable and KNOWS HER STUFF!  Thank you again for a wonderful experience.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Steve Epstein
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been with Traci Hollander's office for nearly 20 years. Service has always been great. Claims have been handled promptly. Heather Love was very helpful in getting my new car added to my policy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Donna Smith
user_reviews_extended.Description: I would like to thank Eve Lee for helping my son and I get insurance for his car.  He moved across country and this was his first experience getting insurance on his own. Eve was so supportive and helpful with both of us!!  We got the car insured and everything went so smoothly!  I highly recommend this Insurance Agency!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sherr Monta
user_reviews_extended.Description: I like to shear my experience working with Eva Lee. She is very polite, helpful, organized and has an excellent customer service. She is on top of her game and she goes above and beyond explaining everything. I had an excellent experience working with her.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nate Weinstein
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been a customer with Traci's office for over a decade now.  They're fantastic.  Most recently, I worked with Eva on updating a number of policies.  She was super helpful and responsive in guiding us through the process.  Highly recommended!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alex Rodrigues
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve always been very impressed by this office. My recent experience to get a new auto policy setup with Heather was seamless. She was incredibly knowledgeable and went above and beyond to get everything in place so we could pick up our new car before the end of the year. Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Daniel Santos
user_reviews_extended.Description: My wife and I recently purchased a house and Alyssa Anderson from Traci Hollander's office has been super helpful with getting our homeowner's insurance policy setup. She has been very responsive and understanding of the time pressure to make sure everything goes smoothly for our close. We're new customers with StateFarm and I have to say that so far I've been very satisfied with their service!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gabe Schine
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I've been with Traci Hollander State Farm for over a decade. After moving and buying a home, I had to get home insurance from another broker, which made me sad. Because of that, I had to move cars as well, leaving my accounts with State Farm rather... minimal.

This year, my new broker *tripled* my home insurance premium. This prompted me to reach back out to State Farm and see if things had changed, and to look into other insurance like an umbrella policy. Eva was incredibly helpful: within two days, I had a new home policy, two cars, and an umbrella policy all added. The coverage was significantly better than my current provider and also cost me 30% less!

Communication was quick, clear, and contained all the information I needed. I was impressed, but this is also what I had come to expect from this office over the years. I am so glad to be back with State Farm and with Traci Hollander.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Vilma Mellott
user_reviews_extended.Description: I got my life insurance set up with Heather Love. She explained all the details to me and got me the right coverage and within my budget. Give Heather a call so you have peace of mind that your family is protected when you pass away! One of the best experiences I've had with an insurance agent.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mike Shaw - San Francisco Realtor
user_reviews_extended.Description: Eva at Traci Hollander's office has been helping me with my insurance needs for many years. Traci, Eva and her entire team are super knowledgeable and helpful and I could not be happier with the service I receive from them!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joe B
user_reviews_extended.Description: I needed to add auto insurance to my other State Farm policy.  Eva Lee was fantastic in helping me do that! She explained all the options really clearly, and was a real pleasure to work with.  Plus, she helped me get better coverage at a lower price : ) . This is a great agency.

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Fink
user_reviews_extended.Description: I am very pleased with the support and guidance Alyssa provided when I was searching for auto insurance. It's refreshing to work with someone who knows what good customer service is about. Alyssa walked me through what I needed to know to make an informed decision and worked with me to set up the coverage and start date on a used car I was purchasing. Thank you Alyssa, and the team at Traci Hollander.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jim Ogren
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had the pleasure of dealing with both Haeley and Eva - they were great.  I moved to State Farm for auto and renters insurance - the agents were knowledgible, the coverage good and the price was right - all good things.  I confidently recommend Traci Hollander State Farm for your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kimberly Rios
user_reviews_extended.Description: Amazing Service! Heather Love assisted me and my family today.  She was very patient with all our questions and concerns. I greatly appreciate her working with us to get the best plan for our budget. I highly encourage you to ask for Heather with any of your questions or concerns!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kasia Parker
user_reviews_extended.Description: Worked with Rocio to make confirm the new bill and make sure that we go the good student / student away discounts. Very professional and pleasant interaction.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dennis Zhang
user_reviews_extended.Description: Amazing team to work with for all your insurance needs. Been working with this team for over 10 years. Eva Lee has been incredible in helping me navigate multiple insurance products from house, auto to personal.  Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Valerie Graham
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have been with State Farm Insurance for 10 plus years (and then some) and Traci never fails to impress me with her excellent services and the folks who work with her - SPECIAL shout out to Vincent Martini, who with one phone call, impressed me so much;  Vincent makes it personal with any call he gets, and really cares about you, the services you need and truly goes above and beyond his call of duty to ensure that all customers are fully taken care of.  What impressed me with Vincent is how young he seems to be and how mature he is - This is someone who has exceptional customer service skills and is an asset to any company he works for you.  Go Vincent go!  You have a great career ahead of you!

Thank you Vincent and to the dedicated crew at State Farm. Traci... .what's it been now... 15  years?  I hope you are well!
Valerie

user_reviews_extended.Name: John Hoag
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have worked with Eva in Traci Hollander's office on two occasions.  In both occasions she was extremely helpful, professional and went the extra step to explain everything clearly.  I am buying a new house and she provided me several options and did some research to make sure that I had the proper amount of coverage.  I would definitely recommend having your insurance needs met by Traci Hollander and her staff (esp. Eva).

user_reviews_extended.Name: Karen Jensen
user_reviews_extended.Description: Eva Lee was phenomenal as she patiently spent an hour on the phone with us reviewing and explaining our coverage needs. She then followed up immediately with a complete summary of our discussion and the changes to our policies. Feeling better and sleeping easier after all her expert help!

user_reviews_extended.Name: mary z
user_reviews_extended.Description: Eva Lee, one of the agents at Traci Hollander's office, has been immensely helpful over the years as I've navigated a number of life transitions and have needed to purchase, change, and explore various insurance options. I've been grateful for her knowledge, guidance, prompt responses, and kindness. 5+ stars!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Danielle Klein
user_reviews_extended.Description: I just talked to Heather Love and got a great insurance quote. she was knowledgeable and very personable. I am seriously considering on taking the offer😃

user_reviews_extended.Name: Angela Choi
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had a very pleasant experience today. Rocio helped me step by step with all my needs, and it was very easy and smooth. I was able to take care of everything with no complications. Thank you so much Rocio~

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mike Ortez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Beau Harshman was great in helping me get my auto insurance going! Very responsive through email and phone. I requested a quote and had a personal delay of 3 months before I actually needed to activate my insurance. All I had to do was respond to the most recent email I received and I had multiple custom quotes ready to go within minutes from Beau! Great experience and very helpful team! Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Robert Waters
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've worked with Traci Hollander Insurance for long time.  During my current needs to adjust auto insurance, I worked with Heather and was very pleased.  Heather helped me with the details and options to leverage discounts and checked in on the rest of my insurance needs as well.  Thank you, Heather!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Erin McAuliffe
user_reviews_extended.Description: I worked with Heather to get new auto and renters insurance after moving. Heather was awesome. She helped me get the best deals and the coverage I needed. She was quick to respond, and made the process of updating my coverage easy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joe machado
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been with Tracy and her staff for many years and never disappointed. Yesterday I had issues with a tow service and like always Diane got involved and got things handled expeditiously. Vincent whom I’d never dealt with took my first call and went above and beyond to help me. I asked several policy questions and he did the research and answered all my questions. He pulled up all the forms I need to use to help me get my discount for fire safety and sent them to me. I know it sounds like they are just doing their job but I must say, in todays world customer service is lacking so SHOUT OUT  to these people at this office they are keeping good customer service alive and well! Refreshing to say the least!

user_reviews_extended.Name: KENNETH KING
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ms. Hollander and her team run a top notch operation where knowledge of products and the recognizing the needs of an insured match. Good agent.  Good agency.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mo 505
user_reviews_extended.Description: Eva at Traci Hollander's State Farm office was wonderful to work with. She is quick to respond, is very clear and articulate, and has lots of knowledge about the insurance policies.  I am happy I found her and highly recommend her as an insurance agent.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lambert Management
user_reviews_extended.Description: Love Heather! She is always kind and friendly. She has always strived to do her best for everyone and make sure you get the best rate possible. Love this company!

user_reviews_extended.Name: gretchen simm
user_reviews_extended.Description: Talked to Eva Lee about a new personal articles policy. Eva was so friendly and knowledgeable and steered me in the right direction. Eva also advised me to change my renter's policy to save some money bundled with the new policy. Was so fast and got coverage hours later. Highly recommend working with Eva and this agency.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Justin Kikuchi
user_reviews_extended.Description: Worked with Eva Lee on consolidating car insurance when my wife and I got married.  We had a super unique situation with one of our vehicles and she very informed on the topic!  She worked with the underwriters so they would understand the vehicle and kept the policy moving!  She is awesome and on top of it! Thanks Eva!

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Helton
user_reviews_extended.Description: The level of service you get combined with the understanding, humor and absolute kindness makes it impossible to go anywhere else.  Thank God they have the BEST rates because even if they didn't, I'd still work with Traci!  Everything is just easy with State Farm.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brett Smith
user_reviews_extended.Description: We recently moved to California, and Eva at Traci's office recently helped us move our policies from out of state to the CA equivalents and got us set up with earthquake insurance as well. My experience could not have been better -- quick, professional, informed, and clear. Thanks to Eva and the rest of the staff at Traci's office! I hope that I never need to make a claim, but I know it'll be handled well if I do.

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Nakayama
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I was shopping for auto insurance online and halfway through I had to log out. I received an email from Alyssa Anderson of the agency asking if I needed assistance. She was not  pushy, just wanting to help me out.

We talked over the phone and I explained what coverages I was looking for. She was attentive and very helpful.  The State Farm rates were not in my budget, so I had to pass.

I have kept Alyssa’s contact information in the event I change my mind or want homeowners coverage.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Carmen Hernandez
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had some questions about life insurance and was kinda worried about asking but Heather Love made it incredibly easy to ask about. This woman knows her game and I’m going to be asking to speak to only her from now on.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chenan Zhang
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have lived at 3 different homes in SF now with insurance coverage by Traci Hollander State Farm, and it's been a convenient and easy process to get it set up each time, including this most recent switch from renter's insurance to homeowner's insurance. Eva Lee helped us with choosing and setting up the insurance coverage and communicating with our escrow officer during the homebuying process, and we're very happy with her services!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kathryn Cradler
user_reviews_extended.Description: State farm is the best insurance  company I  have ever had. They are very helpful  and and don't feel like a big corporation that is just trying to get your money. Traci was totally awesome by reminding me I forgot to pay my bill and sent a link to take care of it without any issues.  Affordable  and personal.  I would recommend Traci to anyone.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Olga Prokopenkova
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had another great experience working with Traci's team. Alyssa helped me get insurance for my business. We completed the whole process in under 30 mins - I got great service, quick and efficient - and got my business ensured. Highly recommend Alyssa!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Craig Matthews
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather Love! What a pleasure to work with her -- she helped my 84-year-old mom with new home, auto and umbrella policies after a move from Oregon to California. Super knowledgeable and super nice. AND she saved my mom quite a bit of $, which is terrific.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Phil Points
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I've been with State Farm since 1964 and Traci Hollander since 1978. I met with Beau Harshman today to review my auto and homeowner policies. Beau was professional, answered my questions, and lent some helpful advice. I have always found the staff to be professional, friendly, and knowledgeable. They serve up a good cup of coffee, too!
I would highly recommend this office for your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nadine Barry
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have had all of our firm's insurance with Traci's office for several years, and we are very happy with the policies and the service that we receive. We usually work with Rocio, and she is so friendly and helpful, and always there to answer a question, or assist us with any of our insurance needs. We feel very fortunate to have found such a friendly and efficient agency!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jill Sweringen
user_reviews_extended.Description: Can not say enough about the great customer service we've had from Traci's associates over the years.  Most recently we've had some in depth conversations with Rocio who has been very patient and clear in her answers of the questions we've had.  In fact, when she was unable to immediately answer one in real time, she did her own research and followed up with us that same day.  Stellar!

user_reviews_extended.Name: louma rammaha
user_reviews_extended.Description: I worked with Heather Love at Traci Hollander state farm insurance. She is very helpful and a great adviser for selecting my best option for insurance. I highly recommend her.

user_reviews_extended.Name: E Legon
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have worked with several of the team’s members and they have all been amazing. I actually had two major losses that they were really helpful with, when I was having some trouble with one claim expert. Traci Hollander’s office team handled this issue and made my awful situation a little bit better.
I am extremely risk averse so insurance is important to me. I pay for peace of mind and not being completely destitute (I would have, without it).
Dealing with a claim is difficult, but State Farm stood by all its contractual obligations, so I am pleased with the company and its agent.

user_reviews_extended.Name: tony thayer
user_reviews_extended.Description: Traci's team provides great service and really stays up-to-date in a changing marketplace. I want to give a special shout-out for Heather Love - she's really responsive!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alison Hom
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been working with Beau Harshman at Traci’s office for about 4 years for renter’s insurance. He is responsive and personable! He also is very knowledgeable about policy specifics and recently provided us a competitive quote for our new car that required auto insurance. Highly recommend working with Beau!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Margaret Weir
user_reviews_extended.Description: My previous agent at State Farm was always on vacation but things are vastly improved now at Traci's office. Rocio Jimenez is so smart and responds lightening fast.  Feeling very lucky.  Margaret (with State Farm 35 years)

user_reviews_extended.Name: eddie ng
user_reviews_extended.Description: Had a great experience working with Eva Lee with Traci Hollander - State Farm Insurance with an auto insurance quote and more!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dallas Nichols
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a client of Traci’s for many years now and am always happy with the service she provides. Recently I worked with Beau Harshman in her office to get coverage for a family member moving into town. Beau was extremely helpful. He did all the work for me and made my day much better.

user_reviews_extended.Name: christa scott
user_reviews_extended.Description: Choosing the right auto insurance can be so time consuming. Choosing State Farm was easy after experiencing such wonderful customer service by Kendall. She was so knowledgeable while addressing all my questions/concerns. I purchased auto + renters insurance and signing up with Kendall was a breeze. There’s so much more value with State Farm and I’m actually saving money monthly. Looking forward to being a long time customer. Thanks for taking such good care of me Kendall and State Farm!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Landon Haller
user_reviews_extended.Description: Eva Lee is an excellent agent and person. She was incredibly patient even with all of my questions and requests for clarification.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jonathan Berger
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I've had an amazing experience with this office. I switched from another agent who did not provide great service. Shortly after switching my auto policy to this office (and found it cost much less than competitors) I inquired about switching my HOA's home owner's insurance too.

Beau Harshman (as far as I can tell, a real star from this office) handled everything from quote to questions to all the logistics with a number of parties involved due to the HOA. He really went above and beyond to help make the transition smooth and comes with my strongest recommendation!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Matthew Esmaeili
user_reviews_extended.Description: My first business with State Farm and our direct agent , Beau Harshman, goes back to the time that I was searching for a company to get homeowner policy. He did a good job and gave me the coverage that I was looking for. A while later, I decided to include my auto policies under the same company and Beau helped me well with beating the quotation that I had from my previous insurance company and adding Umbrella coverage for a decent price. Cutting story short, he made himself available whenever I had a concern or question and supported me well through all the applications. Highly recommended!

user_reviews_extended.Name: C Jay
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather has been helpful and super responsive. We wanted to consolidate our insurance coverage and add new coverage, and she turned things around quickly and got us exactly what we needed within our desired timeline. Thank you, Heather!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Trace Johnson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Traci Hollander and Eva Lee have been my agents for years. Never a problem getting the coverage I want, and personal service that should make any other insurance company jealous. Renters insurance, earthquake coverage, and personal property coverage for jewelry all done in a few minutes. 10/10 would recommend.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nikki N
user_reviews_extended.Description: Eva Lee did a great job at supporting me through my insurance journey. She has been patient and very understanding throughout the whole process!

user_reviews_extended.Name: david wang
user_reviews_extended.Description: Eva from Traci Hollander's office has been most helpful! She efficiently set me up with a new auto policy - answering all my questions with patience, layman's empathy, and subject matter clarity. Thanks to her, I may continue on my journey to purchasing a car. Really appreciate your help, Eva!

user_reviews_extended.Name: mathieu isaacs
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I’ve insured with Tracy Hollander for more than 30 years. Tracy and her team are incredibly efficient and helpful in getting the best rates and discounts while giving A1 service . Over my time with them I have had several auto and homeowner claims and they were handled extremely well with minimal hassle on my part.
I thoroughly recommend them.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sonya Philip
user_reviews_extended.Description: After contacting a few other insurance companies, I was very happy with Traci Hollander's office. Beverly knew exactly what I needed, took down all the information and handed me off to Eva. I was happy to receive a prompt quote and have all my questions answered. Looking forward to working with them!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Guillaume “Gui” Plessis
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a happy customer for 10+ years. The team (kudos to Heather Love specifically) has always been super helpful and responsive, giving us great advice about our best insurance options.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marcia Gregory
user_reviews_extended.Description: Several years ago I moved all of my insurance policies, both business and personal, to Traci's office and have never, once, regretted that decision. She and her staff are extremely knowledgable, helpful, and always responsive. In particular, Rocio Jimenez was recently a huge (and quick!) help to me in resolving a car insurance policy transfer. Thank you Rocio!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sidra Vala
user_reviews_extended.Description: Eva was very helpful and responsive with my HO6 plans and quotes. I’m a first time home owner, so I had a lot of questions, also I’m very unfamiliar with the whole process and technical terms, but Eva was very great at communicating with me and helped me to find the best plans and rates.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gary Grossman
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have relied on Traci's office for many years for our home insurance.  Recently, Eva and Vincent were both very helpful in providing a quote for auto insurance.  I have switched auto insurance from AAA to State Farm and am saving several hundred on auto insurance AND am receiving discounts on homeowners insurance.  Vincent and Eva made this happen  and were very prompt in getting materials to me.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Steve M.
user_reviews_extended.Description: I was shopping around for auto insurance and Kendall Sanderson from Traci Hollander Insurance reached out to provide me with a quote. While the quote was only a few dollars cheaper than my current policy, she brought up other options that could reduce my overall insurance costs. I was also looking to get an umbrella policy and Kendall suggested combining my homeowner's policy to get a package deal. The results were several hundreds of dollars in savings which included the additional umbrella policy. Couldn't be happier with the professional, courteous, and knowledgeable service Kendall provided. If you're shopping for insurance, give Traci Hollander Insurance Agency a try and ask for Kendall.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Adam Engelskirchen
user_reviews_extended.Description: Traci Hollander and her team, especially Blake Delaney, were spectacularly helpful, professional and well-informed. I got all of my questions answered thoroughly (and I had a lot!) and ended up with better coverage at a lower price than I’d had before. Couldn’t recommend this office more highly!

user_reviews_extended.Name: stephanie galinson
user_reviews_extended.Description: After way too long I just changed insurance agents.  While we're in the infatuation stage of the relationship, so far it's smooth sailing.  Our representative, Daniel Nair, at the Traci Hollander State Farm Agency in the Castro, treated me warmly from the first cold call into the office.  Less than a week later we are insured (both home and auto) at a lower rate and with minimal effort, despite three kids, three cars and all related details.  I look forward to having an agency in my neighborhood that understands SF, and I'm so happy to have a contact person at the agency who is so pleasant and easy to work with.  Double thumbs up.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kayla Petrungaro
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather Love was so patient and helpful. She explained things in an easy to understand way and took her time to thoroughly answer any questions I had. It was nice talking to such a personable agent who was so knowledgeable and helpful.

user_reviews_extended.Name: NeilPatrick Enriquez
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been with this agency since 2015 and Beau Harshman has been super helpful with all my questions.  I recently got a Life Insurance policy and it was a simple process and less expensive than you would think.  Call Beau for all your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jeff Lester
user_reviews_extended.Description:
There are some stories that maybe don't mean as much if you don't know the time and place they happen in, and this may be one of those stories:  As someone living in San Mateo during the great atmospheric river onslaught of early 2023, I had to make a work-related Zoom call in my car.  (It wasn't our first day without power, nor our first month going without power for more than a day.)  After the call ended, I went to leave the wifi enabled parking lot I'd been for an hour only to discover my lights had stayed on and the battery had run down.

Fortunately, there are some qualities that can transcend time and place that always mean the world when you come across them: generosity, thoughtfulness, and compassion.  This is what I got when I called the office of my insurance agent, State Farm.

Even though I moved and was no longer in her city, Diana Lima helped me find a tow truck.  Not only did she talk me down from the proverbial ledge while doing so, she called the State Farm agency in my area to work out the best towing company to come out and jump start my car.

Then, after the tow truck showed, she called me back to make sure they were there and that everything was all right.

If we're lucky, the rest of 2023 won't be as hard on us as these first few months.  But what a relief to know that even if they are, I've got someone like Diana Lima in my corner to make things easier.  Thank you, Diana!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kay Harnish-Ladd
user_reviews_extended.Description: Traci Hollander is our agent and I recently had a exceptional experience working with Rocio Jimenez of State Farm.  My husband had a terrible accident and our car was totaled 150 miles away from home. I was feeling totally overwhelmed about what to do about the car. Rocio patiently and compassionately worked with me every stop of the process as I went up to retrieve the belongings from the car, arranged to have the car taken care of and got a fair settlement from State Farm. During a really stressful time. Rocio was a huge help and support for me. I am very grateful.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Umit Yalcinalp
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been with State Farm for years. In particular Eva Lee in this office  is a delight to work with, very responsive, kind, very attuned to your needs. She recognizes all the clients and their unique situations. Highly recommended.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Irina Pichko
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather Love is an expert in auto, life and pet insurance (and much more), she's guided me through and offered the best options for me. Highly recommended.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Wilson Vuong
user_reviews_extended.Description: First time purchasing renter's insurance and Eva Lee was amazing! She extremely courteous, quick with replies, and patient in helping me shape the right policy for my needs. Would highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: seth wright
user_reviews_extended.Description: Just moved to California and got in touch with Beau Harshman to transfer my auto policy. Beau did an amazing job setting everything up for me. Quick and easy. Answered all my questions. I would definitely recommend Traci Hollander State Farm!

user_reviews_extended.Name: kevin thomas
user_reviews_extended.Description: Rocio spent a lot of informative time to review all of my polices with State Farm. She helped me to see various options for adjusting my coverage.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Laura Duchen
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Beau was extremely helpful in setting up my insurance policy.  And Beverly is incredibly helpful as well!  Both are responsive, well informed and professional.  I would highly recommend them!

Edit: Norma Fong is also exceptionally helpful!  Everyone I've encountered in this office has been responsive, kind and professional.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stephanie Cheng
user_reviews_extended.Description: My husband and I are relocating to SF and needed to transfer our renters insurance from another State Farm agent in the Northeast. Beau made it SUPER easy and handled the transfer, clearly explaining any major differences (which there weren’t really any). We got great rates and got our coverage switched in a day! Easy!

user_reviews_extended.Name: t j
user_reviews_extended.Description: Traci Hollander's State Farm office has been very responsive to my requests.  I've dealt with Beau Harshman and he calls me back promptly and gets tasks done right away.  Getting my insurance transferred has been no problem.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lisa Ottati
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather and Traci are a great team, always friendly and helpful. Heather just helped me add a new car to my policy. So quick and easy!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Caleb M
user_reviews_extended.Description: My partner and I have had issues with rentals in the past and when we moved into our new place we wanted it to be insured. We made the call and were connected to Beau Harshman. He helped us with all our questions and concerns. Patient, friendly and made us feel comfortable. Thanks to Beau, we can sleep soundly knowing that our lives and possessions covered. Thank you State Farm team and thank you Beau!!! 😁

user_reviews_extended.Name: Carolyn and Mitch J
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have spoken to Vincent about insurance options and he gave very detailed information in a clear and concise manner. Making insurance less scary and easier to understand. Look forward to speaking to him more in the future.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Noah Bougher
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather was super helpful with thoroughly explaining my life insurance options and had great customer service while doing it! Highly recommend coming here for any of your insurance needs!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rick
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been insured through Traci for a very long time.  Her agency provides our home, auto, and liability insurance.  Recently, we acquired e-bikes and wanted to insure them as State Farm has excellent bike insurance (but it requires special underwriting).  The head office's underwriter denied our request as they had misinterpreted what we had purchased (State Farm will not insure class 3 bikes, we purchased class 1 bikes).  Vincent Martini (an associate at the office) really went the extra mile to clear up the underwriter's confusion and get the policy issued.  We really appreciated his efforts, intelligence and excellent attitude.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kevan Hom
user_reviews_extended.Description: From the very beginning, Eva has been extremely helpful and was always there to answer my questions about my auto/homeowners insurance options. Overall, I had a great experience throughout the entire process. I highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Maggie Paige
user_reviews_extended.Description: I was very surprised to get a note from Beau out of the blue asking if I was ready for new car insurance.  He had calendared the exact time I would be in need based on a prior conversation.  Talk about proactive and organized!  He lured me back to State Farm after a hiatus.  Happy with the service and the rate.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jon Bumgarner
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I am a long time State Farm Customer.   I had problems with the State Farm location I was with when  my agent retired.  I pulled my business  transferred it to Traci  and have received  excellent service from her office.
The entire staff is excellent and Rico who most often  handles my inquiries is excellent.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jerry Gabriel Rendon
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Greetings State Farm Team, my name is Jerry “Gabriel” Rendón. I have been a State Farm home & personal property insurance policy holder in San Francisco for over 10 years (since 1/7/2011) and have been extremely happy with your overall service. I have submitted only personal property claim in 10 years and when that time came your team came through for me!  I have spoken to many Tracy Hollander SF State Farm team members over the years. I appreciate each of you, especially the staff that I have often spoken with on the phone like Dalia,
Rosillo, and Vicent. Again, I am grateful to the entire team for consistent customer service, courteous conversations, and ongoing reliability which includes your 24 hour call center service during non-business hours. I wish each of you on the team much happiness, health & success today and always. Gabriel

user_reviews_extended.Name: H Jun
user_reviews_extended.Description: Beau Harshman recently helped me navigate various insurance products. He is a great listener, explained important coverage I hadn't even thought of, and quickly provided me with a few simple options to choose from. I learned a lot from the process and ended up with a better coverage than I originally planned all within my budget. Really glad I worked with Beau. Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sammy Stein
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been with Traci and her group for 15+ years now and as a matter of fact, my entire family has been with Traci for 20+ years. Traci and her team exemplify how a company should run. Her staff (Vincent, Diana, and Rocio) to name a few, have treated me like family and always put my best interest forward. They are well educated in their craft and have never lead me wrong. If you're looking for a company/ group to insure yourself or your family, look no further because with Traci's team you are family!

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Owens-Hill
user_reviews_extended.Description: I was very pleased with my experience. I'm moving to the area, and have a million little details to figure out before the moving van shows up. I needed renter's insurance and was coincidentally looking for a lower rate on my auto. Beau was helpful, super responsive, and great to work with. He helped me check off a few of those details without adding any new stress, and I'm so grateful. I'm thrilled to be a new customer!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jordan Sink
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've always had great experiences with Traci Hollander's Team (including Heather Love).  Very responsive and great communication throughout each process.  Highly Recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: William Russell
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Heather Love is like a god sent... everything I was confused abt she simplified it, made working with insurance company tons
easier... for that thank you state farm,  and huge shout out to Heather Love,  she's a major asset to ur company

user_reviews_extended.Name: Urvashi Reddy
user_reviews_extended.Description: I worked with Alyssa to bundle my home and auto insurance when we purchased a new home. Alyssa was able to get me quotes pretty quickly and was always happy to discuss the details. Would definitely recommend working with this office!

user_reviews_extended.Name: mayumi omi
user_reviews_extended.Description: Traci's office has been great in helping and caring us throughout our life!  All of her staff are very helpful and kind, but this time especially Diana really helped us sort out our options.  Diana has been very professional and patient, thank you, Diana!   And Thank you, Traci for your time and support :-)

user_reviews_extended.Name: Xa Johnson
user_reviews_extended.Description: I recently moved, bought a new car, and had several other insurance policy changes (including earthquake and umbrella coverage). Beau helped me out a ton! During a busy time, insurance was one less thing I had to worry about. Beau was easy to work with by e-mail, by phone, or in-person. He gave great advice and tended to the details of address changes and policy start dates. It's a huge value to be able to work with a real person, nearby!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sarah Placella
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have been working with Traci Hollander team for many years, most recently with Heather Love. They have always been responsive and helpful. Heather is prompt and efficient as well as willing to explain things.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Claire C

But he never responded to me, and instead passed me off to Vicky who said that the reason for the price hike was that they had discovered an old speeding ticket from 2017 and had "adjusted my policy accordingly." I asked if there was anything they could do to help with the price since the ticket would hit the 3 year mark in a few months and wouldn't be an issue any more (and my record has been clean since) and Vicky was completely unhelpful, said no, and told me that I should look for insurance elsewhere.

user_reviews_extended.Description: As a college student, I had no idea what life insurance was, and how it would benefit me. Beau Harshman did an amazing job in walking me through the process and answering all my questions. Happy and satisfied with his service!

user_reviews_extended.Name: William X
user_reviews_extended.Description:
This is an honest review on Traci Hollender’s firm. The staff is very friendly and speedy but in my case I was charged 60% more then my initial quote AFTER 3 months without advance notice.

Here’s my story:
I did my research and shopped around 5 different carriers for auto insurance on my 2016 Tesla Model S. Being a prepared and educated consumer, I had all the information ready to go including all the drivers, tickets, etc…

After reading rave reviews on Yelp, I decided to try Traci’s branch and was assigned a rep. I submitted all our prepared information and clearly disclosed all the drivers including traffic violations. The rep knew we were shopping around and said she would try to get us the best quote which ended up being about 15% less than the closest competitor at $338.59/mo.

I even confirmed with her that the other driver (with a traffic violation) was on the policy just to be sure that was accounted for. With that trust, I signed off on it and made our first payment thinking we were set. Three weeks later I received an email saying they had an invalid VIN number. So… all this time we were covering the wrong car? Well, mistakes happen right? That was the first red flag and it took them two full weeks to get this information updated.

A full three months later on Thanksgiving day, I get hit with a $715.55/mo charge on my credit card. That’s over 60% more than what I agreed to pay - without any notice. No email, no phone call, not letter.

I immediately email them and a few days later I get a response from them saying my premium has gone up because they noticed a traffic violation on the second driver thus, the premium has gone up.

A. I fully disclosed this ticket with the agent as I did with every firm I shopped around at, there is no reason I would want to hide this.
B. When running the application the ticket should show up. This is not a new ticket so this should have been taken into account.
C. I received zero notice from them on this increase.

After overreacting a bit and threatening legal action, I was connected to Traci who apologized profusely and took full responsibility. She was very professional and also assured me the agent who is no longer at the firm was not incentivized to sell me the plan and that it most likely an honest mistake suggesting this was not a case of bait and switch or fraudulent activity like I initially suspected.

Although I appreciated her assurance and respect her as a business owner, I’m still left with a much larger bill (more than my other quotes) and now forced to search for a new carrier three months later.

This is review is solely based on my honest experience and I hope this will only help the firm grow, stay accountable, and ensure this never happens to another client.

user_reviews_extended.Name: howard howard
user_reviews_extended.Description: After exploring my options for car and rental insurance and sending out a flood of quote inquiries, Yesica was the first to respond. She was more than helpful and took care of all my needs! I'm in sales myself, so appreciate a proactive agent who gets the job done.
