Grazie Beau!
Thank you for making time, clearly stating steps I needed in order to set up my new policy, and for your timely follow-up.  I appreciate feeling secure in my insurance choices and trusting the people behind the scenes.  Con gratitudine - Analisa :)

user_reviews_extended.Name: Arabella David
user_reviews_extended.Description: Beau Harshman was a great help in our family's efforts to weave together our patchwork of policies together into one comprehensive set of coverages that makes sure we don't have any high-risk gaps. I was glad to expand our existing condo walls-in coverages to include our unit's master condo policy, with additional umbrella policy review and refinement as well. A highlight here is that Beau caught wording between our condo policies that was resulting in expensive overcoverage, and worked with us to actually save us money for more accurate coverage! I really appreciated his responsiveness and professionalism, and would recommend him as "your insurance guy". Special shout out to Victor, who answered several general insurance questions I had when Beau was unavailable.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Natalie Coleman
user_reviews_extended.Description: Heather L is amazing! We moved here from Pennsylvania and she made getting insurance seamless. If you’re looking for a great insurance agent, give her a call.

user_reviews_extended.Name: G H
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I've been a client of Traci Hollander State Farm Agent for decades. They are and continue to be my one and only insurance representative. I have been pleased with them all these years, always quickly responsive and patient with calls.
I would like to highlight a recent event Diana Lima assisted with. While in San Diego, my car was vandalized at the Marriott La Jolla in their secure parking structure. Though it was entry only by card key, the hotel took no responsibility.
I had called to inform TH office of the damage and for guidance. I decided to file a claim which was seamless and quick. The app and website is easy to navigate and they pretty much walk you through the process of what is needed, including taking pictures from certain angles.
Once it got to the SF Estimators, that is where the problems began. To make a long story shorter, SF denied my claim even though I had sent in all the pictures, police report and written statements of what had presumably and visually transpired. This back and forth went on. I spoke to 4 different people on the phone, 2 Estimators, a manager and another colleague working with the manager. After the 3rd person denying my claim and reclassifying the claim into another category despite my journal and statements from the police report and repair shops, I had to call the office of Traci Hollander. I am so glad I did. Diana Lima was on it. She offered to look into it, asking to be referred to a manager and even put us on a conference with a SF Rep. On this call, one CSR in particular, Lisa, was open to listening but had already determined that their department was correct and was very adversarial stating that call logs and notes have shown that I had called a number of times and that "we have expert estimators and that is what they do for a living". It was apparent in her tone that it was being insinuated that I have been calling to change my story and claim! And asked if I had proof! I told her I that I was told to file under the category and she placed me on hold saying "she had to check". She came back and said" Okay, I'l give you that". Like she was trying to catch me not being truthful.  That upset me. I explained that there are extenuating circumstances to each claim and not all of them are cut and dry. That is why I wanted to speak to a human. It was physically impossible using the law of physics to substantiate their reason for denial. Diana, sensing the CSR's growing frustration and soon  an impasse, interjected that perhaps,"you could inform a manager to look into this". After a few more sentences of her voicing skepticism and then appealing to her, the CSR reluctantly agreed saying, "I will pass this message to the manager for you".
Diana did a follow up call with me and then the following Monday to the Claims Dept. A manager, Ike, called me back later that day to discuss the claim and he would take into consideration what information I had sent in. He said he was not familiar with the particulars. How can you not be familiar with the particulars and then deny a claim you are not familiar with? Well, they denied it again. The manager's colleague, David, called to give me the determination. I explained the situation and he agreed that he would discuss the decision with the manager again. I received a call from David again and he said that they would determine to cover it! I realize they did want to work with me to resolve this. I will say that the Manager, Ike, and colleague, David were both professional, cordial, responsive and listened when I was speaking to them. Diana followed up again with me to see if anyone had gotten a hold of me yet. I relayed the information and she was pleased it was resolved. Ultimately, I am still pleased with State Farm, they did come through.
Throughout this, Diana was checking in to make sure things were being responded to. If it were not for Diana being a supportive guide and advocate, I believe it would have gone nowhere fast. Nice to know Diana is working for her clients and in your corner.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ken Stephens
user_reviews_extended.Description: In my opinion State Farm has great commercials. State Farm has competitive rates. We had renters, car, and motorcycle insurance through State Farm. While they claim to be a "Good Neighbor" they are anything but. We found out when one of our vehicles was totaled. State Farm did not offer us a "fair market value" that would cover the cost of a "comparable vehicle" Section 2695.8. Additional Standards Applicable to Automobile Insurance. (2) A "comparable automobile" is one of like kind and quality, made by the same manufacturer, of the same or newer model year, of the same model type, of a similar body type, with options and mileage similar to the insured vehicle. I would caution you, to think twice about who you choose. Because when you need it, you need them in your court. State Farm is not a good neighbor.

user_reviews_extended.Description:
We have so many unexpected life events made more tolerable thanks to State Farm.... the day a bear broke into our car and did so much damage it was declared a total loss, a home burglary a year ago... each time we've had real compassion and guidance from the team at Traci Hollander's office, but specifically from Rocio Jimenez who has been our point of contact for years.
Whether she's getting us money back by catching a detail on our home policy, or sending a car policy declaration page to the kids' school so I can be a field trip driver, or helping me get business insurance, or walking our family through what to do for something serious, Rocio has always gone to bat for us, saved us countless dollars and a lot of anxiety!  I can honestly say that time and time I'm surprised by how WELL things turn out in the middle of calamity, thanks to Rocio and this State Farm office.  Thank you, Rocio!!!!!

title: Insureaze Insurance Solutions
address: 2021 Fillmore St #9186, San Francisco, CA 94115, United States
plus_code: QHQ8+7C Lower Pacific Heights, San Francisco, CA, USA

user_reviews.Name: bartek zacharewicz
user_reviews.Description:
I’ve been working with Johny and his associates for over five years, and they continue to exceed every expectation. Johny has handled all of my business insurance needs with exceptional care, including setting me up with a comprehensive umbrella policy that keeps every aspect of my business protected.

What really stands out is Johny’s professionalism and speed. Anytime I’ve needed help or had a question, he’s responded quickly and handled everything with clarity and expertise. He makes the entire process effortless, which is rare in the insurance world.

Johny is truly the best at what he does, and I highly recommend him and his team to anyone looking for reliable, knowledgeable, and genuinely dedicated insurance support.

user_reviews.Name: Enrique Carrillo
user_reviews.Description:
I’ve been doing business with Insureaze Insurance Solutions for over 4 years, and they’ve consistently made the process simple and stress-free. They’re truly a one-stop shop for general liability, workers’ comp, and bonds. What stands out most is how easy they are to work with—Johny, in particular, is always approachable, knowledgeable, and quick to provide solutions. Their professionalism and reliability have made them a trusted partner for my business, and I highly recommend them to anyone looking for straightforward insurance support.
Paintrix Inc.

user_reviews.Name: Derrick Clifton
user_reviews.Description: I’ve been working with Johnny and his team for nearly 6 years now. Not only are they extremely professional and responsive, but they are timely in everything they do. As a business owner, having the ability to reach out at any time for COI’s, workers comp questions or renewals without delays is imperative to our business operations. I highly recommend this organization to everyone. World class service, at a reasonable cost, with many options.

user_reviews.Name: Richard Hynes
user_reviews.Description: As a General Contractor, I am thrilled to have the opportunity to work with Insureaze. Johnny is Extremely Knowledgeable, a great communicator, and always readily available. He is a hard worker who gets straight to the point, making the process smooth and efficient. I feel confident having insureaze shopping for our insurance. Highly Recommended.

user_reviews.Name: Tari Electric Inc
user_reviews.Description:
I’ve been working with Insureaze Insurance Solutions for all the insurance needs of my company, Tari Electric Inc., and the experience has been excellent. Johnny has provided top-notch customer service and consistently goes above and beyond to make sure I understand my options and get the coverage that best suits my business.

From general liability to workers’ compensation and commercial auto insurance, Johnny has helped me find competitive rates and reliable coverage every time. He’s knowledgeable, responsive, and truly cares about helping his clients succeed.

I highly recommend Insureaze Insurance Solutions to any business owner looking for honest advice, great service, and peace of mind. Thank you, Johnny, for your ongoing support and professionalism.

user_reviews.Name: Oscar Orozco
user_reviews.Description: Johnny has been a great person to work with. Always answers my question in prompt manner. Customer service is awesome. Johnny has saved me thousands of dollars my insurance needs, both general liability and workers comp. I would highly recommend insureaze, for all your insurance needs. Thank you for all your help from Aquatic Horizon Pools & Spas.

user_reviews.Name: Russell Patterson
user_reviews.Description: Been working with Johnny for a few years and have had no problems. He is always quick to respond and give me the best pricing possible and also works with some issues to pop up along the way. Highly recommended.

user_reviews.Description: Johnny Bransford is an outstanding insurance broker! He is professional, makes everything so easy, and is excellent at communicating. Johnny answers calls and emails quickly, ensuring we’re always informed, and he takes care of our requests right away. We will continue to work with him for all of our insurance needs. Highly recommend him for anyone looking for top-notch service!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Boxers Plumbing
user_reviews_extended.Description: Johnny from Insureaze is great to work with. Easygoing and always responsive to calls, emails, or texts. Whatever you need, he gets it taken care of. Five-star service and the best coverage for liability and workers’ comp. He’s my go-to for insurance.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Miguel Castellanos
user_reviews_extended.Description: John Bransford with Insureaze Solutions LLC is above and beyond a five star rating. He professionally guided me throughout the entire process to getting insured as a new contractor; accepting calls and texts to answer my questions. John would email me promptly with quotes and would keep me updated on the entire process never leaving me in the dark. Whenever I had a question over text message or phone call, he would always respond or call back fast. I really do exude that you call John if you’re going into business or are already doing business, his expertise will speak for itself. I could keep on writing about how excellent he and Insureaze are but check them out for yourself. You will not be disappointed.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Andrew Ostermann
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been using Insureaze for 4 years and have been impressed with how they handle their customers. I have been using Johnny Bransford and I couldn’t be happier. They are the easiest company to contact, whether it’s a phone call, text, or email. They have gone out their way to help me as a new business owner get started with various types of insurance, and have done far more than any large insurance company could ever do. I really do appreciate companies that really care about their clients.

user_reviews_extended.Description: When Johnny first reached out to us in 2019, we were just getting started as a sole prop. plumbing company. user_reviews_extended.Description:

Thanks agin,
Brian Griffin

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marvin Rogers
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Insureaze is fantastic! I was referred to Johnny by another plumbing contractor and it's hands down still the best referral in all my years of owning my business. I don't know how he does it, but Johnny consistently gets us the lowest rates and his fast service is impeccable. Anytime we need anything he answers same day with exactly what's needed. He answers our questions and finds solutions to our insurance problems whether it's been general liability, bond, you name it!

If you need insurance, don't hesitate to let this guy give you a quote. I tell every contractor I know about him.

Thank you Johnny and Insureaze for being a reliable, affordable and thorough insurance solution for so many years. You've helped my business thrive and grow. Who knew I'd ever be this enthusiastic about insurance! But I am when it's Johnny and Insueaze.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lillian Scholz
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Johnny Bransford and his team at Insureaze have been exceptional to work with. In an industry where responsiveness and clarity matter, Johnny consistently delivers both. He’s extremely quick to respond, highly knowledgeable, and always proactive in making sure our policies align with the specific requirements across our projects.

Johnny truly goes above and beyond. His level of commitment to his clients is rare, and it shows in how smoothly our projects run. He’s become a trusted partner for our business, and I couldn’t recommend him more.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Daniel Stensberg
user_reviews_extended.Description: By far the best most easy to reach, communicates straight forward, if I need to add some one as additional insured it happens quick, I’ve referred many friends and will continue doing so, tired of waiting on hold ? Call Johney

I highly recommend Insureaze Insurance Solutions to everyone. You will not be disappointed.

title: Three Foundation Insurance Services
address: 4016 Geary Blvd Ste D, San Francisco, CA 94118, United States
plus_code: QGJP+HX Inner Richmond, San Francisco, CA, USA

user_reviews.Name: Marie Brlles
user_reviews.Description: Daniel was an amazing insurance agent. Everything went so smoothly and easily, and the communication was excellent. I'm from France, and he helped me insure a motorcycle when many major insurance companies wouldn’t. This company is truly human-centered — it's rare to find such perfect service these days. Thank you so much!

user_reviews.Name: Joseph Park
user_reviews.Description: I have been a client for over 16 years.  Over these years, I had many accidents (including a lawsuit) and events. Every step of the way, Daniel has been professional, knowledgeable, friendly, and loyal in helping and guiding me. The level of customer service is unmatchable and I have become a loyal customer. I recommend 3F to anyone, and genuinely am thankful for the service I have received. Daniel is willing to listen to customer's needs, does his best to accommodate and provide the best options. Additionally, what a great adviser!

user_reviews.Name: Greg Orzech
user_reviews.Description: Daniel has been our insurance agent for nearly 20 years and has helped us with a number of different auto insurance policies. He is extremely knowledgeable when it comes to auto insurance, organized, quick, enthusiastic, and great at landing solid coverage at the best price. We have never been anything short of totally satisfied with Daniel and Three Foundation, and I can't recommend them enough.

user_reviews.Name: Nicole Kuang
user_reviews.Description: Daniel was awesome and quick to help me out. Apparently it’s been ongoing that auto insurance companies are trying to pull out from doing business in California. I’ve been looking around for a car insurance that’s accepting new customers and offer a reasonable premium. I was referred to Three Foundation by a friend and Daniel helped me on the spot. Thank you, Daniel!

user_reviews.Name: Danny Kang
user_reviews.Description: Daniel has been my auto insurance agent for 17 years and what I like about him is he always makes my policy easy and simple.  Whenever I need help on claims or policies,  he calls be back for answers right away.  It doesn't matter the size of the problem, it seems that he takes care of it before I have to call him back.  He looks at the best ways to manage my policies and I feel that I can rely on his advice all the time.  His honesty, professionalism, and reliability made me to become his customer for 17 years!

user_reviews.Name: Ajay Kachwaha
user_reviews.Description: Daniel has been a fantastic agent for the past 6 years that I had a policy with Progressive. He helped me lock down a policy really quickly as I was on my way to buy a new car! And since then he has been an amazing agent, helping with add other cars, renter's policy... only reason I ended my insurance was because I sold my cars and moved out of state otherwise would have stayed for many more years!

user_reviews.Name: Minho Ha
user_reviews.Description: As a 12 and 1/2 years client, Daniel is a top notch professional insurance planner and very easy to talk to. He managed couple of collisions smoothly and you will easily get to know your coverages and plans. He also advise what to do when you are in trouble and extremely honest. It is very hard to meet someone who is qualified in this field. just ask him! he is ready to provide you a great personalized service.

user_reviews.Name: Douglas Dowers
user_reviews.Description: Great insurance experience.  I had a bitter end after 15 years with a small town and local State Farm agent.  I never met Daniel in person, and this was strange to me, but the way things are done now I suppose.  He was available ANY time I needed him.  I could call and leave a message, or send a quick email and he responded within a few hours.  Alway conscientious, asked clarifying questions, gave helpful advice, and a great product and service.  I would recommend Daniel and Three Foundation to anyone looking insurance services.

user_reviews_extended.Description: I've used Three Foundation Insurance Services for about 15 years. Daniel is very responsive, communicative, easy to work with, and always proactive about making sure I have the best auto insurance deals. Highly recommended.

user_reviews_extended.Description:
Got connected by chance to Daniel and his service by the dealership I bought a car from. Recently had to move policies, but truly appreciated Daniel's responsiveness, ability and professionalism in the 3 years of excellent service.

Will be sure to contact him at any time for any future insurance needs!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Yoon Haeng Lee
user_reviews_extended.Description: Had car insurance through Daniel for the last 3 years. I had to switch out when I moved out of state but I wouldn't have if I didn't have to . He is always available and quick to offer help. He guided me to get the right amount of coverage when I was new to car insurance and helped keep the premium low. He makes advice from the customer's point of view, and doesn't hide anything. Def recommend.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Donna Boyd
user_reviews_extended.Description: Daniel provided excellent service when other insurance agencies were telling me no, were not knowledgeable, or just weren't responding. He took my calls (even when he was out of the office!) and always got me answers quickly. He provided the proper coverage I needed and not to mention at a great price. I couldn't have asked for better service or coverage. Thank you, Daniel!

user_reviews_extended.Name: D C
user_reviews_extended.Description: I was a customer of Three Foundation Insurance for over 5 years for my auto insurance. I received nothing but the best service and attention from Daniel over the years. He was easy to get in contact with when I needed to and always there to answer my questions! Would highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael Hellerslien
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Daniel is the man.  He called me out of the blue (I was already his client) and asked if I wanted to switch to an equally good insurance company for $300 less per 6 months.
He didn't have to do it.  But he did because he clearly tries to do his part to provide good service to his clients.  I find that refreshing and I appreciate his work.

user_reviews_extended.Description:
Daniel is very helpful and experienced.

user_reviews_extended.Description: Danny is awesome. After someone hit my brand new truck (didn't even get my plates yet). He helped me to start a claim, talk to my adjuster, rent a truck, send in my receipts etc......I have 10 cars insured with him.

user_reviews.Name: Deidre Von Rock
user_reviews.Description: Fred is an incredible professional and I cannot recommend him highly enough.  He has provided a specialized business policy I could not find elsewhere and he and his team have been incredibly responsive and always available for questions.   I confidently refer Fred to clients for their business needs.   If you are looking for a thorough, thoughtful and capable business insurance professional, look no further than Fred at Regency Insurance.

user_reviews.Name: Sean Riordan
user_reviews.Description: Regency Insurance Services and especially Fred Danfoura is a great resouce for business insurance. Fred has the ability to explain the advantages and disadvantages of the various types of insurance your company needs in an easily understood way. I feel very well covered knowing that Regency Insurance Services are maintaining my Business Insurance!

user_reviews.Name: Paulo Filho
user_reviews.Description: My family and I have been using Regency Insurance Services for our car insurance for the last 10+ years ever since they were in Daly City. They have never been short of support and are always quick to assist with our car insurance needs. Recently we had an experience were our insurance decided to send us a non renewal notice but Fred was able to reinstate that and help my family out once again. We are very grateful for the quick communication and quickness of solution.

user_reviews.Name: Howard Miller
user_reviews.Description: I'm a bookkeeper and have referred several clients to Fred.  For one client, he cut their insurance premium in half.  For another, he found a claim where other insurance brokers couldn't.  For another, he told them to keep their current insurance because it was a good deal.  I'd recommend Fred to any business owner who needs insurance.

title: Zurich Simon - State Farm Insurance Agent
address: 1745 O'Farrell St, San Francisco, CA 94115, United States
plus_code: QHM8+6M Western Addition, San Francisco, CA, USA

owner.name: Zurich Simon - State Farm Insurance Agent (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Saul Gonzalez
user_reviews.Description: Saula at Zurich State Farm is beyond excellent. She has shown more consideration, patience, and knowledge than I have ever been met with from other insurance agents! She made me feel reassured and confident throughout the whole process of switching companies, and left me feeling like my needs were met and ultimately confident in my decision. I highly recommend Saula to anyone looking for the best insurance policies! Thank you so much!

user_reviews.Name: A Google User
user_reviews.Description: I can't say enough positive about working with this Agency.  They inherited my account from the former Resident Agent we had been with for 35 years. He was a HS classmate of my x wife. Since then, Zurich & Team ( Saula, etc ) have been deligent, available and super creative in aligning my needs with the best State Farm products ( home & Auto ).  As my vehicles aged ( 3 over 20 years old ) they found the best possible solutions at the best Rates ever. Thank you.

user_reviews.Name: kevin legaspi
user_reviews.Description: Joan made the switch to State Farm extremely easy! She has very clear and explained everything perfectly, helping me understand the importance of some coverages. She was able to get me some discounts and overall I am extremely happy with her and State Farm’s customer service already. Coming from Geico I never experienced customer service like this. Thank you Joan for making the transition smooth and effortless! The price of customer service is priceless to me and I’d rather pay more so I can speak to an actual person than have an automated system do all the work.

user_reviews.Name: Terry Davis
user_reviews.Description: Zurich Simon State Farm Insurance in San Francisco has been an excellent service provider for my Father. My Father has 2 homes and a car insured and he has been with State Farm from the now retired Don Lehr to current Zurich Simon for over 40 years. Zurich has continued the excellent support my Father has received along with his team, including, Saula Gonzalez.

user_reviews.Name: Tiana Celest
user_reviews.Description: Joan helped me with my auto insurance and she made everything really easy to understand. She was very nice and answered all my questions. The whole process was quick and smooth. I’d definitely recommend her.

user_reviews.Name: Richard
user_reviews.Description:
State Farm on O'Farrell Steet in San Francisco is one of the best insurance company in the bay area.  Zurich Simon and Saula Gonzalez are very professional and accommodating and take their time to review your policy and insurance needs thoroughly as well as follow up with any questions. We highly recommend using them for your insurance needs.
-Rick and Gabriella

user_reviews.Description: I had a great experience working with Saula at Zurich State Farm. She was professional, responsive, and took the time to explain my coverage options clearly. I felt well supported throughout the process and would definitely recommend her to anyone looking for reliable insurance services.

user_reviews_extended.Description:
I recently had the pleasure of working with Saula on Zurich’s team at State Farm and I couldn't be more impressed with her service. From the moment I reached out, she was incredibly responsive, knowledgeable, and patient.

What really stood out, however, was her willingness to go above and beyond. When I faced an unexpected situation while adding my son to my policy she not only guided me step by step through the process, but she followed up regularly as she worked to get the issue resolved. It was clear that she genuinely cared about providing the best service possible and making sure I was fully supported every step of the way.

In today's world, it's rare to encounter such dedicated customer service, and I am grateful for the peace of mind she provided. I highly recommend Zurich and his team  to anyone seeking reliable, thoughtful insurance services. They truly exceeded my expectations.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marie Larsen
user_reviews_extended.Description:
We had our cars insured with State Farm for 35 years and our home insured with SF since 1999, with the same helpful agent who retired this year.  I'm pleased to say the changeover to a new agent, Zurich Simon, has been seamless.  Representative John Pablo contacted me about earthquake insurance initially. Since  we had been considering purchasing that, the call was timely. John was generous with his time and patient with our many questions about our entire insurance picture.  We had questions about the right level of home ownership premium to cover the replacement value of our home after talking to different sources.   John helped explained how to calculate estimates and assured us we are carrying a reasonable level of replacement value insurance.
Since we moved our car insurance to Geico a few years ago to save money, John calculated our total premiums by bundling everything back with SF and offsetting the car insurance with at 20% discount to our home ownership policy. It took several back-and-forth conversations and separate quotes from John, but in the end it was cost effective to bring the cars back under SF and have access to one local professional SF agent.  Thank you, John for all your work in bringing clarity to our questions, as well as the peace of mind that this long overdue task has been adequately handled.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Estela González
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had the pleasure of working with Saula on my new policy. She was truly phenomenal! She took the time to explain everything to me and was incredibly knowledgeable. Definitely recommending her to everyone I know!

Luckily, Zurich and his State Farm team communicated effectively by regularly following up with me, giving me updates, and paying great attention to detail. They were able to process my claim and recommend low-cost auto repair shops near me. Their help was much needed because I commute across the Bay Bridge 3 times a week from class to work, and Zurich's State Farm team helped me out during a hectic week.

Thanks yall!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bella Nguyen
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been in midst of transitioning to this new chapter of my life in San Francisco, and honestly, it's been incredibly stressful and hectic. I admittedly haven't had the greatest customer service interactions in setting up utilities and other household accounts, which has only exacerbated the chaos and meltdowns. Therefore, you can only imagine what an absolute godsend it is to be able to connect with someone who is warm, efficient, helpful, and excellent overall at their job! I called State Farm and spoke with a Jason Pham about Renter's Insurance, and he was so on top of everything. He made sure to cover all of the bases, like how much coverage I needed, which add-ons I should consider to avoid a crisis down the road, etc. Even over the phone, I could tell how sincere he was about helping and acting on my best interests; he was so personable and reassuring about everything, and even pitched some recommendations for someone new to the area. I don't think I've ever had better customer service. Everything I needed was done immediately over the phone with such professionalism and time-sensitivity, and he even shared extra information about other insurance plans that State Farm offers that would help me save more long-term. I cannot recommend reaching out to this specific State Farm office enough, especially if you're also lucky enough to connect with the same fellow I did! Will definitely be looking to relying on them for all of my relevant needs moving forward.

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Nuaimi
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Update October 11th, 2023

This is a letter to the insurance Agent at the Zurich State Farm Agency in San Francisco. The letter, in short, is in response to an astronomical increase in premium for no clearly defined reason. The increase constituted an increase by 300% to close to $4,500 for a 6-month policy term without cause justification or explanation. This is my letter to Zurich himself requesting a call back and resolution to what only can be described as an industry wide fleecing of America.

I'm still waiting to speak to Zurich regarding my renewal quote for insurance on the above vehicle.

To date, payments have been in monthly installments of approximately $175 to $225 per month.

While I reluctantly paid the down payment or deposit towards this 6 month renewal term, I had asked to speak to Zurich regarding the renewal quotes which far exceeded the last 6 months policy term, and upon a discussion with your office discovered that the unreasonable premium for the renewal quotes had been calculated on an unsubstantiated presumption that miles driven far exceeded policy limits... if there is actually such a thing.

After receiving multiple calls from your office regarding payments towards this renewal premium that frankly constitutes a new industry price gouging tactic buy a company that I've always held in high esteem and with great respect for its professionalism fairness and "as a good neighbor State Farm is there".. but not there to exercise profiteering tactics to extort exorbitant premiums in an economy gone mad and in the industry that has proven to be the beneficiary of American suffering.

To that end, I  want to speak to Zurich tomorrow and at a time that is most convenient to him. I should be available after 10:00. Or you may simply give me a window, and I will call back during that allotted window  to set this matter to rest once and for all.

Previous post,:

I thank you for your time and consideration, and confidence that misunderstanding will be resolved to my satisfaction once and for all.

Please be reminded that I personally posted a review on Google. l held your company and your agency in the highest and most formidable regard with top tier review scores. I hope I didn't misconstrue it a mistake. Thank you for your time and I look forward to hearing back from someone scheduling a definitive meeting time tomorrow. Sincerely yours David Nuaimi

My previous requests and recommendation Second request following suggestion seems to have fallen on deaf ears as I have not yet received a formal written response
If I might make a suggestion to senior management of State Farm.  State Farm should offer gap insurance for new and used vehicles.  This would be an enormous benefit to most Americans who may have been misled by dealerships and not sold or told about gap insurance and the benefits thereof.

Just a suggestion!

title: Allpointe Insurance Services
address: 1459 18th St Suite 171, San Francisco, CA 94107, United States
plus_code: QJ63+X4 Potrero Hill, San Francisco, CA, USA

user_reviews.Name: Sirena Mccart
user_reviews.Description:
This is a third party provider that I never worry about whether the job is done correctly.  They are highly organized, their systems are vetted before they roll them out, and the whole team works in sync.  We have used Allpointe for a decade now, and I can't think of a single mistake.   Allpointe has provided consistent excellent service throughout.
Allpointe knows their business.  The company has great employee retention and it shows in their staff knowledge base.  The team is very personable and accessible, with employees responding same day, often same hour to my emails.  I especially appreciate their comprehensive services with user-friendly admin software, ease of employee on-boarding, legal compliance, and their direct support to employees and employee families.   I just don't worry about whether I've missed anything with Allpointe.

user_reviews.Name: Julio Cesar Morales
user_reviews.Description: We have worked with Brad and the team at Allpointe for a number of years and couldn't recommend them more highly! We are a small nonprofit (fewer than 10 employees), and we receive high-quality, personal service. As the benefits manager for my org, Allpointe has always been able to answer my questions, and provide supportive options as we offer benefits to our employees, all while keeping things cost-effective for our limited budget. They manage a smooth onboarding and renewal process for staff as well, and offer a portal than makes it easy for employees to access and understand their benefits. I highly recommend working with them as your benefits broker.

user_reviews.Name: Oscar Guido
user_reviews.Description:
I've worked with Brad and his team at Allpointe across multiple companies since 2009. First time was with a small start up, and now more recently again with a more medium-sized company.

Allpointe staff does a tremendous job of just slipping into your team as an extension -- they are plug n play, so you don't have to worry about the benefits stuff. Then you're free to focus on your core business. Side benefit: because they're such experts, you end up learning in every convo with them.

Moreover, everyone at Allpointe is just good people. Could not recommend them enough!

user_reviews.Name: April Gaston
user_reviews.Description: My preschool uses Allpointe and we've had nothing but wonderful experiences with them. From the administrative side, they take so much off my plate and offer helpful guidance and suggestions when it comes to making changes to the benefits we offer our employees. Our annual open enrollment is made so easy with a simple process, thorough information and really clear communication. They are so quick to respond and help with questions anytime. Cannot recommend Allpointe enough!

user_reviews.Name: Jennie Bucciero
user_reviews.Description: I recently partnered with a client in California to exit a PEO and transition to independent benefits, and we sought a broker to partner with us to handle the entire benefits transition. Allpointe was absolutely the perfect choice!  They have gone above and beyond to make the transition to all new plans and rates completely seamless, partnering to provide a high level of service to the client.  The entire team is extremely knowledgeable and made sure every detail was covered, really working as an extension of the internal team.  Employees reported 100% satisfaction with the new benefit plans and the enrollment experience, thanks to Allpointe.  We evaluated a variety of other brokers from around the country and I'm not sure we would have had the same success with anyone else. The Allpointe team was the perfect choice!

user_reviews.Name: Rebecca Kee
user_reviews.Description: The Allpointe team has honestly been such a pleasure to work with. I run a nonprofit preschool and don't consider myself an expert in the benefits side of things, so it's meant a great deal to have people I can trust with the things I don't understand! There's also just something about the friendliness and supportive nature of this team that makes me feel comfortable and welcome, even when I fear asking a "dumb" question. Plus my own staff is consistently very happy with the benefits and deals Allpointe finds for us.

user_reviews.Name: Suzanna Rush
user_reviews.Description: I've worked with the Allpointe team for seven years and cannot say enough good things about them.  They are (1) highly professional, (2) extremely responsive, and (3) plain good people.  I would strongly recommend them to any startup or business looking for support on the benefits side - they've been invaluable to us as we've grown.

user_reviews.Name: Taylor Keep
user_reviews.Description:
It's easy to underestimate the complexity and time commitment necessary to do a great job transitioning from a scrappy group of friends building a high value product into an effective business - with payroll, banking, permits, insurance, etc. And for many (like me - twice), that initial transition takes place without any dedicated operational expertise. Finding great partners is difficult and massively valuable.

For people in this position in the Bay Area, I highly recommend Brad Vaccaro at Allpointe Insurance Services. Brad and his team not only took care of benefits but regularly went above and beyond their duties helping us set up and maintain payroll and other services. They are a true extension of your team and will do whatever they can to help you succeed.

user_reviews_extended.Name: jacquelyn c
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've worked with Brad for 3 years and he has been an excellent insurance broker for my business (a preschool). He started with us from the very beginning and was so patient, organized, and thorough. Bradley Vaccaro was easy to access and always responsive. He has handled our health benefits and offered HR advice in a timely manner from the time our school opened in 2017. He has also offered support and personal recommendations as a fellow small business owner. We were so impressed with how responsive and helpful he was during the shelter in place order and was so helpful in helping us understand how to get our PPP loan and connecting us to resources. We hope you will consider using Bradley Vaccaro from Allpointe Insurance for you business too!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ruel James
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have had the pleasure of working with Allpointe for two years as a People Operations leader with Trove Recommerce, and I'm thoroughly impressed with their exceptional service. The speed at which they operate is fantastic, ensuring that our needs are met promptly. Their approach to handling our employees' benefits matters with utmost thoughtfulness and care speaks volumes about their dedication. Furthermore, their deep knowledge and expertise in the field of benefits have been invaluable to us at Trove. They've adeptly guided us through exploring various benefit plan options, demonstrating a keen understanding of the complexities within a rapidly changing benefits ecosystem. Special shoutout to Brad and Carolyn, who consistently go above and beyond to ensure that Trove is well-positioned for success. Their commitment and proactive efforts have made a significant impact. Highly recommend the Allpointe team for their outstanding support and expertise!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cara GPW
user_reviews_extended.Description: Brad & crew were terrific in helping our company get set up quickly with small business health insurance.  He's incredibly responsive, thorough, and friendly, and does an excellent job bringing clarity to a pretty mind-numbing experience.  We had worked with another insurance broker previously who didn't specialize in working with small businesses, and ended up with an overly expensive plan that didn't fit our needs.  Brad straightened everything out for us quickly and accurately.  If you need an insurance broker or help with small business health insurance & employee benefits in San Francisco, I highly recommend Allpointe.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Katie Holman
user_reviews_extended.Description: I LOVE these guys.  Allpointe has been *absolutely stellar* with customer service, delivering quick and helpful replies and going above and beyond to help my small team with all things benefits.  They assisted me with moving all benefits in-state, aligning our open enrollment periods (don't ask... I didn't set it up...) and ensuring we added value to employee benefits packages at minimal cost to the employer.  I could not recommend them more highly!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Casey Cobb
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've used Allpointe for years and highly recommend them. Any time I have questions or concerns, answers are a quick email or phone call away. I feel like I have a partner that truly helps me navigate benefits and healthcare for my employees and they have a slick portal that makes compliance super simple for new and existing employees (forms, signups, etc..). I'd never consider trusting anyone else with my business.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jess Taylor
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've worked with Brad Vaccaro and the Allpointe team for over 8 years now. I would describe them as professional, cheerful, and extremely responsive and responsible. A huge asset for an organization like Blue Rocket.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Eco temp
user_reviews_extended.Description: In my 25 years of experience, there is no one that does this job better, more complete, or more above-and-beyond what is required, than Allpointe. The only vendor I have ever given 100% support and recommendation without caveat or reservation. This is the high-water mark of service against which I measure all other providers. And no one even comes close. Congratulations Brad and team! Well done.

user_reviews_extended.Description: This company provides amazing professional excellent customer service! They follow through and make sure that deductions for your employees are correct! I have worked with many benefits companies and I would highly recommend them!

title: SIStation Auto Insurance Company California
address: 777 Florida St #311, San Francisco, CA 94110, United States
plus_code: QH5Q+QQ Mission District, San Francisco, CA, USA

user_reviews.Name: Paula Dheer
user_reviews.Description: After being rejected by multiple insurers because I don’t own a vehicle, I was frustrated. Non-owner SR-22 policies seem simple until you actually need one. What stood out here was how knowledgeable the team was about state filings and compliance timelines. They didn’t oversell anything, just helped me meet the requirement so I could move forward. I received confirmation quickly, and the coverage met exactly what the DMV requested. This experience restored a lot of trust for me.

user_reviews.Name: Garyn Q ekaterini
user_reviews.Description: I was honestly overwhelmed trying to figure out how SR-22 insurance even works after my license issue. When I came to their newly relocated office, the energy instantly felt different—calm, organized, and patient. The agent broke down my options for non-owner SR22, explained the state filing requirements, and double-checked everything so I wouldn’t run into another suspension. What really stood out was how they never made me feel judged. Getting back on the road isn’t easy, but they made the whole process feel doable. I’m seriously grateful.

user_reviews.Name: Rena Fena
user_reviews.Description:
Wasn’t planning on dealing with insurance today, but after getting a DMV notice about my suspended license, I drove over to SIStation SR22 Insurance Company California on Florida St. I’d passed their building before heading to Atlas Café, and this time I finally pulled in. I was nervous — had no clue how SR-22 filings even worked.

The lady there was calm and super professional. She broke down the SR22 filing process in plain English, helped me compare liability vs full coverage, and found an affordable auto insurance plan that didn’t blow up my budget. My proof of insurance hit my inbox before I even finished my coffee.

Took maybe 20 minutes total. I walked in stressed and walked out breathing easier. If you’re in San Francisco dealing with DMV headaches, just come here — they make it simple, quick, and honest.

user_reviews.Name: Anderson Kaul
user_reviews.Description:
My first week in San Francisco, I got blindsided when the DMV told me I needed an SR22 filing just to keep driving. Coming from New Jersey, I’d never even heard of that. I was stressed and embarrassed, honestly. While grabbing coffee near Mission High School, I saw SIStation’s sign on 17th and decided to give them a shot.

They didn’t just sell me something — they walked me through the SR22 process, explained my options, and sent proof to the DMV within the hour. Best part: they got me on a budget-friendly SR22 premium I could actually handle. Big weight off my shoulders.

user_reviews.Name: jimmy carcoverage
user_reviews.Description: I’m someone who asks a lot of questions, especially when legal and insurance stuff is involved. Instead of brushing me off, they walked me through every step—from choosing the right policy to submitting the SR-22 form to the DMV. I appreciated that they focused on long-term compliance, not just a quick fix. Because of them, I avoided mistakes that could’ve caused another suspension. That kind of guidance is priceless.

user_reviews.Name: Dawson Cole
user_reviews.Description: I honestly expected this to be way more stressful than it was. I needed help getting my filing done correctly so I could stay compliant with the DMV, and the team handled everything without confusion or delays. They explained the difference between policy options clearly and made sure my coverage met state requirements. Even after they relocated to their new office, communication stayed smooth and consistent. It felt organized, professional, and fair priced. Definitely a solid experience.

user_reviews.Name: Tanner Emerson
user_reviews.Description:
Got stopped near Potrero del Sol Park on a random Tuesday during work hours — turns out I’d been driving uninsured without knowing. Court gave me a deadline for an SR22 filing and I honestly panicked. One of the tech guys at my office whispered about this insurance office on 17th Street that helped him get SR22 after a DUI.

user_reviews.Description: Inclusive Insurance is wonderful to work with. We find them to be knowledgeable, responsive and very easy to work with. When we have a question or need something they respond immediately. They regularly market our renewals to make sure we have the most competitive rates. When we call, we always get a rapid reply to our questions.

user_reviews.Name: Nicole Albicocco
user_reviews.Description: Inclusive Insurance gets an A+ in all areas, from Insurance to 401k, ancillary and PEO- and everything in between. John Nielsen from Inclusive, is one of the most thorough, responsive brokers and his knowledge base is bar none. I would recommend John, as he would be an major asset in devising, recommending and implementing solutions for any company and any size.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ryan Zivelonghi
user_reviews_extended.Description: Inclusive Insurance Solutions is an outstanding commercial business, insurance, and employee benefits brokerage. Their knowledgeable staff has a great understanding of the insurance industry and is consistently up-to-date with the most current products and services. They have access to all the workers' compensation markets, and even harder to find property insurance for our construction business.  Their Employee Benefits team has innovative programs that help meet our employees where they are in terms of cost and benefit design.  Their team is experienced in addressing complex issues, negotiating the best coverage and value for their clients, and providing customized solutions for every situation

user_reviews_extended.Name: Todd Lammie
user_reviews_extended.Description:
John has always been very helpful and my Knowledgeable Go To Business Insurance Resource

Inclusive Insurance has helped many of my clients and is a great resource for all business owners seeking comprehensive commercial insurance coverage at competitive rates.  They have provided helpful guidance to the business owners refer to them for Employee Benefits, Investments, PEO selection marketing and Commercial and Workers' Compensation options.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Trang Chung
user_reviews_extended.Description: Excellent service and peace of mind! The team is professional, responsive, and truly cares about their clients. Highly recommend for anyone looking for reliable insurance agency.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kelly Riggs
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have a small business, and John is the best for health insurance! He responds quickly when we have a question and answers all of our questions thoughtfully. We wouldn't work with anyone else!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Aaron Brynen
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Inclusive Insurance is your PEO Marketing partner. They know the importance of Human Resources, Employee Benefits, Workers Comp and Commercial Insurance in a way that literally will make you feel like you have a partnership with them.

If you want a holistic insurance broker with all the technology and knowledge you need for your business then trust my information and call Inclusive Insurance.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sean Zhang
user_reviews_extended.Description:
why our restaurant owner loves working with Inclusive Insurance.

Inclusive Insurance provides our business with a top-rate client experience. We love their use of "smart" forms and applications, that make it easy to apply and renewal to new insurance options.  They have awesome document management that is paperless, and enables sharing, and an e-signatures.

Less Work For Us: We don't have time to deal with annual renewals Inclusive provides us with 'smart forms' auto-maping the answers to duplicate questions across all forms and applications, decreasing the time and work it takes your clients to input data.

We are a happy client and think you will be too!

Sean Zhang, Owner

user_reviews_extended.Name: DawnSignPress DSP
user_reviews_extended.Description: Inclusive Insurance is wonderful to work with. We find them to be knowledgeable, responsive and very easy to work with. When we have a question or need something they respond immediately. They regularly market our renewals to make sure we have the most competitive rates. When we call, we always get a rapid reply to our questions.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Darren Carlin
user_reviews_extended.Description: Fastest Insurance Agency in the west! This is ultra important when closing real estate deals. Their team continues to amaze us every time we send them a client with the best communication, service and performance in the industry! Keep up the great work Team Inclusive Insurance!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Robert Ingram
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Group Benefit Experts
Inclusive Insurance Solutions has been our group benefits resource for nearly 10 years. I took over as the director of operations for our 56 employee non-profit and I can’t say enough good things about our Broker/Consultant.  Our agent helped me with even the most basic issues that popped up from time to time.  We have navigated all the changes in the Affordable Care Act together, new administrative policies and new state regulations.
What I love the most is:
#1 Responsiveness: they are always there to answer questions.
#2 Knowledge: they know the interplay of legal requirements, insurance needs and provide a balanced approach.
#3 Easy to use: they make my life easy! Making all the communications for me so all I need to do is tweak a few things.

I can’t say enough good things about John Nielsen and his team at Inclusive Insurance Solutions

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kimje Gabrielse
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great employee benefits broker!  I have been working with John for a few years and can testify to his professionalism, industry knowledge, and positive attitude.  I can always rely on John to be thorough and provide the best customer/business experience.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ulf H Wynnsdale
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Norwegian Yacht Voyages is a rapidly expanding global operation within the expedition segment of the cruise industry. We needed a resource knowledgeable on matters that might affect our operations. Having been recommended to us, we reached out to Inclusive Insurance and they connected us with resources that helped answer our questions and concerns as we grow both domestic and international.
Ulf Henrick Wynnsdale
President & CEO

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jay Sutton
user_reviews_extended.Description: John Nielsen of Inclusive Insurance is a knowledgeable and trusted advisor. I refer businesses to him that I know — who are in need of insurance coverage.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Thomas A
user_reviews_extended.Description: Talented and professional, I would wholeheartedly recommend.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stevie B
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great service ! Knowledgeable, capable, attentive

user_reviews_extended.Name: Peter Leth
user_reviews_extended.Description: Incredible professional and dedicate customer service.

user_reviews.Name: Sue Kirkland
user_reviews.Description: We've been with State Farm for over 30 + years and they are always very helpful and professional. Tiffany & Erika and the entire team have been very prompt to all of our needs whenever we reach out to them. We highly recommend the team. Sue K

user_reviews.Name: Norman Ramion
user_reviews.Description: Tiffany and her team are the best insurance agents I've worked with, bar none. They always take the time to listen, and questions, and offer the best policies possible for best rates possible. I recommend her without reservation.

user_reviews.Name: Emily Arnold
user_reviews.Description: Tiffany and her team provide amazing, tailored, personable service.  We have been working with her for over a decade and have felt really cared for the entire time. Most recently, we added our teenage son to the auto insurance and she worked with us to try to find ways to help us save money on our other policies to help offset the costs.  I highly recommend Tiffany and her team!

user_reviews.Name: Nancy McKinney
user_reviews.Description: We were transferred to this office following the retirement of our State Farm agent of 30+ years.  We were used to dealing with a two-person office and didn't know what to expect from Tiffany's larger team.  We don't have to contact our insurance agent often, but a recent move meant changes to multiple policies.  Fortunately, the person we connected with was Krista.  She's been very responsive and thorough and has effectively followed up on details like ensuring that security monitoring and multi-policy discounts are correctly applied.  Thank you, Krista!

user_reviews.Name: Brian Wong
user_reviews.Description: Erika, Wesley, & Tiffany all have helped me out in recent weeks.  As always they have been super responsive and helpful in getting quotes and adjusting my plan.  I have been with them for at least 15 years now.  State Farm rates have gone up significantly in the last couple years, but this is more a statewide industry issue and not a function of this office.

user_reviews.Name: Debra Turner
user_reviews.Description:
Tiffany Won's team are  always very professional, courteous and efficient. I recently dealt with Krista who responded quickly to my request to cancel a policy.
Excellent customer service.

user_reviews.Name: Yolanda Owens
user_reviews.Description: After visiting a State Farm office where they took my phone number, I decided to call Tiffany Won’s agency. Steven del Terzo answered my call. He was efficient, friendly, and professional. Looking forward to a great working relationship and leaving that other company starting with a P behind.

user_reviews.Name: Be Tea
user_reviews.Description: Krista was a huge help while I was administering an estate. Her guidance made the process much smoother and ensured everything was handled properly. Highly recommend.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sue Kirkland
user_reviews_extended.Description: We've been with State Farm for over 30 + years and they are always very helpful and professional. Tiffany & Erika and the entire team have been very prompt to all of our needs whenever we reach out to them. We highly recommend the team. Sue K

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marilyn Ines Rodriguez
user_reviews_extended.Description: My family home and cars insurance are bundle with Tiffany Won. Her response rate is fast &  precise. Very intelligent & professional agent. Highly recommend her!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Richard Harrison
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been with Tiffany Won for over 10 years and state farm for around 30 years. Recently I thought I was going to have to cancel State Farm because my rates tripled. I contacted Tiffany and she was able to diagnose the problem and provide solutions so that I did not experience such an extreme increase. Throughout my 10 year history with her,  she and her staff have been able to help with strange occurrences and quick quotes and I am grateful for each one. People are so quick to complain about problems and almost never give compliments... I decided to give her credit for her excellent service and say thank you publicly!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Eric Lee
user_reviews_extended.Description: Wesley was awesome to work with! He was patient with me throughout our call and was able to get the best price for my insurance. I'm glad to be able to connect with Wesley to assist with my questions.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Denise Dorsey
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Steven was amazing- I think it took less than 5 minutes to get my auto policy changed!!  He was soooo efficient and cordial!

Thank you Steven for excellent customer service!

Denise Dorsey👍👍

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nicolle Hamilton
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany's team is very responsive and engaged whenever I have a question! Krista L recently helped me with questions and I was so grateful at how fast she responded.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Wesley Alexander
user_reviews_extended.Description: Rare that I meet a person with the same name as me! Wesley was fast, efficient, didn't make any offers incredibly out of my means. I told him I had a goal and he delivered. I'll be calling Wesley back to renew for sure.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michele Raska
user_reviews_extended.Description: We've always had a great experience working with Tiffany Won and team at State Farm Insurance. This was highlighted recently when we worked with Krista on some adjustments to our policy. She was super thorough and knowledgable, and on top of that was so friendly and kind. I felt comfortable asking all of my questions, and Krista made me feel confident that everything was updated, adjusted, and set to go. Thanks Krista for making this experience so smooth and pleasant!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sandy Lee
user_reviews_extended.Description: State Farm has been handling all of our insurance needs since we switched several years ago. The customer service is great. You can reach out to either Tiffany or Krista and they are alway glad to address or answer any concerns. Because State Farm is going some changes in California we had to reach out and make some adjustments in our policies.  Tiffany and team are very responsive and take the time to explain things.  While insurance coverage is very comparable, it’s the customer service that makes the difference.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Hwee Yeo
user_reviews_extended.Description: We've had all our insurance needs taken care of by Tiffany and team for several years, and have always experienced awesome and prompt service.  What's more amazing is even after we had to change insurance company because of a move, we continued to get excellent service and attention from this team.  We want to especially commend Krista on her excellent service.  She jumped immediately on an urgent request for our auto insurance claims history, was patient, responsive to followups and super reliable.  We would highly recommend her to anyone with insurance needs!  Thank you Krista!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kira Arnold
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've had State Farm policies through Tiffany Won for nearly a decade now. I've always experienced excellent customer service whenever I've had a need to contact them. My most recent experience was with Krista L. She is a newer rep, so there were a couple questions she wasn't immediately able to answer over the phone, but she was able to clearly explain the answers she did have to my questions, and she was very prompt in following up with me via email for the other questions she has to check on. Overall another great experience.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Christine M
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had a fantastic experience with Tiffany and her team, especially Krista. They were efficient, professional, and made consolidating insurance with another household member seamless. Their clear communication and expertise made the process easy and stress-free. I highly recommend them for any insurance needs!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Andi Hawley
user_reviews_extended.Description: Krista provided excellent service—knowledgeable, efficient, and very easy to work with. She made sure everything was handled smoothly and with care. I’d highly recommend her to anyone looking for professional, friendly, and reliable service!

user_reviews_extended.Name: emm m
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany Won, State Farm Insurance Agent, and her Team consistently demonstrate knowledge, build trust, and cultivate loyalty. At each moment when I had a question, Tiffany and her team immediately responded with grace and knowledge and took the time to ensure that my concerns were comprehensively resolved. Lastly, Tiffany and her State Farm Team drive excellent customer service with professional communication and warmth. Tiffany Won and her State Farm Team deserve 10+ stars.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nadine E.
user_reviews_extended.Description: I was insured with State Farm when I was living in the US many years back. I now needed a few documents from the time back for confirmation, and Krista was amazing in helping me out. She responded very quickly, was super helfpul and kept me in the loop on all activities. It was a pleasure interacting with her and I am very grateful for her help after so many years. Can only highly recommend this team.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bibiana Bauer
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I love Tiffany and her team— she's been my agent ever since I was a college student and goes above and beyond to make sure that I'm getting the best deals I can on any and all policies I have through State Farm. Her office staff are very helpful and responsive and I've overall had a very positive experience with them.
I had to transfer one of my policies over to another insurance company about a year ago— Tiffany's team was very helpful in connecting me with agents from other companies who would be a good fit for what I needed. I was able to find one without too much hassle and everything worked out fine, but the new company definitely doesn't have the personal touch and relationship with me that Tiffany does.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jodi Baumann
user_reviews_extended.Description: State Farm has been my insurance partner for 20 years and Tiffany Won has been my agent for the past five. I have been so happy with the level of service and coverage she and her team have provided. The guidance the gave me as I went from a TIC to a condo, helping me with additional polices like umbrella insurance and even recommending other people in her network like a lawyer to help with my will and trust. They always answer my questions responsively and listen to me.  I recommend Tiffany and her team to anyone with insurance needs that wants more than an agency — but a partner.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ed Sheffner
user_reviews_extended.Description: Wesley Walker in Tiffany Won's office of State Farm was helpful and efficient in dealing with two insurance issues regarding condo insurance and adding coverage for a new car.  The cost of insurance is increasing too fast for people with fixed incomes, but if you accept the need for it, the staff in this office of State Farm are reasonable people to work with.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chau Le
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany Won and her team are the best! I've been a client for years and they are always so friendly and responsive. Today I needed last minute event insurance for my son's birthday. Courtney was able to obtain this for me so quickly and at half the price I was quoted elsewhere! Every time I have a question or need help, they're always there and make things so easy. Thank you to Courtney and Tiffany for all your help!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jodi Garcia
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been with State Farm for 8 years and I have all of my vehicles, life, and renters insurance through them. I have even added my family member to it as well, When she was unable to get insurance elsewhere because in California insurance is a thing now days. My entire 8 years has been flawless Agents from office will call randomly to make sure all is ok. If I need to make an adjustment it’s done easily.. Filling a claim is very simple do it right in your phone and get a response within 24 hours. State Farm Tiffany Won and team are truly the best you can get if you want personal service that is where you will get it. This team does care about you and your needs. I would recommend them to anyone, in fact if you have the opportunity just call and get a quote and talk to the amazing staff if you aren’t convinced from this review then you will be after the call. Just want to say thank you to you all

user_reviews_extended.Name: trung tran
user_reviews_extended.Description: Absolutely thrilled with my experience with my State Farm agent! From the moment I reached out, they were quick to respond and incredibly helpful. They took the time to answer all my questions and made the entire process smooth and stress-free. Highly recommend if you're looking for efficient and friendly service. Five stars all the way!

user_reviews_extended.Name: jimmy h
user_reviews_extended.Description:
My previous agent retired after five years of exceptional service, during which time he ensured that our payments remained stable. Unfortunately, our new agent, Tiffany, has not been able to maintain this level of service. I contacted her regarding our payment and her assistant or team provided a generic response and were unable to assist us further. They did not offer any alternative solutions. Subsequently, I discovered that I had been reassigned to a different agent.

This demonstrates that Tiffany and her team do not prioritize the needs and concerns of their clients. A competent and client-focused agent would offer alternative solutions rather than abruptly terminating the relationship and delegating the matter to another agent.

If that is what you desire, then you may choose her.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jude Sargent
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I am an elder, and had received notice from my State Farm agency that my bank had declined my auto insurance payment. I was confused about this, as I had thought I was on auto pay. When I got the
texted notice  about the bank declining my payment, I was able to communicate my confusion to my State Farm office, and they explained that the card that I was using for payment was no longer valid. I realized then that I had taken out a new card, and that was why the old card was no longer valid. This office helped me re-establish my auto pay with my new card, simply by working with them on the phone, which was very helpful to me and took care of my problem immediately. I really appreciated their kindness and clear explanations of what had happened and what I needed to do. I'm very pleased with their service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Julia C
user_reviews_extended.Description: Krista was super helpful and thorough reviewing our rental condo unitowner’s policy. We weren’t sure how to figure out how much building coverage we need. Krista offered to review our HOA documents to make sure we had enough coverage which ended up saving us money. On top of that, she was very friendly and prompt in all her replies. We are very thankful for all her help!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Fabi Cruz Cabrera
user_reviews_extended.Description: “Wesley was incredibly helpful in getting me set up with affordable car insurance. As a single mom trying to figure out this whole insurance process on my own this year, I really appreciated his patience. He went out of his way to explain how insurance works and took the time to find the best option that fits my needs. Thank you again, Wesley!”

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ccgreen
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had a wonderful broker with State Farm for over 20 years, and he recently retired. He told me that the only person he would refer me to was Tiffany. I'm so glad I took his advice! In the six months I've been with Tiffany and her amazing staff (you will always reach someone to get immediate assistance) they have surpassed the service, knowledge, friendliness, and efficiency of my prior broker. You won't go wrong with Tiffany!

user_reviews_extended.Name: cam tran
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Update: even though I had to cancel my policy with State Farm because they no longer write policies for our area, the customer service has always been great. Krista L made it very seamless to process the transaction. I'd happily go back to State Farm with this office if/when their policy changes.

I feel like picking a new insurance agent is generally a shot in the dark. I saw that Tiffany Won’s office had great reviews so I went for it. It turns out that I got really lucky! I had the fortune of getting paired with Steven D and it was a great experience from start to finish.

Insurance shopping isn’t something you do for fun, but Steven made the whole experience incredibly seamless. He was responsive and exceptionally clear with all his communication—answering the many questions that I had with great detail and expertise. When I needed guidance, he provided sound advice without being pushy with the suggested coverage. To top things off, he was able to significantly reduce my yearly premiums. I’d highly recommend Steven for your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Selvin Salgado
user_reviews_extended.Description: I was looking for a Life insurance plan that was affordable but also protected my family and I found just that. Reached out to this office and worked with Erika. She did a great job at guiding me with the best plan that suit me and my life needs. Super easy to work with and knowledgeable. If you are looking to find the best protection but also great service call her up at Tiffany Won’s office!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Haydn Zhang
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a customer for a few years. Wonderful team and very responsive services. Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: T. Metague
user_reviews_extended.Description: Shout out to Erika Montalvo at Tiffany Won’s office. Erika has always been very responsive and professional as my insurance needs have changed over the years. I’ve been with Tiffany’s office a number of years now, and would not hesitate to recommend her and her extremely wonderful staff!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mark Barthel
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany-is-the-best. How's that for an insurance review opener? How often do you hear that about an agent? Tiffany and State Farm have carried multiple policies for me over the past decade including for both my car and my home. She’s always cheerful, always knowledgeable, and always provides top notch customer service. I would have happily typed a positive review and endorsement had I never even needed to file a claim. As it turned out though, last year I did. I suffered a plumbing accident on the second floor of my home and the damage was extensive. It required the replacement of wood flooring, carpeting, remediation services, and atop all that I was contending with the failing health of my cat. Tiffany went above and beyond. The situation was almost unfathomably stressful, and not only did she and State Farm come through on every front, she took the time to truly check in on me; not just the process of getting the home back in order. If you’re looking for an agent, you would be well served in calling on Tiffany Won. She won’t let you down.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Carol Machado
user_reviews_extended.Description: The service received from State Farm from the first day has been excellent. We needed the insurance for our first rental and the service was wonderful every time, which is why, now that we are renting again, we are looking for State Farm again. All the people who have assisted us at the different times we have contacted them have provided us with the information and advice we needed in an assertive and precise way. 100% recommended.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Severin Stone
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany Won & her team are amazing! I ran a food truck and catering business in Los Angeles and the greater surrounding areas and they are constantly doing certificate of insurance work for my truck and have always done so in a timely manner! Courtney, Especially has been amazing to work with! So great to work with people who are so easy to get in touch with, and always do the best to get you taken care of

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chuyi Yang
user_reviews_extended.Description: It has been so wonderful being a client with the team at Tiffany Won's office. For the past four years they have been incredibly helpful, responsive, and knowledgeable when it came to my renters insurance policy. Even during the course of the pandemic and a few moves, my renters insurance always remained affordable. While I had to find a new provider to keep up with California's fire policy, I would highly reccomend working with Tiffany Won's office and would work with them again in the future!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jonathan Senigaglia
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love working with Tiffany Won and her whole team! When I purchased a new car, Courtney was super easy to work with. She fielded all my questions, and got everything updated quickly and with a great attitude. And the price is really competitive too! Highly recommend this State Farm office for anyone who wants a high level of service from their agent.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Astha Gupta
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany and team, especially Krista, have been amazing at helping us keep our State Farm condo building insurance! We’ve retained our reasonable insurance despite all the churn in the state, kept our low rates and no claim discounts, and Krista in particular has kept us in compliance despite payment hiccups on our end due to the churn with First Republic Bank and a bumpy transition to Chase. Glad we found them! Allstate was charging us nearly double.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Zha Zha Liang
user_reviews_extended.Description: Really wonderful service from the Tiffany Won team! Even when my point of person isn't available, another team member will jump in to assist me. I wasn't expecting a speedy response and service, but Krista was super helpful. Love how I can rely on them when I need a customized COI for work.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tawnya Brode
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany and her office are always very responsive, friendly, and knowledgeable.  I’ve always been pleased with service.  Recently, I’ve been working with Courtney who has continued the great customer experience.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Pattananiti Wirattigowit
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I reached out to Tiffany Won - State Farm Insurance Agent for a car insurance quote. I was pleased when Erika responded to the coverage level I was looking for and made a suggestion that added additional protection that made sense monetarily.
