I called in a day or so later late afternoon since I had to provide proof of liability to DMV. Krista answered the call and said that Erika happens to be out on that day, but she assured me that another representative on the team would reach out to me when I shared my sense of urgency.

Special shoutout to Steven who confirmed the quote and carefully listened to all my needs. I wanted to pay for this auto insurance on a different schedule, and Steven made that happen. The whole interaction with Steven was extremely efficient, and I had what I needed shortly.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Eric Dizon
user_reviews_extended.Description: Courtney's professional service of adding my new vehicle to my policy was a smooth process. I am grateful for her efficiency and quick response time. She is very knowledgeable and offered additional coverage, which I did added car rental. I am so happy to be a loyal policy holder at Tiffany Won State Farm Insurance. You guys are the BEST! Thanks again, Courtney, for your hard work and attention to detail.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nancy Ganner
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've held policies at State Farm for 25+ years and I've been with Tiffany's office for at least 10 of those years. They've always been responsive to my needs. Erika is very friendly and quick to reply when I've needed it.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lana Tainter
user_reviews_extended.Description: Thank you for all your help and support.  State Farm is the very best insurance company and I highly recommend you give them a call

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alicia Halpern
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I had a great experience working with Steven when switching my car insurance over to State Farm. He worked with me to find the right coverage at a great price. Renter's insurance through State Farm is also incredibly affordable. Really friendly and great customer experience. I highly recommend  Tiffany Won's office.

Edit: Customer service continues to be excellent. Eddy was super helpful when I needed to make some changes to my policy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jalena Wright
user_reviews_extended.Description: Awesome Team!! I have been apart of State Farm for almost 10 years and Mrs. Won’s and her team has provided me with awesome service, always responding in a timely fashion, giving me different options on my insurance policies, and being patient with me!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ethan Lim
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had trouble finding my declaration page, but Krista was extremely helpful and made the process easy. She was friendly, professional, and quick to assist me. I really appreciate her great customer service!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ruth Hartman
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Tiffany and everyone on her staff are truly five star. Every interaction I've had with them has been professional, timely, and thorough.
I transferred to this office after my State Farm agent retired. My initial meeting with Tiffany to review my coverage was a fantastic experience. She showed me where I was both over and under insured and gave me options to consider for both current and future coverage. I felt that she was truly looking out for my best interest based on my individual needs.
I have recently gone through a homeowners claim. The communication with the claims department was quite arduous. Tiffany and her staff shepherded me through the process and helped greatly as a conduit of information and communication to resolve the matter and receive payment.
I give them the highest recommendation possible - EXCELLENT!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kelly Powers
user_reviews_extended.Description: New across-the-industry insurance hikes prompted me to reach out to Krista Lambeth to see what could be done about my soon-to-be-renewed auto insurance.  There were at least 6 or 7 back-and-forth emails/phone calls where she provided me options.  Super quick and efficient.  Attentive, friendly- great customer service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Me M.
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany Won and team have been very attentive and helpful to our family in managing our home, auto, and umbrella insurance policies. They are proactive in contacting us when a payment is due if we miss it and setting up automatic payments we can manage easily in the State Farm app. Thanks, Team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marge Gabbert
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I had some questions about my home and auto insurance and Steven Del Terzo answered my questions 100% to my satisfaction.
His answers were very clear and easy to understand, and he sent me a written explanation so I could print it out and save it to refer to later. I have had other conversations with other agents, and they were all knowledgeable and professional and very helpful!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Karen Wiederholt
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Tiffany Won has been an amazing person to work with. She always makes me feel welcome and supported. Tasks that I would avoid doing (like figuring out life insurance) are easier with her non-judgemental, helpful attitude. I feel I can trust Tiffany.

I've recently also worked with Eddy Padilla and Erika Montalvo in the State Farm office. Both are very responsive to emails and follows up with whatever they said they would do. A great team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mike and Huma
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Tiffany and her State Farm team
are my first call for all things insurance. They are smart, responsive and honest. The whole team really knows the ins and outs of the industry and makes you feel like they truly want what’s best for you. I regularly refer Tiffany to clients, colleagues and friends without hesitation.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jasmine Smith
user_reviews_extended.Description: Special shout out to Steven Del Terzo !!!! He was an absolute doll to work with !! He did a very excellent job explaining everything! And making sure we got an amazing deal ! I would definitely recommend this company to others and make sure they ask for Steven personally! A 10/10 service ! Appreciate it !! Steven was able to get us on Renters insurance! And a life insurance policy as well as coverage for vehicles! Good and affordable rates !

user_reviews_extended.Name: Al
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Krista at Tiffany State Farm was amazingly helpful in helping me processing my policy. Very intuitive and knowledgeable every step of way!

Thanks Krista
-Alvin

user_reviews_extended.Name: Barry Krasner
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Tiffany and her staff are great!

A few years ago, I sold off my car in SF and Allstate abruptly canceled my umbrella insurance because I no longer had automobile insurance.

Tiffany and State Farm were willing to sell me an inexpensive non-owner auto insurance policy so that I could maintain my umbrella insurance coverage.

I had called around to multiple insurance companies, and no one else was willing to do this for me, except Tiffany and State Farm.

And they did this for me despite the fact that my homeowner insurance was still with Allstate!

Tiffany and her staff are the best!

user_reviews_extended.Name: J. Son
user_reviews_extended.Description: Wesley was great to work with & made the process of getting my new auto insurance easy. I'd highly recommend Tiffany Won & team for their excellent communication and resourcefulness.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stephen cooper
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very helpful at breaking down your policy and explaining everything out and stay very honest and upfront about your insurance your getting

user_reviews_extended.Name: dev loz
user_reviews_extended.Description: My time with State Farm Insurance just continues to get better. My partner wanted to add motorcycle insurance to our policy. I easily filled out a short questionnaire on the app one night. The next day a representative called me back. Steven Del Terzo was friendly and knew his stuff. Without much time being spent he was able to produce the quote. After going over the quote with my partner it was simple to accept the addition into our current policy. Thanks to Steve for answering all of my questions and providing excellent customer service. And thanks to Ms. Won for having a great group of people to assist people like me!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: s d
user_reviews_extended.Description: We've used Tiffany for years and couldn't be happier.  She's been a pleasure to work with and always there to help us out.  Highly recommended!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Radu Ranga
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany's office and team were incredibly responsive. In working with Wesley, we achieved all of our insurance goals in two short calls. Had a wonderful experience with State Farm in terms of coverage and costs as well as this local branch.

user_reviews_extended.Name: ruben bantilan
user_reviews_extended.Description: I called in today to make changes to my policy. Krista was very quick, kind and helpful with my request. Some representatives don’t have the enthusiasm Krista has. She also responded quickly to me email question. Great customer service!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alan Wu
user_reviews_extended.Description: Working with Tiffany has been a great experience. She spent a lot of time going over our family's assets and life goals and made sure that everything was protected. The experience Tiff provided was a huge turnaround from another State Farm agent that rarely took the time to reach out and engage. It's nice to know she has your back as situations change. Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: La’Rue Martin
user_reviews_extended.Description: Krista was so helpful ! I’m really glad she took out the time to address my concerns and she was very solution oriented!! It can be nerve wracking talking about insurance and I appreciate her calm yet proactive tone. Thank you again Krista !

user_reviews_extended.Name: Robert Imazumi
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I've had the pleasure of working with Tiffany on multiple occasions and she has always been extremely responsive, diligent and most importantly HONEST! She looked over my policies and made sure I was properly insured and even took the time to refinance my new car after I simply used the dealer financing. By far the easiest loan experience I've ever had.

In the world of insurance, Tiffany and her team are top notch. If I could give them 6 stars I would. HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kate Fricker
user_reviews_extended.Description: Steven + the rest of the team at Tiffany Won are great! Have had multiple policies with them over the past few years and have no complaints. Always quick to respond with any questions I have, highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Palepa Mageo
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very great customer service! Tiffany Won helped me through my process and was very kind and patient. She made everything feel easy going for me. I am very pleased with the service I received. Thank you Tiffany!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Zha Zha Liang
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Reliable and exceptional service!

I've had my business liability insurance with Tiffany Won for the last 6 years now. My point of person, Marycruz, has been super helpful and quick on responses. When she isn't available another team staff would step in! Courtney saw I had a last minute deadline for a COI and she was able to help assist it. They truly make my life so much easier with their excellent care!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gina Lynn Cabonce
user_reviews_extended.Description: Quick and exceptional service each and every time. Today, Courtney was able to add our new car to our policy just by answering a few questions via text.  This was super convenient as I was in work meetings all day.  I was able to communicate with her when time permitted.  She gave me some recommendations but I never felt pressured.  Thank you Courtney and team for being so easy to communicate with.

user_reviews_extended.Name: J. L. Gold
user_reviews_extended.Description:
(Third Review)
Oops they’ve done it again. I was in a serious incident involving a homeless person who made contact with my vehicle. He further threatened me and vandalized my car.

When I initially phoned State Farm and spoke to Krista, she immediately asked if I was all right. Then I provided a statement as to what exactly happened. Krista reassured me that I was covered and further connected me to the appropriate individuals to jump start the claim process. I met that same day with the police to file an incident report for the record in addition to getting an appointment at the body shop to assess damages. A week later she phoned again to ensure I was in the right space and if I needed anything else to close the loop in the matter.

Finally a company that cares about your well being instead of looking at you as a dollar sign! Tiffany Won’s team gives stellar service and know their jobs very well!!! Thank you!

(Second review)
I am a very satisfied customer of State Farm. Most recent I was registering my vehicles at a local DMV office when the clerk told me my insurance company had not reported coverage recently obtained to the state of California. I immediately phone State Farm, spoke to a representative with T. Won who provided me copies the policy.

The team is thorough, honest and have gotten back to me in an expeditious manner when I needed information which in these days and times is hard to find. Thank you for your services. You have a client for life!!!

(First review)
It is a pleasure doing business with Wesley. He was patient and very detailed even went above and beyond to ensure I understood the policy for my lifestyle. Because of Wesley’s thoroughness, I will be transferring my auto policy to State Farm within the next 30 days.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nicole Hall
user_reviews_extended.Description: Wesley assisted me in my insurance and also informed me of my current life insurance policy. I was paying into a policy that would not cover my monthly expenses if in the event something may have happened. I am greatly satisfied with State Farm Insurance and the excellent customer service State Farm employee offer at any given time.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Carrie Barrineau
user_reviews_extended.Description: Steven Del Terzo was very helpful and was able to answer all of my questions for a lesser used auto policy. Courtney and Erica also were very nice and they seem to work well as a team. Very happy with the service so far and recommend them!

user_reviews_extended.Name: jodie m
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had a friend refer Steven Del Terzo. He is great actually, I like that his tone of voice is very friendly and up beat! He was very welcoming and I asked for some quotes and he emailed them to me right away. After a few minutes, I called another company for quotes but they seemed not as happy over the phone not like Steven was. I am really big on that. So I called back to speak with Steven again and signed up because he was great over the phone and gave me extra information that I didnt know of. Thanks for helping me 😁 & keep being awesome!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gadiel M
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had called for a quote, Wesley went above and beyond helping me get started with joining the State Farm Family. He was very friendly, efficient, and provided such a positive experience I decided to move forward on the spot! Thank you, exemplary service!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Leslie Sullenger
user_reviews_extended.Description: I found Krista to be not only knowledgeable about the car insurance questions I had, but also extremely proactive, accommodating, and very friendly. She is also serious, responsible and efficient! A great addition to Tiffany's team.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marbled Mint
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Tiffany and her team are amazing!  We've been with them for a few years now and their service is always on point. They are quick to respond to our emails and always have the answers to our questions. We absolutely trust Tiffany and her team!

- Shout out to Eddy for always being so prompt and friendly!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Krishawna King
user_reviews_extended.Description: Steven Del Terzo was of great assistance. I reached out for a quote over a month ago he stayed in contact and insured me he was available for any questions. When it came time to finalize my needs he was available in minutes. He was of great help and made me feel comfortable in making my final decision. Even after I had questions was available in minutes. I’m very happy and very Thankful for Steven at Statefarm. Glad to be apart of the family now.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Eric Fang
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany Won's office was very helpful in getting me setup for auto insurance and provided affordable rates.  I unfortunately had to cancel my auto insurance with them as they couldn't provide homeowners insurance for California and my current homeowners insurance required the auto-home bundle.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jaclyn
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Awesome to have an insurance agent nearby. Just got motorcycle insurance for my Go4 meter maid trike. It was super simple! Westley made extra sure that I would be able to set up my policy for driving around the city.

I'm excited to work with them (but hopefully I won't have to!) in the future, and will recommend this office to anyone looking for State Farm coverage, especially if they're in my neighborhood or lookin to insure a silly little car.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Aprille Espinueva
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had a wonderful experience with Wesley who helped me through the process of adding a vehicle to my insurance. He guided me through various options and getting the best deal. The whole process was simple and efficient. Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gary Borella
user_reviews_extended.Description: Excellent experience with Tiffany Won's Team at State Farm. Erika provided us outstanding service by discussing our options and adding our teenage driver to our insurance policy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Karen O'Neill
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Tiffany Won and her team have consistently provided us with excellent customer service --- for all of our insurance needs (homeowners, auto, umbrella, personal articles, & earthquake). They were really helpful in processing a claim following a recent vandalism to our car and in processing a homeowner's discount after the installation of a new home alarm system.

Extra shout out to Eddy Soto Padilla for his incredible responsiveness, professionalism, and help in responding questions and follow-up.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Amy Iftekhar
user_reviews_extended.Description: A friend recommended Tiffany Won, State Farm Insurance, and from the beginning Tiffany and her team have been exceptionally friendly, responsive, and comprehensive in the delivery of their services. It was a huge change from our last insurance agents! We highly recommend Tiffany and team.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ziyad Al-Wakeel
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany Won and her team have been nothing but excellent, always attentive and responsive, they always get back to me within the day and I never have to ask twice. I have several policies with them and been with Tiffany for 8 years and can't think of even one instant where they didn't deliver. Two claims over the 8 years and they handled it all. Grateful it's one less thing for me to think about.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ana Le
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany was referred to me by a friend and referrals go a long way with me. Tiffany and her team have been great to work. I appreciate how experienced they are and how much they strive to provide great customer service, from being patient with answering all my questions to being responsive with any of my requests. I would recommend working with Tiffany and her team.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nick Driver
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany and her team provide excellent service. Krista Lambeth was the latest on the team to go above and beyond for me. Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nancy Soto
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany and her team have always been super helpful. They’re always quick to respond. Eddy helped me set up a life insurance for my husband and I. He was really informative and made sure we were comfortable with our decision.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Peggy Marcenaro
user_reviews_extended.Description: Recent communications with Krista Lambeth were always cordial, informative, helpful, and quickly answered my questions. I’m pleased to have this State Farm agency overseeing my home insurance. Thank you, Peggy

user_reviews_extended.Name: Julie Reyes
user_reviews_extended.Description: I switched over from being with Farmers Insurance for 10 years and could no longer take that slow-burn anymore (rates gradually increasing). I wished I would’ve found Tiffany and her team sooner. I would’ve saved money and time! Tiffany has been amazing since day one- ensuring timely meetings, customizing each policy line, and taking the time to understand my needs as a customer. Tiffany and her staff have made this transition seamless and I could not be any happier.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Steve Nguyen
user_reviews_extended.Description: Switched from AIG to State Farm years ago because State Farm was able to offer me a higher umbrella policy. I searched around and State Farm ended up being one of the more cost effective insurances. Had my initial consultation with Tiffany years ago and she was very thorough. So far, I have had no issues with them and they even check up on me yearly to adjust my insurances to save me money and make sure I have to the appropriate coverages. Special shout out to Adreanna for taking the time to go all my new updates and checking prices for me.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chioma Ume
user_reviews_extended.Description: Steven is always ready to help answer my many conversations about insurance. He's incredibly friendly and responsive – and always does his best to help me find the policy I need. I've been insured by Tiffany's office for years, and although I've been lucky enough never to have to file a claim, I've always had an excellent experience!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Letrisha S.
user_reviews_extended.Description: Mrs. Tiffany State Farm office takes care of all my insurance needs. If I  have questions or concerns,  her staff (Wesley) is always happy to assist me. I would recommend this State Farm office to anyone if you want to experience good and efficient service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: M. J. Guerrero
user_reviews_extended.Description: When I transitioned to move our auto and HO insurance to State Farm, that was the best decision I’ve made in years!  My former insurance carrier never offered the kind of attention, time or concern that matches State Farm.  It was a huge relief to entrust Tiffany and her team to help guide me in making sound decisions for the needs of my family. Tiffany and her team (Adreanna) provided exceptional service  with helping me assess  my family’s insurance needs and coverage. Their response time and communications are timely and prompt.  What sets them apart from the rest of their competitors is that they truly care! Thanks so much Tiffany and Adreanna!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tyler Fong
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been with Tiffany for over 10 years and her and her team and been extremely helpful, patient, responsive, and professional throughout our relationship.  They've been very transparent and I never feel like I'm being sold any service.  I highly recommend checking them out if you're shopping for a new insurance group!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Loren Adrian
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany was more helpful than any other insurance agent I have dealt with in a 40 year span. I had a couple of collector vehicles that were a problem to move into our insurance coverage. Over 3 months of going back and forth Tiffany found a way to cover all my insurance needs. She is attentive and very responsive. I have recommended her on a number of occasions.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Julia Brown
user_reviews_extended.Description: Wesley, part of Tiffany Won's State Farm team, was so helpful in advising me on my renter's insurance and earthquake insurance. It was the first time I had purchased either of these and Wesley explained my options and the cost breakdown super clearly. When I had a follow-up question, he was so quick to call me back and clarify things for me. Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: seleste hermosillo
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great customer service! Erika M helped me look for great coverage within my price range while looking for cheaper alternatives since my current insurance increased. Everything went smoothly and she made everything easy!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Edward Agustin
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany and team handled my a recent claim with ease! I contacted Tiffany on the day of my auto accident, spoke with claims, found the other party liable the same day and had my car in the body shop two days after! She has contacted me several times since to follow up and check that all is well. Very professional and awesome customer service!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ryan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany has been great. I talked with her over the phone a couple times when I was looking for a new insurances. She helped me figure a what coverage would be best for me and there was no pressure to sign a policy. Since becoming a client I have emailed her a couple times and she has been just a responsive as when I was looking for insurance.

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Bartz
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany and her team have been a pleasure to work with.  Compared to other insurance companies I’ve dealt with in the past, they are incredibly responsive.  Yesterday I sent Eddy an email, got up to get something to drink, and had a response when I got back to my computer.  Who does that?  Tiffany and her team do. Highly recommended!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tin T
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany is knowledgeable, reliable and so efficient. She is quick to reply and thorough in all her responses and if she is not available, I always hear back from another staff member promptly. I value the way she goes above and beyond to help and her thorough explanation and analysis of the different policies offered to meet my needs. I use her for my personal properties including my home and umbrella coverage and also my commercial properties, she does it all. I trust her.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chukwueloka Ogbu
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have always had a very amazing experience with State Farms. The customer service representative Wesley Walker always answered all my questions in a prompt and professional manner. He is very helpful and demonstrates that he really cares about his clients interests as he is always there to help. Highly recommended!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Larrenzo Brown
user_reviews_extended.Description: My State Farm agent was a man named Wesley. He was amazing. He answered all my questions and even gave me good questions to ask. Appreciate his help. Been a state customer for the past 5+ years.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Roman M
user_reviews_extended.Description: After the recent storms I realized I didn't have renters insurance and that it would probably be a good idea for me to get some because you never know what could happen. Eddy was incredibly helpful in helping me find the policy that was right for me and was very informative in explaining it to me and answering any and all questions I had. Highly recommend him and the Tiffany Won agency to anyone who may be in the market for some insurance.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dale Beermann
user_reviews_extended.Description: We've worked closely with Tiffany as well as Steven Del Terzo. They have both been amazing, from helping navigate 3 homeowner's policies needing timely quotes, to figuring out whether or not insuring our cars with them would in fact make sense (it did). State Farm's prices are great here, and their service has always been top notch.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jessica Lee
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany and her team have been there for our family for almost 10 years and seen us through numerous life changes.  The are always super responsive, good with follow-up and follow-through, and creative with their solutions to try and get us the best coverage at the best rates.  I highly recommend them.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Betty Nogues
user_reviews_extended.Description: Steven Del Terzo was the agent that presented my home insurance options comparing them to what I've had in the last couple of years.  He was so helpful and patient with me.  With his help I decided to sign up with State Farm in a bundled policy including my auto insurance.  We had been insured for our automobiles for 47 years with CSAA.  With his informtion I was able to compare and make what I believe to be an educated decision and I am very happy.  As I mentioned Steven was very helpful.  Usually my husband handled these type of decisions but now I have to and Steven made it comfortable and easy to decide.  My appreciation to Steven and Tiffany.

user_reviews_extended.Name: LaTanya J
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’m very happy with the service I receive from Tiffany Won and her team Especially Eddie Soto.  Eddie is wonderful. He is so thorough, patient and he knows the products very well. I also appreciate that if I ask him something and he is not sure he goes the extra mile and finds out for me. I couldn’t ask for a better person to handle my insurance needs. It is a great pleasure to find people in any industry that treat the customers with tailor- made care and respect. I’m sharing this review in the hopes that others will get the opportunity to be served by a team of individuals who will help you get the insurance you need.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Arlene Romana
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Tiffany deserves 10 stars. Don't be fooled by her newly open office, she's seasoned and very knowledgeable in her line of work. I would honestly say that she's the best insurance agent I've ever dealt with in San Francisco, Bay Area.

The level of service that she gave me was so amazing. I had a 401k account from my past job that I still haven't rolled over yet bc my new job kept me very busy, she offered to help call my previous job to get information as to how I can roll it into a different account the right way. She ensured that when the rollover happened the right way, with no penalty charges. Not to mention she even sat in the 3 way conference call with me and my old 401k company, then finished everything for me, hassle free.

As a young professional, I find investing intimidating. Tiffany walked me through options that worked really well for me in a way that made me feel like she really cared for me as a friend, not just another customer. I feel so happy I found her office.

Thank you so much Tiffany! I will recommend everyone I know to call your office for insurance :)

Stay awesome,

Arlene

user_reviews_extended.Name: Aravind Mani
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany Won and her team are great. They are quick to respond to my questions, they always follow through, and I appreciate them very much!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jennifer Lim
user_reviews_extended.Description: Eddy helped me with a renter’s insurance quote. I’m moving soon so changing insurance plans is the last thing in my mind. Eddy was friendly and quick in his response and we set up a plan to transfer all my car and renter’s insurance to my new location within minutes. He made it quick and painless. The service and responsiveness is unmatched at State Farm. Thanks Eddy!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Aidan O'sullivan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Was helped by Wesley, who was very calm and attentive to my particular situation, not to mention quite relaxing with whom to talk. Before calling the office, I had been dreading sorting out a cohort of insurance policies, but Wesley's competence and smooth FM radio show host voice was comforting to the point were I began to enjoy the State Farm calls, ironically like the commercials said I would. When there was an unforeseeable policy complication from my end, Wesley involved the right people at the office and it was all sorted out quickly.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stephanie Silvestre
user_reviews_extended.Description: Eddy did a great job assisting me with client/customer support.  Tiffany and her team will without a doubt be by your side for insurance needs.  They will treat you like family.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael Whatmore
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany Won is an excellent State Farm Agent. Tiffany and her office team makes insurance look easy and effortless. Great service, coupled with good rates; my experience with Tiffany is casualty insurance has never been better!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Zuzu
user_reviews_extended.Description: My family has been working Tiffany for years now. When we have questions or need something done on their end, it gets done. They are very good at responding whether via email, or phone. She has a good team that makes when he need get done.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brandon Blake
user_reviews_extended.Description: I work at a different insurance company and yet I’m still a proud client of Tiffany. The speed, quality, and genuine care from her and her team is immediately felt. Can’t recommend them enough.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Patrick Cannon
user_reviews_extended.Description: We decided to change our State Farm agent and contacted Tiffany Won's office, based on her high ratings.  We're glad we did--Steven Del Terzo, a specialist in Tiffany's office, was incredibly responsive and helpful as he worked with us to fine-tune our longstanding HOA policy so that it better meets our current needs.  His customer service was off the charts!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Elliot Bartz
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany is the master of her domain. She knows how to help anyone with their personal insurance as well as investments, banking and lending needs. She is also connected to a fantastic network of high quality professionals who can help her clients find anything else they might need. Besides being an absolute operator, Tiffany is kind, genuine, and simply a fantastic person to know and work with. I have sent her several clients and every single one has been satisfied and relieved that she was able to help them so quickly and solve their problems completely and totally. You're awesome, Tiffany! :)

user_reviews_extended.Name: Adrianna Boghozian
user_reviews_extended.Description: Steven was so helpful in getting my coverage transferred while we were moving from out of state. He was extremely responsive to my many requests and was a pleasure to interact with both on the phone and over email. I highly recommend using this office for your insurance needs!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jonathan Koshi
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been with Tiffany's office for years and recently worked with Steven on her team to add an auto policy. They're always transparent and responsive to all of our questions. Steven not only helped me BEFORE I purchased our car on what it would cost to insure, but on the day of receipt had our policy ready to go and we sprang it on him out of the blue because our car came early! Definitely sticking with this team for all of my insurance policies.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dana
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great team at Tiffany Won.  They are fast to respond and make changes where necessary and to help get the best rates. Tiffany is fantastic!  She is warm and welcoming and highly professional.  We need more insurance agents like her!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Calvin Ling
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I've been working with Tiffany, Eddy, and the rest of the team for the last ~5 years: they've been nothing short of professional every time.

I like that they respond to my emails about new quotes, issues, or billing questions quickly and they do their best to answer all of my questions. Their rates are also super competitive, which always helps.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Julie Baumgartner
user_reviews_extended.Description: I actually got HOA insurance bids from several different agents, and Steven was the best! Obviously, one of the biggest factors was the rate he was able to get me, but he also was very responsive, able to explain what everything meant in terms I could understand, with great attention to detail, and came up with a creative idea to help me save money. I highly recommend working with Steven for your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stacy Del Monte
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany has been helping our family for almost 10 yrs. She is the most responsive and professional in her field that we have experienced. She takes the initiative to contact you should there be a deal, added benefit or a chance to reduce your rates. I would highly recommend Tiffany.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Libby Dodd
user_reviews_extended.Description: I want to thank Krista for her help resolving questions regarding my ca earthquake policy. It's great to do business with an insurance office that ALWAYS has someone knowledgeable answer the phone and  do research when necessary.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Isak Belas
user_reviews_extended.Description:
What an absolute great service!! Easy and professional customer service!! Wesley WAlker helped me through all the steps to become a member of State Farm family ( Tiffany )  !!
I’m speechless!! What a difference between my previous insurance and State Farm regarding costumer service and team care !!
I will refer many friends to you guys :)
5 star Wesley you are the best :)

user_reviews_extended.Name: Will Wannaviroj
user_reviews_extended.Description: Courtney was great. She provided me with great information about my policy was was able to direct me to the right policy. Every email was answered promptly and professionally.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tania Garcia
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had a positive experience with Wesley while sorting out my car policy. He was informative, cordial, and exceptionally helpful throughout the process. Highly recommend his services.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Paulo Gilberto Pereira de Albuquerque
user_reviews_extended.Description: Excellent service! Steven, Eddy and Tiffany are super helpful and quick in responding to customer requests and take the time to explain in details policy changes and questions that arise during the process of purchasing a auto or home owners policy. Highly recommended.

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Maxim
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have had communications with Tiffany and Eddy, and both were
very knowledgeable and helpful in figuring out the best insurance
policies that fit my needs. I have little doubt the other agents at that
office are as cordial and of equal skill.  I'm glad State Farm has agents like Tiffany and Eddy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Iheem Antone
user_reviews_extended.Description: State Farm is like family. They take care of their customers at all cost. No matter the situation. State Farm has your back and guarantees help in any way they can deliver it, rather it be the receptionist or the CEO (Tiffany Wong) they have phenomenal service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jonathan Fong
user_reviews_extended.Description: Just reached out to the office to request a change on my insurance and they got back to me quickly and without a delay. In fact, it was me that was delayed by a couple days but they still responded in less than an hour each time!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ashley Timmington Roehm
user_reviews_extended.Description: I just recently switch from Allstate to State Farm after being dropped 3 years in a row from the outside coverage they have to use to cover our home in the woods. Steven Del Terzo from State Farm came highly recommended in my mountain neighborhood. Steven was so helpful and took care of everything. He relieved so much stress and I am so thankful our home is now fully covered. Great prices and I could not be happier! Thank you so much!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tina Ly
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany is my agent and has been ever since she worked at the Castro office.  When she opened up her own agency, I had to make the switch!  The level of service she provides is as if she was my personal agent and no one else’s.  But in all reality, she has tons of clients and she just works her butt off to give attention to each client.  She’s the only agent I know that has a true passion for insurance.  Thank goodness too because who the heck loves to sell insurance?!?!  Lucky for you, Tiffany does!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Benjamin Chavez
user_reviews_extended.Description: I transferred my life insurance policy to this office because I seen such great reviews on their quick responses and great service! I worked with a wonderful agent named Adreanna. She was incredibly knowledgeable and made me really feel like I was in control of my financial success. The staff is all so kind and work so hard to make things so simple. I highly recommend reaching out to Adreanna for your life insurance needs, she's AMAZING!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kaila LaWarre
user_reviews_extended.Description: I absolutely love working with Tiffany! She is an amazing agent who is highly responsive and genuinely cares about her clients and her team. Her passion for the industry and her role in it shines through in everything she does.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Elizabeth C
user_reviews_extended.Description: Krista was very helpful and patient, guiding us through all our questions on homeowners and auto insurance and very promptly made updates to the policies when requested. She is very responsive, friendly and professional.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gia Punjabi
user_reviews_extended.Description: I switched over to State Farm after being with Farmers Insurance for 2+ years and was getting sick of the rates gradually increasing. I wished I would’ve found Steven and his team sooner. I would’ve saved money and time! Steven has been brilliant so far - ensuring timely meetings taking the time to understand my needs as a customer. Steven has made this transition seamless and we could not be any happier. My parents have also decided to insure their home with State Farm and I'll be referring Steven to all my friends here in the future.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ron Merk
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have worked with Tiffany Won and State Farm for a number of years, obtaining both my car and home insurance from them.  They are a great organization, and always get me super deals on insurance, and offer really solid service.  I highly recommend them.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Matthew Schaefer
user_reviews_extended.Description: Once again, Tiffany Won's office fulfills my needs quickly & efficiently. This time, I needed a copy of my policy. Courtney got back to me with the information in less than an hour!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brad Gakenheimer
user_reviews_extended.Description: My wife and I recently got married and got our rings insured through Tiffany, and her and her team even helped us save money on our renters insurance policy on our new place. Her and her team were awesome through the entire process, super responsive, made everything straight forward, simple and easy and we couldn't have asked for better service, or rates :) Will continue to go through Tiffany's office for our other insurance needs we have going forward and recommend to anyone else.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nilotpal Pegu
user_reviews_extended.Description: Best agent I have worked with in my professional career. Offered wise insights into plans and policy choices, extremely due diligent and meticulous with her approach. I would say the biggest asset has been the timeliness of her response and how she was able to break down complex terms into what a layman would understand. Highly recommend her for any insurance needs, even if you are shopping and looking for comparisons and ideas. You won’t be dissapointed

user_reviews_extended.Name: Steve Xu
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've worked with Eddy for a few years now.  What stands out to me is the level of customer care that he provides.  He takes the time to walk me through the coverages and does a great job of explaining the policies and answering my questions.  He also provides honest recommendations.  Working with Eddy has given me a lot of confidence in my insurance plan.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shinichi Kogi
user_reviews_extended.Description: Everyone at Tiffany's office is super helpful and friendly. I knew nothing about car insurance especially when I started talking to them, but they explained to me how things work, what each item means :) Highly recommend these folks :)

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nicholas Goldman
user_reviews_extended.Description: Everyone at Tiffany's office has been fantastic. Tiffany got me  great rates for my policies and her staff has been very responsive and professional. I am glad to have brought my business here.

user_reviews_extended.Name: su om
user_reviews_extended.Description:
The BEST and PROFESSIONAL team that will take care of your needs and leave one feeling FABULOUS and CAREFREE. They get the job done!!! This beautiful team understands the products and services of State Farm Insurance and are RELIABLE and only define EXCELLENCE. They treat their clients as family and receive first class quality service.

Thank you Steven, Tiffany, and each and every one of the team on board for giving your clients the confidence, compassion, love and support.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Martine Habib
user_reviews_extended.Description: After a flooding incident during the storms, we called Eddy Soto Padilla, a member of Tiffany's team. We were developing black mold on the walls after we pumped out the water. Eddy was extremely friendly, helpful, and responsive. He not only helped us file a claim, but he also gave us advice as to what to do while we waited for a clean up company to view the damage. Thanks to his advice and with some hard work, we were able to get rid of the mold, even before the company responded. It felt good to know that our insurance agents were ready to help in any way possible.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Clarissa Louis
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany Won’s team is second to none! In particular, Eddy is professional, responsive, thorough and timely. Very positive experience across the board. Every request I’ve had with this team has been met with urgency and prompt follow through.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jeff Kalvelage
user_reviews_extended.Description: #1 AGENT IN SAN FRANCISCO! I love working with Tiffany and her team, they are caring and listen, to ensure clients get the best rates. I live in Washington State, but always refer to her agency when people move to California, because she does the best at home & auto insurance, as well as mortgages (yes purchases & refinances!).

user_reviews_extended.Name: keilanie Allen
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had an amazing experience with this company. This was my first time getting insurance for my new car, I was calling for a round up of the cost, and I ended up just sticking with this company. Great prices and customer service. I was on the phone with Wesley from state farm and he work with me and provided evey detail and information I needed. I had so many questions and he answered them all very well and honest.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tiffany Bindoo
user_reviews_extended.Description: We had a wonderful experience with this State Farm branch!  I highly recommend this agency for Home Owner's policies.  Our Agent, Steven Del Terzo, was VERY responsive and knowledgeable.  He helped us every step of the way to get a Home Owner's policy for our new home.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Eben Benson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Insured my car and apartment with Tiffany for the last 4 years. She is always very helpful and found me good deals and packages so I could get the most for what I was paying. Would definitely recommend her if you’re trying to get insured and don’t have a ton of time to sift through the endless options of insurance out there.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jeffrey Shen
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been with Tiffany for 4 years now for my home and car insurance. She has always been very responsive and is great at explaining nuances of different policies so I have all the information I need to make the tradeoffs that suits my risk profile.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michelle Rios
user_reviews_extended.Description: Phenomenal customer service, constantly checking in too assure I am sufficed with my insurance, based on my previous experiences, Tiffany Won state farm is number one, with exemplary staff that are kind and patient, I would most definitely recommend them everywhere!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ash Kim
user_reviews_extended.Description: I worked with Wesley for auto insurance and he was incredibly informative and helpful! I also use Tiffany's services for home insurance and I highly recommend - they're fast, responsive, professional, and transparent.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Liesl Anne
user_reviews_extended.Description: Worked with Steven Del Terzo and he was awesome! Quick, knowledgable and professional. I got a quote for auto insurance within minutes with a full explanation of options and benefits. Even added on an umbrella policy which I have been putting off thinking it was a big deal. Took 5 minutes all in and so glad I called Tiffany's office!

user_reviews_extended.Name: derren w
user_reviews_extended.Description: I setup home owners with Wesley Walker, I was very pleased with his customer service and his patience since I was still shopping around. Wesley is very knowledgeable, friendly, and efficient! Also State Farm came in better price than geico thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sindhura Kodali
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany and her team have been super helpful - I worked with Steven del Torzo and he has been wonderful at pricing different options for me so I can  decide what works for me. They are helpful, prompt, and made the whole process seamless and worry free. Very happy with their service. Would definitely recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: K C
user_reviews_extended.Description: I first contacted Tiffany Won's State Farm office because of the wonderful reviews on Google and Yelp, and I was not disappointed! Adreanna helped me with getting me set up with small business liability insurance and commercial vehicle insurance. She explained everything carefully, and she even took time out to tell me why it was important to get a specific type of coverage to protect myself, and what I may want to revisit in the future. I could really tell that Adreanna cared about the clients she worked with, including myself, and I have nothing but praise for her professionally and as an overall lovely person. Thank you again for all the helped Adreanna!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jefferson Curry
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been working with Tiffany and her office for three years now. They are consummate professionals and have provided me with great, friendly service. I highly recommend them!

user_reviews_extended.Name: maria rojas
user_reviews_extended.Description: Love State Farm, Eddy is GREAT, he has answer all my questions with a great answer. Really helpful.  Every time I have a claim the insurance has fixed my car/truck really fast, they get me on the road ASAP. Will definitely recommend State Farm and will tell people to contact EDDY HE IS THE BEST!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Andrew Spalding
user_reviews_extended.Description: Steven has always been so helpful with any questions I have or changes I need to make to my policies. Highly recommend him and the Tiffany Won team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lorenzo Russo
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Tiffany helped tremendously with my move to San Francisco from Louisiana.

I bought my first motorcycle not long after relocating to SF. I was not familiar with all the special coverage options that are offered with motorcycle policies, but Tiffany was very well-versed and clearly explained all the options and then confidently made recommendations to me for coverage.

She competently explained everything to me for the renter's insurance I needed as well.

I am so thankful that my State Farm agent back in Louisiana connected me with Tiffany and I highly recommend her to anyone in need of counsel or coverage!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Vic
user_reviews_extended.Description: Steven was awesome! I was looking for car insurance at an affordable price, and he explained everything in detail and with transparency!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jaylen Hollis
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had a great experience getting my auto insurance set up by Wesley W! The process was quick, informative and I am happy to be apart of State Farm auto insurance.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jonathan Khuong
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany and the team are always responsive and helpful.  My questions are answered quickly.  Top notch quality service 10/10.  Would highly recommend to everyone. Unbeatable competitive pricing, coverages, and service all rolled into one.  Thank you Tiffany and team.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael Beckler
user_reviews_extended.Description: I just worked with Tiffany on some information that I required for one of my cars, she was very helpful and responsive. I have been with Tiffany Won State Farm for years and it's always been a joy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ryan Kennedy
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Really great insurance agent. Super responsive and helpful.

I needed to get my address changed on a policy and made a typo when inputting it online. They texted me to confirm the address change and that’s where I noticed the typo there. Afterwards they were able to help me correct it quickly and apply it to my policies. Really appreciate their services and recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tesia Blackburn (Acrylic Diva)
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany's office is always super helpful. Courtney immediately emailed me a copy of my Cert. of Insurance.  You can't get better service than that! Highly recommended!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Anthony Lindsey
user_reviews_extended.Description: I called their office to sort out some overlapping coverages between a couple of different policies.  I spoke with Eddy and he was very responsive and helpful - he explained the parameters of our policy with them and offered to evaluate another of our policies even though it was through a different agent.   He even read through our condo CCRs in order to make sure the policies were working together properly.  In the end he helped discover that we could lower our premiums by adjusting our coverages...thanks Eddy!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Polina Nesterova
user_reviews_extended.Description: “Working with Tiffany has been like finding the golden ticket in the insurance Wonka factory. I’ve been with her for a few years now, and somehow, she still hasn’t blocked my number! She answers my endless questions like a pro—always in record time, as if she’s in some kind of insurance Olympics. I’d highly recommend her services, unless you hate fast, friendly, and expert help… in which case, stick to Googling confusing insurance jargon!”

user_reviews_extended.Name: Elisabeth Torrens
user_reviews_extended.Description: There is a reason this place has 5 stars all around. They are transparent and genuinely care to help. Let's face it, most people don't enjoy shopping for auto policies or understand them. I am one of those people. Thank God, when I called this place a year or so ago I was connected with Eddy. He has been my go to guy there since then. Eddy is so knowledgeable and to say that he has "good customer service skills" is an understatement. When I talk to Eddy, it feels like I am talking to a REAL person/human with a soul. Not just someone who is trying to hook me into a poor policy and get top dollar out of me. Eddy also has a great memory or takes good notes because every time I call he seems to remember our previous convos. Which is great because I don't have to explain my policy history every time I call. No one likes having to repeat things. Long story short, Eddy is superb....and if you need insurance help call this place. You won't regret it!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michele K-tel
user_reviews_extended.Description: Big thanks (and five stars) to State Farm employee Eddy Soto Padilla who works out of Tiffany Won's office.   He was super helpful in regard to issues with our auto reimbursement.  He straightened everything out and then followed up to make sure that we had received payment.  Thank you Eddy for all your help!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mark Anthony Relon
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany was very helpful in helping me transfer my policy from one state to California. She is very knowledgeable and insightful when it comes to explaining the business and the industry

user_reviews_extended.Name: Eduardo Enz
user_reviews_extended.Description: I want to express how impressed I was with agent Adreanna Amezcua from Tiffany Won’s State Farm office. I had recently been non renewed by my carrier for home insurance and had a few days to secure an alternative policy. Adreanna went above and beyond to ensure that I could obtain the coverage I needed at the most reasonable price. I can’t say enough about her professionalism and single minded focus to provide first class customer service. Thank you, Adreanna!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Teineleps
user_reviews_extended.Description: Thank you Wesley with State Farm for guiding me through my intake. He was wonderful, kind, & very informative. He made me feel content and comfortable with joining State Farm!! 10/10

user_reviews_extended.Name: David W
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany and team (especially Steven!) are always great.  Not only did they cover us while I lived in San Francisco but were also able to cover me for our recent move into Oregon.  Just couldn't be more thankful to have found them!

user_reviews_extended.Name: emiko oye
user_reviews_extended.Description: Steven really took the time to walk us through the details on our Home Policy and help us set up a Personal Articles Policy that we've been meaning to do for years. He was very responsive in returning our emails and answering our questions. Friendly, accessible and helped accommodate our needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kimberly Won
user_reviews_extended.Description: Krista was quick and very helpful with my amended renter's insurance. With additional questions I had she made it very easy for me to understand. Thanks!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chi-Ming Chien
user_reviews_extended.Description: Steven, Courtney and the team at Tiffany Won insurance were quick, courteous, knowledgeable, and helpful in responding to our family’s car insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: M L
user_reviews_extended.Description: Special thanks to Steven Del Terzo! Steven is diligent and always responsive with my property insurance request, especially considering that I has a tight deadline. He analyzed my situation, answered my questions, and helped me to set up the most suitable plan very quickly. Highly recommended.

user_reviews_extended.Name: mcarajo L
user_reviews_extended.Description:
OUTSTANDING SERVICE!

Every time, I’m taken care of with precision and speed. Whether I call or email, all necessary arrangements are handled seamlessly. I consistently receive email receipts and notifications—everything runs like clockwork!

A big shout-out to Ms. Courtney for her excellent work—Kudos!

Thank you,
Mr. M. Lucha

Special thanks to Ms. T. Won .

user_reviews_extended.Name: Walt Shaw
user_reviews_extended.Description: Steven was a pleasure to work with. He followed up over an extended period as I collected my documents and then provided me a super competitive quote, friendly and professional along the way. Thanks State Farm team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Heather Warm
user_reviews_extended.Description: Eddy has been really helpful with my insurance policy. He has navigated 2 changes in loan services for me, and helped me when I had a claim due to water intrusion in my home. He made interfacing with a large company go much smoother during a very stressful time.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Katie Cariffe
user_reviews_extended.Description: We love working with Tiffany and her team.  They are professional, responsive and provide excellent service for our accounts.  Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Leslie Young
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Tiffany sat me down and reviewed my policies. We switched from term life to whole life. She gave me a 1 million umbrella liability coverage instead of 3 separate ones. All my payments are taken out of my bank account so I don't have to worry about missing a payment or writing checks.

My storage locker was broken into and most of my best stuff was stolen. Although I didn't have receipts for everything, nor photographs, I was able to get about half of my items covered. Thefts have been way up in San Francisco. When someone broke into the garage at my apartment complex & stole my electric bike and my mountain bike, State Farm covered them. I've had my car windows smashed out three times. Got them fixed right away.

I finally bought a house and was relieved that State Farm was able to give me fire insurance instead of having to get California Covered supplemental insurance. I got a home security system through Comcast when I got internet. State Farm is giving me a big discount for that, which helped offset the cost of the system.

Great people to work with and very responsive.

I was finally able to buy a house

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joey Harris
user_reviews_extended.Description: I recently bought a new car and was in need of insurance quick. Eddy was great ! Great customer service and got me insured fast.  I have worked with Eddy before with my renters insurance and he is always great and so knowledgeable.  I would not go anywhere else for my insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Thalita Machado
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been a client of Tiffany’s for years and she and her staff have always provided excellent service. The staff is prompt when responding to queries and requests. They are all wonderful to work with!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Minh Quan Huynh
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I love this office. They have been so helpful everytime I called. one time i was panicking on vacation about rental call insurance cause i forgot to get it, i called the office and they looked it up and was like... we got it for ya... i your base policy... and totally saved my hawaiian vacay yo.

shoutout to Courtney C for always being so helpful and proactive to remind me of my renewals and telling me whats up with all the changes.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Emily Kizzia
user_reviews_extended.Description: This team has been very helpful in managing/revising/transferring renter's insurance, car insurance, and a personal articles policy over the past couple years. Even during covid times when things can feel pretty impersonal, they're kind, personable, and quick to respond via email. I've appreciated their help through lots of changes on our end and highly recommend this team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Corbin
user_reviews_extended.Description: I always speak with Wesley when I have questions about my current policies and he recently worked with me to move my Maryland auto policy to California. I was shocked when I found out I was saving a ton of money in CA vs MD. Service is consistently good and friendly. I have no complaints.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sharon B.
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been with State Farm for almost 2 decades.  During the pandemic experienced a home burglary while my home was being remodeled.  I immediately called State Farm when I heard my contractor's phone message.  Eddy Padilla walked me through the process so I knew my responsibilities and can prioritize activities.   I was frantic...securing my home, assessing losses and have not even begun to file a claim; however, Eddy checked in on me number of times until I was ready.  He also followed-up after my claim to make sure I wasn't missing anything and I had fully understood the process.  We even went over my policy to ensure coverages were up to date.   He acted as a go-between to claims department for as additional items arose.  State Farm was by my side every step of the way.  I remain a forever client!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Boyang Zhao
user_reviews_extended.Description: Steven is such a nice and patient agent on the Tiffany team who provided all the steps and documents in details. Highly recommended. It was a pleasure to work with Steven!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ray Alexander
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a client of the Tiffany Won Agency for many years. Tiffany and her agents, especially Marycruz Herrera, have been consistently courteous, professional and responsive. I recommend them highly.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lupita Mejia
user_reviews_extended.Description: Adreanna has been a blessing. I am able to save so much by switching over to State Farm. I used to be with Flow but she got every expensive. Best thing I could have done is move over. I now have three plans with State Farm and still paying way less. Thank you for everything. God bless

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gabriel Rafael
user_reviews_extended.Description: I called with considerable anxiety, having experienced displacement after a fire 10 years ago ravaged everything I owned, my entire life. I got to speak with Eddy, who answered every single one if my questions and worries. He took the time to listen, and to explain each type of coverage and how to assess my needs. I'm very happy and will sleep much more comfortably knowing I have this team on my side, and good coverage for a very affordable rate. Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brenda
user_reviews_extended.Description: Steven Del Torzo was always so prompt with the turnaround for coordinating a phone call with me regarding renter's insurance. He walked me through the various policies and what they covered, and Steven covered my questions in full. Many thanks for the help, and glad to have had the opportunity to work with Steven, and am looking forward to connecting with him after when I have a car and learn more about bundling opportunities for renter's and car insurance.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marisol Ochoa
user_reviews_extended.Description: I want to take the time to thank Érica she healp to find the best insurance for my trucks. She’s very good at answering all my question’s that I had . She has  truly make my life so much easier with their excellent care!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brian T McGue
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany has been my State Farm Agent for four years now and has always responded quickly to any inquiries I have. She's very helpful, thorough, and always has my best interest at heart.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jan Sluizer
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Often working closely with Mary Herrera on Tiffany Won’s staff, like all her colleagues, Mary has been helpful in letting me know when I have missed. a premium payment, when one is upcoming if I am
out of town, as well as making sure my accounts are all up-to-date.  These individual touches are greatly appreciated and are factual assurances that I am working with a staff who cares.

title: Alan Chan - State Farm Insurance Agent
address: 1820 Van Ness Ave, San Francisco, CA 94109, United States
plus_code: QHVH+23 Polk Gulch, San Francisco, CA, USA

owner.name: Alan Chan - State Farm Insurance Agent (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Ann Lee
user_reviews.Description:
I've had the pleasure of working with Alan Chan for my business and personal insurance needs for many years, and I cannot express how grateful I am for the outstanding service provided.  It was clear that Alan possesses a deep knowledge of the insurance industry, which made navigating my options incredibly easy.  He took the time to listen to my specific needs and tailored his recommendations accordingly, ensuring I felt confident in my choices.
Additionally, Alan was always available to answer my questions and provided timely follow-ups, demonstrating a genuine commitment to customer service. I highly recommend Alan to anyone looking for a knowledgeable and dedicated insurance agent. His expertise and exceptional service truly set him apart!

user_reviews.Name: Teris Liu
user_reviews.Description:
I worked with Alan Chan and Aileen Chan for my auto and home insurance for over 10 years, and they were absolutely amazing! From the start, they made everything so easy to understand and really took the time to go over all my options. They helped me find the best coverage that fit my needs and budget.

Both Alan and Aileen were super responsive, friendly, and patient with all my questions. The whole process was smooth and stress-free — I never felt rushed or pressured.

I really appreciate how professional and caring they were throughout. I’d definitely recommend Alan and Aileen Chan to anyone looking for trustworthy and knowledgeable help with their insurance

user_reviews.Name: Kate Riseman
user_reviews.Description: Alan Chan has been my trusted agent for over 20 years for car, home and life insurance. He's great. He's knowledgable, easy to talk to, and ethical. He always helps me weigh pros and cons of various types of insurance, and I never feel like he is trying to scare or pressure me. I'm so glad to get to work with him. Highly recommend!

user_reviews.Name: Wendy
user_reviews.Description: I’ve been a client of Alan for a while now, and what stands out most is the genuine care and thoughtfulness he and his team bring to every interaction. They remember the important details, explain coverage options clearly without pressure, and always let you make the choice that’s right for you. On top of their knowledge, responsiveness, and follow-through, the trust they build is what truly sets them apart. I can’t recommend Alan, Tracy, Aileen, Kyle, Matthew, Laura, and Tiffany enough. And yes, that’s how special the interactions are, you’ll remember everyone’s name! :)

user_reviews.Name: Christina Ng
user_reviews.Description:
I have been a client of Alan's office for nearly 40 years, starting with his father, George Chan. Alan has all my insurance needs covered under one roof. Insurance is complex, the expertise of the agent plays a huge role in finding solutions to the client's needs. Alan definitely masters that and then some. He is proactive in guiding clients through the current challenging insurance environment with his advice, and suggests changes as needed. He is backed by a team that provides great customer support. I am so pleased knowing that I am in good hands.

On a different front, my profession is closely tied to the insurance industry. I often seek Alan's opinion in helping my clients make decisions. He never hesitates to help and shares his knowledge.

I would highly recommend Alan and his team if expertise, service, responsiveness and support are important to you.

user_reviews.Name: MC
user_reviews.Description: I have been with Alan Chan since he took over it over from his father. Alan and his team are professional, friendly and consistently helpful.  When I leave a message, they return the call within minutes. I completely trust Alan and his team.  I know they will take care of my insurance needs and give me good advice.

user_reviews.Name: Megan C
user_reviews.Description: I have been with Alan and Aileen Chan for 26 years, and they're the best. They always take the time to ask what’s important to me and help me find options that fit my needs and budget. Alan also knows everything about insurance. He helps me to understand my options, so I feel confident that I'm making the right decisions. I couldn’t recommend them more.

user_reviews.Name: Hugh McDermott
user_reviews.Description: I had a unique situation in which I needed to track down documentation to prove I was the owner of a boat for purposes of a Coast Guard license.  I sold the boat more than 25 years ago, but I no longer had any of the documentation.  Kyle Chan and Tracy went above and beyond the call of duty to track down the copy of the State Farm insurance policy that Alan originated on the boat during the time I owned it.  It's increasingly rare these days to receive such exceptional service.  I am grateful and I want to recognize them for it.
