user_reviews_extended.Description: Alan Chan and his entire team are great. I've been with them for well over a decade at this point and have always been impressed by their communication, professionalism, and level of customer service. Let's face it: we're rarely excited about purchasing and paying for insurance products, but they're often necessary for financial stability, mortgage purposes, etc. Alan and his team have always been fair and transparent, and I never feel like I'm being pressured for products or coverages I don't need. I appreciate their dedication to their customers and would recommend them highly to anyone.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Paras Shah
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have been insured with State Farm for almost a decade now.  Alan, Tiffany and the rest of the team are extremely helpful and responsive.  They helped us navigate the complexities around home insurance and made sure we were aware of how to make decisions.

user_reviews_extended.Name: I Lazarus
user_reviews_extended.Description: Alan has been our trusted insurance advisor for over 20 years. He has always helped us fine-tune our insurance through every stage of life, from having a child to planning for retirement. He is a trustworthy, knowledgeable, and sincere professional.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Katharine Moodie
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I’ve been with Alan Chan’s State Farm team for many years, and I can honestly say they’re the gold standard when it comes to customer service. Alan goes to bat for me, my family, and my business every single time—he truly puts his customers first.

But it’s not just Alan—his incredible team deserves just as much credit. Eileen, Kyle, and Matthew are always responsive, professional, and genuinely caring. Whether I need quick answers, guidance on coverage, or support during stressful situations, they make the process smooth and reassuring.

This team doesn’t just provide insurance—they provide peace of mind. I couldn’t ask for a better group of people to have in my corner. I’ll be a loyal State Farm customer for life thanks to Alan and his outstanding team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kirsten Geney
user_reviews_extended.Description: Alan and his team have taken care of me and my family for 30 years - starting with auto insurance, then adding home and life insurance. If I needed to claim their first concern was always my safety. I also appreciate their consultative approach to make sure I've got just the right coverage.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jeff Hashfield
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tracy has handled both our HOA and my personal insurance for 10+ years. She's the best! She's always available to talk with me on the phone and patiently explain everything. She's honest, straightforward, helpful, responsive, and friendly. I've been thoroughly satisfied working with her. 100% highly recommended!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Suzanna L
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been with Alan’s office for over 20 years and they’re great! Insurance can be complicated, so it’s important to me to have an insurance office that I can trust to explain coverages and offer good advice. Alan and his entire team are professional and always provide excellent customer service. I highly recommend them!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Felix Xiao
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been a customer for almost a decade now and am very happy with Kyle, Allen, and team. They've helped me with renter's, automobile, home, earthquake, and personal articles policies over the years. Kyle is friendly and responsive, and has helped explain options and make adjustments to plans when needed. I definitely recommend this team to anyone looking for insurance!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Robert Stouse
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been working with Alan for more than 20 years.  He is knowledgeable about the local /California insurance market and has always sought to understand my HOA's needs before presenting options.  Top notch!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lucian Beebe
user_reviews_extended.Description: Alan's team has been so proactive and on top of things. They respond to email within the day, follow up when they say they will, and have helped me navigate accident repairs much faster than on my own. Nobody likes what the insurance companies are charging, but since you have to have it, Alan Chan is a great one to go with.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Andrew Osugi
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've worked with Alan Chan at State Farm since 2010. The California insurance market can be challenging, but Alan and Kyle have always been honest, transparent, and helpful. I've always felt confident that I was well insured and fully covered in case of an emergency. They're responsive, trustworthy, and a pleasure to work with.

user_reviews_extended.Name: stacy sase
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been insured by Alan Chan State Farm for decades now. Multiple types of insurance. I appreciate that they answer their phone and answer emails very quickly and take care of my insurance needs very efficiently.

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Malmud
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have been a customer of this office for over 18 years.  Alan never tries to upsell me on coverage when I ask for a periodic review.  Laura in his office is very responsive when I need annual copies of my policy for my mortgage company.
Would totally recommend (despite the general State Farm issues in California).

user_reviews_extended.Name: Denny Tsai
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been one of Alan Chan's customers for nearly a decade. Everyone who I've worked with has been very responsive and great to work with! I hope State Farm is able to start writing new home insurance policies again in California soon!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Karen Szeto
user_reviews_extended.Description: As with many of Alan's customers, our family, like the majority of his clients - have based our trust in him and State Farm from a working business relationship spanning many years.  What stands out about Alan and his team is their responsiveness, honesty and commitment to us over the years.  I would much rather speak to a real person and know they are dedicated to help.  That will hands-down beat an on-line chat knowing the assistance needed is that 20% that AI cannot help you with!  We'll continue to work with Alan and his team whenever we can.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mary Sutton
user_reviews_extended.Description: Alan Chan is a knowledgeable and trustworthy insurance agent who consistently delivers excellent service.  He handles my homes, autos, life and personal umbrella polices with professionalism and care. I appreciate his clear communication, attention to detail, and the peace of mind he provides.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kathy Lee
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a State Farm client for over 30 years….and Alan Chan and his team have supported me every step of the way. From buying my first home to getting married, growing my family, and managing rental properties—they’ve tailored coverage to fit my changing needs. Whether it’s life, home, auto, or rental insurance—even for my daughter in college, I trust Alan and his team to provide the advice that fits my family!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mr Pooh
user_reviews_extended.Description: My family has worked with Alan since 2000 for home and life insurance. As long time clients, we are happy with the products they offer. They are always prompt to answer questions. And their responses inspire confidence. It’s good to know we’re in good hands.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bernie L
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have worked with Alan Chan and his team for 30+ years for all our insurance needs. The personal touch and family feel of their service is the best. I recently had to make changes and adjustments to one of my policies, and I just know I won't get the save level of support elsewhere. Everyone here is great!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lou Aguilar
user_reviews_extended.Description: Alan Chan is a well dedicated and observant  State Farm agent. Our relationship stretches back decades.  He has insured my homes,cars and trucks. As my needs and life style have changed Alan and State Farm have been there to help me navigate my changing insurance needs. I highly recommend Alan and State Farm. I hope to keep doing business with him in the future

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ken Lim
user_reviews_extended.Description: Our family has been working with Alan Chan and his family for many decades, spanning two generations, and for good reason—they are simply the best. Thanks to Alan and his team, we have had the peace of mind that comes with having a knowledgeable, reliable, and professional insurance agent by our side. We highly recommend Alan Chan to anyone in need of top-tier service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: James
user_reviews_extended.Description:
You can trust Alan Chan and his team in your life's biggest decisions.

We've worked with Alan and Kyle successfully to put in place what we needed as a family to ensure we have peace of mind for the future.

I would highly recommend Alan.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Robert
user_reviews_extended.Description: Recently switched agents to Alan Chan, and very happy I did. Mr. Chan's office is very helpful in answering questions, but also proactively suggesting ways to save on premiums. They're also  extremely responsive.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Trudy S
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve worked with Alan Chan and his team for many many years now (~20)for both rental, earthquake, and auto insurance and have been very happy with all of them.  Kyle Chan, Tracy Allio, and the rest of the team have consistently provided professional, efficient, and high-quality customer service. I would highly recommend them!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bill Kedem (QA4U)
user_reviews_extended.Description: Amazingly quick and personalized service by 20+ year insurance experienced Tracy as well as from the Chan family members and other staff! State Farm are very competitive, too and I recommend bundling all types of your insurance requirements to obtain the best rates for each policy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ekaterina Martynova
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had a chance to work with Tracy. She is very efficient, quick responder, great communicator - she is simply wonderful! The whole process applying for the life insurance was easy and straightforward

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kathleen Shone
user_reviews_extended.Description: Alan Chan’s office is always there for you. You can call and talk to an actual person and everyone who works there is so knowledgeable! They have helped me understand my policies so I can make informed decisions on all my insurance needs! I highly recommend this office.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Darryl Chan
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have known Alan Chan and his team have been serving my family and business needs for over 20 years!  HIs team provide excellent service but they excel when something goes wrong and you need their services.  Alan's team is exceptional, highly competent and prompt!  Tracy, one of Alan's team leads, is someone who has consistently provided me with great service, timely information and has solved many of my problems!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kelley Moffat
user_reviews_extended.Description: Alan and his team are top notch.  They have provided insurance for multiple residential, commercial and multi-family properties for us, and they are incredibly easy to work with.  In particular, I appreciate their excellent communication skills and follow through.  You can't go wrong using this State Farm office.

user_reviews_extended.Name: OK Boomer Channel
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Here’s the deal: We’d  been with one agent at State Farm for decades. Then he retired and we wanted a personal relationship with a new agent. State Farm assigned us one whom we decided NOT to choose. We wanted to do research into a local team who could fulfill our requirements for our priories: 1.Excellent service ✅ 2. More than one team member in office ✅ 3.Take enough time to fully explain coverage options ✅ 4.NO up-selling b/c we only want to purchase coverage that is good value and applies to our needs ✅ 5.Last but hardly least, have a user friendly relationship with ALL agents on the team ✅✅

While we were absolutely wedded to our former agent and were NOT looking forward to the change, the Alan Chan team has been a perfect fit for ALL our insurance needs… AND we’re still in the honeymoon phase of this business relationship, even though it’s been quite a number of years that they’ve represented us. Amazing team of efficient, helpful, cordial, smart and savvy insurance representatives. And they’re “young” enough for us to feel secure that they’ll be in business till WE expire. Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ashling Loh-Doyle Nunnelly
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have been working with Alan Chan’s office for over a decade and have always been impressed by his team’s exceptional service. We have our business, home, auto, and life insurance policies with State Farm. Alan and his team have helped us navigate all of life’s milestones (marriage, children, entrepreneurship, and home ownership) with attention to detail and care. When we were in a car accident earlier this year, Alan and his team helped us through every step of the process and went above and beyond to make sure that we were informed and advocated for along the way. You’re in great hands with Alan and team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Scott Rivas
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I can not recommend enough: find another insurer.  State Farm is only interested in receiving your checks, and definitely not a good neighbor as they advertise.  I'd been with them for 20 years, and because I'm moving to another city in Cali, they cancelled my renter's policy claiming it was a 'new fire policy,' which is not allowed. And on top of that, they raised my rates declaring that since I didn't have a renter's policy anymore, I didn't qualify for discounts on my vehicles.

Again, find another insurer. These guys are only in it to make money.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sue Eldredge
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have been State Farm clients for at least 20 years.  Alan and his team have done a remarkable job of addressing a wide arrange of our insurance needs: auto, home, earthquake, business insurance and umbrella policies.  Alan is well-informed.  He and his agents are always quick to respond to questions and are courteous and patient in going over everything from technical issues to complex policies.  I greatly appreciate Alan's candor.  He doesn't try to sell you a policy.  He and his team truly seek their client's best interest.  I highly recommend giving them an opportunity to help keep you covered.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cathy Sabo
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had the unfortunate experience of having multiple home burglaries during 2023.   I have never experienced any form of  intrusion in my life so having multiple incidents had been quite disturbing and traumatic.  I was extremely fortunate to have an agent like Alan with a dedicated team that actually cares about the welfare of their clients.  He and his team (Tracy Allio) went over and above to provide exceptional service and support to assist in the process to provide coverage continuity after my very unpleasant experience and loss.  This very competent and seasoned team lobbied so that I could not only receive the insurance benefit I have been paying for over many years, but continue to maintain coverage.  I truly appreciate their efforts and any policy holder would be fortunate to work with this talented team to address your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Steve Belunek
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been with Alan Chan's office for well over a decade. I recently wanted to review my coverage after moving. Tracy was amazingly helpful, and patiently went through all the options to determine the right kind of coverage for me. Many Thanks!

user_reviews_extended.Name: jason lee
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Recently got a car and had no clue about setting up insurance. I stopped by Alan Chan’s StateFarm office to learn more about which policy fits my needs. Kyle, representative at this office was super helpful and walked me through each line of coverage.

From this experience, not only did I learn about what I’m paying, I got to learn more about the coverage that I have. This office won’t oversell you coverage you don’t need. They are honest and have genuine interest in their client.

I highly recommend people to book an appointment with this office if you want to learn more about insurance coverage you need.

Exceptional client service. I walked out the office with confidence and got to learn more about my coverage that I’m super satisfied with!

Ask for Kyle Chan! You won’t regret his service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: James Cerenio
user_reviews_extended.Description: Aileen and Allen and their team are responsive and professional.  They have handled our home, auto, and personal umbrella policies for years.  They provide peace of mind with their thoughtful customer service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sam Kwei
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a customer of Alan Chan and Tracy Allio for over 2 decades (specifically over 21 years). Tracy and Alan have always taken very good care of me as a customer. As a result, I have transferred all of my insurance needs to Tracy's care. Through my first decade with State Farm under Tracy and Alan's care, my service satisfaction has always been high while my premiums dropped due to my being a good customer (not having any incidents). Even when I did have some not-at-fault incident such as being rear-ended by another car, Tracy was able to quickly take care of things for me, and I never have any issue getting the resolution I wanted. Recently, State Farm had to increase its price, and Alan/Tracy did not sugarcoat and explained the situations in full to me. In fact, soon after, Tracy helped me correct one of my premiums. I appreciate the way Alan and Tracy take good care of their customers while keeping in mind that their reputation with their customers is most important. I will continue to stay with Tracy and Alan due to their great services!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mommy Mak
user_reviews_extended.Description: Alan Chan and his group are always so helpful and responsive.  Whenever there is an issue or a need, the entire staff is very prompt, efficient, and friendly.  I have  personally worked with Alan, Laura, Sally, and Matthew, all of whom are very good at what they do.  Also, my parents were clients of Alan's father.  This State Farm team is HIGHLY recommended!

user_reviews_extended.Name: JC F.
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tracy Allio at Alan Chan and State Farm has been wonderful to work with - she came highly recommended by our realtor because of her deep expertise in San Francisco-specific needs and she didn't disappoint. Tracy gave me very helpful advice as I was looking into homeowners, auto and umbrella policies. She clearly has a ton of expertise, takes the time to understand each client's situation and provides a very responsive and high quality service. She spent a lot of time ensuring I had the coverage I needed for the best price. She gets it and gets things done - I highly recommend her as she is my go-to insurance agent!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Austin Chan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Alan and his team are amazing. Tiffany was very professional and helpful in addressing my needs. I would recommend this office to anyone.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brenda Tucker
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been working with Alan for over 12 years with both personal condo insurance and our HOA, and it has been a pleasure. He is incredibly responsive to questions and requests, as well as supportive about any changes to either policy. Alan is well informed regrading any questions that arise, including short term rental insurance. He is a dynamic professional with great integrity and we feel lucky to work with him.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mark Harding
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve worked with Alan Chan for many years for both home and auto coverage and have been very satisfied.  Tracy and the rest of the team have consistently provided exemplary service. I would highly recommend them.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michele Phua
user_reviews_extended.Description: Alan Chan has been our insurance agent for awhile (auto, home, life, etc).  He is a great adviser and so responsive in helping us with all the Q&As.  And we have encountered many situations that require his timely guidance.  He is professional, patient and knowledgeable.  Highly recommend him.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Amber L
user_reviews_extended.Description: I was referred to Alan's office from my past Seattle agent when I moved back to CA. Everyone at Alan's office is kind, professional and responsive. Shout out to Kyle- he is my main point of contact here and always answers every question I have in detail and gets my policies in order in a timely manner. Thank you Kyle! Would definitely recommend this office. Reliable, fast, and great customer service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Andrew Yu
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Alan Chan and State Farm stepped up for us when we needed help.  My family and I were the victims of a lawsuit claiming "wrongful eviction" and "harassment".  The tenants had moved out (not evicted) over six months earlier and were demanding $725k, through a lawyer they found.  My elderly parents (in their late 80's) were named, along with me.  The tenants had moved from a unit in my parents' duplex; my wife and I lived in our own single family house.  My parents had Farmers Insurance; and my wife and I have State Farm.  This is when you find out what insurance company you can count on, and which insurance rep has your back.

Farmers said my parents had not purchased the right coverage to be protected against such a lawsuit.  My parents had insured the duplex with Farmers for almost 50 years, and had always rented out one unit while living in the other.  All their Farmers reps over the years knew this.  Meanwhile, ten years earlier, Alan Chan had asked my wife if we had any tenants in our single family house.  When Alan learned that we did, he recommended that we add an additional coverage that would protect us against tenant claims.  The coverage was only an additional $16 premium.  That additional $16 premium provided us with the financial backing of State Farm and access to their lawyers, to protect me in this lawsuit.  State Farm took on the case even though the tenants were not my tenants.  Furthermore, State Farm's lawyers managed to resolve the case without dragging my elderly parents into stressful depositions, whereas Farmers abandoned the case.  All along the way, Alan Chan demonstrated an interest in our case and was always there to provide support.

I have told family members about Alan's office and State Farm.  So far, they have moved 3 homeowner policies over to Alan.  My family members and I have had many conversations with Alan over the past year.  We have found him to be knowledgeable, honest and forthcoming.  My wife tells me that this is a family business that Alan had taken over from his father many years ago.  I believe that Alan runs his business for the long run and provides high value and excellent service for his customers.  We have only had a few interactions with Alan's staff but have found them all to be polite and diligent.  I would encourage anyone with insurance needs to give Alan's office a call and judge for yourself.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brian Davis
user_reviews_extended.Description: Alan has been our agent for many years. My daughter (and her roommates) were moving to New York City (international students from three different countries) to continue their studies at NYU and needed a renter's policy on very short notice to satisfy their new apartment lease requirements. We did not know what to do given we had no contacts for this type of insurance in NYC. Alan again helped us by connecting us with his longterm colleague (Kevin Leong) in NYC. Kevin then provided us fantastic service and secured the policy we needed on very short notice (he did this on a Friday night). We could not be happier with Alan (and Kevin) for taking such good care of us and so quickly. We highly recommend him!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael Caplan
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a very satisfied customer of Alan Chan's State Farm Insurance Agency for over 30 years. Alan and his staff have provided auto insurance, homeowner's insurance, and HOA insurance with professionalism, efficiency, and excellent advice. More than that, Alan, and his father George before that, have helped me through challenging HOA situations with a difficult co-owner in our two unit condominium building. I recommend Alan Chan for your insurance needs with no reservations.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Evan Parker
user_reviews_extended.Description: Have multiple policies via Alan and his State Farm office. I trust Alan and team, and reach out for consultation before making decisions that could have an insurance impact. His team- Wendy, Tracy, Tiffany, et al have been great to work with and are always very responsive. Happy client.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Matthew Strom
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have worked with Alan and his team (Including Tracy and Tiffany) for over a decade across home (previously renters), earthquake, auto, umbrella and other policies.  Their service and advice are top notch, ensuring appropriate coverage without overcharging.  They are always able to be competitive on price as well.  Hard to imagine moving our family's needs to anywhere else!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sandra Jeong
user_reviews_extended.Description: You can always rely on Alan and his team to respond quickly to all questions and requests in a very professional, patient and friendly manner. They definitely deserve this 5 star rating!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jim Robbins
user_reviews_extended.Description: Alan has been my agent since 2001. His service has always been excellent and the policy prices very good. He goes above and beyond to help his clients out.  I have recommended him to many friends in the past and definitely suggest you contact him for your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jordan Kobert
user_reviews_extended.Description: Hard to believe but I've been with Alan Chan and team for over 20 years across multiple policies. I've always relied on them for advice and great support and they've never let me down. Highly recommend them as part of your support network!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ali Model
user_reviews_extended.Description: My husband and I have had a great experience here. We have had their car insurance and recently added rental insurance. We have been happy customers for the last 5+ years and recently just referred another family member and they are very happy as well. Tracy has been consistently helpful and kind, answering our (many) questions and always responding quickly. I highly recommend for all insurance needs!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Katie Breitenbach Coughlan
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a customer of Alan's for several years, and I most recently worked with Matthew Machado to set up a new policy.  He was very flexible to set up time to talk to walk through questions and was extremely responsive by email.  I highly recommend working with them.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shu Y
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have been working with Alan since 2012 and have entrusted him with all of our insurance needs.  Alan and his team are extremely professional. Alan is an expert in the insurance field and provides customer oriented solutions depending on your  personal situation.  We highly recommend Alan!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kathleen McCormac
user_reviews_extended.Description:
For the past 25 years Alan, his father and now Kyle covered my personal and business needs. They were always responsive, concerned about my needs and a pleasure to work with through the years.

When I moved out of state this year they assisted in closing the policies and worked with my new insurer.

I would highly recommend them!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Elena Kohn
user_reviews_extended.Description: Thank you Tracy and Allan for taking care us!  We have multiple policies with them and know they really have our best interest at heart.  They are personable and truly get to know us as individuals.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marion Wallace
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been with Alan since I was 16 years old and always feel taken care of. His team is extremely responsive and would highly recommend him to any and all of my friends and family.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Angelica Boivin
user_reviews_extended.Description: We want to give Alan Chan and his team 100 stars! We have been with them for over 10 years now and they are the best and professional. We have Auto, Life, Home, and Rental insurance with Statefarm and when ever we have needed to write a claim the steps are easy and everyone so helpful. Thank you.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joe Russack
user_reviews_extended.Description: Absolutely went the extra mile to secure favorable terms for my earthquake coverage. Spectacular work from Alan and his team. Been using them for all my insurance needs (home, auto, motorcycle) since sometime in the 90s, no regrets.

user_reviews_extended.Name: West Coghlan
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I am President of the HOA of a five unit building on Russian Hill.  I don't know a great deal about insurance, but was concerned about our building's longstanding policy with another company.

I called Alan to see what his firm could offer.  He patiently explained to me that our policy was in fact a good one, explaining the details of the other carrier's coverage.

So even though he wouldnt get the businss, Alan was very professional and helpful, putting the customer first.  I appreciate it.  Worth 5 stars.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bryan Nadeau
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have been with Alan Chan State Farm Insurance for over 10 years. Can't say enough about how they take care of business, quick response and Tracy Barrantes-Allio rocks! She always takes care of us no matter time or day. Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Judy Ho-Lam
user_reviews_extended.Description: Alan Chan's office has been a great help for me and my family for the past so many many years.  The staff has been so helpful, prompt and efficient.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Aristotle Torio
user_reviews_extended.Description: Worked with Kyle who provided a lot of great advice around auto policies. He was transparent and easy to work with. When we later cancelled the policy, Kyle didn't make us jump through any hoops or give us a hard time. Very sincere staff and would work with them again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tom Benthin
user_reviews_extended.Description: Alan has been my insurance agent for decades. He's responsive and proactive, great to work with. And when our house burned in the 2017 fires, he and State Farm were there for us.

user_reviews_extended.Name: vivian b
user_reviews_extended.Description: Alan and his team are always so helpful and responsive (even during Covid).  They are friendly and knowledgeable, making sure to answer all my questions and explaining all processes.  Alan has been my agent for many years and I hope many more to cone!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Carol S
user_reviews_extended.Description: The staff at Alan Chan State Farm were very supportive and helped me sort out my claim after my car was stolen. They’ve insured our family for more than 30 years.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Annette Margolis
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tracy is an OUTSTANDING insurance agent. She really knows her stuff, clearly has the best interest of her clients at heart, and responds to emails and calls in a timely manner. Really couldn't recommend working with her more!

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Mathew
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Searching for insurance coverage is never easy. I called around to several different “big name” companies and was directed to a call center, where there were long wait times to get a quote, I given less than stellar service, and my questions were not fully answered.

Just when I was about to give up and settle for one of these other companies, on the recommendation of a friend, I called State Farm and I was immediately directed to a local office in the area where I was seeking an insurance policy. I had the pleasure of speaking with Wendy, one of the local agents who answered all my questions and immediately got me a quote. The total cost was far less than other quotes I had received, with more coverage included. Wendy answered all of my follow-up questions and helped me get quickly setup.

Since then, I’ve had numerous other questions, which Wendy has been quick to answer. The people you interact with always make a huge impact. Wendy’s cheery demeanor, positivity, and efficiency definitely leads me to fully recommend working with this State Farm office.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lianne Herzberg
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been working with Tracy Allio/State Farm for nearly 20 years and am a very satisfied customer!  Her attention to detail, excellent customer service, and in-depth knowledge of CA insurance policies is superb.  Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Daghan Altas
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been Alan's customer for 10 years. I thought insurance was something you bought from the Internet. Alan thought me the value of having agent on your side. All in all, this is a very courteous team and they return my emails and calls within minutes.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Allison Fox
user_reviews_extended.Description: We've had the pleasure of working with Tracy Barrantes-Allio for the past 15+ years. She is incredibly responsive, knowledgeable and helpful. We love both her and State Farm!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kendall Pike
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great experience working with this office. Very knowledgeable and professional. I fully recommend Alan Chan's office for all your insurance needs!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joel Hayashida
user_reviews_extended.Description: Our Integra was parked in SFO long term lot while we attended an out-of-state wedding. We came back to find our catalytic converter was stolen!! We got towed back to the City to Hayes Auto where our excellent mechanic Joe Ng got on it immediately. Meanwhile, we contacted our insurer, State Farm, whose claims department gave us clear and detailed instructions on filing the claim. Aileen of Alan's team made sure our Police report and parking receipt were properly forwarded to Claims to complete the opened claim. We are completely satisfied with State Farm's rapid handling, approving and payment of our claim. From our agent (Alan, Kyle, Aileen) to Claims to Hayes Auto, they worked together seamlessly and rapidly to get our car repaired and running. Thanks again again State Farm!! For you travelers, please don't park at SFO long term lot. They're not secure. We had nothing in the cab of the car, yet because SFO long term lot espouses "contactless parking", there are no eyes on who enters or exits, so your cars aren't safe! Go patronize another,more secure lot, have someone drop you off, or don't go at all. Better safe than sorry. Joel

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lisa Kendrick
user_reviews_extended.Description: I am sad to be leaving Alan Chan's State Farm branch. The only reason is because we moved. I have been with this company for about 25 years and have watched it grow exponentially over that time... it's because of their amazing dedication to their customer! I've never experienced such excellent customer service from any other company in any business setting. THANK U ALL! I will miss u!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jim Haungs
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tracy was an absolute rock star working up an insurance plan for our condo. She knows the business cold, she's a delight to work with, and she got us a good deal.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Deborah Rockwood
user_reviews_extended.Description: Alan and his team are the best! We've been with them for years and years. You hope you won't need to talk with them but when you do, they are responsive, communicative, and always helpful. Highly recommend!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jeff Johnson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Thank you all of your help with my home insurance. Highly recommend. Office manager is a wealth of knowledge and expert service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Karen Rivo
user_reviews_extended.Description: Appreciate the personal connection I have had with Tracy over the years

user_reviews_extended.Name: Hendrik van Geel
user_reviews_extended.Description: Alan and his team always take the time to explain circumstances and follow-up internally.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sam Fox
user_reviews_extended.Description: If I could give them 10 stars I would! Highly professional and helped me out with all of my insurance needs! Couldn’t recommend more.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ariel Shidlo
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tracy Allio has been amazing. She is responsive, thorough, explains options, and follows up. I couldn't be happier. Highly recommended.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nancy Kehoe
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been a client with Alan Chan's office for more than 20 years, and they have been incredibly helpful. Everyone in the office is kind and knowledgable and truly cares about clients.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Matthew Rantinella
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Wendy recently helped me secure an auto insurance policy and was very helpful and knowledgeable throughout the entire process.

I have a few insurance policies with this office, and am very pleased with their service, rates, and insurance plan options.

user_reviews_extended.Name: PC S
user_reviews_extended.Description: Excellent service in all the years we have been clients.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joan Jeong
user_reviews_extended.Description: Alan Chan and his staff were extremely helpful to my husband, Gary, and I during a time that we needed guidance in caring for his parents' affairs. They came through with flying colors!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gabriel Hernandez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Excellent team, always ready to assist and friendly and professional

user_reviews_extended.Name: April Filer
user_reviews_extended.Description: Alan Chan and his team have protected our family for over 2 decades - the help, support and information they provide is invaluable and they have made a daily positive impact on our lives.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jim Offel
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Really appreciate the claims investigator digging into the facts of the situation surrounding a recent minor fender bender.  As a result of her due diligence, fault is shared equally between the parties as I believed it should have been instead of being entirely on me.

Great follow-up!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Camilla Papale
user_reviews_extended.Description: Don't use this company. High rates and questionable accounting policies. They will deduct money from your account and tell you check is in the mail. This will never happen. I am out $3K on my accounts that are unaccountable. There's no digital payment options and they overwhelm you with bills for multiple policies. You are better off with an other company. This is borderline fraudulent. Beware

user_reviews_extended.Name: Heidi Hagberg
user_reviews_extended.Description: Quickly received a quote and policy for a non-owners car insurance. Wendy and team were made a complicated topic easy to understand and got my policy up and running within a day!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lee Johnson
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have been with the Chan Agency for 24 years and have always received excellent service. They are proactive, professional, and exceptionally friendly.  We recommend them highly!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jonathan Lee
user_reviews_extended.Description: Wendy has been incredibly helpful and quick to respond with all of my questions. And able to get us covered very fast as we worked through a new car purchase.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stefani Herr
user_reviews_extended.Description: "I just wanted to say that Alan was really helpful! He was super prompt, easy to work with, and answered all of my questions about filing claims."

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lyla Reinero
user_reviews_extended.Description: Alan and team are truly the best. We have been covered by them for years and they have always been a dream to work with.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sherwin Jew
user_reviews_extended.Description: It was my first time working with Wendy and she replied promptly to questions and provided useful information.  She was professional and great to work with.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ivan Miter
user_reviews_extended.Description: Easily accessible, clear, helpful. Been with them for many years!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brian Welch
user_reviews_extended.Description: Fantastic customer service every time I call or write with a special request.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kim George
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great customer service and fast response. Thanks!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sally Wong
user_reviews_extended.Description: Excellent service of all your insurance needs. Very good group of people to work with.

user_reviews_extended.Name: John Boatman
user_reviews_extended.Description: You need insurance needs.please call this office they have excellent customer service.i will tell all my friends.Thanks for all your help

user_reviews_extended.Name: Amy DiLaura
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tracy and Alan are always responsive and helpful. Great team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Eric Foerg
user_reviews_extended.Description: Everyone here is helpful and friendly.  They all work to help you save money and make moving less painful.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Darrell Katsch
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very happy for many years of excellent customer service.  Thanks Alan!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ching Chung
user_reviews_extended.Description: Excellent people with excellent service

user_reviews_extended.Name: Thank You
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very helpful

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kate Eaves
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tracy helped our client transfer over to California seamlessly! She knew exactly what to do to make sure our client was covered well!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Janice Lee
user_reviews_extended.Description: Alan and his team are friendly, responsive and great with explaining details.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Robin Mcdonald
user_reviews_extended.Description: Alan Chan has been my agent for many years and I've always had a great experience with him and his team. title: Henry De Guzman Cruz: Allstate Insurance
address: 369 Pine St Ste 618, San Francisco, CA 94104, United States

owner.name: Henry De Guzman Cruz: Allstate Insurance (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Maynard “Buknoy” Arguinoso
user_reviews.Description: Awesome experienced at Allstate insurance always gave us what our expected service from Mr Henry De Gusman the best and second to none!! The service that you need they wiil give to you a 1000 percernt of his effort!!!

user_reviews.Name: Haipeng Hu
user_reviews.Description:
I wish I could give 0 star to Henry and Allstate.

I have been a customer of Henry at Allstate since 2018. I had set up monthly auto-pay with paperless billing. On February 10, 2023, I chose to cancel my Allstate insurance policy by contacting Henry directly. He did not inform me of any outstanding balance on my account, and my online account was deactivated after February 10, 2023.

On June 20, 2023, I received a notice from a collection company representing Allstate, claiming that I owed them $232 and that they had already reported this to my credit report. I immediately reached out to Henry, who explained that it was a pro-rated premium for the period before I canceled my policy. I never received any billing information either by mail or online. I made the payment the same day, and Henry assured me that his team would inform the collection agency to remove the collection history from my credit report. However, even after one year, the collection history is still visible on my credit report, significantly affecting my credit score. Several banks have rejected my mortgage application.

The way Henry and Allstate has handled this situation is unacceptable. I was unable to receive the final pro-rated statement because:
1. Henry did not inform me of any outstanding balance when I canceled my policy.
2. I lost access to the online portal the day after I canceled my policy.
3. I was enrolled in auto-pay, and Allstate could have directly charged my credit card instead of sending the final bill to a collection company.

Avoid Allstate at any cost!!! Their system is still in the 80s.

user_reviews.Name: Exequiel Cruz Jr
user_reviews.Description: Thank you Mr Henry DG Cruz for helping me obtain my Current Auto Insurance ID Cards. Your quick assistance is greatly appreciated. Have a nice day!

user_reviews.Name: Michael Acabado
user_reviews.Description: Henry, Tess and their team are pro-active and will make sure you get the best insurance policy. I have been their customer for over 10 years. And they have always provided excellent explanations and or actions in whatever queries/concerns I provided.

user_reviews.Name: Darren Wong
user_reviews.Description: Our family have been with Henry for more than 15 years and are very happy with his services.  Henry and his team have always been very responsive to our queries and needs.  We wholeheartedly recommend him!

address: 1160 Battery St Suite 100, San Francisco, CA 94111, United States
plus_code: QHVW+HX Financial District, San Francisco, CA, USA

user_reviews.Name: Deanna Ulrich
user_reviews.Description: Eric is incredibly helpful in navigating the complex world of insurance. He has spent much time with me to ensure I understand my options and providing advice and recommendations for the most cost-efficient coverage balanced with safety and peace of mind. Definitely recommend working with him!

user_reviews.Name: Jackie Liao
user_reviews.Description: Eric is very thorough and knowledgeable about the processes and policies. He made this very easy and he communicates with promptness. Highly recommend working with Eric if you’re in the Bay Area.

user_reviews.Name: XL R
user_reviews.Description: Eric has been an invaluable resource for my family’s insurance needs over the past five years. His deep knowledge of insurance, prompt responsiveness, and unwavering support have made the process seamless and stress-free. If you’re looking for an insurance expert who truly cares, I highly recommend giving Eric a try!

user_reviews.Name: Leonard Reyno
user_reviews.Description: Outstanding service and follow up 100% customer focused. It’s a tough for consumers these days but Eric focus on your needs is singular.

user_reviews.Name: Ran
user_reviews.Description: I was very glad to work with Jimmy from Eric's team for my homeowners insurance in San Francisco. Insurance is difficult everywhere in California right now, and having someone who can clearly explain what is required, and help you make sure you meet those requirements, is critical. Thank you Jimmy!

user_reviews.Name: Dan Mitchell
user_reviews.Description: I hate paying for insurance, but when you have an agent like Eric Gee, and the team at Farmer's, I can truly see the value in it.  I've been a customer of Eric's for over 20 years.  During that time Eric, and Farmer's, have gone above and beyond exactly when I've needed them most: flooded house, car accidents, etc...  Every time I've had to file a claim, Eric and his team has done exactly what I needed them to do; resolve my problem quickly and easily.  They have always helped take the stress out of stressful situations.   What I also love is that when I send an email with a question, I get an almost immediate response from Eric - not an automated system.  When I call, I talk with Eric, or one of his team members who know all about who I am and my account - not a machine.  Eric and his team are there when I need them, and they don't just push me off to a machine or to the web to get something done.  Because of the incredible service from Eric, and the Farmer's team, I'll never switch to another insurance company.  What you get with this team is worth every penny.

user_reviews.Name: alice xiang
user_reviews.Description: Eric has been impeccably responsive, and is always helpful when any issues arise — if you're searching for an insurance agent, look no further!

user_reviews.Name: Derick Chui
user_reviews.Description: Eric is fantastic at helping you find the best rate at the right coverage level you're comfortable with. He is also very attentive, responsive, and patient to help you understand the nuances of purchasing homeowner's insurance for the first time. I highly recommend Eric!

title: Joe Freund - State Farm Insurance Agent
address: 1732 Divisadero St, San Francisco, CA 94115, United States
plus_code: QHP6+84 Lower Pacific Heights, San Francisco, CA, USA

owner.name: Joe Freund - State Farm Insurance Agent (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Jesse Halbert
user_reviews.Description:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Five-Star Review for Harlan Halbert

I had an outstanding experience working with Harlan Halbert on my life insurance policy. From the very beginning, Harlan took the time to clearly explain my options, answer every question, and make sure I fully understood the coverage I was selecting. His professionalism, patience, and genuine care made the entire process simple and stress-free.

Harlan went above and beyond to tailor a policy that fit my needs and budget perfectly. It’s rare to find someone who combines expertise with such a personal touch, and I truly appreciate the level of service he provided.

I highly recommend Harlan Halbert to anyone looking for life insurance. Exceptional service from start to finish!

user_reviews.Name: Barbara Duff
user_reviews.Description: I would like to give a shout out to Ember Trudell-Huerta. She is very knowledgeable, thorough and upfront.  She wrote us a home/auto/umbrella bundle that provided great coverages at really great rates and saved us a lot of money. Ember was easy to work with, and did a fantastic job following up on any questions I had and checking back with me to see if there was anything else I needed.  Excellent customer service!  So glad I switched to State Farm.

user_reviews.Name: Sara Hutchinson
user_reviews.Description: I had a wonderful experience with Beth Leonard! Beth helped us navigate our building insurance in San Francisco. She was patient and provided several options to ensure we had a policy that best fit our needs. I appreciate her transparency and partership throughout the process!

user_reviews.Name: Sarah Bianchin
user_reviews.Description: I've been with State Farm for many years, and my recent experience with Joe Freund’s office reminded me why. Kim was friendly, responsive, and really helpful in getting everything squared away. She made the process simple and welcoming, especially as I’m settling back into California. It’s nice to feel taken care of by a team that values long-time customers.

user_reviews.Name: Eric Fifer
user_reviews.Description: Michelle Ezzell has been fantastic in understanding recent changes to our property and identifying policy discounts that helped reduce our premium. She also assisted in navigating and following up on all the underwriting documentation needed for the central alarm and utility discounts. I've been a State Farm customer for over 20 years, and since our policy was reassigned to Joe Freund's office this past year, I've been extremely pleased with the level of service—especially Michelle's professionalism, responsiveness, and attention to detail.

user_reviews.Name: CAGGR
user_reviews.Description: Sasha is always fantastic. She provides professional, friendly service & is very helpful breaking down quotes & helping you get the biggest benefits out of your insurance. We love working with Sasha.

user_reviews.Name: Shelley Costantini
user_reviews.Description: We’ve been with Joe Freund - State Farm Insurance Agent for over 20 years, and we couldn’t be happier. Everyone in the office is always easy to work with, and our questions are answered quickly every single time. In all these years, we’ve truly never had anything go wrong, which is such a comfort. They even check in periodically to make sure we’re in great shape with our policies. We feel really lucky to have them on our team for life. Highly recommend!

user_reviews.Name: Kevin Ryan Long
user_reviews.Description: Sasha's been my motorcycle insurance specialist for nearly 10 years - always fast as lightning in issuing the doc when I impulse-buy a bike! Joe's team is great. I wouldn't even move to save money!

Her friendly and professional attitude made the experience even better. If you’re looking for an insurance agent who truly cares and goes the extra mile, Sasha is the one to call! Highly recommend!
