user_reviews_extended.Description: Ember was the best agent I have interacted with. She was very clear and helpful when discussing my coverages.

user_reviews_extended.Name: francisco puppio
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been a customer for over a decade now, and I just have to give a huge shout-out to Beth. When I had an issue recently, she was so quick and incredibly helpful. Her responsiveness and clear options made the whole process a breeze. I'd definitely recommend her to anyone!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Victoria Lum
user_reviews_extended.Description: Although I have been a State Farm customer for 30+ years, I do not recall ever submitting a review.  Everyone was SO accommodating/understanding/caring during those ugly early days of Covid.  I will never forget their kindness.  Honest!  Several years ago William Yee became my "go-to guy" and he has  ALWAYS been professional/personable and so ready to answer my questions and concerns.  William is in my opinion, exactly the kind of person anyone would want to represent a company.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Hannah Kellogg
user_reviews_extended.Description: Joe and Michelle are the BEST. I've been with them for years and they're always available for questions, and transparent about what I need and what I don't.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jennifer Gil
user_reviews_extended.Description: Michelle,  was great! she provided all the details that we needed, and went above and beyond.  We are very happy with the services provided by her and Joe.  Thank you

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nickolai Mathison
user_reviews_extended.Description: I am a current client and had a difficult question to ask, the agent was super responsive, and I got an answer within 24 hours. It was so impressive, then they went the extra step to file a form on my behalf. I can’t recommend these folks enough!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Patrick Brown
user_reviews_extended.Description: Joe, Michelle, and his office have been incredibly helpful in gaining coverage for buildings in our portfolio. They have been responsive and accommodating to our requests for certificates and quotes. I asked them to take care of my personal insurance coverage as well.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ashley Denney
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a clients of Joe’s since approx 2007. He and his team are great! Recently Michelle on his team helped me evaluate different options for auto insurance (fee and deductibles). This is just one example. Over the years they have always been responsive to questions, planning and claims.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Erick Lopez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Sasha is the best in the West! Always answers my calls/emails with urgency, care, and kindness. I wish I would have switched my family over sooner. Thank you to Sasha and everyone on her team that makes insurance easy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: archie algas
user_reviews_extended.Description: I just switched my auto insurance to State Farm. Amy was super helpful and responsive. We had to get the switch done in just 2 days, all while I was on vacation and Amy unexpectedly had to take a few days off. Amy and the team (Beth) were able to get it done with minimal interruption to my beach time!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Frank Albert
user_reviews_extended.Description: Thanks you Ember for your service. We were able to save some money and get more coverage with state farm. Very happy with the change !

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chris Meza
user_reviews_extended.Description: Joe and the Freund Team are outstanding! They’re my go-to source for all personal insurance needs, and I’m always confident referring my clients to them as well.

user_reviews_extended.Name: tryg mccoy
user_reviews_extended.Description: Sometimes great customer service can be shown just by expertly responding to a question and that is what Michelle did for me.  My question about a policy detail that required her to check on my active security alarm certification was resolved in a professional and friendly manner.  Thank you Michelle.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mary Miller
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great job Michelle Ezzell!!  You made it so easy to onboard my new vehicle.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nina Anderson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Michelle was extremely helpful, especially considering the quick turn-around and willingness to search for solutions to our "interesting" situation.  We've worked with this office for years, and continuously appreciate the great customer service and patience with all our questions.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Luca Rattazzi
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have been using Joe for insurance for almost 15 years, and when my family moved back to California from Utah, I went straight to him for coverage. Kimberly was great to work with, answered all my questions and worked with us to get the best rates! Glad to be back.

Follow up. Kim continues to provide fast, excellent customer service.

Adding another note: Michelle has been great helping with my never ending stream of questions.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mehul Mehta
user_reviews_extended.Description: Shout out to Harlan - he has been extremely helpful and responsive to make sure we are well taken care of. Thank you Harlan!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kosuke Kume
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great experience with Michelle to get life insurance for my wife and I. Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sacha Monpere
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been with Joe Freund since.....over 20 years. Someone is always available to help with minor or major things and Beth is amazing! Having had a house burned down and various car incidents, I can't imagine not having a real insurance agent who can answer questions when I call.

user_reviews_extended.Name: James Dunlinson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Joes team is great! They are always there there to help, and follow up quickly. If you are looking for insurance, I can wholeheartedly recommend Joe and his team. A++

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jon Wood
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kim is THE BEST! I've been shopping for new insurance for months and was referred to Kim Beach by a good friend. She explained all my options and was able to beat all other quotes by a significant margin. Every time I've called or emailed Kim she's been delightful to deal with, she patiently answered all my questions and has treated me with utmost respect and courtesy.  I'm so happy to have found Kim and know that all of my insurance needs are in great hands!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chanel Kelly
user_reviews_extended.Description: Michelle is such a pleasure to work with! I appreciate her prompt responses and eagerness to help whenever I need. Great resource.

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Pennebaker
user_reviews_extended.Description: Michelle Harrell at Joe Freund's office is always so easy to work with.  It literally took 1 minute of my day to pay my bill which was due that very day.  She is terrific!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sheryl Denker
user_reviews_extended.Description: I am not a review writer, typically, but a big shout out to Michelle Ezzell who is the ultimate professional. Thank you for your help!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bachul Koul
user_reviews_extended.Description: We've been clients of Joe's agency for various insurance products over the last 10+ years. We've always enjoyed Joe's responsiveness and his team is excellent. Our current agent is Beth Leonard who has been so helpful - she explains everything clearly and is incredibly responsive to questions. We would definitely recommend Joe Freund and Beth Leonard to anyone!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Hunter George
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been using this agency for years for all my insurance needs.  They have me covered from renters, homeowners, autos, flood, umbrella liability and personal articles.  Michelle has been especially helpful as my coverage needs have shifted over time to make sure I don't have too much or too little protecting what matters to me!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Abraham Barkhordar
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kim Beach was awesome and greatly helped me out with insuring a unique 3 wheeled meter maid vehicle. Her service and dedication was very good and she followed up with me personally multiple times. Happy to be switching from progressive thanks to Kim's help!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Laurence {Pulgram
user_reviews_extended.Description: State Farm moved us to Joe Freund here when our long time agent required. First month of service has been outstanding, quick, on point, and thoughtful work by Beth Leonard on two different houses.  Looking forward . . . .

user_reviews_extended.Name: Abbie Dutterer
user_reviews_extended.Description: I just worked with Sasha on insurance for my new home. She was amazing to work with, and not only did she help get me a quote within just a few hours, she saved me a significant amount on all of my other insurance products. She took the time to explain everything that was needed and matched all of my coverages and suggested additions. I never felt pressured or pushed, and feel really confident about my choice with Sasha and State Farm. Don’t hesitate to call them!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cassidy Garvin
user_reviews_extended.Description: Michelle at Joe Freund has been the most incredibly knowledgeable, helpful, kind & supportive insurance agent I've ever experienced! She has helped me navigate what could have been very overwhelming insurance challenges with thoughtful expertise & a great sense of humor when a little laughter was just what was needed. Total recommendation without hesitation.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ilsa W
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had a great experience with Sasha Viney creating a life insurance policy. She made the process very easy and headache free. The experience made me feel like she valued my needs and she was very knowledgeable about the whole process. I would highly recommend her to anyone.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brian Nguyen
user_reviews_extended.Description: Highly recommend Michelle H! Was very helpful and easy to work with in my policy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mary Thomas
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been with Joe Freund for over 10 years and they have provided great services.  They make it really easy to add and remove vehicles and adjust my other policies and my needs change.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rondel Place
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Highly recommended. Fantastic and professional service.
Michelle Ezzell, and Joe Freund are amazing agents. Knowledgeable & fast. We switched our properties, auto's from Farmers a few years ago and could not have better support and rates. We also added life insurance, and umbrella.

user_reviews_extended.Name: matt everly
user_reviews_extended.Description: Working with Michelle was an absolute breeze! Her expertise and professionalism are top-notch, making the insurance process simple. I had a ton of questions on policies and she went above and beyond with great patience. Highly recommended!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stan Adler
user_reviews_extended.Description: Just completed a full policy review with Chris Alfred. Very thorough- received some good tips and made a few changes to save me some money. He assured me  of State Farms' commitment to California residents policy holders and that was a relief. I have always had prompt good service from the Joe Freund agency over the past 12 years.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Fred Chang
user_reviews_extended.Description: Reached out to Kim for quote on insuring new Tesla Model Y vehicle. She was helpful and responsive. Ended up still going with Tesla Insurance as it was half the cost of State Farm's for similar coverage, but will definitely consider State Farm at a later date if it fits my budget & needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jay Elliott
user_reviews_extended.Description: The Joe Freund State Farm team is great to work with! Highly knowlegable, professional and efficient. I highly recommend Michelle and all she does for me!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Emily Soffrin
user_reviews_extended.Description: Thank you Michelle and the Joe Freund team for the seamless experience adding a new car to our existing auto insurance policy. Michelle was incredibly friendly and knowledgable, and I felt well-taken care of during an otherwise complicated car-buying experience.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jan Coppinger
user_reviews_extended.Description: Beth is a wonderful example of good customer service. Appreciate her great attitude and quick action with a recent request. Always a pleasure to deal with Joe's office. Thank you, Jan

user_reviews_extended.Name: Felicia Cleper-Borkovi
user_reviews_extended.Description: Our condo association has been covered by State Farm since 1998. Michelle Ezzell, Sasha Viney and Joe Freund have recently demonstrated customer-focus, patience, and understanding. Notwithstanding the substantial increases to our HOA Premium, we felt heard and supported by Joe's team. Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Henry Tang
user_reviews_extended.Description: Michelle Ezzell has advised me on my insurance needs for 5-10 years.  She always provides me with great advice and ensures I have the right policies and limits - not too much but sufficient to not have to worry.  Whenever I have a change in my life circumstances, she's the one I get advice from.  She reminds me, when I forget, to cancel, get or change my policy on a timely manner.  She makes sure I have the most economical yet effective set of policies.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Laurie Fusia
user_reviews_extended.Description: I always thought that the cheaper the insurance the better but as I have grown older and now have more to lose, I didn't think to adjust my insurance accordingly. Sasha Viney is an insurance wizard... she explained to me how underinsured I was with cheap insurance. She never pressured or insurance shamed me but clearly explained how the system works and what I needed to protect what I have worked so very hard for the past 30 years. I was shocked that my previous insurance company hadn't advised me of my possible liability. We were so impressed with her knowledge and advice that we purchased renter's insurance and we plan on consulting her on any future insurance needs. I recommend  Sasha and State Farm to all my friends and customers and I'm not the recommend type of person so if I am going to recommend something I really mean it!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Abigail Henderson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Customer service is awesome here - Michelle was super helpful when I called. She was able to give me information about my policy, suggest next steps, took care of everything on the phone and followed up with an email confirmation!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brad Vaccaro
user_reviews_extended.Description: Michelle E. is the best! Always a prompt response, gets me the information or document I need, even when I'm up against a tight deadline. Love the Joe Freund team.

user_reviews_extended.Name: emily dickson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Michelle Ezzell provided me with fantastic service and support in sorting out my mother’s affairs. Every step of the way she communicated swiftly and clearly to me what was required. I wasn’t expecting this kind of hands on service from an insurance professional, and am immensely thankful for her help.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Yuwen Memon
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've never interacted with Joe himself but his staff is amazing. Sasha, Kim, Brianna, Veronica - all great! Super friendly and helpful with whatever questions I have. Very thorough as well. They really make that whole "like a good neighbor State Farm is there" thing feel genuine.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cara Allan
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Kim and Michelle are AWESOME!

Kim was very responsive and extremely helpful in assisting my 90 year old mom with transferring her HO, Auto & PLUP over to State Farm and helping my husband get a life policy!

Michelle assisted me with confirming that are auto policy covered rental car and in a timely fashion.

Highly recommend Joe Freund State Farm Agency!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Crystal Dykstra
user_reviews_extended.Description: Working with Beth was a fantastic, efficient, and  informative experience! Thank you for all the help!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Diane Harrigan (PostcardsFromSF)
user_reviews_extended.Description: Joe Freund is hands down the best State Farm agent I've ever worked with - I feel SO fortunate to have discovered this office over a decade ago. Everyone in the office is the gold standard of professional and they go out of their way to make sure the coverage you secure meets your needs. I have spoken many times to Kimberly who knows this industry inside out and provides such a level of comfort in making sure I understand my options. Wonderful experience working with this team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Taylor Gandy
user_reviews_extended.Description: I worked with Kimberly Killips. I haven't owned a vehicle in some time. As a result I was very out of practice when it comes to getting insurance for a vehicle. I was fortunate that my partner was already connected with Kim through our home insurance and insurance we had on another vehicle. Working with Kim was a breeze. She was very responsive and great with follow up. On the phone she was even more outstanding. Felt like I was talking to a great friend. In addition to her professionalism,  she was very informative and accommodating to all my questions. I left my call with her feeling I was in great and trusted hands. Because of Kimberly, I would recommend State Farm to anyone looking for home, auto, or other insurance. But I would further recommend them specifically to Kimberly........not Jake.......

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marilynn Holland
user_reviews_extended.Description: Sasha was very responsive, informative, professional and went the extra mile to get me the best policy and coverage. I am very pleased with our work together.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lewis Burleigh
user_reviews_extended.Description: Staff was efficient, very helpful and polite. Overall, the best insurance agency I have dealt with.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Vincent Leger
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have worked with Joe's team, including Michelle more recently, for 15 some years. They are always so responsive, look out for you, make things happen seamlessly and painlessly. Congrats on running such a great organization and being so customer focused.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Charles Cawte
user_reviews_extended.Description: Definitely ask for Sasha and Beth! They are  both unbelievably helpful, responsive and friendly. Throughout my time as a State Farm customer, both Sasha and Beth have made various components of our insurance needs a breeze and an easier process!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Darren Smith
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Thanks to the team at State Farm for coming through with appropriate coverage for my wine country property during the height of the fire season when no other company would. The team was such a pleasure to work with, asked detailed questions to make sure they fully understood our property and provided me with excellent level of detail prior to binding the policy.  I was also able to get a lot better coverage for the same price as my previous policy.

By far this was the best experience I have had working with an insurance company.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cathy Carl
user_reviews_extended.Description: Joe and Michelle were amazing in helping me get all my insurances sorted. They took ample time to understand my needs and put together a solid plan for which I am very grateful. They were patient, knowledgable, and provided great customer service. Five stars!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sarah Coates
user_reviews_extended.Description: This office was INCREDIBLY helpful at quickly setting up a new car insurance policy when my rates increased substantially with another provider. Thank you, Kim!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nathaniel Beach
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have had great experiences every time I work with the Joe Freund State Farm Agency. They take care to explain the ins and outs of the policies that they offer and give fantastic advice. This makes the sometimes confusing world of insurance accessible and easy to navigate. I feel completely confident in recommending Joe's agency to my friends and family.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Robert Garcia
user_reviews_extended.Description: Sasha is an amazing person and rep. Sasha genuinely cares about her clients and does not push sales tactics. I truly felt that Sasha cared about my interested and needs and suggested the best policy for me. I highly recommend Sasha and the Joe Freund State Farm team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jane Richey
user_reviews_extended.Description: Michelle Ezzell of Joe Freund State Farm solved a problem for me which I didn't think was solvable.  She went out of her way to help me and she is an incredible asset to this office and State Farm!  I am so grateful and recommend her for any of your insurance needs!  Thank you Michelle!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Julie Mora-Blanco
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been with Joe Freund's team at State Farm since 2006 and they have always been fantastic. I most recently worked with Michelle who quickly helped resolve my issue.Last year we did a full assessment of our needs as a family and walked away with more insurance at a lower price. I can't recommend them enough!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mark F
user_reviews_extended.Description: I really appreciate being able to talk to someone locally. Working with Sasha was the first time I felt like an insurance salesperson was working in my best interest not just trying to sell me something I didn’t need. Quite a new experience. Thank you

user_reviews_extended.Name: Carolyn Copeland McKinney
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had such a great experience with this State Farm branch. My husband and I got the umbrella package because that was the best deal for us and saved us a lot of money. The staff was so helpful and professional and kind, and made the transition effortless. I didn’t feel pressured into choosing a package. Instead, the person who works there (Sasha) just told us what our options were and sat there answering any questions. With a lot of insurance branches, it feels like people are just selling to you and don’t really care what you choose as long as you give them money. That wasn’t the case here. I’m so happy I switched over and can’t recommend working with Joe Freund’s branch enough!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kam Borruso
user_reviews_extended.Description: I highly recommend Joe Freund and his team for your insurance needs. Debbie and Sasha were very helpful with getting me a life policy. Throughly explained the products available and really patient. Thank you!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nick Cusick
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I’ll be honest, insurance companies tend to be excruciatingly hard to deal with; not this one though. I’ve had so much help with my needs, and the office has always been more than happy to accommodate my requests, and educate me on the particulars of my problems. Tina has been especially gracious and helpful to me and my family.

God Bless

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bill Fein
user_reviews_extended.Description: I recently had the pleasure of working with Kimberly on a new policy. She was amazing. She walked me through the process while maintaining a very professional and cordial demeanor. I would recommend this State Farm office to anyone getting insurance.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Albie Afan
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Had an incredibly clear and easy experience with Sasha!

We were in need of insurance quickly. After looking at 3 competitors online, we needed to talk to an expert to distinguish what’s what. Within 12 hours we had our policy in hand at the very best rate. We found our go-to spot!

Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Janice Glenn
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I will start by saying- believe all of the accolades in these reviews. You can expect the highest level of service from both Joe Freund & Michelle Ezzell. They consistently provide professional, knowledgeable, honest, prompt, courteous service & advice. They recommended the appropriate coverage for our 4 unit condo building in SF & review our policy annually
Highest recommendations
Janice Glenn

user_reviews_extended.Name: Regina Phelps
user_reviews_extended.Description: Harlan was very helpful with some modifications to our policies. I have been a State Farm customer since the 1970s and have been pleased with the company and the service.  Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Vincent Santiago
user_reviews_extended.Description: Had a great experience dealing with Sasha. She was extremely attentive and knowledgeable every step of the way. Will definitely be back in the future. Highly recommend this agency!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Matt Levine
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great, fast, friendly and very personal service. Highly recommended.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rachael Szmajda
user_reviews_extended.Description: Sasha's help with transferring all of my insurance services to my new address was seamless and priceless. Nothing but 5 stars for Sasha and everyone else at Joe Freund - State Farm from me! They are always easy to work with and a pleasure to boot. Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: John Schaefer
user_reviews_extended.Description: We regularly work with Sasha. She does a great job, is readily available, and is easy to work with!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Colby Harrell
user_reviews_extended.Description: Michelle and Kim were so kind and helpful as they explained to us what the different policies covered and helped my wife and I determine the best coverage choices for our current situation. I highly recommend Joe and his team.

user_reviews_extended.Name: S G
user_reviews_extended.Description: Joe, Sasha, Beth, Kim, and Brianna have been absolutely wonderful with prompt service and care.  They take the time to understand the client's needs, underwrite well, and ensure efficient and accurate follow-through. Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cliff Curry
user_reviews_extended.Description: I recently worked with Kim to estimate insurance during our house hunt and she was incredibly fast and helpful throughout. I’m now using State Farm for all of my family’s insurance needs across home and car. Thank you for being so easy to work with!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Theresa Buckley
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been with this office for close to a decade. They are very friendly. I appreciate that staff reach out preemptively about issues that are not on my radar.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joe P
user_reviews_extended.Description: Beth Leonard, a member of the Joe Freund team, is the person you want to contact when you have insurance questions.  She listens; she responds.  In my case she offered some very helpful advice.  Thanks, Beth.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dark Leap
user_reviews_extended.Description: The team are very responsive and super helpful. I requested many quotes over 2 years as we were looking to move and the team always got back to me within 24 hours and once we did finally move they applied additional discounts based on my new address without me even having to ask. Thank you to everyone for the help, especially Kim and Sasha!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brian O'Connor
user_reviews_extended.Description: Always professional and responsive… I worked today with Michelle in Joe Freund’s office and truly appreciated her timely assistance. She was knowledgeable and courteous. Highly recommended!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Caleb Canning
user_reviews_extended.Description: This agency is wonderful to work with. They're highly responsive, helpful, friendly and professional. I've worked with them for a decade now and trust them to make excellent recommendations on situations that can get very complicated. Thanks Joe and Michelle!

user_reviews_extended.Name: George Ortuzar
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been a Bay Area resident most of my life. I struggled to find decent auto insurance for many years. When I finally found quality insurance it was extremely over priced. But now since working with this State Farm I have only experienced excellent service, professional and responsive staff, and most importantly a fantastic insurance policy. If you aren’t working with this state farm you’re probably missing out. They are the best!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jessica Trejo
user_reviews_extended.Description: Had a great experience getting our life and auto insurance taken care of. Sasha explained all of our options, helped us find the right fit, and answered all my follow up questions. 10/10

user_reviews_extended.Name: Andrea Delgado
user_reviews_extended.Description: I'd like to thank Sasha Viney for always taking good care of me. She is responsive, honest and always makes sure that I have the best coverage. My knowledge of insurance barely touches the surface but she always takes the time to explain each detail to me, which makes me feel like she truly has my best interest in mind. I feel very confident that I am in good hands.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mandy Sugrue
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kim is the best! She has been walking me through everything from rental insurance to car insurance. She answers all my calls and emails so quickly and I feel genuinely like I have a expert friend to turn to. Highlight recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Berkeley McKeown
user_reviews_extended.Description: I feel so supported by this team. I moved from across the country and the transition to a new State Farm team was effortless. They helped me select the right policies for my life, my neighborhood and my budget. Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: j allsworth
user_reviews_extended.Description: Joe Freund's agents are always there for me, despite the fact they've never met me. They inherited my account from an agent who I worked with before I moved to LA. Once she retired, Joe's office took over and that was a good day for me.  I recently bought a car. I called to get my insurance updated.  While I was speaking to Sasha, the agent assigned to my account, I learned that I could obtain an umbrella policy that would provide protection in the event my regular car insurance limits were not enough. I live in LA and there are some incredibly expensive cars here. This has been a concern of mine. Sasha showed me how I could get the umbrella as well as a personal property policy for only $10/month more than my current auto and renters policies. She answered all my questions, got me all the pertinent documents and was able to bind coverage in less than 24 hours. The ultimate professional, Sasha was great to work with, made the whole thing easy (I mean who actually likes buying insurance??), and I love her Aussie accent!  I highly recommend this agency.

user_reviews_extended.Name: mark russell
user_reviews_extended.Description: Joe Freund agency and Kim Beach are the best. Have been with them for close to 20 yrs. Professional, reliable and great problem solvers. Highly recommend.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ana
user_reviews_extended.Description: Sasha was extremely helpful in getting our renters policy up and running! She was super quick to respond and very informative. I would absolutely recommend this to anyone who is looking for an easy and painless set up. Thank you again Sasha (:

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mayur Mehta
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have worked with Chris Alfred. He is very good with follow up and takes care of the policy holders. He represents and supports policy holders very well with regards to claims or any other issues with the underwriters which is what a good agent does. I like working with Chris.

user_reviews_extended.Name: LT Kwok
user_reviews_extended.Description: Work done by actual people vs a computer. I was traveling & was away for months with my car parked the back of my garage & didn’t need it insured.  I asked Michelle to turn off my car insurance while I was away and turn it back on the day before i return. No hassle at all. Just a couple of emails & it was done. Saved me $300-400!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Parviz Zavareh
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great and very competent staff.  We contacted the agency on a short notice to procure  homeowners insurance for a multiunit tenancy in common on a tight escrow closing schedule for condo.  Ms. Michelle Ezzell handled the underwriting , we were very happy with  her getting the insurance so promptly in place.  I highly recommend Joe Freund agency.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jodi Traversaro
user_reviews_extended.Description: Consistently providing excellent service! Thanks to Harlan and the team.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tiff B.
user_reviews_extended.Description: Michelle Harrell and State Farm have been excellent to work with.  We have been with them for 20+ years, and have had incredible service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Aditi Dalakoti
user_reviews_extended.Description: I worked with Sasha to get an insurance policy with State Farm. She is excellent at her work. She explains policy benefits, makes suggestions (really good ones), and is clear and concise in her communications. Thank you Sasha

user_reviews_extended.Name: James Carey
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I moved and got confused as to what I owed State Farm - I accidently paid twice. Michelle Ezzell, the Customer Service Manager, helped me sort it all out. I received my refund today.
I am happy and I wish everyone at Joe Freund a wonderful New Year.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Burak Guner
user_reviews_extended.Description: When it comes to insurance on your biggest assets, you want peace of mind; you want to go with the most reputable, reliable firm out there. Since our first home more than a decade ago, we have been with State Farm. It is now our one stop shop for all our assets. My local agent in SF, Joe Freund and team, has consistently been the most helpful and most responsive team ever since.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kelli Costelloe
user_reviews_extended.Description: This was my second time getting rental insurance here and both times Kim made the process seamless and enjoyable. She is friendly, professional and goes above and beyond to find the best coverage for the best value. I highly recommend this office for any insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: R Butler
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been with the Freund Agency for years because they have always been honest, responsive, professional, and easy to work with.  Sasha Viney provides expert advice on insurance products without high pressure.  Highly recommend to anyone.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lorraine Burgstrom
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great work everyone! We were SO pleased from the beginning of our contract. Our agent was very professional with a lovely and personable disposition.  Michelle Ezzell surely made this experience as easy as possible.  Thanks for all you did and best wishes!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Maciek P.
user_reviews_extended.Description:
If you are looking for a solutions oriented agency, Joe Freund’s office is not for you. For context, my 1st policy with this office was written in 2013, and I just removed the last one in Oct 2023 due to incompetence. This office used to be great, but the support here has diminished substantially.

I have a permanent resident with a house in CA, and am in WA temporarily to take care of my aging parents because I can work remotely. During my time here, the registration on my main vehicle had expired as had my previous auto policy. I called this office to sort this out and transfer my auto policy back to CA so that the DMV will issue me new tabs, and they refused to help. In fact, they went as far as try and sabotage any resolution by adding notes to my account with disinformation.

Needless to say, I will never do any business with this office ever again. And if you are seeking solutions, consider this experience and look elsewhere.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cynthia Arteaga
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Insurance isn't my favorite topic - "What if I decrease my deductible by X amount? Do I really need X? What if I add an umbrella policy? Help me understand why I need that?"

I.ASK.ALL.THE.QUESTIONS. Fortunately Michelle is not only patient but goes out of her way in helping me understand the ins and outs of all my questions - even the dumb ones. Thank you for presenting me with different options and following up when you say you are! I appreciate it!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Carol C
user_reviews_extended.Description:
If you’re looking for an insurance carrier who is responsive, friendly and efficient, look no further than Joe Freund – State Farm Insurance.   Kim Killips was able to set up 4 different policies and send digital confirmation along with policy attachments in just a few hours.

It’s refreshing and a pleasure to do business with qualified and professional people within the insurance industry.

Thank you Joe Freund and Kim Killips!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Emer Espiritu
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kim and Debbie are excellent at handling customer service, providing efficient service with thorough follow-ups to ensure everything is done correctly. Their exceptional services are truly commendable!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jose Rodriguez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Been with Joe Freund for many years now. Amazing team, finally satisfied with an insurance team that always answers all my questions and help me in every step during my claims. Highly recommend to anyone looking for an insurance team that treats you like family.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rohit Ramkumar
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kimberly is the definition of professional - she was thoughtful, informative, and very proactive when helping me set up my life insurance policy. She answered all my questions above and beyond and helped my navigate the process understating my unique situations. Will definitely be working with Kimberly for my future insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brandon LaSan

user_reviews_extended.Description:
Bertha and Veronica Both truly exemplify stellar customer service. I’ve had a lot of changes in the last year even though I have been a client of this particular state farm branch for about 10 years now, these two ladies have been very diligent and being patient with me and working with me throughout this last year of my ups and downs! They truly care and a lot of customer service positions a lot of people I engage with do it out of obligation but these two ladies sincerely care about the clients experience! user_reviews_extended.Name: elizabeth hu
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had the most amazing experience with Jessica Aquilar, Office Manager at David Chacon State Farm Insurance Agent. My life insurance agent for many years could not be reached so I googled and found David Chacon with the highest review in San Francisco. Making a long story short, after changing agent, Jessica helped me and my spouse with termination on life insurance cash surrender policy and followed up with the necessary documents. We would highly recommend this agent for your insurance companies because there is always someone answering the phone and they will follow up whatever the problems are. We’re now living outside U.S. and we are impressed with Jessica Aguilar.

user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been with statefarm… too long.  I know I may find “cheaper” rates (or who knows nowadays) but I will not get the great service, kindness no where else.  I’m always calling asking questions regarding my different policies and always get answers on the phone or email. I love the app! I mainly get in contact with Mayra, she’s great! Genevieve reached out to me to discuss the State Farm quote after I started the process online. She was helpful and even explained each item that I was confused about so that I could get the exact coverage I needed. Unlike other renter's insurance providers, she was able to work with me to adjust the coverage for liability insurance to $500k and add the HOA of the condo that I was moving into, so that my husband and I could move our stuff in ourselves and save money on movers.

Genevieve really went above and beyond, and I recommend reaching out to her for any of your insurance needs!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jose Flores
user_reviews_extended.Description: David and his team are great! I have been insured with them over 10 years. When it comes to business insurance, life insurance ,auto or home insurance,  I've always received great customer service. I highly recommend David and his team to be your next State Farm agent.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Paul Moore
user_reviews_extended.Description: I recently worked with Eun Jun at David Chacon's office to update my homeowners insurance to reflect changes in home security (which is a surprisingly great deal). Eun was not only incredibly helpful on that front, but also alerted me to savings I could claim due to recent upgrades to our plumbing, electrical and heating. It ended up saving my family a bundle, which is particularly great nowadays! Many thanks to Eun and the rest of David's State Farm team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gloria Brandt
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been with State Farm for over 10yrs. I’ve had Jessica as my agent and I pretty happy all these years of excellent service. Their service and concern, for anything they may come up, has been their number one priority all these years. You’re not just another costumer, you’re part a tight knit network that truly values you.

user_reviews_extended.Name: H.Gabriel Melese
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have been with State Farm insurance for our Business Liability coverage over  10 years now. David and the team, especially Jessica, have always been the MOST helpful for any situation we have been in. Love that we can pick up a phone & get an immediate answer. So happy we found David and his team through State Farm.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Akshay Menon
user_reviews_extended.Description: Genevieve was extremely helpful right from the beginning. Prompt in her communication, she made it much easier to get coverage for my car with the best discounts. Highly recommend working with her.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lucca Reichborn
user_reviews_extended.Description: David Chacon State Farm office crew is the best !! They are super efficient, professional and quick to resolve issues. I have been with their office for over 20 years and I am still amazed how easy they make everything sound. Never a problem, always an answer !! Thank you so much to a great team !!

user_reviews_extended.Name: D D
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I recommend David’s State Farm office. They have always provided me with quality service and have taken excellent care of my needs.  Moreover, my last dealings were specifically with Genevieve. She is top-notch. Her service was proficient and her personality was friendly.
💯👌🏼

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ahmad Omar
user_reviews_extended.Description: Genevieve Has been nothing but amazing to me and my family. The only reason why I’m still with State Farm’s insurance honestly is because of her. Hands down she has been there for me caring treats us like family god bless her.

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Fuchs
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I was GHOSTED by my agent of 14 years.

David will be your "good neighbor" as long as he can sell you stuff, but don't expect an iota of help when you need it.

I've been a decades-long loyal SF customer, until a month ago when another SF insured caused an accident and damage to my vehicle. SF refused to deal with my claim in good faith, and dismissed it before even getting a statement from me or a witness that was present.

This isn't David's fault - But when I contacted him, asking if he could help me get the situation resolved, all I got was crickets. Several emails over a month to multiple people in his office were not acknowledged in any way, even when I finally simply asked to cancel my policies.

Absolutely shameful behavior from SF towards an accident victim, and absolutely shameful treatment of a long-time loyal customer on David Chacon's part.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Christian Muñoz
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Now I fully understand the other review below about being ghosted. I tried starting a new policy but they have been slow to respond or not even at all, I guess the good news is I dodged a bullet maybe you should too. Can’t imagine being in this when an accident happens.

It’s a shame because the lady who helped was kind and I was looking forward to this good neighbor thing.

Guess not.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Carlos Benitez
user_reviews_extended.Description: David and his team are outstanding!  Whether its car insurance, life insurance or home insurance,  I've consistently recieved highly responsive and friendly customer support. Highly recommend David to be your next State Farm agent.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gerry Almen
user_reviews_extended.Description: State Farm representative David Chacon is the example of ‘Excellence’ in the insurance market. David has formed a dedicated team to service all insurance needs. I filed a claim was contacted the very same day  I felt they understood my hardship & helped me cope with the situation.Thanks David for the attention given, for the awesome service State Farm, David is at 3425 25th St in San Francisco 94110.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brandon Spearman, Sr.
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ed with State Farm really made the process of obtaining a life insurance policy very easy.  It left me with a peace of mind that m family will be taken care of in the event of a sudden loss.  The San Francisco office is very neat, organized and plenty of space for social distancing. I recommend David's office to all of my friends and family.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mikel Tabaniag
user_reviews_extended.Description: I first had the pleasure of working with David Chacon's office, specifically with Ed H., over 10 years ago. The entire office, has always responded professionally, ethically, and very quickly. I have on multiple occasions, referred friends and others to this office. If you're looking into insurance, you'll be in very good hands letting David, Ed, and the team help you with all your needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sophie Borja
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had a situation with my car insurance premium and mileage. Veronica Garcia assisted me efficiently and professionally. She kept me abreast and solved my situation in a short period of time. Kudos to Veronica who is an asset to your company.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gina Surber
user_reviews_extended.Description: We’ve been with David Chacón’s office for all of insurance needs for about 20 years. More recently, we have worked directly with Genevieve Martinez. Genevieve has been very responsive with whatever we needed, whether it was about our car or home coverage, or about e-bike insurance. She also recently helped us secure a policy for earthquake insurance, which we had thought about purchasing for years, but had never done.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ruby Danielsson
user_reviews_extended.Description: I was looking to reduce the amount of my auto coverage with AAA.  Truth, State Farm could not beat my price.  However, the personal attention, unbiased advice and customer service I experienced working with Ed Hidalgo made the competitive quote a no brainer.  Although I ended up paying slightly more with State Farm, I knew from past experience it was worth it to have someone like Ed on my side.  About a year later, this proved to be true when someone stole my car totaling not only it but, also a second car and damaging a third vehicle as well.  I was so overwhelmed  by the situation which left me and my children with no means of transportation when we woke up in the morning.  I didn't even try calling the claims number on my policy - I just called Ed Hidalgo.  Honestly, he took care of everything - he even set up my rental car and gave me step-by-step instructions of what to do next.  He then went to the extent of contacting the claims department and having the call me so that all I had to do was answer the phone and give them my report.  I can't say enough good things  - I was satisfied with the reimbursement I was given for my totaled car but I was even more grateful to have Ed Hidalgo as my representative.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brendan Kenneally
user_reviews_extended.Description: Genevieve, in this office has been very helpful in managing multiple insurance policies for my family.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jose Velasco
user_reviews_extended.Description: We contacted David a few years ago because we needed the liability insurance for our business, we ended up with our renter and vehicle insurance as well. We always receive an excellent service and attention in a timely manner.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rachel Jones
user_reviews_extended.Description: Genevieve from State Farm has been great to work with! She is super attentive, helpful, and friendly.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Claudia Center
user_reviews_extended.Description: Highly recommend. Very professional and responsive insurance agent. Will answer questions about your policies promptly. If you forget to pay your premium, they email and call you and send you a link to pay on your phone or computer.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Victor Diaz
user_reviews_extended.Description: Excellent experience with David and team! He was attentive and listened to my needs.  Would definitely recommend him to family and friends.

user_reviews_extended.Name: JP Hercules
user_reviews_extended.Description: I'm very happy with my agent, his office staff and my coverage. Full disclosure: I used to work at this office, so I know them all personally and wouldn't want anyone else handling my insurance.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Frank lemus
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great experience with staff, very friendly and knowledgeable there is not one question they could not answer regarding auto and life insurance.  I feel I have made the best decision choosing State Farm.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Veronica Chan
user_reviews_extended.Description: This review is specifically for Ed. He really took the time to answer all the questions I had. If he didn’t have an immediate answer, he made sure to do the research and get back to me in a prompt manner. I really appreciate the time he took to make sure I felt like I understood everything. Thanks so much, Ed!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Paula Gamez
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love there very friendly hope and never had a problem with them if you call they will work with u i been with them  more then 8 yrs

user_reviews_extended.Description: The enrollment process was quite simple, and the agent explained the options clearly. Customer service has been prompt every time I’ve called. Although the  price is quite reasonable and fits your budget.Thank you Veronica & Monica por su ayuda

user_reviews_extended.Name: Moises I Amaya Najera
user_reviews_extended.Description: Buying life insurance was one of the best decisions I have ever made. Beyond the financial aspect, it gave me something priceless: peace of mind. Knowing that—come what may—my family won't have to shoulder financial burdens during a difficult time completely changes the way one lives day-to-day. It is a real and responsible way to protect the ones you love most and to safeguard your legacy. Furthermore, the process was much simpler than I expected; everything was explained to me clearly, without any pressure, and with options that fit both my budget and my needs. Thank you for your service, Veronica and Monica.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jairon Mendez
user_reviews_extended.Description:
My first thought why get it now? I call ☎️ Immediately Jesica/Monica answered my question, I give🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟 & looking forward building new relationships with opportunities now possible!
Thank you David Chacon (team) - State Farm 100% satisfaction.

user_reviews.Description: I needed insurance for my car and was looking for something quick and easy. Hogan Insurance made the process so efficient, and I had my policy in no time. The agent who helped me was punctual, professional, and answered every question I had. Highly recommend their services!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Klaudia Caronna
user_reviews_extended.Description: I needed insurance for my car and was looking for something quick and easy. Hogan Insurance made the process so efficient, and I had my policy in no time. title: Lynn Petrie Lange - State Farm Insurance Agent
address: 3717 Buchanan St #100, San Francisco, CA 94123, United States
plus_code: RH38+PF Marina District, San Francisco, CA, USA

owner.name: Lynn Petrie Lange - State Farm Insurance Agent (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Adrian Featherstone
user_reviews.Description:
I recently switched my car insurance to State Farm and had an excellent experience working with Lynn Petrie Lange and Chaz Hamm. From our first conversation, they were professional, brilliant, personable, and genuinely attentive.

What I appreciated most was how thoroughly they walked me through my options. They took the time to explain the details of my coverage, made sure I understood the differences between policies, and answered all my questions patiently and clearly. At no point did I feel rushed or pressured, just supported and well-informed.

Making changes to car insurance always feels like a big decision to me, but Lynn and Chaz made the process seamless and gave me confidence that I made the right choice. I’m truly grateful for their guidance and highly recommend working with them. You will not regret working with them.

user_reviews.Name: Chemika Rash
user_reviews.Description: Tommie Shaw, Account Manager| License # 0L11876, was incredible and helped me set up my Auto insurance policy. She was knowledgeable and professional, and it was a Joy to become a new customer. More people like her are needed in the business. I would recommend anybody to State Farm because of her exceptional customer service.

user_reviews.Name: Carlos Mock
user_reviews.Description: Lynn and her team has always been there for every need I’ve had in regards of auto, home or business, her office definitely has me covered. They will take the time to have a dialogue to find what best suits me to have the benefits, the protection and to keep it reasonable within my financial needs. I would highly recommend working with her and her office, it’s been many years for me of an honest, consistent and professional relationship.

user_reviews.Name: Bonnie Kirk
user_reviews.Description:
I am very happy to share with your present and future State Farm customers about the excellent service that I have received for the past fifty years.  Yes, 50 years!  I signed up with State Farm when I was 23 and working in San Francisco at the Ferry Building. I bought my first car - a 1973 Plymouth Duster and needed car insurance.  Although I have changed my cars over the years, I have never changed my car insurance.  Lynn, you and your team provide great service.  I have received the best customer service and I really appreciate your help with all of my insurance needs (car insurance, life insurance, and home insurance).

Thank you so much!

user_reviews.Name: Donna McClung
user_reviews.Description: I have worked with Lynn and her team for 31 years and they consistently provide the best customer service experience with their fast, thorough, and knowledgeable responses for both my personal policies which are many and for our HOA. Over the last year, I have also worked with Rosie and Summer, whose knowledge and friendliness were outstanding.  For anyone seeking a friendly, highly knowledgeable, and reliable insurance team, I highly recommend them!

user_reviews.Name: Keenan Rodgers
user_reviews.Description: My partner and I have been clients of the Lynn Petrie Lange for over ten years for our home owners, vehicle, and personal articles insurance. We feel so fortunate for her and her office for the peace of mind they provide us with the trust they instilled in us to them to always make sure we are informed, covered properly and fully as well as the outstanding communication they consistently provide us with. Summer is our primary contact at the office and in the past few years has solidified our decision in being lifetime clients.

user_reviews.Name: Gracie Hurtado
user_reviews.Description: I have been a customer for over 20 years! Lynn and the team have been right there by my side as life brought on changes that required various types of coverages and needs. With the recent changes in the insurance industry Tommie has been amazing helping me navigate and ensuring me and my family have great coverage and maximize all benefits to ensure competitive cost. She is also super supportive , helpful and responsive to inquiries I throw at her! Thank you Lynn and team

user_reviews.Description:
I've been with Lynn Petrie Lange 20 plus years and I have to say each time I call to speak with any member, they have been responsive, extremely kind, extremely helpful, and friendly.  I have to say I never had any issues with anyone.

One member who unfortunately is no longer there, went out of his way and helped me out a tough jam many years ago regarding an accident I was involved in.

I highly recommend Lynn and her State Farm Crew to anyone

I have many vehicles insured by them I plan to add to the fleet and look forward to working with Lynn for years to come

I'm in the process of buying a vehicle in California for the first time, so I gave the office a call, and spoke to Tommie, who generously helped me gain the clarity I needed for this process. Tommie also informed me that I qualified for some additional discounts that saved me a significant amount of money, which I was thrilled about! Although I haven't purchased a vehicle yet, I am confident that working with Tommie will make the process smooth. Thank you so much for everything, Tommie!

user_reviews_extended.Description: 3 decades of excellent professional and personal support from each and every team member demonstrates how all firms should conduct your businesses. The ultimate pleasure in dealing with Agent, Lynn Petrie Lange and her competent staff.

user_reviews_extended.Name: marc kasky
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a client of Lynne’s for over 30 years, maybe 35. I have remained a client, and expanded the ways in which my wife and I have been covered, because she and her staff have ALWAYS provided excellent service. No waiting for answers to questions, always explanations I understood about our coverages and costs. I could not ask for more when it comes to feeling secure with our insurance meeds. And that is the main objective of insurance. Marc Kasky

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ryan King
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I've been a State Farm client my entire life. Lynn and Summer are shining examples of why I keep with State Farm.

They are always attentive and quick to respond to my needs, as well as keeping me updated on the state of insurance (which is a big deal right now in California!).

Additionally, Summer always ensures I am getting exactly what I want and need for my coverages, ensuring I am aware of the options and cost differences, as well as the impact any changes can make to my bills.

As long as State Farm will keep providing insurance, I will continue to work with Lynn and Summer to keep my coverages up to date and have the peace of mind that things will work out of there is an accident.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kristin Reinke
user_reviews_extended.Description: Lynn has been my agent for over 25 years.  She and her knowledgable staff are delightful to work with and always go out of their way to give me helpful advice through all of my family’s changing needs.  I highly recommend her office!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Grant Goldstein
user_reviews_extended.Description: If you need any assistance with insurance, use Lynn!! She is extremely professional and has a great staff working with her to assist with your needs. Tommie, who works aside Lynn was a fantastic help and extremely sweet to deal with. Would recommend to family and friends.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Carolyn Mollenkopf
user_reviews_extended.Description: Happily, Lynn and her team have been a part of our lives for decades, covering several policies.  They are prompt, professional and personable.  Working with a team of such superior people  allows us to rest assured that should anything happen involving policies covered, they will have our backs.  We have most assuredly been at peace over the years having Lynn's team on our side.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bob Edwards
user_reviews_extended.Description: Lynne Petrie Lange has been our StateFarm insurance agent for over 25 years, first covering our condo in San Francisco and subsequently our home in Sonoma CA.  In the rare (fortunately!) cases we’ve had to make a claim, her agency & staff have been the epitome of thorough information, prompt & friendly response and processing assistance, making sure we obtained the full benefits of policy coverage.  The agency’s staff has also been very helpful seeing that we obtained required FEMA flood insurance.   I highly recommend them to anyone with insurance needs, regardless of type or location. Prompt, friendly, smart.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Scott McPhail
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have multiple home and auto policies with Lynn, and have been a customer >20 years. I recently worked with Summer and Rosie on her staff. Both of them provided exceptional customer service and were extremely prompt in their follow-up. I have been loyal to Lynn and State Farm because of this personalized, sincere and customer-centric approach by her staff.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Eric Guarisco
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have been with Lynn Petrie Lange for over 20 years.  Her level of support is superb.  She, along with her staff (Rosie), have helped me through several tricky insurance situations, with quick, detailed and specific guidance.

Insurance often feels like a commodity to me.  However, Lynn's office supports stands out.  Which is why I have stay with them for so many years.  I highly recommend her!

user_reviews_extended.Name: PK Moy
user_reviews_extended.Description: Lynn and her team have always been attentive and patient, making insurance conversations informative and non-stressful. Recent interactions with Tommie in Lynn's office have made me feel heard, which is rare when dealing with most vendors and service providers. It feels like real people work in this office, and they sound like they like their jobs. How refreshing!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joe Numsangvanich
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a customer with Lynn for the past 15+ years. Her staff are always helpful and go extra miles for us. Recently, my wife bought a new car and the dealership requested us to have a proof of insurance with new car information on the policy before we could pick up our car next morning. We are talking about getting all these insurance documents done on late Friday afternoon. However, Rose was able to work diligently and marvelously to give us a quote and prepare all documents ready for our new car. Thank you for that. From my own experience, I haven't had a better service from anywhere else. Thank you again Lynn and all the staff for your wonderful service all these years.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mukesh Gurnani
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been with this agency for more than 12 years now, and very happy with them due to their responsiveness. Fortunately haven’t had a chance to make a claim so can’t comment on that aspect, but on any pricing or coverage changes, they’ve been incredibly helpful and always provided information beneficial for me. Tommie is really thorough and prompt.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gina L. Ferrante
user_reviews_extended.Description: The Lynn Petrie Lange State Farm team has provided me with exemplary customer service for over 20 years. Tommie recently went above and beyond to assist me with the claims process. I truly appreciate being able to count on courteous & friendly people who both answer the phone and welcome me into the office to lend a helping hand!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Catherine Hughes
user_reviews_extended.Description: Lynn, Tommie and Rosie are the absolute best!!  Responsive, knowledgeable and helpful.  Been with Lynn for 26 Years and take her with me wherever I go and she helps members of my family as well.  Always has time for questions which I appreciate.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Maurits Wiersema
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have found the office to be poor in responding to questions and the agent Lynn to be rather unprofessional.  I have used State Farm for many years when living elsewhere  (20+ years) and my experience with Lynn and her staff has.been uniformly poor and very different than the other agents I have had from State Farm. I am switching to a different San Francisco State Farm agent and would suggest all to consider the same.  Specific issues with Lynn are: 1.) Her policy quotes are higher due to errors she makes when using the State Farm system - other State Farm agents will incorporate appropriate discounts and respond to requests for adjustments in coverage (her absence of communicating makes this impossible to rectify with her), 2.) she does not respond to the online State Farm portal when messages are sent to her and she and her office staff indicate this is  her policy and 3.) her office staff have informed me that she is too busy and therefore only will speak to her clients with a scheduled appointment which are currently 10 days out.   Interestingly, within a few minutes of being contacted by my new State Farm agent who would be taking over the account, Lynn called me indicating she was aware of the unanswered messages left by me but laughed at me and never offered an explanation for her poor service.   As one of her online reviewers indicated, her best attribute is collecting checks .  I can’t imagine the nightmare of trying to work thru a claim with Lynn and her office.  Her online reviews indicate this has been uniformly poor.  Strongly encourage not using this office - State Farm fortunately has many better people out there.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tim Irvin
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have had my homeowners, auto, and HOA policies with Lynn for nearly 30 years.  She and her team have always been incredibly helpful and attentive to my needs.  I appreciate working with an insurance agent who goes out of their way to make sure you have what you need, but not more than you need -- and that is exactly what I have grown to expect from Lynn.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cameron Gregory
user_reviews_extended.Description: My family and I have worked with Lynn at State Farm for many years and are so pleased with her exceptional service. Every time we call the office for assistance they are at the ready and offer us the help we need.  We feel very secure knowing we are in their hands.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Charles Posigian
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been with State Farm for years and they have proven themselves to go above and beyond time and again. This office is no exception and Summer in particular worked diligently to make sure I was getting the fairest price on the market. Could not recommend more!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marcia Trainer
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have known Lynn for 15 years. She is the consummate professional: extremely knowledgeable, organized, prompt, responsive, courteous and friendly, too. Whether I interact with her or her staff, I have been well cared for and fully represented. I confidently recommend her without reservation.
Marcia T.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mazuniga
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had been meaning to switch companies for years due to the increasing premiums and misleading info I received from my previous agent and finally took the leap. I received an email with a follow up text from Summer. She was quick to provide me with a quote for auto and renters insurance that I just couldn’t pass up. She was able to answer any questions I had and explained everything so thoroughly. Thank you Summer and thank you State Farm Insurance!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Damon Boyle
user_reviews_extended.Description: Always helpful with my Insurance needs, and kind, explaining things for me and giving me room to make my decisions. Always there with a call if i need them, for decades now. It's good to talk to people who can help you.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Su Yadanar Htike
user_reviews_extended.Description: Rebecca Hlaoung has been nothing but professional, knowledgeable, and kind person to talk to regarding my auto insurance.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tyler Henchcliffe
user_reviews_extended.Description: Had a very pleasant experience switching my auto insurance from out of state to CA. The staff was very friendly and knowledgeable, and made the daunting switch a piece of cake!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jeff Warren
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been with Lynn for 25 plus years. I have home and auto insurance with her & team. Always been a pleasure to do business with Lynn and the office.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mon Ziegler
user_reviews_extended.Description: The team member (Summer) was incredibly helpful and walked me through the process of changing my Insurance from Florida to California. So helpful!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kevin Capo
user_reviews_extended.Description: The best team to work with! They have been exceptional throughout the years we have worked with them.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Enrico Saturay
user_reviews_extended.Description: Outstanding service.  They walk you through the renewal quotes and give you options to reduce your cost.

title: MOC Insurance Services
address: 101 Montgomery St, San Francisco, CA 94104, United States
plus_code: QHRW+5X Union Square, San Francisco, CA, USA

user_reviews.Name: Norman Burg
user_reviews.Description:
We want to take this opportunity to let you know about the excellent service we are receiving from Tiffany Hartsinck.

We appreciate that Tiffany is always very timely in responding to our questions and concerns. Her cheerful and uplifting manner is always welcoming.

We look forward to continuing to work with her now and in the future for our insurance needs.

Sincerely,

Dr. and Mrs. Norman Burg

user_reviews.Name: Rebecca RebeccaA
user_reviews.Description: I have only been with MOC Insurance Services for a short while, personally less than two years, but my family has been with them for years.  I would normally say that I would just pay my bill and I would not have to worry about anything like everything else but Tiffany has been a godsend this last year.  I recently got a loan to remodel my kitchen and if it had not been for Tiffany and her professionalism I am sure the whole thing would be a mess right now.  The bank kept going behind my back asking her to do things that I had no idea about if it had not been for Tiffany cc'ing me in her return emails.  Mistakes were caught by her eagle eye and I was not caught off guard by things.  I call her my "BFF" because I know that she has my back and will not do anything without letting me know.  I feel that she represents "the customer comes first"!

user_reviews.Name: david lawrence
user_reviews.Description: Outstanding service and attentiveness to client needs.  Timely notifications, helpful advice.  Tiffany Hartsnick is our rep and she is outstanding.  Best we've had.

user_reviews.Name: Jeanie Coleman
user_reviews.Description: Tiffany Hartsinck is the best agent I have had at MOC since my original agent Priscilla Chun retired about 6 years ago. I have been with MOC for 25 years and they are always right on!

user_reviews.Name: Summer Williams
user_reviews.Description: I have never worked with a more consistently kind, easily reachable,  and hard working insurance agent as Tiffany Hartsnick. Love her and MOC!

user_reviews.Name: Tom schmitz
user_reviews.Description: These people are the worst. As a current customer, I needed to make some adjustments to my coverage. I tried multiple times over the course of two months and could not get them to respond to me. Stay Away!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Norman Burg
user_reviews_extended.Description:
We want to take this opportunity to let you know about the excellent service we are receiving from Tiffany Hartsinck.

We appreciate that Tiffany is always very timely in responding to our questions and concerns. Her cheerful and uplifting manner is always welcoming.

We look forward to continuing to work with her now and in the future for our insurance needs.

Sincerely,

Dr. and Mrs. Norman Burg

user_reviews_extended.Description: I have only been with MOC Insurance Services for a short while, personally less than two years, but my family has been with them for years.
