user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiffany Hartsinck is the best agent I have had at MOC since my original agent Priscilla Chun retired about 6 years ago. I have been with MOC for 25 years and they are always right on!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Summer Williams
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have never worked with a more consistently kind, easily reachable,  and hard working insurance agent as Tiffany Hartsnick. Love her and MOC!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tom schmitz
user_reviews_extended.Description: These people are the worst. As a current customer, I needed to make some adjustments to my coverage. I tried multiple times over the course of two months and could not get them to respond to me. Stay Away!

title: Janet Lin - State Farm Insurance Agent
address: 2190 3rd St, San Francisco, CA 94107, United States
plus_code: QJ66+PC Dogpatch, San Francisco, CA, USA

owner.name: Janet Lin - State Farm Insurance Agent (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Gilberto Gamboa
user_reviews.Description: Anita is the best!! She reached out for my yearly review with State Farm to make sure I was happy with the service provided throughout the past year. She explained to me my current coverage plan and the upgrades that I can add later down the line if I desire to do so. She was very accommodating and sweet throughout the process and made me feel comfortable like I wasn’t talking to a stranger. This agency is honestly amazing because they check in periodically throughout the year just to see how I’m doing and if there is anything they can help me with or improve on. I’m happy to have them taking care of me for my insurance needs!

user_reviews.Name: John Lincoln
user_reviews.Description:
I recently had quite a bit of interactions with Tiara Choi, a staff member of Janet’s.

Normally, people take the time to complain about someone or their service.

In this case, I want to share my gratitude and recognition for Tiara. She exemplifies what service, support, and professionalism should look like.

Her speed of response, and the way she clearly recaps every discussion, gives me real confidence that she will ensure not only expediency, but also accuracy and correctness in the support she provides.

Tiara is one of those folks that gives you an added assurance that things will be taken care of as committed.

She has my utmost confidence.

Needless to say, my experiences engaging with Janet the Principal has always been superb and extraordinary. I guess leadership sets the tone. my family has my life, our home and all our car insurance needs done through Janet and her team.

I highly recommend Janet and her team for all your insurance needs.

Keep up the excellent service.

user_reviews.Name: Molly Sands
user_reviews.Description: Anita (with Janet Lin’s group) is an outstanding State Farm agent! She proactively checks in with me every year to review our coverage and make sure we’re properly protected. The annual calls are quick but thorough, and I genuinely feel like someone is looking out for my family’s insurance needs—something I never experienced with other providers. Her team is personable, thoughtful, and professional, and rate increases have been very reasonable over the years. I highly recommend working with Anita if you want an agent who truly cares about keeping you properly insured.

user_reviews.Name: Lauren Rosales
user_reviews.Description: I had the pleasure with working with Tiara in getting new auto insurance. She was not only a JOY to talk to and made my day but we were able to get myself covered for car insurance right away. The process was enjoyable and im so grateful to Tiara and Janet for being able to guide me in the right direction and make sure that my auto insurance policy reflected every little nuance since my car is only used for pleasure and very low milage in this new stage of life! Thank you so much Tiara and Janet for providing just easy, fun, thorough insights throughout this process it truly was SO MUCH EASIER than i could have ever imagined. YAY!

user_reviews.Name: Heidi Hartsough
user_reviews.Description: Agent Anita Scribner is consistently generous with her time and attention to detail. She has been a great help to our family in understanding the complexities of our insurance policy. She has a magic quality of demystifying what for me is unknown and intimidating territory. Anita is one of the best listeners I have ever encountered, and I’m sure all her clients feel her warmth and kindness in every interaction with her. Kudos for Janet Lim for having such a star member on her team!

user_reviews.Name: Millie Yip
user_reviews.Description: Janet Lin and her staff were very professional, knowledgeable, excellent communication skills, answer my and trustee's questions via Zoom, prompt and were not resistant to the challenges of having a more accurate Replacement Home Estimate Costs. Computer took time to transfer my case from former agent to this current agent, and once transferred successfully, they acted quickly and responsibly, correcting every error tirelessly onto the computer without complaint, but with graciousness, understanding our concerns, and accepted the challenge professionally and with expertise, doing it with joy and pleasure, treating us as family with combined packages of insurance needs - homeowners, auto, earthquake, and Umbrella policies. Very educational in explaining the computer system, their endless attempts to meet our requests, via emails, phone calls, and Zoom meetings, all done in a short period of time. They met our expectations above and beyond our imagination, with personal touches, and Excellent Quality. I now can have Total Peace of Mind in my Golden Years to entrust my insurance needs with Janet Lin, Anita Scribner, and staff. My heart is Full of Gratitude above and beyond past experiences, and during this Thanksgiving season also! Thank You! Mucho Gracias (Spanish), Daw Chai (Cantonese). From a Retired Professional, it's worth my investment to invest with this group of professionals, it's worth every dollar. Very thorough, covered every area, each policy, with new questions/info answered and shared.

user_reviews.Name: Ting Fung Chan
user_reviews.Description: Janet and her team with Anita and Alex have been simply a blessing to us since 1997.  They took care of all our auto and life insurance.  Unfortunately, State Farm withdrew our home insurance protection in 2025 ieven though we have clean record.  It was the first time in our lives to scramble for coverage with twice the preimium for same coverage. Janet and her team could not do anything to assist.

user_reviews.Name: Claudia Landivar
user_reviews.Description: I worked with Anita of Janet Lin Insurance to resolve some billing confusion and clarify my policy details. Anita followed through exactly as promised. She took the time to explain my options clearly, answered every question, and helped me feel both confident and respected in the process. High marks for her collaborative style, communication, and follow-through. I'm grateful for her support!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gilberto Gamboa
user_reviews_extended.Description: Anita is the best!! She reached out for my yearly review with State Farm to make sure I was happy with the service provided throughout the past year. She took the time to explain my options clearly, answered every question, and helped me feel both confident and respected in the process. High marks for her collaborative style, communication, and follow-through. I'm grateful for her support!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Abigail Lee
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been with State Farm for over 10 years. Janet Lin and her team are consistently always helpful when I have questions or in the event of a claim. Her team provides detailed and comprehensive customer service. State Farm has also been very generous for the few auto claims that we have had, even when it was a hit and run incident. I highly recommend them!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jacky Tam
user_reviews_extended.Description: Excellent service from Anita! She is highly professional and always thinks from the client’s perspective. Because of Anita’s dedication, Janet Lin’s group consistently does an outstanding job, which is why I’ve remained a loyal client for over 20 years!

user_reviews_extended.Name: K Cusson
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I initially reached out to Janet regarding the passing of a family member. As she was unavailable at the time, Tiara offered to assist me. Tiara was exceptionally professional and knowledgeable, and—most importantly—she demonstrated genuine compassion during an incredibly difficult moment.
Her follow‑through was outstanding; she kept me consistently updated through clear and timely emails. I cannot overstate how helpful and supportive she was, especially when other companies were unable to return even a promised call. I felt very blessed to have her support. Thank you!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Loren Robertson
user_reviews_extended.Description: All the folks I've worked with at this office are attentive and kind. When I did have to file a claim, it was easy and I received the needed payment quickly.  When I have made changes, it has been a smooth process with clear communication and reliability. I have relied on them for my business liability and workers comp for about a decade and I've been very satisfied! Thank you Janet Lin and all!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Linda Chan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Anita would talking to me about life insurance.I thought is a great idea so I brought it through her and she have great advice.Thank you Anita

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jon Ro
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had a great experience working with Anita at Janet Lin’s State Farm Agency. Anita took the time to clearly explain my condo unit owners' policy and walked me through options for long-term care planning and life insurance in a thoughtful and helpful way. She was knowledgeable, personable, and truly cared about making sure I understood my coverage. Highly recommend this team for their professionalism and excellent service!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Betsy Doyle
user_reviews_extended.Description:
We were recently notified of a change in Insurance agents and wasn't sure what to expect.  We met with Anita Scribner with Janet Lin's State Farm office and had a great experience.  She reviewed our current insurance and pointed out some of our discounts and answered our questions.  She was open, friendly and very knowledgeable, offering information that we may want to consider for example, long term care.  She also told us about her group, while new to us they have longevity at State Farm,  so that reassured us.
We appreciated the review and feel that we are in good hands.
I would give 5 stars, but know rates will be going up.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ritchie Jong
user_reviews_extended.Description:
This review has been a long time coming. Have nothing but beyond positive things to say about Janet and her team: Anita, Tiara, Alex, and everyone else in the office.

Long story short, I've been with Janet's office for over 10 years with at least 6 different policies and they have always provided the best customer service. Full accountability and how things should be handled. Had some issues with the State Farm Auto Claims Division that they all went above and beyond to help resolve the situation.

I believe State Farm the corporation has its issues but Janet's office does not. They understand how difficult and ridiculous corporate can be, and do everything they can to help you through their issues. Transferred to Janet's office originally just by chance because my original State Farm office became useless. Highly recommend giving Janet and her team a call!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Santina Lora-Umali
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tiara, who works with Janet Lin’s State Farm agency, was incredibly fast and helpful with my renters insurance. Even though State Farm is no longer offering new renters policies, she let me know right away, gave me solid recommendations for other providers, and handled my cancellation quickly and smoothly. She made everything so easy—highly recommend working with her!

user_reviews_extended.Name: SB 1204
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve had insurance from State Farm for nearly two decades, and Janet’s team has always been really easy to work with. Judy has been especially helpful with a recent claim and some updates to my insurance. She’s been great and I really appreciate it.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Caner Kale
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I had the pleasure of working with Janet Lin State Farm Agency for my car insurance over the past 2 years, and I can confidently say they offer top-notch service. The entire team is polite, professional, and genuinely dedicated to helping their clients.

I want to especially recognize Anita, who was an absolute standout in my experience. From the very beginning, Anita was incredibly kind and approachable, making it easy to discuss my insurance needs and concerns. She has an impressive depth of knowledge about insurance products, and she took the time to ensure I fully understood my options. What really sets Anita apart is her unwavering commitment to her clients. No matter what I needed, she was always there to help with a friendly attitude and a level of professionalism that’s hard to find.
Her responsiveness and willingness to assist made a significant difference for me.

If you’re looking for an insurance agency where you’re treated with respect and where your needs are truly prioritized, I highly recommend Janet Lin State Farm Agency.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Beverly Fuentes
user_reviews_extended.Description: Janet and her team are truly a pleasure to work with. We all need insurance, and granted, due to climate change the devastating fire/storms have caused insurance to cost more.  However, I would rather deal with a company where I am listened to, treated with respect, and looked out for like Janet Lin’s company than any other.  I recently spoke to Alex Louie who helped me realize some possible cost savings  He was very friendly and willing to help.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ashley Lee
user_reviews_extended.Description: Janet Lin’s office has been amazing in helping to manage my insurance policies over the last few years. Everyone on the team is extremely knowledgeable and helpful. When I bought renter’s insurance in 2020, it was a smooth process, and I was given advice on what was a reasonable amount to cover given my possessions moving into my first apartment. I appreciated that I was not pushed to buy renter’s insurance worth more than my belongings and was guided on what would be best for coverage purposes. When I moved to Virginia and needed car insurance, Janet Lin’s team made the transition seamless in getting my information over to an agency in Central Virginia who could help insure my car. I was impressed by thoroughness of information transferred to the point that there wasn’t much I had to provide to the Virginia agency to get set up. From my experience setting up renter’s insurance (in the past), car insurance, and life insurance, Janet Lin’s office has been nothing but helpful and caring for each client’s best interest. The collaboration between each team member and how they leverage each other’s strengths to the team and ultimately to serve their clients is unique and not something I have seen to the same level in other State Farm agencies.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Al Chan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Janet Lin and State Farm insure my parents home in the sunset district of San Francisco.  As my parents are elderly, I have been working with Anita Tsang Scribner from Janet's office.  They are absolutely the most professional, thoughtful and responsive insurance team I've ever worked with.  If State Farm was accepting new home owners policies, I would definitely contact them.  They are the best.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Peter Bond
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Update: Bad review below.   So Janet has been very helpful. It seems my complaint is with the service side. So I can't say anything but horrible reviews of State farm so a far, but Janet is great at listening and attempting to get things resolved. Will update again later.

4/1/25    Really dishonest! Not sure if things are changing because of the fires, but my agent blatantly lied to me that my contractor said they could fix my roof and my contractor said no way. They're trying to pay as little as possible and now I have a leaky roof that can't be repaired. Very dishonest group. Watch out for the Claims rep.  Lynette Pennick, or her Boss Melissa Blea. From the moment she got to my home Lynette started looking for reasons to deny my claim. Got on a call with my contractor and Melissa and this woman told me to replace parts of my roof with tiles from another side of my roof! If the problem is they don't make tiles that fit with the existing roof, how do I replace the side I've stolen tiles from?  Really awful human beings. BAD FAITH!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jessica Justino
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have held my insurance through the Janet Lin State Farm Office for at least 30 years.  Janet and Anita have been very responsive to any of my requests. They were essential in helping me reinstate my insurance with State Farm. The personal touch they provided is definitely why I have stayed with them.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joe Mancini
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been a customer for insurance from Janet and her team for a little less than 20 yrs. I'm always impressed with the level of service that they provide, which is often way above any other insurance provider that I have used. At times I may have found a slightly lower rate here or there, but I've always felt the service provided was well worth the small delta in price I may have received from going elsewhere.

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Chi
user_reviews_extended.Description: Anita was incredibly helpful with starting a new policy. She was very thorough to make sure I was opening the correct one for my use case. She was also super responsive to my questions, and took the time to answer in detail. I really enjoyed working with her to start a new policy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Adam Stone
user_reviews_extended.Description: This has been a great agency to work with. I'm a long-time State Farm client. Due to having various work locations in my lifetime, I've lived in several of our 50 states, so I've worked with a lot of SF agents all around the country. When I was looking for agents in the Bay Area, I talked to a few different offices, but it was definitely Alex at Janet Lin's agency who made all the difference. Alex was absolutely tireless in helping me find appropriate coverage along with every appropriate discount. I've also worked with Anita, Tiara, and others at this agency--all great--but it was Alex that I first encountered, and he's the reason I chose this agency. But no matter who you encounter first, you won't be disappointed as long as you're working with Janet's highly skilled team.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Armand Ebba
user_reviews_extended.Description: Janet Lin has been my agent for over 20 years. Janet and her awesome team have helped me find the right home and auto coverage to protect my family and save me money. They have guided me through small and large claims and made it as painless as possible.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jay Rosas
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been insured by State Farm for over 20 years and have had nothing but excellent experiences in dealing with them. My State Farm Agent Janet Lin and her staff (shout out to Anita) in San Francisco have always been wonderful to deal with, are always upfront and honest when it comes to giving advice and recommendations, but most importantly, they always recognize me when I call their office and have my policy at the ready. Dealing with them all of these years (locally/directly) has been one of the biggest reasons I have been such a longstanding customer!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Carlos R. Carazo
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have been insured with State Farm since 1972 and we have been with Janet Lin since 2009. They have covered my Autos, Home, Life insurance and we have used State Farm Bank to open CD's. State Farm and specifically, Janet, Anita and Alex and all her staff have always been available to promptly answer or address any issue or concern; their service has been impeccable. It is safe to say that Janet has provided
invaluable support and guidance as my wife and I transition into our senior stage of our lives. I highly recommend Janet Lin and her State Farm staff to address any insurance related questions.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Hado
user_reviews_extended.Description: Anita was incredibly helpful as she assisted me with my policy. We had a few complex scenarios and she was able to get me an answer promptly. We both ended up learning a few new things on the call. Great customer service and a pleasant experience. Highly recommend her.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Robert Riemer
user_reviews_extended.Description: Janet's office has been a great partner in my home insurance needs for many years.  This year, at their suggestion, I decided to price a combination of auto + home.  Janet's colleague Judy did a tremendous job of evaluating my needs, making suggestions, and walking me through the process to get all of the discounts I was entitled to.  This was not an easy task!  Janet answered multiple rounds of questions and stayed focused on my account all the way through wrap-up, and I ended up saving nearly $2,000!  My highest recommendation.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Google top Reviewer -David
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I've been a client of Janet Lin - State Farm Insurance for over five years now, and I couldn't be happier. Janet and her team, especially Nissi Wusan, have consistently provided me with exceptional customer service.

From the very beginning, they took the time to understand my individual needs and tailor insurance policies that fit my specific situation. They never try to push unnecessary coverage, and they always explain options clearly and patiently. This personalized approach has given me great peace of mind knowing that I have the right coverage in place.

But their outstanding service goes beyond just setting up policies. When I've had to file claims, Janet and Nissi have been incredibly helpful and supportive. They walked me through the entire process, answered all my questions, and made sure everything was handled smoothly and efficiently. Their proactive communication and friendly demeanor took the stress out of a potentially stressful situation.

Beyond their professionalism, Janet and Nissi are genuinely kind and friendly people. They are always willing to go the extra mile to help. They truly care about their clients and it shows in everything they do.

If you're looking for a reliable and trustworthy insurance agent who will prioritize your needs and provide exceptional service, I highly recommend Janet Lin - State Farm Insurance. You won't be disappointed!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ralph Jacobson
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have been with the Janet Lin agency for many years.  Today, we reviewed our policies with Anita Scribner.  The review is something we do every year or two.  As always, Janet and her staff are very thorough and are interested in our protection and our desire to maintain adequate insurance.  Ms. Scribner was very clear about the coverages we have, and those areas where we might consider additional or other insurance to cover areas where we are currently exposed.  We appreciate the quality work that this agency provides and intend to remain with them for many more years.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alexis Smith
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been with Janet Lin's office for two years now and have always received quick and clear information about my plan and coverage. I recently had my Insurance and Financial Services Review with Anita Scribner who is so kind, knowledgeable, and helpful! She makes navigating insurance a breeze. Highly recommend this office. Thank you for all of your help!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Vanessa Wilson
user_reviews_extended.Description: As a person working in the nonprofit sector, we will forever be grateful to Janet Lin's team's responsiveness and understanding that we are often requesting time-sensitive information and forms. Janet's team is incredibly helpful and patient, they have supported our organization for several years now and demonstrated empathy and grace when meeting our urgent demands. We truly appreciate their continued hard work and support, and their willingness to hop on the phone at a moment's notice to answer questions and ensure all our needs are appropriately met. Special shout-out to Anita and Tiara who have been working closely with our team; we couldn't ask for better guides to all matters related to our insurance policy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: George Fisher
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I hooked up with Abigail at State Farm on a classic car , the experience was great, she was
so helpful and and true to her quote, I’m hopeful
to insure my other cars with that agency , Forr
the client the insurance business is unpredictable, Alls well that ends well , I have
faith in this broker and recommend it

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alexandra Porshnikoff
user_reviews_extended.Description: The service I received from Janet's agent, Tiara Choi, was exceptional. Tiara patiently and thoroughly answered all of my questions. She was thorough in researching available options, and saved me so much time by her efficiency in managing my case. Not only was she prompt and professional in her communication, she was personable, compassionate, and fun to talk to!  I am extremely pleased I serendipitously found Janet's office, and am definitely motivated to consolidate the rest of my insurance needs with them.  Thank you so much!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tara
user_reviews_extended.Description: I recently switched State Farm agents to Janet. Her office has been a pleasure to work with on several different insurance policies. Anita in particular has been very responsive, knowledgeable, and helpful. I would definitely recommend speaking to Janet and her office for your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jensine Thomas
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been with Janet Lin's office for over 10 years. The staff is consistently responsive, friendly, and professional. They deliver quality customer service while also providing great rates. I recently updated my policy and worked with two members of the team. Alex Louie answered all my initial questions and provided quotes for various scenarios. Anita Scribner, who I've primarily worked with over the years, very clearly explained my insurance options, patiently answered all my questions, and went above and beyond to make sure I was getting the best coverage for my needs. I highly recommend this office!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Abby Crizaldo
user_reviews_extended.Description: Janet and her team are so helpful and quick to respond. We submitted a claim last week after a car hit us and are already set up with a body shop and replacement car seat. Grateful that it’s been quick and painless!

user_reviews_extended.Name: elizabeth uy-smith
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have been with Janet Lin's office for more than a decade. The Lin team has always been extremely responsive with any changes in our insurance policy needs and paying out claims. Recently, through the very stressful process of purchasing our first home, Anita Scribner was incredible! She helped us navigate home insurance policy options, quickly providing the necessary quotes and documents needed during escrow. She responded to all correspondences promptly, was always patient and thorough with our questions, and generally went above and beyond at every opportunity. Thank you to Anita and the rest of the Lin team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Frank de Jong
user_reviews_extended.Description: Anita has been great to work with. I needed a new car insurance and I'm usually the "why can't I do this online" kind of person, but after having gone through State Farm's process, I kind of appreciate the more personal approach. I walked past this branch and figured I just give it a go, Anita was super helpful and friendly in explaining everything, giving me a quote, and setting me up with the insurance. Happy I used their services.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chena N
user_reviews_extended.Description: Janet was SO helpful in my journey to move out of my moms insurance and finally be an independent woman with my own insurance. I just purchased a new car and my previous agent was never too nice or helpful. But Janet was so patient in explaining everything in details and had the BEST customer service ever. Great job Janet! Looking forward to working with you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: My Th
user_reviews_extended.Description: We are clients of Janet Lin's office since 2010! Anita has helped me thoroughly with all my endless questions all these years, very prompt in replying to emails and phone calls. Everyone in the office is super friendly, yet professional in dealing with us, for all our insurance coverage, from home, auto, and even life insurance. I believe their rates are highly competitive with the BEST service!! AAAA+++++++++++++ service, especially Anita! Thank you for always being there for us!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alvin Fan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Working with Tiara to transition my auto insurance provider was quick, easy, and most of all, a great experience! Tiara is incredibly helpful and knowledgable, and was even able to hep me transition my auto insurance plan seamlessly even 5 months after I initially contacted the office. Would highly recommend working with Tiara, Janet, and the rest of the team if you're looking for a responsive and helpful team to help meet your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Taylor Stilwell
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Our family has been a Janet Lin customer for 21 years, and we have moved around the Bay Area. We stay with her office for a number of reasons. While she and her team are knowledgable, always looking for ways to help us save money, and provide good care, that is not the main reason.  Janet Lin and team are consistent! There is not a lot of turnover in staff and we've come to know the agents but more importantly, they've come to know us!
The agents are always looking out for our best interests and remember the specifics each time we move. When issues have arisen, they are able to provide quality and helpful direction and support.
One recent example: we were renting a house and called to inform us that in the future, many insurance companies would not be able to provide Home Owner's Insurance in CA. While we didn't care at the time, it proved useful information. When we looked for a home a few months later to purchase, we were already aware of the issue. This allowed us to do our homework and get insurance during the escrow period, and essentially close on time (many people were not able to do this because no one had made them aware of this issue). And while State Farm was not able to offer this particular insurance, the agent they referred us to was (and his office was the only one out of 15 other choices). Without this level of care, we would have had a much larger struggle. If only we had asked for a referral before trying to get it on our own first.

And of course - JANET LIN'S OFFICE ALWAYS HAS THE LOWEST RATES!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Hannah K
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Tiara is an excellent account representative! I am in the process of moving and she asked all the necessary questions to help me in updating my policy. What I really appreciated was the thoughtful gestures in her customer service, ex. in the beginning she informed me how long updating my policy would take, gave me additional helpful information, and did a full review that our updates today were updated across all my policies with State Farm.

It was an absolute pleasure working with her! I’ve been with this group for quite some time now and my experiences over the years have all been positive.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Justin Marimon
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Nobody loves buying and managing insurance policies, but working with Janet and her team is always a pleasant experience. They're quick to respond, thorough and helpful, and work with me to get all the discounts I'm able to, even over email. Tiara has been particularly wonderful to work with.

I have no doubt I could shop around and find cheaper renters policies, but my experience has always been so positive that it's worth sticking around each year.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chris Hodapp
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I spoke with Anita on the phone. She was warm and exceedingly helpful. She helped me double-check my condo coverage, in light of my EV charger install. She was even able to identify a way for me to increase my coverage while reducing my premium by moving my auto insurance to State Farm.

If you're in San Francisco and need insurance, you'd do well to check out this office.

user_reviews_extended.Name: David
user_reviews_extended.Description: Anita is a great insurance agent. We've had many pleasant chats over the years about different insurance options. She consistently demonstrates both her expertise in the subject matter and that she cares about her clients.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Steffie Ho
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Janet’s team is super helpful and responsive on assisting our claims. Especially Anita is very knowledgeable on the policies, being very patient to explain the details with us, sometimes even on her day offs.

We are very much appreciated her hard work and professionalism. Highly recommended.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nick Donovan
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I've had my Renter's insurance through Janet Lin since 2019, and her agency is absolutely stellar!

Alex (one of the on-site agents) helped get us set up with our initial renter's insurance when my partner and I moved into our first apartment together, and his friendliness was absolutely amazing. So much so that when we moved into our new apartment, a work/live space requiring a minimum $1M liability insurance policy, I wasn't worried about the prospect of calling up their agency and discussing our new circumstances-- I looked forward to it! Alex has been a great help since we first started, taking a personal interest in my hobbies. As a comic book collector, I had a few items that were particularly valuable to me, and Alex helped me figure out how to make a record of my belongings and feel confident that, should the worst happen, I'd be alright. Most recently, he worked hard to coordinate getting me pet insurance for our new puppy.

Today, he helped set me up on a call with Anita, who was a pleasure to work with as well! Anita walked me through the ins and outs of the plan so that now I feel confident that I understand the full scope of my pet insurance in detail. Suddenly, a thing that I knew very little about and seemed very overwhelming is simple and friendly!

I've even been impressed with the staff who answers the phone when I've called in for assistance.

Overall, I am so glad to have your team by my side for whatever accidents life might throw our way.

5 stars, would recommend to anyone in SF looking for some peace of mind and a group of genuine friendly faces to help with their insurance.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Janel Lin
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve had insurance with Janet Lin for a long time!! She never fails to exceed expectations of professionalism, genuine care for customers, and she is super personable and fun to talk to. She and her team are beyond exceptional. You can tell that they care for the customer and not for their own profit. They are here to help you! I highly recommend Janet Lin and her office!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Vic Garces
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very happy with the team at Janet Lin's office. Judy and Anita, in particular, have taken great care of me since I moved to San Francisco. They've gotten me the exact coverage I needed at a fair price. With everything that has come up, I have had no problem getting in contact with them and getting things resolved. Couldn't recommend them more!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Linmeng HE
user_reviews_extended.Description: It is the first time for me to get the insurance for my car and the apartment, and I totally have no ideas about what should I get. With the help from Janet Lin and her team, especailly Anita, finally I get the bundle including auto, renters and also the life insurance! All the purchase process finish within three days since I sent out the quote request. Anita is always responsive and patient to give clear explanations about every details of different insurance. I really have a good experience in working with the team and would like to be with them for the following years! Really appreciate for all the help!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Romeo Pakasi
user_reviews_extended.Description: We decided to go with State Farm among other companies and insured our family with their Term and Whole life insurance products. During the initial process until now, Nissi has been very knowledgeable and responsive. She possess deep knowledge and insights about term and whole life  insurance to give us confidence which products best suited for our family. We feel safe in knowing that our family is protected through the insurance policies we bought in the event of unfortunate circumstances. We feel very confident and secured in the company’s track record and their established products. Overall, we highly recommend Nissi as your trusted agent when it comes to term and life insurance products!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Robert Powers
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Our family has been with State Farm Insurance for over 20 years. Janet Lin and her team have always been there to answer questions and give us guidance when needed. Our main contact is Anita Scribner, we appreciate her insurance knowledge, her patience, her courtesy and excellent customer service. We highly recommend State Farm Insurance!
The Powers Family

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jennifer Suit
user_reviews_extended.Description: We've been clients of Janet Lin's office since 2010 and have always been pleased with their kindness, prompt service, and advocacy in helping keep our premiums low. If the State Farm service fits your needs, I can't recommend this team enough.

user_reviews_extended.Name: New DST
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Whenever I call Janet’s office,  the team is available and also willing to help answer any questions I may have in detail and care. I found that her team is very knowledgeable and always helps provide additional perspective or recommendations where needed.
Recently,  I suffered an HOA claim on my rental unit, and the Janet was quick and available to help- aiding me in the process as well as provide needed recommendations.
I have been with Janet since I got married,  over two decades, and am going to remain with her agency.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Maxi Chousand
user_reviews_extended.Description: Janet Lin is a compassionate, knowledgeable and patient State Farm agent who listens to your needs and concerns. Janet's professionalism is impeccable. She also directs her staff to treat each and every potential customer like their family member. Janet and her staff explained the pros and cons of having life insurance, the type of life insurance, and how much of the life insurance one should buy. Therefore, I had referred my two nieces and their friends to Janet for purchasing life and other insurances.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brian Chang
user_reviews_extended.Description: Janet and Anita are not only extensively knowledgeable so as to ensure that every course of action you take is a well-informed one, but their kindness, care, and understanding will demonstrate that they have your best interest and the welfare of your loved ones in mind.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Emily Lin
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been a client with Janet for around three years now and she and her team have been nothing but excellent to me. She is incredibly experienced and knowledgeable yet remains personable. Navigating insurance can be intimidating but Janet is more than willing to present her services in a crystalized and digestible manner. I know I'm in good hands!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dede Heiman
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Just wanted to say I am supremely pleased and confident of the care💯I’ve received when asking about both mundane and complicated insurance questions. Janet and her team have been my agent for decades.

Her 3 A team delivers: Alex, Anita and Abigail.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dom Bay area v d o production
user_reviews_extended.Description:
We have been using Janet Lin State Farm Insurance for our small business, Home insurance and even earthquake insurance, all in one agent. Because Janet and Her staffs are very professional, responsive and helpful when we needs any help or have any questions regarding our policies.

Agent Judy, has been an outstanding agent.
We highly recommend them to our friends and family.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joanne Grau
user_reviews_extended.Description: Janet Lin is really awesome!  I know her through a good friend and when I told her I want to set up a retirement account she drove all the way to meet with me and patiently listened to my needs.  She offers honest and helpful advice and takes care of all the details.  I'm happy with the service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: G. Cooper
user_reviews_extended.Description: Janet Lin's team - especially Anita! - is terrific. They helped us to secure a business liability policy. It was a complicated process that took a lot of time. Anita fielded our questions, clarified information as needed, and was generally very available for us to work through each step.  Great professionalism, very thorough, and very personable. Many thanks!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ken Eng
user_reviews_extended.Description: We had an emergency requirement for our building's insurance and Janet Lin's team (Anita Scriber) came to the rescue.   Anita Scriber did a fantastic job of quoting and providing us with insurance for our family apartments and rental buildings in San Francisco & San Jose within 24 hours!   Not only is she quick but helped save us money on the premiums.    She is responsive, thorough, and very professional in all the details for our building insurance needs.  I highly recommend Anita and Janet Lin's team for all your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: truong thuy
user_reviews_extended.Description: Had an almost 2h zoom consultation with Janet team today, it was a remarkable experience. Anita and Tiara? was the ones who helped me. Anita was extremely helpful and thorough, professional, compassion... She was above and beyond, really patient to answer all my 2000+ questions, took time to make sure I understand all the policies and questions, all the options, all the choices I have. Plus she even followed up with a very detailed and easy-to-understand email to make sure im not confused with all the whole new information. Now I feel abit like being blindly tricked by my current insurance company 😕. I just wish they also provide the insurance for rental properties and could match my current premium. But Thank you so much Anita and Janet’s team. Im highly recommend for everyone to also work with this wonderful team. 🙂

user_reviews_extended.Name: Renee A.
user_reviews_extended.Description: I highly recommend Janet Lin’s group with no reservations.  I’ve had multiple types of insurance through this group for over 10 years - business, renter's and auto insurance.  I’ve worked with Alex, Anita and now Judy - and they are all amazing, trustworthy and kind people.  They take time to explain the coverage details and answer all your questions.  They consider your unique situation and expertly suggest the best options for you.    I’ve compared insurance rates with many other companies and always come back to this group for the best value and best service.  I’m very grateful to have found this group.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kent L
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love working with Anita S. She always has good information and is very timely to return calls. She makes me want to stay with State Farm. ALWAYS a pleasure and excellent follow through when working with the office.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Hai Liu
user_reviews_extended.Description: Janet Lin is my favorite insurance agent. She always has very professional knowledge also with her patient great attitude to provide me with all the solutions that I might have! She is the greatest agent I have ever seen! She deserves my highest five stars 👍👍👍👏👏👏

user_reviews_extended.Name: alameda house
user_reviews_extended.Description:
We have been with Janet Lin and her team for 35 years. We have always had great service and sound advice. And whe. The need arose claims processing was always a breeze.  I would not hesitate to recommend Janet as a statefsrm agent.

Mike

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alvin Barlian
user_reviews_extended.Description: Janet's office has been awesome. (I think I've been with them for more than 10 years now). I've been very satisfied with their service, support, and professionalism. The agent who has been helping me a lot is Nissi. I've asked her a lot of questions and she's always patient, thorough/complete, and friendly addressing all my questions and concerns, from the most complicated problem to the simplest curiosity. I frequently asked for a quote of this and that, and again, every time she responded with a systematic, clean and complete information. One time when I had an accident, she gave me all very helpful advice and guidance. They have a great team there.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Esther wong
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I wanted to drop a note about your employee, Anita Scribner.  She helped me with a new car policy this afternoon.  I found her telephone skills to be excellent.  Anita's understanding of customer needs, her clear answers to my questions and concerns and most of all, her patience.

Thanks for having such a capable employee on your team representing your agency.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tiara Choi
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Absolutely love working with Janet Lin and her team!

They are all so knowledgeable and responsive to any questions I had. Nissi was great in teaching and guiding me through various life insurance policies. The process was so simple and I know that my family and I are protected with state farm life insurance.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Liz Branham
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have been using Janet Lin and her excellent team (especially Anita!) for 20 or so years and we highly recommend them! They are so responsive, attentive to our changing needs,  always willing to spend time to discuss questions, and they are simply really good people. So happy to insure with them!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sue Brown
user_reviews_extended.Description: Our family has worked with Janet Lin since 1989. She meets with us annually (if we desire) to review policies to be sure they meet our current needs.  Her office staff is efficient and friendly.  I highly recommend.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Evan Brill
user_reviews_extended.Description: Anita T Scribner helped me reduce my car insurance by 60% AND get better coverage and lower premiums. I was getting ready to sell my car and take the bus before I spoke to her. She was incredibly professional, kind, and fast working. I was able to get a quote and get my car insurance set up during a 30 minute lunch break. There's no reason to go anywhere else!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Wendi Stern
user_reviews_extended.Description: Long term client here with years of experience with Janet and her team. Most recently, Alex and Judy have assisted our family with many service requests for auto, home and umbrella policies. I like that all of our agents are licensed with Janet's office. They handle each call with professionalism and knowledge. We've had experience with others carriers but Alex and Judy are the A team with State Farm.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Raymond Portugal
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been with State Farm here in SF for 10 years for my homeowners insurance and they always provide excellent customer service. Janet, Tiara and the team there are very friendly, knowledgeable and very helpful when providing information and explaining the details of the homeowners insurance plan. I would highly recommend State Farm!

user_reviews_extended.Name: juniorhansenjr
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been with State Farm since my first car and although I no longer own one, I have maintained Renter’s Insurance with Janet Lin’s agency for decades. Recently decided to add an Earthquake policy. Alex in her office was friendly and patient with all my questions. He walked me through scenarios to help me understand the addition to my existing account. Very satisfied with our interaction and the peace of mind I now have with my new policy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jireh Lin
user_reviews_extended.Description: Janet sold me Long-term care insurance.  I was a bite hesitant to buy the insurance since I was in relative good health.  Three month after I bought the insurance I had my first A-fib episode.  I spent 2 days in the hospital to correct the heart issue.  Janet called me when she found out about my A-fib.  She later told me that my Long-term application would not have been approved because of my A-fib.  But now State Farm must honor my Long-term care contract.  Thank you Janet for getting me the LTC policy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Howard Chang
user_reviews_extended.Description: Been with Janet for 15 years and never had any issues. Her team has served me attentively and have always looked out for me!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Caroline Lincoln
user_reviews_extended.Description: I'd like to share my recent experience with Ms Judy Ascencio, she provided an excellent service on adding a new vehicle to our policy and made the process so easy and pleasant . Judy have always been such a delight to communicate about all of our policies. She's friendly, knowledgeable, patient , pleasant and efficient. She will also give me some good advice and recommendations for our policies and future ones as well . Many thanks again , Judy 😊

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tyrone Mckellar
user_reviews_extended.Description: I just purchased a 2024 Gixxer 750. Hooked it up to a trailer and towed it home. The next day I called my insurance company AAA thinking it would be an easy and quick process to add the motorcycle insurance to my cars policy. Oh how wrong I was! I was told that they don’t provide motorcycle insurance that they would have to go through Progressive insurance. Progressive gives me a quote of $6,000. On top of that, they wanted it in a single lump sum for the year. To say I was shocked is an understatement. I called around for an entire day from company to company getting the same type of results. If they didn’t want the lump some they wanted between $500-$600/month. I have had my drivers license since I was 16. I been riding since I was 21. I’m now 50 years old. I have never had to pay such outlandish insurance premiums for a bike. My driving record is spotless which it has to be because I am also a class B driver. I was just starting to wonder if I made a mistake buying the new bike. Until in a last desperate attempt I typed into my google browser Motorcycle insurance companies San Francisco. 100’s of companies popped up. I randomly chose one number to call. That was to Janet Lin State Farm insurance company of San Francisco. An agent by the name of Anita Scribner answered the phone. After my pleas for help. She was so kind and helpful. And was also shocked at the quotes I was getting. She told me not to worry that she could help me. After about 15 minutes on the phone I was set up with full coverage motorcycle insurance at $92/month. I wanted to cry I was so excited! Anita at Janet Lin State Farm insurance is the most professional and kind agent I have had the pleasure of dealing with. I will be making a change from AAA to Janet Lin State Farm insurance for my other vehicles also. If any other riders are experiencing the same insane quotes. Don’t get ripped off by greedy agents and companies. Give Anita at Janet Lin State Farm insurance immediately!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tobius Onthebrink
user_reviews_extended.Description:
The agent I work with Anita handles all my accounts. She is always positive and never lacks for product knowledge or policy parameters . I began with a couple of account, and over the course of time have transferred all my accounts to State Farm.

Judy Ascencio of the same office is truly a dedicated insurance professional. Her calm demeanor and knowledge provides assurance the customer is in good hands. Every time I have a question or require help Ms Ascencio is ready to step up and provide assistance. I feel privileged to be a client here and always know my family and I are in good hands.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chuck Jones
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a State Farm customer since I was 16 years old. My grandmother in Red Springs, NC inspired me to used them as she was a satisfied customer many many years ago. user_reviews_extended.Name: MATTHEW GRENBY
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have been working with Janet since the very beginning—back in 2001 when I first moved to San Francisco before I was married and she was still establishing her practice without a formal office. Over the last 25 years, our family has moved several times and our insurance needs have grown increasingly complex, but we have never considered working with anyone else.

What sets this agency apart is their institutional memory and the consistently exceptional level of service they provide. They act as strategic partners rather than just providers.

Most recently, Anita and Abigail were instrumental in navigating our earthquake insurance renewals and managing the specifics of our homeowner’s policy during a new roof installation. Anita has consistently held our hand through these transitions, ensuring that our coverage remains robust and seamless.

The deep bench of expertise in the office has been a constant through every stage of our growth:

• Anita: A 20+ year pillar of our insurance strategy. From handling the closing of our first home to managing complex furnace and windshield claims, she has always provided expert advice on policy strategy and asset protection.
• Ben: Invaluable during a high-stakes home refinance, turning around urgent "replacement cost" documentation in under an hour to meet a critical lender deadline.
• Alex: Our go-to for fleet transitions and commercial registrations, ensuring that everything from our BMW to the Metris and GLB-250 was categorized correctly for maximum efficiency.
• Abigail: Most recently ensured our 2025 earthquake insurance renewal was handled precisely and on time.
• Nissi: Provided a smooth and efficient transition when transferring coverage for our GLE-350, maintaining the high standard of service we’ve come to expect.
• Jonathan: Managed our business-specific needs for years, including workers' comp and specialized equipment coverage for our office.
• Judy: A foundational member of the team who established our first Toyota policies in 2004 and helped transition us to our more recent vehicles.
• Sophia and Ashley: Provided essential clarity and follow-through on detailed claims and earthquake insurance inquiries.

The bottom line is that Janet’s team has the expertise to ensure we have exactly the right amount of insurance—eliminating unnecessary "bloat" while ensuring we are never under-covered. If you are looking for a professional-grade team that truly cares about your family’s long-term security, this is the office!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bethany Huisman
user_reviews_extended.Description: I was needing to switch auto insurance providers because my premiums with another provider were getting way too high. Many of my co-workers recommended State Farm. I submitted a quote online over the weekend and on Monday got a call from the office of Janet Lin. I talked with the most friendly representative I have ever come in contact with over the years. Her name was Tiara and she explained all my options and showed that she could relate to some things I shared. I really felt like she cared about me and my wants/needs. Talking with her felt like we were really close friends. I shopped around and found State Farm to be the best option for me and when I called back, I was able to talk with the same person again. Not a computer. Not someone else. It was really nice to pick up where we left off and get everything set up through the same person. Im set up with the app now and couldn't be happier with how things turned out. Thanks Tiara and team! :)

user_reviews_extended.Name: Christos Papandreou
user_reviews_extended.Description: This is an awesome State Farm agency! Alex and Abigail have been incredibly helpful in getting everything set up as I move to California. Cannot recommend them more - super friendly and helpful!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Simon Tsang
user_reviews_extended.Description:
從保險公司客戶到25年老友記！
剛把2025年月曆掛上墻，忽然想起因為這棟房子的保險，我已經與State Farm 保險代理Janet Lin 和她的團隊，從客戶關係變成四份之一世紀的老朋友了。
因為Janet Lin 和她的團隊的專業效率，細心關懷，我家的保險（房，車，責任傘保險），都交託他們代理。車子被人碰了，一通電話，他們就幫我安排妥理賠和修車。有一次內子開車碰破了車輪，我不會把車內的後備車輪換上，我打電話問他們怎樣辦。Janet的助理Anita說他們幫我買的汽車保險，包括了電召他們約定的換後備車輪公司，到我車子拋錨的地方，我出示State Farm 保險號碼，換後備車輪公司的技師，就免費為換上後備車輪。我照Anita的指示，果然很快得到免費換上後備車輪。
Janet Lin教我理財（年金投資、共同基金），我是理財外行人，電話裏說不清，Janet不惜耐心，來我家說個明白，難怪客戶變老友了。
FROM BEING AN INSURANCE COMPANY CLIENT TO A 25-YEAR FRIEND!
While pinning my 2025 calendar on the wall, I suddenly remembered that because of the insurance on this house, I had become an old friend of State Farm insurance agent Janet Lin and her team for a quarter of a century.
Because of the professionalism, efficiency, and attentive care of Janet Lin and her team, I entrusted them with all my family's insurance (house, car, liability insurance). When my car got hit, I just made one call, and they helped me make the claim and get the repair. On another occasion, my wife got a flat tire while driving, and I couldn't install the spare tire onto the car. I called to ask them what to do. Janet's assistant Anita replied that the car insurance they helped me buy included calling their assigned company to install the spare tire. Anita told me to show my State Farm insurance number upon the technician’s arrival. I followed Anita's instructions, and sure enough, I quickly got the spare tire replaced for free.
Janet Lin taught me financial management (annuity investment, mutual funds). I was a dummy in financial management; and failed to grasp her explanation over the phone. Janet kindly gave me a home-visit lesson in financial management. Like Dale Carnegie, Janet Lin wins friends and influences clients.

owner.name: Victor Bull - State Farm Insurance Agent (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Mona Soo Hoo
user_reviews.Description: Victor Bull and Cecilia Garcia and their team always provided efficient, prompt and personalized customer service relative to my family's various commercial and residential State Farm accounts. They are knowledgeable about San Franciso's unique (duplex) "flats", and were always on top of the insurance trends in the now difficult California commercial market.  I wish that they were still my agents, as they were always communicative and quickly responsive to any questions or issues that we encountered over the years.

user_reviews.Name: Maureen
user_reviews.Description: I’ve been Victor’s client for several years and am very satisfied with the service I’ve received from both Victor and Cecilia. They are responsive, reliable and have a command of the myriad details related to my comprehensive coverage, auto, condo, HOA, personal property and liability coverage. They helped me manage a complex property damage claim and made sure I received the maximum benefits according to my policy. Most of all, they go above and beyond for their clients and are genuinely interested in providing an exceptional customer experience.

user_reviews.Name: Misha Sundukovskiy
user_reviews.Description: Best insurance agent I've ever dealt with. Victor is a truly professional and will look out for your best interests even when he doesn't have to. He goes the extra mile for his clients and its both refreshing and tremendously appreciated. Thank you for everything that you've helped me with over the years. Cheers!

user_reviews.Name: Jeff Kalvelage
user_reviews.Description: Victor's agency is a wonderful agency to be apart of! I refer all my clients who move to California, because I know they will be well taken care of, and experience a seamless transition of their policies!

user_reviews.Name: Shannon Singer
user_reviews.Description: Victor has been a trusted advisor to our family for a long time. He and his office are very responsive, too. Highly recommend!

user_reviews.Name: Emma Kemp
user_reviews.Description: It wasn't until I made the decision to use Victor at State Farm as our insurance agent that I realized I could actually have a positive relationship and experience with our insurance company. My family recently dealt with a very challenging situation that involved a car insurance claim, and I cannot say enough good things about how Victor and State Farm team has handled it overall. His compassion and understanding went above and beyond, and we've felt very supported throughout the whole process. Victor has won our lifelong business with State Farm and that is because of the quality customer service we received throughout. I cannot recommend him highly enough.

user_reviews.Name: Caroline Kelter
user_reviews.Description: I would highly recommend Victor and his team! My husband and I have several policies with Victor because he is incredibly responsive (I mean typically within the hour!) consultative, and trustworthy. While I got a few more competitive quotes for one of our policies (and Victor even advised me they were good deals!) I was happy to insure and pay a little more with State Farm/Victor solely because of the service and partnership we get from him. I know he always has our best interest in mind. When we have a claim, he is eager to help, making a sometimes confusing process easy and hand held. He is always proactively helping us to bundle and save money, too. If you are needing a go to insurance guy- don’t hesitate and connect with Victor! He epitomizes our favorite jingle- “like a good neighbor State Farm is there!”

user_reviews.Name: Cecilia Zhou
user_reviews.Description: Victor came recommended by our real estate agent as we were on a tight timeline to figure out a homeowners insurance for our first home. And I decided to get quotes for auto and umbrella insurance as well. I had reached out to another agent with State Farm that was recommended by some local families but the service was meh -  they didn't even bother putting in the quotes within one single email for me so I had to look through 3 different things separately. In comparison, Victor was much more responsive and considerate. He provided all the quotes and rationales for certain options over others in a very concise way. He also told us about potential further discounts given the property's recent renovation that the other agent didn't mention at all. I would definitely recommend Victor!
