user_reviews_extended.Name: Faven Araya
user_reviews_extended.Description: In a process that can often feel overwhelming and complex, Victor offers trusted, reliable, affordable and comprehensive services. He is extremely knowledgeable, always responsive and goes above and beyond to ensure our needs are met. If you’re exploring insurance options, I highly recommend working with Victor’s agency!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jessica Ferrara
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor is amazing! He is very responsive, professional and just a really cool guy.  My husband and I have had our insurance through Victor for over 5 years now and we wouldn’t change a thing. We recommend Victor to all our friends and family looking for coverage.  10/10!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rohan Kapoor
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Victor came highly recommended from my realtor and from the beginning he demonstrated why. He was able to work things out in a very tight timeline for a home insurance policy and figured out how to save me money by rolling in my auto policy in as well. I found working with him extremely easy as he is very communicative over email, accessible via phone call and fast at getting things done.

He's also extremely patient and able to clearly explain different options and his recommendations.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Morgan Taylor
user_reviews_extended.Description: I got car insurance through State Farm and worked with Cecilia and Victor Bull. They responded to my online inquiry very quickly and the process was smooth and easy. If you need car insurance by a certain date, make sure to give yourself extra time since it takes two weeks for the policy to officially start once you sign up.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Megan Johnson
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Attentive, kind, responsive, informative — all the things I want in an insurance agent. Victor was referred to me by a few friends who also get their policies through Victor. What was deserving of five stars? Victor put me in touch with his wife who is an agent/broker and gave me a few other plans options to consider. Ultimately went with Victor because of some cost savings being a former State Farm customer.
Victor made the process of getting new car insurance pretty painless & there’s not much more you can ask for!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alisa Elliott
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor Bull has been our agent for several years now and we can’t imagine working with anyone else. He is extremely professional and knowledgeable, and is always a pleasure to work with. He is always super quick to respond to our calls/emails, and assists us with the highest level of customer service every time. If you’re looking for a new agent and/or insurance provider, you truly can’t do better than Victor and State Farm.

user_reviews_extended.Name: ken kleier
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have been a life-long (50 plus years) State Farm insured spanning four states and have been a client of Vic's for 5 plus years. Vic is very knowledgeable and helpful with our car, home and umbrella policies and I have enjoyed working with him very much.

He is quick to respond to my inquiries and thorough in addressing all necessary issues about our insurance needs. We highly recommend him for all your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kevin O'Connell
user_reviews_extended.Description: I highly recommend Victor and his team. He is responsive and pleasant to work with. He is also proactive and patient in explaining coverage details.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mike Hsieh
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor has been immensely helpful over the years with my auto and home insurance.  He's always extremely responsive, available and helpful - he even had a great suggestion for a bouncy house since our kids are about the same age!  I can always count on him and highly recommend him.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Celie O'Neil-Hart
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor saved us over $2,000 on our annual insurance. We switched to him from USAA on everything from home to auto to umbrella. I can't tell you how nice it is to have one person--and a kind, knowledgeable human being at that--who we call directly when we have a question or when we need something. Victor is super responsive and he's got great advice for new home buyers like us (e.g. on Earthquake insurance). I can't recommend Victor highly enough! A life-changing choice to work with him and we are so glad we made it!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Zack B
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve had auto and renter’s insurance through Victor Bull for years. Victor and his team have always been extremely helpful explaining my options and helping me through multiple claims. I’ve recommended him to a number of friends and they’ve all had very positive experiences too. He’s very easy to deal with, friendly, and professional. Like a good neighbor Victor is there!

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Kinsella
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor & team have not only helped us save money, but they've helped guide us through multiple life events and how to think about our overall coverage portfolio. They're personable, highly available, and really clear/no-nonsense -- great team & agent!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Isabelle Selby
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor and his staff QUICKLY respond to my calls and emails concerning any insurance questions I may have.  They are polite, well-informed, friendly and always a pleasure to deal with on all my home, car and business insurance policies.  I highly recommend them to anyone looking for an excellent insurance agent and agency.  Year after year, they are consistently great!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Andrew Nakagawa
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor and his team did an outstanding job reviewing my insurance needs. I appreciated their advice and professionalism. I highly recommend him and his team. I worked with JP, who is part of Victor's team.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stephen Calvillo
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor has been a great agent. My wife and I have moved a few times since living in SF and we make sure Victor moves with us! Every time I call or email with questions he responds in no time and answers all the questions we have. He’s incredibly friendly and professional. Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joseph M
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor and team are amazing!! I worked with JP who was so helpful. He helped me bundle my car and home. He Is also helping us get the life insurance we have been looking for. I highly recommend this agency

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jamie Bitetto
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Victor you and your team are incredibly helpful, always personally responsive, and wonderful to interact with! We appreciate you guys for taking great care of us and making us feel remembered versus just another client.
As a small business owner, I was especially appreciative of your knowledge about what kind of coverage I would need to protect the animals I work with, my clients, and my family. I could do my work with confidence that if something went wrong, we'd all be cared for.
Thank you so much!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Richard Hyun
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor is absolutely amazing. He’s extremely knowledgeable, very responsive, and really listens to our situation to find the best option for our needs. We had a situation with our car, and Victor analyzed the situation, walked us through the entire process, and helped us save a decent amount of out of pocket costs. Afterwards, he found an error in the system and made sure that everything was fixed and taken care of. I can not say enough good things about Victor and his team at State Farm. Highly recommended!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Louis S
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor Bull is the best state farm agent I have ever had. He has always provided the best service. He is easy to contact and Ive always had back up in every situation. His financial guidance has brought me to another level. I look forward to working with Victor Bull well into my retirement.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shane Mason
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor earned my business 4 years ago by spending an hour on the phone with me at a time when I was not even qualified to be insured due to two recent accidents on my record. He set me up with a non-owned policy, then a renters/term-life policy, a full auto policy when I purchased my car, and even a business policy for an events business. He is a responsive and effective insurance advisor who puts the needs of his clients above his own. There has been more than one occasion where he advised against getting a policy because it was unnecessary for me, even though he would have made a commission on that sale.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Deanna Lencioni
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been using State Farm insurance for over 4 years. Victor has always been very professional with me. He will take his time to explain everything so I can fully understand . Whenever I email him with a question he will respond back right away with an answer. I am very happy with his service and highly recommend him!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Victor Reynolds
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ive used Victor as my agent for many years. He's always given me great rates and outstanding service. I always recommend him to anyone who is looking for quality insurance at reasonable prices

user_reviews_extended.Name: George Pradhan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor and his team were incredibly helpful and responsive in handling my car insurance. He was always accessible by email and brought a personalized touch and attention that you often don't see when dealing with large companies.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael Wong
user_reviews_extended.Description: Insurance agents don't get a lot of love and it's easy to get frustrated with the insurance industry. But Victor has been nothing but forthright, helpful and understanding through many quotes and claims. He's the best there is.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Beth Imhoff
user_reviews_extended.Description: As a fellow professional in the real estate industry, I always appreciate Victor’s quick replies, attention to detail, and candor when explaining complex insurance issues to me and to my clients. I always know that my clients will feel well taken care of with Victor and his team. Kudos!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Madison Kelleher
user_reviews_extended.Description: To me, the idea of life insurance was one of those mysteries of adulthood that I dreaded looking into. Victor and his team made this entire process simple and easy to understand. He was patient and honest about what the best decision was for not only my future but also my finances. I look forward to having Victor Bull & his team involved in all my future insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Monique Tiger
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor Bull is an outstanding agent!  He’s knowledgeable, professional, thoughtful and responsive.  State Farm has decent automated communication system for many issues, but whenever I need something in hurry, I call Victor and he takes care of me.  I’ve been working with Victor for several years for auto, home, and umbrella.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Angus Barnett
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been using Victor’s State Farm agency (and Dick Russell before him) over 15 years for all my insurance needs across multiple properties. I always find the service responsive, informed, and proactive when needed. I would recommend Victor and team without reservation!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Beach Chalet Soccer Club
user_reviews_extended.Description: We’ve used Victor for our auto and home insurance for many years. His team is always professional and dedicated. Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael M
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very happy with the service provided by JP and Victor when transferring to State Farm. Initially had a great rate with Geico and thought it could not be beat, but not only did they beat my policy rate, but also gave me more coverage too! I ended up bundling my home and auto together with them. Could not be happier with their professionalism and business acumen. 10/10

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lexy Gonzalez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor was very responsive and communicated very clearly on what I would need when purchasing my condo insurance. He took the extra step to confirm with the lender the exact coverage and he got it all done within a day or two!! I really appreciated that since work has been so busy he texted or emailed me instead of the usual telephone call. Thank you victor!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Janaina Yera-Paez
user_reviews_extended.Description: My experience with Victor Bull and his agency has been nothing short of seamless. I have had two claims within the last year and both were handled expeditiously and without question. Times where matters can be extremely stressful my claims were handled with urgency and tact. Thank you Victor Bull and agency for making what could have been a nightmare truly painless.

user_reviews_extended.Name: V.
user_reviews_extended.Description: This was the worst insurance experience EVER. Victor Bull and his coworkers were rude and unprofessional and failed to provide coverage when I needed it most and also failed to inform me of important details about my policy. They cancelled my policy without my consent and refused to take responsibility for my medical bills for a claim I submitted. Do not waste your time or money with Victor Bull’s office or State Farm for that matter.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rachel
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have had only pleasant interactions and useful help in anything I have ever inquired about on insurance with this State Farm office. Too bad they’re not taking on any new clients in CA.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joey M
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’m a 17 year old who just got his first car.  I was extremely nervous about what type of car insurance to get. Victor and his amazing staff explained everything to me, answered all my questions, and helped me get the best rate possible which I could afford.  I highly recommend this agency.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Regina
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been with Victor Bull for about 10 years and have gotten nothing less than stellar service. Responsive, professional and always helping me think about one of my favorite things - more value for less money!  He's down to earth, easy to speak to and if he doesn't have the answer at his fingertips, he finds it. Highly recommend.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sheila Kappler
user_reviews_extended.Description: Based on our limited experience so far, Victor was efficient and patient working with our group of first-time homeowners to explain policies, and determine the optimal building and personal coverage to meet the needs of our TIC.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ivan Philips
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor and his team have exceeded my expectations. He is able to respond to all my requests promptly and accurately. The team is always available to process new policies, make change, provide quotes or identify savings for me. Highly recommended!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Annie Stancliffe
user_reviews_extended.Description: Highly recommend Victor! Victor helped us set up an HOA policy and he has been responsive, informative, professional, and friendly throughout our time working together.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Matt Thomas
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor and his team are all very knowledgeable and so helpful with their guidance. Their customer service is out of this world.  I highly recommend this agency for all your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Christienne
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Always available, knowledgeable, reliable. And responsive.
I also consider Victor a friend.
I highly recommend him for all of your insurance needs. I have so many different policies. And, he manages all of them so well.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tom Giarrusso
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor and JP did a fantastic job at taking a look at my insurance portfolio and re-assessing to ensure best value, and keeping the coverages.  I really appreciate how available and attentive they are.  Thanks team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Emily Freitas
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor was wonderful to work with, and very knowledgeable and quick to answer any questions I had. I spoke w/ a few companies, and he was by far the most professional and patient. Happy to continue business with him.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Benjamin G. Vaillancourt (MisterBGV)
user_reviews_extended.Description: If you are searching for a quality agent who will treat you professionally and who is also respectful and kind then Victor Bull is your man. Victor and his team will take care of you in a way that feels personal and authentic. His services go well beyond a 5 star review.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ros Cat
user_reviews_extended.Description: Cecilia at Victor Bull SFA was very helpful in getting my daugther added into our car insurance policy. She was very responsive from when I asked for quotes and giving advices. Keep up the good work.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rocco Turpin
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor is a top notch agent! Very trustworthy, knowledgeable, and willing to go to bat for his clients! I definitely would recommend Victor if you're looking for Life, Home, or Auto.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Curtis Shirey
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor is an incredible insurance professional and community member. He succinctly answers questions related to my policies and always recommends practical solutions.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Victoria Gomez
user_reviews_extended.Description: In April I was in the process of signing a lease for a new apartment that required proof of renter's insurance which I had never purchased before. I worked with Cecilia from State Farm and she was able to answer all my questions. I signed my lease with proof of insurance the next day. This process could not have been any easier. I highly recommend working with Cecilia from State Farm!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Noemi Lopez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor and his team were able to set up my life policy super quickly and stress free! Call Victor for all your insurance needs. Thank you Victor!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Judd Blair
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor is great! Genuinely helpful, especially in understanding what/how much insurance you need, and not at all sales-y - obviously helps that the rates are excellent as well. Highly recommended!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Celeste L.
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor and his team are great! Prompt communication and overall excellence with every interaction, including getting me information when requested. It is a pleasure working with Victor and Cecilia!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joey Haberman
user_reviews_extended.Description: I just finished getting homeowners, auto, umbrella, and earthquake insurance from JP Mourad. I was on the California Fair Plan and JP was able to save me a significant amount of money. JP was thorough, professional and competent. I would highly recommend using his service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brendan Mullins
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor is well-spoken, prompt, and helpful.  He makes it easy for me to understand my options which allows me to make confident decisions regarding my policies.  Huge thanks to Victor!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Catherine Harris
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been insured with Victor Bull and State Farm team for MANY years now!  They are very responsive and cost efficient when helping you select the right policy. Very satisfied customer!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brian McCarthy
user_reviews_extended.Description: Victor is the type of agent the commercials are based on. His compassion is sincere when times are tough. I feel like he is always looking out for me... What more could you want in an agent?

user_reviews_extended.Name: Will Pearson

user_reviews_extended.Description:

The more things you have insured the more you will save$$$.  There's not enough adjectives to explain how great this company is. user_reviews_extended.Name: Rosabella Safont
user_reviews_extended.Description: So I have been an Allstate homeowners insuree for well over 50 years. I've always had a great deal of trust and confidence and rarely ever had to address any real issues knowing that they were always watching out over my best interests. So recently I had cause to question the auto insurance company I had done business with for more than 50 years. I considered a number of auto insurance companies but suddenly realized how much trust I had in Allstate and called and I was fortunate to connect with an Allstate Insurance agent by the name of Allyson Bleisner. Allyson was the consummate professional respectful, courteous,  considerate and extremely helpful in every which way you would hope you would be treated as a customer. Customer service is very important to me given that you can actually go anywhere and get the same products and services. Everyone has competitors. But what makes the difference is the customer service oriented employees.  I asked numerous questions and still had questions so it took me a couple of days.  Allyson was ever so patient and answered every last question in detail. She was prompt and extremely efficient. I had confirmations shortly after we completed our conversations via email. Thank you. Happy at Allstate!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mary J Molina
user_reviews_extended.Description: ive been with them for years. My experience is always personalize. I appreciate it. More power to you.

user_reviews_extended.Name: qtpooh77 (Olga)
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been with this agency since mid 90’s and almost left due to high pricing and very so-so customer service, but by chance I got Lisa Moyle on the phone just before going to another agency and it’s now years since.  Lisa has been my ‘go to’ gal for all the questions ever since, knowledgeable, responsive, resourceful, personable, yet professional and just overall exceptional customer service bar none! Lisa is a true insurance Partner and the sole the reason I have changed my mind years ago and stayed with Alstate snd this agency in particular. Loyal customer, Olga L.

user_reviews_extended.Description: Yumi Sam, we leave you so many messages, we leave so many messages to your helpers too (they probably don't forward it to you neither) They are rude to my family. They don't help out. We ask them to help us with our cars they say they will and give us attitude. The next day nothing has changed... You never gives us a call back as well!! You're always on vacation which is what your helpers tell us... Is this what you do with our insurance payments? Next... we have a claim on our house due to a water leak. We are asking for help but we never received it. You are gone again!! What kind of a joke is this?!? The claims adjuster always downplays the general contractors quote. DO YOU KNOW HOW MUCH MATERIAL ARE NOW?!? The adjuster said to remove the cabinets to your guys "CODE BLUE" contractors now he said he didn't give permission to remove them. The claims adjuster is ripping us off!! My family and I are about to call our lawyer and sue you guys

title: Kajal Pashmi - State Farm Insurance Agent

owner.name: Kajal Pashmi - State Farm Insurance Agent (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Karen Skillin Rojas
user_reviews.Description: We've been customers/clients with Kajal and her team for years for auto and renters insurance, and have never been disappointed.  We always receive attentive, responsive and honest service.  The team goes above and beyond to answer your questions, provide you detailed information and options and great pricing.  We can't say enough good things about this business and we highly recommend them.

user_reviews.Name: Emiko Kaji
user_reviews.Description: My husband and I have been working with Kajal for several years now.  She and her team are very professional and quite personable.  Kajal or her team would respond to our inquiries or requests promptly.  We've been so happy with their services that we even moved our commercial property coverage from another insurance company as Kajal offered a lowered rate with more efficient coverage.

user_reviews.Name: Angie Wang
user_reviews.Description: We've been working with Kajal and Charles for a while now and I've always been impressed by how they take the time to understand my insurance needs and provide personalized coverage options. Every time I've had a question or concern, they've been super responsive and helpful. We definitely recommend!

user_reviews.Name: Ben Johnston
user_reviews.Description:
We just bought a new house and were listing our current house and had to deal with a lot of different stakeholders to make the transition happen. I'm so happy we had Kajal and Charles in our corner to handle our home insurance.

Everything we need was delivered promptly with simple explanations of what the deliverables were and what was needed from us. When we forgot something Charles followed up to keep things on track.

If you want a reliability, speed and excellent communication then Kajal and Charles are the insurance agents for you.

user_reviews.Name: Dounan Shi
user_reviews.Description: We have been with Kajal and Charles for years and they are extremely responsive, patient, kind, and detail oriented. We recently made some complex changes to our existing insurance packages, and Charles was there every step of the way and helped us find ways to save on our premiums without us even asking! We have had an amazing experience so far and would highly recommend them to anyone!

user_reviews.Name: Karen Hutchinson
user_reviews.Description: Kajal, Ravi and team were recommended to me by my real estate agent and now I can't imagine working with anyone else. In my search for a home, I've had this team check on each property I bid on for insurability and a quote. Every quote has been affordable and every interaction I've with them has been friendly, efficient and professional. Once, I even had to contact Ravi late on a Friday afternoon and he couldn't have been more accommodating. It's clear that these guys really care about their clients. Highly recommend!

user_reviews.Name: Henry Shi
user_reviews.Description:
We had a wonderful experience working with Kajal and Charles for our new insurance policy! Highly recommend especially for complex insurance needs.

We bought a new home and was looking for a bundled home and car insurance. On top of this we also shopped for a liability umbrella and wanted that to cover our two rental properties (one was out of state). The many combinations naturally meant the pricing structure was complicated and a lot to digest. Luckily Charles was super on-point with all the tradeoffs for different options. He answered our technical questions promptly and precisely; this really helped us narrow down on the best plan.

user_reviews.Name: Hannah Maverick
user_reviews.Description: Kajal @ State Farm is the BEST! We just selected them as our home/auto insurance and feel really good about it. Her and her team were incredibly responsive and helpful. They prepared a personalised quote/proposal for us within a day and set up a full consultation call to walk us through it which was incredibly helpful. They offered us the best prices and the highest quality of coverage/service. Highly recommend!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Karen Skillin Rojas
user_reviews_extended.Description: We've been customers/clients with Kajal and her team for years for auto and renters insurance, and have never been disappointed. user_reviews_extended.Name: Rod Nafrada
user_reviews_extended.Description: If you've had an insurance policy for over a year and you haven't reviewed it since then,  NOW would be a great time to have Kajal Pashmi and her team review your policy and save you a tremendous amount on your premium.  I did and I have been very happy since then.  Kajal is very proactive when she deals with each of her clients and is constantly looking out for their best interest.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Misti Layne
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kajal has been my State Farm rep for years. She and her team are fast with responses and quick to answer questions and provide what I need for both business and personal insurance. Totally recommend them.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Katie Pyle
user_reviews_extended.Description: In an industry in where it's easy to get overlooked and feel like a number, Kajal Pashmi is the real deal. She helped me get the right insurance for me at a great price with the right coverage, and then when I was unfortunately in an accident, she worked to make sure I was taken care of through the entire process. I am very grateful for Kajal, and would highly recommend her for all your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Daria Victorov
user_reviews_extended.Description: Wonderful insurance agency that is responsive and professional. I have worked with Kajal and members of her team for a few years. Before Kajal I have always had State Farm since I got my driver's license. Go no further and work with Kajal's team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mark Fighera
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I was with Gieco for 20 years but they don't really understand the California market particularly when It comes to replacement value for homeowners and earthquake insurance. I called a good friend and he referred me to Kajal.
Kajal and Charles were responsive and able to answer all my questions and present a policy that worked for my family.
The really cool thing is that they are a family business and local San Francisco residents.
This added that personal touch that is so important when doing business regarding my biggest and most personal asset-my home!
What a huge contrast compared to the Gieco 1-800 number where someone in Virginia could not understand that I needed $900k replacement value on my policy.

Thank you Kajal and Charles!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Frances Leong
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had a question regarding possibly switching cars with my father but didn't know how that would work out because I am insured with State Farm and my dad is insured through AAA. I reached out to my State Farm agent Kajal, and Charles Tanner responded to my request very promptly via email and phone. He was very cordial, courteous, professional, and patient over the phone. As someone who isn't generally timid to ask MANY questions when something is unclear, I REALLY appreciated Charles's patience and the information he provided for follow-up to my questions. My brother and I are both insured with State Farm. We are grateful for the discounts that we qualify for and the quality service/reputation that State Farm is known for. I am thankful to be insured with State Farm and am blessed Kajal/Charles's office is relatively near my parents' house!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Paula Tejeda
user_reviews_extended.Description: I cannot say enough good things about Kajal Pashi and her team. Kajal is a consummate professional that understands the challenges of a small operations like mine and has, over the years, always been very supportive of my business. Kajal has a wonderful disposition and I greatly appreciate her assistance and professional advice.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Vikram Virmani
user_reviews_extended.Description: Outstanding service by Kajal and Charles for all my insurance needs.  Having lived in San Francisco for many years they were able to beat the pricing from other carriers and get competitive rates and very comprehensive coverage.  I highly recommend them for all your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cyodax Lee (CyodaxMighty)
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Given the history of 43+ years with State Farm since 1978, our limited driving came after the retirements before the pandemic lockdown. For several years with Kajal's office, we've always appreciated her attention-driven service for our multi-driver-multi-car plan. In the most recent engagement with Ashley at the office, she helped initiate a plan review that resulted the premium reduction in our favor. We thank both of them for the pro-active and meaningful customer service. Kudos to both of you, Kajal and Ashley!
Justine Lee, Customer

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ed Diaz
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kajal and her team are EXCEPTIONAL! Their service levels put Nordstroms to shame and their attention to detail is a testament to their love of people and providing value. Whether you are looking for new coverage or want to make sure you are both properly covered and getting the most for your hard-earned money, you owe it to yourself to contact Kajal and her great team. Ed Diaz/Mortgage Ninja :-)

user_reviews_extended.Name: Katie Tanner
user_reviews_extended.Description: As a first time home buyer, I found the whole process very overwhelming, and didn’t know where to start. I didn’t really know anything about insurance- and what I needed. Kajal’s agency walked me through it all, and helped me understand what  protection was best for my family. They also know a lot about life insurance and we’re able to walk us through this as well. A great experience!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Neeyaz Hojatoleslami
user_reviews_extended.Description: State Farm has been providing me with insurance for over ten years. I have a variety of policies - personal articles, vehicles, home and life insurance - with Kajal's office. Anytime I need anything both her and her staff are very responsive and helpful. I recommend State Farm, and Kajal's office specifically, to everyone I know!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Neil Pearson
user_reviews_extended.Description: After dealing with automated phone menus, unresponsive/unknowledgeable agents and general headache at Nationwide, it was refreshing to get renter's insurance through Kajal. She was friendly, professional, easy to deal with and quick to respond to emails.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brenda Arisman
user_reviews_extended.Description: I reached out to Kajal’s agency for help with renters insurance, and definitely recommend her and her team for any insurance needs. They were able to bundle my renters and auto policies to save me money, and were very knowledgable about the coverage. Thank you!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ben Vance
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kajal has been my insurance agent for years and I've always been impressed by the friendly and reliable service she and her team deliver. Highly recommended.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Misti Layne
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been with Kajal and her team for years and totally appreciate the professional and responsive take they have for my business needs and personal needs. I'm provided options and understanding and assistance. Always appreciated.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Amy Trusso
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been with Kajal for two years and have been surprized by her quick response to any questions - her anual review of my policy - her suggestions to make my policy fit my needs - she really wanted me to be informed of my policy. A+

user_reviews_extended.Name: Keyairra
user_reviews_extended.Description: StateFarm is a great insurance company, Kajal Pashmi and her staff Charles and office manager Gela Pahmi are TERRIBLE insurance agents. They are racist towards African Americans!!! They’ve canceled my policy without notifying me, even when they’ve received payment on time. Also raised my policy without notifying or formally informing me. I contacted Kajal and her team to get some clarification and from the moment Charles answered the phone was very rude, hostile, and unprofessional. Didn’t have a positive attitude and told me everything him and his team “ couldn’t do” instead of trying to figure out what him and his team “ can do”. Hung up in my face multiple times when called out on their unprofessionalism. This team is VERY unprofessional, lacks empathy and lacks providing great costumer skills, or  the ability to communicate with their costumer professionally, let’s not forget VERY VERY racist!!! I wouldn’t dare waste my time or money with this  branch. PLEASE find another location or store. DO NOT waste your money on these racist!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lindsay Burgess
user_reviews_extended.Description: My husband and I have been with Statefarm for a very long time and have always had great customer service, however most recently I worked with Charles Tanner on a few policies and he is friendly, professional, easy to communicate with and on top of it. Highly recommend he and his team if you are in need of insurance!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Verne Smith
user_reviews_extended.Description: The team here have been helping my partner and I with insurance queries as we navigate the home buying process. They've been extremely helpful and responsive as we prepare offers and enquire on insurability and rates, and we'll be moving forward with a policy once we've found our home.

user_reviews_extended.Name: N T
user_reviews_extended.Description: We had a wonderful experience working with Charles and team for our new home insurance policy! Highly recommend - professional, kind and responsive.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ryan Cameron
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kajal and her team are friendly, knowledgeable, and highly responsive. They usually turn my requests around within the same day, which exceeds my expectations.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cecily Drucker
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been very satisfied with the professional, prompt and helpful assistance I have received from Kajal and her business colleagues; I am moving shortly and she will remain my agent when I do!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Adrian A
user_reviews_extended.Description: Charlies was very helpful in walking me through all the insurance options, and highlighting the discounts from adding more services with State Farm.  Often the added services cost less than the discount they provided. Would certainly recommend.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nadia Andrino
user_reviews_extended.Description: I recently purchased renters insurance through Kajal’s agency, Charles and Ashley were both so helpful and great that I plan on bringing my auto insurance over in the near future.

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Lipps
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been with State Farm for about 15 years now. They've always taken care of me when things go wrong. I just had my car broken into and all my stuff stolen. I was able to replace everything under my renter's insurance with no hassle or haggling. State Farm turned a terrible situation into a good one. Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Loren Bland
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kajal and her team are great. They are a pleasure to work with, quick to respond and very knowledgeable. Highly recommend

user_reviews_extended.Name: William Dillon
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kajal and associates were highly professional and responsive to our insurance needs. I would highly recommend them for your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Clark Bloom
user_reviews_extended.Description: The team provides amazing service. Always prompt, accurate and proactive when necessary. They relieve all the mental burden for all our insurance needs!!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: James
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have just moved to San Francisco. And we get the renter insurance from Charles. I must say Charles is super helpful, professional and respond our email very quickly.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kaia Heffernan
user_reviews_extended.Description: This team is quick to respond and attentive, so happy to work with them and have all of my insurance needs taken care of without causing stress! Thank you!!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: John

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sergei Kovalenko
user_reviews_extended.Description: Charles and Kajal helped us to navigate through a lot of questions, super helpful and responsive! Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Adam Banasiak

user_reviews_extended.Name: Christopher Rose
user_reviews_extended.Description: Simply the kindest, most helpful and knowledgeable team in the history of insurance.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Christopher Wood
user_reviews_extended.Description: Quick accurate and through service. Not much more to ask for other than friendly service - which they provide too.

user_reviews.Name: sas ruazol
user_reviews.Description: We have been with our State Farm agent, Filia Francisca, for about 8  years.  She and Susan have been amazing partners. When we need them, they are always responsive, professional, yet personable. They have this personalized element to the service they provide which makes it easy to trust doing business with them. I never had any sort of relationship with previous agents, until I started doing business with them.  Thank you Filia and Susan for always being available when we need you and for all the support you’ve given us throughout the years.

user_reviews.Name: Leo Ruazol
user_reviews.Description: Susan has been our State Farm contact for many years and I can’t express the appreciation we have for her and Filia.  They are always responsive to our questions and requests and they’re very clear with explaining our insurance coverage. We’ve never had a bad experience with either of them. Thank you for being our trusted provider.

user_reviews.Name: Elaine G
user_reviews.Description: My family has been using Fillia's services for years and have been quite happy.  She has been able to recommend different bundling structures with our home, auto and umbrella policy and have saved us a lot over the years. I  have referred her to others and they have also been happy. Give her a call!

user_reviews.Name: Jeff Dembicer
user_reviews.Description:
I've been with State Farm for almost 30 years, and in particular with their Sunset District Office as well as online for all my vehicles' insurance needs.  I can only say that regardless of the fact that auto insurance is one of those necessary and less than pleasant chores, dealing with State Farm has been an absolute pleasure.
The Staff, headed by Fillia Fransisca and a number of agents such as the one I spoke with today, Leanne Lay, are absolutely delightful. They always either answer the phone or respond to a message expeditiously. They are thoroughly attentive,  knowledgeable, helpful and quick.
Especially in this day and age of impersonal, untrained, uncaring and diminishing services, the people at State Farm have always been a pleasant breath of fresh air to deal with, and I recommend them and State Farm itself for handling any and all of your auto insurance needs.
Jeff D

user_reviews.Name: Agnes Ng
user_reviews.Description: I had a fantastic experience working with Susan Lin.  She was incredibly patient with all my questions and maintained a high level of professionalism throughout the entire process. It’s rare to find an agent who truly takes the time to make sure you're comfortable with your coverage. I highly recommend Fillia Fransisca - State Farm Insurance for their excellent service!

user_reviews.Name: Alexander Lee
user_reviews.Description: I was referred to Fillia by a friend. Fillia and her team provided me a quote that was lower than my current insurance and helped me switch car insurance by processing all of the paperwork to my old insurance company. She was courteous and professional. It was a smooth and seamless transition. Fillia is very knowledgeable and explained to me what I needed to do if I get into a car accident. I would highly recommend Fillia and State Farm for your car insurance.

user_reviews.Name: Vinson Mac
user_reviews.Description: Working with Fillia Francisca State Farm insurance has been a great experience, the staff was great and very helpful, Susan Lin is knowledgeable, patient and answered all our questions, and truly cares about tailoring coverage to our needs, highly recommend.    ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

user_reviews.Name: Clement Chen
user_reviews.Description: Great experience with my Statefarm agent Fillia and her office manager Susan. They took the time to answer all my questions and provided detailed explanations regarding my insurance policies. Quick next day turn around getting my new car insured. No extra hoops to jump through, just straight to the point. Susan is quick to respond to emails and/or phone calls and readily available when needed. Thank you both Fillia and Susan.

Their office also gives back to the community, and support local businesses. If you're looking for a responsible insurance agency, look no further!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Julie Tang
user_reviews_extended.Description: I am appreciated this State Farm team which offers an excellent service..Fillia, Susan and Lenna are very nice.  In addition, they all show me how professional on their work.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bobby Manalo
user_reviews_extended.Description: Fillia and her office are outstanding in the service they provide. Very courteous, knowledgeable, and helpful. If you need auto insurance, or any other services, this is the office to visit. They will take good care of you.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chris Zeng
user_reviews_extended.Description: My family and I have been customers for over a decade, and the whole staff has been extremely helpful, professional, and welcoming. Susan, the office manager, provides excellent customer service and is very knowledgeable. I recently added my wife to my auto policy, and the process was smooth and easy. 10/10 would totally recommend if you are looking for an insurance agency.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Vivien Leung
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I recently purchased a new vehicle and worked with Susan Lin at the Fillia Fransisca Agency for my insurance coverage. Susan was incredibly helpful and responsive throughout the entire process. She answered all my questions with patience, provided clear options, and helped me secure the coverage I needed quickly and smoothly.

Her support made a potentially stressful process feel easy and manageable. I truly appreciated her professionalism and warm customer service—highly recommend Susan and her team if you’re looking for reliable and knowledgeable insurance support!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joseph Lau
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had an incredible experience working with Ms. Susan Lin at State Farm. From start to finish, she was attentive, knowledgeable, and genuinely cared about helping me find the best coverage for my needs. Even while I was overseas, she made the process smooth and stress-free. What really stood out was her patience and professionalism—she took the time to explain everything clearly, answer all my questions, and ensure I felt confident in my decisions. If you're looking for someone who treats you like more than just a policyholder, Susan is the one to go to. Highly recommend her and the team at State Farm!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tissia Mundisugih
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been a customer for some years now, and I’m extremely satisfied with the service. The team is always professional, responsive, and helpful.I highly recommend recommended Fillia and team to anyone looking for an insurance agent. 👍👍

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jessie li
user_reviews_extended.Description: Fransisca’s office was absolutely amazing when helping me! Good service and absolutely helpful. Couldn't ask for better.

user_reviews_extended.Name: M
user_reviews_extended.Description: Have been with State Farm for almost 30 years.  In that time, never once met with my agent.  He retired last year and his clientele moves to Fillia and her office staff. She has done more for us in 2 months than the prior agent over all those years.  Reviewed policies, made recommendations, explained nuances and answered too many emails from us with more questions.  Am I paying more now for my homeowners and other insurance policies - yes.  Am I properly insured for the first time and understand completely everything that is "in" and "out" in the policy - 100% yes.  Fillia, Leanne and the rest of the staff are easy to work with and most responsive.  I'm glad my prior agent retired and Fillia is younger than me!  Will be keeping her.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Judy Tran
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been with State Farm for over 15 years for both auto and home insurance, and their customer service has always been excellent. Special thanks to Susan Lin and Fillia Francisca for their outstanding support over the years. I highly recommend State Farm for reliable coverage and friendly, professional service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Christine Sacino
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have worked with Fillia and Lee Ann over the years. We have always received prompt and thorough and caring service. I highly recommend their team.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Paul Somerville
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I've been with State Farm, and specifically Fillia's office for well over a decade now (maybe two decades) and they have always been there for me (I know, I know... it's also the jingle, but it's true).

I recently had a not-at-fault accident where the other party insisted that it was my fault. I was so grateful to have full coverage with State Farm and to have Fillia's office backing me up. Every time I reached out, they knew exactly what to do. They checked in, they took care of everything. If you want the best insurance experience you have ever had.... choose this office. They will take care of you when you need it, and are super helpful for day to day stuff too!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tony W
user_reviews_extended.Description: Fillia and Leanne are the best!  I've been with this team for years now, and never had a bad experience.  Adding a car, updating policies or fixing my daughter's broken window, always there to help.   Always finding the best options for my family, whether it's home coverage or automobile. My teenager just received her DL and Leanne have made it very seamless to add her to our home coverage.  This team is like Batman and Robin, great team and years of expertise in serving the Bay Area, thank you both for helping our family with all our insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Luke Wang
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve had State Farm insurance for several years now, and I couldn’t be happier with the service. From the start, the process of getting a quote was quick, transparent, and stress-free. Their agents are friendly, knowledgeable, and always willing to go the extra mile to explain coverage options and help find the best plan for my needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Zijian Yang
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have used many insurance companies. including Progressive, Farmers,Geico etc. They just focus on my vehicle business. Rarely discuss all aspects of my insurance needs. Susan helped me sort out my needs in this regard.Let me be free from my business concerns. I have to say thanks for her to helped me find balance in my life.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stephen Kwong
user_reviews_extended.Description: Sue was responsive and helpful.  She was able help me save half on my auto insurance.  Highly Recommend.

user_reviews_extended.Name: J cheung
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Susan Lin, the Office Manager of Fransisca Agency at State Farm taking care all my insurance, properties n autos. Very good service as I traveling ard all time. They always keep me post if things happened.
Top agency in the Bay Area. No doubt!

user_reviews_extended.Description: Received updated information for all my policy. With agency assist. Update and upgrade all Policy as well. Services is great.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Juliana Austria
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been with Fillia and Statefarm for over a decade and they have been the amazing! Great service, easy to talk to, considerate and kind. I have not had any issues with my multiple polices and each claim or update processes smoothly and with care. Check ins during Covid and other issues around my neighborhood. Quick responses to inquiries and updates to policies. Very happy and grateful with their service through the years.

user_reviews_extended.Description: First time person to person to meet,I feel very comfortable and nice to explain about the insurance policy to me and I learn something new and very satisfying the agent.

As complex as insurance can be, Leanne explains everything with ease to ensure my understanding and provides me with the best possible plans suited for my specific needs. I highly recommend anyone to work with her and Fillia’s team if you’re on the market for exceptional service!

user_reviews_extended.Name: AA FS
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very responsive team helped me find insurance for my unique situation where coverage options were limited in California.

user_reviews_extended.Name: William Chen
user_reviews_extended.Description: Filia and Sue are exceptional State Farm agents who genuinely care about their customers. They take the time to understand individual needs and always go the extra mile to provide thoughtful support. Whether it’s answering questions or helping through a complex situation, they approach everything with patience and kindness. It’s clear they are passionate about what they do and truly value the people they work with. Their dedication and empathy make them stand out.

user_reviews_extended.Name: JOHN C KWOCK
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I really appreciate the excellent services that I get from the staff at Fillia Fransisca State Farm Insurance.  Sue has been a tremendous
help.  She is so pleasant and courteous I really enjoyed talking to her.  All of the staff at this office is great.  No matter who I get when I call; they are all wonderful.  They treat me like I was the only customer and gives me undivided attention.  THANK YOU TO ALL OF YOU WONDERFUL PEOPLE.

JOHN

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joseph Chen
user_reviews_extended.Description: Fillia Fransisca State Farm handles all my family's insurance needs.  They offer very reliable and efficient services.  Special Thanks to Susan Lin for responding to my inquiries so promptly all the time!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kathleen Dooley
user_reviews_extended.Description: Fillia & her excellent team have been part of my life for almost 20 years. I have referred friends to he, & I know I’ll get answers when I call her office. I really appreciate their service & attention to detail.

user_reviews_extended.Name: walter light
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a customer for a few years, each time I called and had questions; its agent always gave me a quick and comprehensive solution to my problems. As my recent example, my auto insurance has been increased, the agent answered that the DMV had doubled the minimum requirement in liabilities; So I replied that my annual driving mileage had been down, and followed the instructions to supply my evidence, my premiums would save 25%. Secondly, I increased my homeowner’s deductible by a few percent, I would save around 10%. I really enjoy their excellent service and have been referring my friends to them.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joann Binkley
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very thankful to have Fillia and her staff seeing to my insurance needs. I've been warmly welcomed and gotten exemplary service from the first time I walked into her office and over the years now. Fabulous agent, thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Edward Schrandt
user_reviews_extended.Description: Fillia & Sue have been my agents since my previous agent retired in San Francisco. I appreciate their attention and prompt resolution to any insurance issues that have arisen.  I will remain their client for years to come.

user_reviews_extended.Name: sleepylof
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have all my insurance needs met from State Farm Agent Fillia, and Leanne who leads her front office staff.  They manage multiple policies for me and are efficient, thorough, and take the time to ensure that I understand what kind of insurance is offered/why it is appropriate for my situation.  Very responsive to e-mails and phone calls.  They are always professional and respond quickly to address any issues.  I have made several referrals to family and friends.  Thanks!

user_reviews_extended.Name: T Cheng
user_reviews_extended.Description: As a long-time client of State Farm, I can't recommend them highly enough. Filia and her team, especially Sue, have consistently gone above and beyond to ensure our family's insurance needs are met. Their professionalism and dedication to educating clients about proper coverage are unmatched. With Filia and Sue at the helm, we feel confident and well-protected. Thank you, state farm, for your excellent service and commitment to your clients' well-being.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jolene Hui
user_reviews_extended.Description: Susan (Office Manager) has always been a great help when it comes to my home and auto insurance needs. She's friendly, professional, patient and great with clarifying things for me when I have questions. I've been a long-time customer of this branch and plan to continue doing business with them for many years to come. Highly recommend them!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dean Vanech
user_reviews_extended.Description: Fillia and her team have consistently provided strong client service to me and my wife for years.  We have all our insurance policies with this group.  And a special shout out to Sue for ALWAYS being willing to chase down answers to all my questions, and for working with me to find ways to keep costs controlled without sacrificing peace of mind.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lynn Banks
user_reviews_extended.Description: Spoke with Sue on 7/18/23 regarding my vehicle policy and was very pleased with her warm customer service. She was patient and very professional when explaining coverage regarding my policy. I felt that I was in good hands with State Farm and gladly will continue my business with them. Again, thank you Sue for your welcoming personality and making me feel safe with State Farm.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Eling Ng
user_reviews_extended.Description: Susan Wong is my agent who is very informative and follow up closely for my case at Fillia Francisca-State Farm Insurance. Susan is knowledgeable in her position, and very patient to explain the case. Susan has follow up the auto body shop repair manager to make sure my car is done perfectly. She made my case processed smoothly which I worry free! Thank you for her big effort !

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tad Sky
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Recently my wife needed business insurance for a permit to work on the San Francisco Port’s property. As I have been with State Farm since my home purchase in 1979 I decided to ask them for a policy. They were definitely the right choice because the Port is very “particular” in their specifications but Susan Lin was able to fulfill all of their “demands” professionally and in a timely manner. My wife DID get the permit but only because of Susan’s diligent work.
Occasionally, Fillia Fransisca, the State Farm agent, will call me into the office to review my multiple coverages. Besides being friendly and fun to talk with she always takes time to explain any questions I have and I am pleased to hear the extent of coverages that State Farm offers.
I highly recommend this wonderful team at
2315 Noriega St., San Francisco.

user_reviews_extended.Name: John Kung
user_reviews_extended.Description: Normally don’t do reviews but I feel like I’ve gotten exceptional service from Leanne Lay, Went above and beyond to solve my problems. I’ve even recommended her to other people and they’ve had the same thing to say about her. 100% recommend going to this office if you’re looking for an agent that’s ready and willing to serve!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Raymond Soo
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Amazing to have all my insurance with Fillia State Farm for more than a decade now from home to life insurance and retirement investment too. Fillia team do follow up and remind if there are anything I miss or benefit too.

There are so many insurance companies and agent, but I come across and learn that more agent want is your sales. Fillia State Farm agent value each customer and explain thoroughly to ensure help to choose the best option.

You will still hear from Fillia State Farm team to follow up every year to make sure we are all OK or any changes of benefit to help client. You can always depend on Fillia State Farm team and real person to discuss any issues. Same team member for so many year Most of the insurance agent interested on the first sales, and never hear anymore in future.

Highly recommend and hard to find this best team to help and monitor all my insurances.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lorenzo
user_reviews_extended.Description: "I am thoroughly impressed with the exceptional service provided by State Farm Agent Fillia and her capable front office leader, Leanne. They expertly manage multiple insurance policies for me with remarkable efficiency and attention to detail. They take the time to ensure that I fully comprehend the various insurance options available and their suitability for my specific circumstances. Their responsiveness to emails and phone calls is commendable, and they consistently maintain a high level of professionalism while promptly addressing any concerns. I have confidently referred several family members and friends to their outstanding services. Thank you for your dedication!"

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael Yuen
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have worked with Sue at this office for all of my insurance needs for several years now.  Sue is always very professional in explaining the different types of coverage and determining what my insurance needs are while also being mindful of costs.  She is very responsive to any changes I need made and promptly tends to my questions.  I recommend this office for all insurance needs, and I look forward to continuing to work with them for many years to come.

user_reviews_extended.Name: henry chen
user_reviews_extended.Description: Fillia and her office employees have been doing good customer service for many years. I have been enjoying my home and auto insurance with them more than 10 years. They are honest, efficient and friendly. I'm very happy staying with State Farm. I highly recommend drivers and home owners to join State Farm - become a member of this big  family.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jeffrey Woo
user_reviews_extended.Description:
The insurance agents are super friendly and always quick to respond.

I’ve got insurance for my house, car, business, and rental apartment all through them. They’ve handled everything smoothly and even gave me a discount for bundling my policies.

Even with the tricky parts of business insurance, like when my landlord needs certain documents, they’ve been on top of it and get things done fast, often in just a few hours.

In the past five years, running a business in San Francisco has meant dealing with a couple of break-ins. Thankfully, the losses were small, but what really helped was their straightforward claims process.

I’m looking to switch my workers’ comp insurance to them soon. Whenever I need insurance for something new, they’re the first ones I think about.

user_reviews_extended.Name: cOraL liang
user_reviews_extended.Description: Leanne always quick to respond and incredibly professional. She makes everything simple and stress-free, and I truly appreciate how efficient and reliable she is. Highly recommended!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alex Okarkau

user_reviews_extended.Name: Darron Feldstein
user_reviews_extended.Description: Everyone at Fillia's office has always been very kind and helpful to me.  They are very competent and skilled, and I have never had an easier experience when dealing with insurance matters.  Thank you for the opportunity to recommend this State Farm office.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Andreas Susanto
user_reviews_extended.Description:
It all began when my windshield cracked. So, immediately I reported it to my insurance through the website. The claim was a breeze and chose my glass installer. On the day replacement of my glass, my windshield camera also needed to be calibrated, due to replacement. After an hour of waiting, they failed to calibrate the camera and triggered warnings on my dashboard. I panicked after they told me to need to bring the vehicle to the dealership and had them calibrated. It should be their responsibility to calibrate the sensor which was advertised with windshield replacement.

Called Fillia and asked if the insurance would cover the incurred cost for windshield calibration. My agent said just bring the dealership and pay upfront then reimburse the cost. Went to the dealership and had them perform calibration and the cost was almost $700.

Submitted the invoice and proof of payment to my insurance. Later that week they called me a couple of times to let me know they got all the paperwork and were in the process of working on my claim.  Finally, I got reimbursed a couple of weeks later. Fillia and the team had worked hard to assure me that my claim would be reimbursed. Their service is above and beyond. I recommend Fillia and the team take care of your insurance need. Thanks so much.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bill Knutson
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have enjoyed being able to speak to Fillia as both a friend and an agent. She is always willing to sit down and review my policy to make sure I get the best balance between coverage and value. I have confidence that my family has the best coverage for our needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Magidson
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I've been with Fillia and her team for many years.  This is a family business, it's nice they send birthday cards and always ask after my children.

I appreciate how quick the team is to answer questions. My son is in college and they gave me advice on renters insurance in another state. Fillia goes over my policies once a year and I never feel pushed to purchase something I don't want.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Margaret Tong
user_reviews_extended.Description: Sue Lin and the entire staff are very accommodating and are very knowledgeable in all aspects of their business at State Farm. I am very fortunate to have State Farm oversee all my insurance needs. I wish to thank State Farm to have such awesome Associates representing their company.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Vaggelis Sotiropoulos
user_reviews_extended.Description: Both my husband, Vaggelis, and I, Yan, have our policies with State Farm Insurance and we're extremely grateful to Susan (aka Sue) for helping us out with our needs! I really appreciate her patience with my questions since I am very detailed oriented as well.  Thank you Fillia for hiring such wonderful staff to take care of our insurance needs!  God bless you all!

user_reviews.Name: Suzanne Cross
user_reviews.Description: Henry Ha and Christie Kennett have provided me outstanding and knowledgeable service at the Christie Kennett State Farm Insurance Agency.  This office has serviced me for over 25 years, providing fair pricing. I always feel welcome to ask any questions and receive immediate attention by phone or email. (note: someone always picks up my direct phone call)

user_reviews.Name: Ashley Roth
user_reviews.Description: Henry Ha helped me with my life insurance policy. He was the most relatable, helpful, and thorough agent I have ever worked with. I’ve recommended him to many of my friends looking for insurance policies and they all report back that they had an amazing experience with him. He’s very honest and I’ve never felt pressured to purchase anything, but the life insurance rate and policy was just a no brainer. I def recommend him if you’re considering policies. He’s a very good resource!

user_reviews.Name: angel ng
user_reviews.Description: I am astonished by Christie's level of friendliness and patience.  She put in a lot of effort to obtain all the discounts that could be applicable to my policy.  She devoted her time to assisting me in saving my budget.  Having someone who is kind and efficient on the phone to assist customers nowadays is not common.  Christie demonstrated to me how 5 star services should be.  I am very much appreciated.

user_reviews.Name: Greg
user_reviews.Description:
I just had a great experience with Henry Ha, State Farm Insurance Account Representative / Lic #: 4038364.
Henry was spot on with all of our insurance needs, he was prompt, courteous, and had well prepared. Insuring our new car was a breeze.
Sincerely,
Greg Snead

user_reviews.Name: David Padilla
user_reviews.Description: Christie has helped educate me on several of my insurance needs. She is very informative and generous with her time. She has shown me so much patience when explaining things.

user_reviews.Name: B Sanchez
user_reviews.Description: I'll try to make this short but it'll be hard 😉.Christie has been so amazingly patient, understanding and persistent in a good way. I ran in to a car ins quote ad on Snap. I entered some details and was bombarded with calls and texts after, which annoyed me. But I responded to her only because she seemed like a real person. After her repeated attempts to get me with State farm and my repeatedly ignoring and avoiding her calls only because I'm going through a lot in life. I hate being on the phone. We communicated back in forth for over a month (my fault). She's never lost hope in me or ever got rude with me even though I feel like it's a "complicated relationship" lol. This lady has been great. Longer story shorter. I left ProG now have State Farm saving almost $200 a month AND life ins on my hubi for only$30 a month. Glad she put up with me. 😊 6 vehicles only 1 full coverage, more coverage than before and now some life insurance. At about $200 a month total 😲

user_reviews_extended.Name: John Roach
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I renewed my daughter's San Francisco renter insurance policy in March 2024 and then in May she decided to move.  I contacted Crystal Tu at the Kennett insurance agency to inquire about transferring the policy to the new address.  The policy was non-transferable and Crystal informed me that a prorated refund check would be issued.  When I received the refund, the check was made out to my daughter and her former roommates who were long gone.  I live in Colorado and depositing this refund was near impossible with 3rd party, out of state implications.  Crystal was instrumental in helping me get the check reissued in my name.  It took 6 months but I finally received the refund.  Crystal's amazing customer service made this possible.  The personal and professional service Crystal provided was top notch.  I highly recommend this agency for your insurance needs.

John - Colorado

Guillermo has been very communicative and calming upon discussing a recent (small!) auto accident.  Christie suggests different options to maximize the insurance experience. user_reviews_extended.Description:

I'm no spring chicken, but I've learned lots of things about insurance that I never knew before. user_reviews_extended.Name: PJ Ganaden
user_reviews_extended.Description: I am a long time client of Christie Kennett and Sales Manager Guillermo Gutierrez - this is long overdue.  Unfortunately, I have had more claims and insurance issues than I would have liked.  Each and every time Christie and Guillermo have gone well above and beyond to help me through my claims and each and every one has been resolved to my satisfcation.  I exclusively work with Guillermo and when he says "call me or email me if you need anything" he says it with full sincerity.  I call or email Guillermo and he gets back to me within minutes with information, updates, guidance and ultimately resolutions.  I don't understand a lot of the insurance intricacies and jargon - Guillermo always simplifies things for me and provides the most useful advice.  He serves as an intermediary between myself and the State Farm claims department, especially when I am faced with challenges and roadblocks.  I HIGHLY recommend Christie Kennett's office and if you get a chance to work with Guillermo, consider yourself lucky and in great hands!  Thank you Guillermo for all that you do for me!

user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been working with Christie and her team for a few years now and they level of service and attention is amazing. Something you don’t see anymore. I have needed their help over a weekend and in the evening and they contacted me within minutes.

user_reviews_extended.Description: I have always been under my parent’s plan so I had lots of questions as this was the first time doing car insurance completely on my own. user_reviews_extended.Description: Great agent who takes pride in taking care of her customers.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Todd Crawshaw
user_reviews_extended.Description: I know Christie Kennett to be a smart, honest and reliable agent. As well, she’s enjoyable to do business with and someone I’m happy to have as a contact. A couple years ago a drunk driver crashed through the main gate to our house. His car landed in our front yard and caused considerable damage. Fortunately, no one was injured. State Farm is our home insurance company and we’ve been insured with them for many years, yet had never needed to call for a claim until this incident. My wife and I were extremely impressed by how promptly State Farm took charge, returning our call and having a representative come to our property. Within a week we received a check for the estimated cost to repair the damage. And once all the repairs were made – removal and replacement of wooden front gate and fence; repair to damaged masonry walkway and stairs; planter box and light fixture replacements; and restored landscaping – the cost was slightly higher than what had been estimated. State Farm paid for the difference. I highly recommend State Farm, Christie, and the other agents we worked with to get our property restored.

user_reviews_extended.Description:
I never thought I would have such strong feelings about an insurance experience! I got rear-ended the FIRST day I joined State Farm (didn't even have physical insurance cards yet) and Christie and Guillermo were so responsive on a Saturday.

When I think about getting into an accident the only thing worse than physical injuries is dealing with insurance -- but with Christie and Guillermo that was not the case. They handled everything from start to finish (filed the claim, uploaded photos, found a repair shop and worked with the other driver's insurance -- basically everything outside of actually driving our car to the shop). We ended up paying $0 out of pocket and couldn't be more grateful we insured with them!

Looking forward to insuring more parts of our life with them.

Thank you Christie and Guillermo!

user_reviews_extended.Name: James Maloney
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I chose Christie Kennett as my State Farm agent based on her stellar credentials and competence in working with State Farm corporate. I found Ms. Kennett easy to work with and willing to extend her time and knowledge to patiently resolving my questions and offering her advice and counsel on insurance best practices for me as a Bay Area homeowner.

Ms. Kennett's background in insurance is extraordinary. After graduating from St. Louis University School of Law, she joined the tax, real estate and corporate law practice at the St. Louis firm of Husch & Eppenberger. She then joined the securities law unit of State Farm's general counsel's office and later held the title Director of Government Affairs for State Farm Insurance Companies.  Christie relocated to the San Francisco Bay Area where she served in an advisory capacity to State Farm offices throughout the Bay Area before opening her agency in San Francisco.
