title: Farmers Insurance - Justin Choy
address: 1200 Vicente St, San Francisco, CA 94116, United States
plus_code: PGQ9+PX Parkside, San Francisco, CA, USA

user_reviews.Name: Ryan Si
user_reviews.Description: Tony was fantastic to work with throughout our home insurance process. He was extremely knowledgeable, responsive, and took the time to walk us through all of our options so we could find the coverage that made the most sense for our needs. He made what could have been a complicated process feel simple and straightforward. Tony was always quick to answer our questions and made sure we felt confident in our decisions. I truly appreciated his professionalism and attention to detail, and I would highly recommend him to anyone looking for a reliable and trustworthy insurance agent.

user_reviews.Name: eddy lee
user_reviews.Description:
We had an outstanding experience working with Tony at Farmers Insurance.

With the current challenges of finding insurance in California — especially with wildfire-related restrictions — we were honestly expecting a stressful process. Instead, Tony made everything smooth, clear, and manageable. He ran multiple quotes for us, including different home and auto coverage options, always keeping our goal of cost savings in mind.

Tony is incredibly knowledgeable and professional, but what really stood out was his responsiveness and patience. He took the time to walk us through each option, explain coverage differences, and answer all of our questions thoroughly. At no point did we feel rushed or pressured — just supported.

In a market where insurance has become difficult to secure, Tony helped us find a fair, competitive quote that met our needs. We ultimately decided to move forward with Farmers because of both the coverage and the confidence Tony inspired throughout the process.

If you’re looking for an insurance agent who is responsive, knowledgeable, and truly focused on excellent service, we highly recommend Tony.

user_reviews.Name: Neria Jacobs
user_reviews.Description: I worked with Tony Chu he was amazing he made sure we got all the discounts that we could qualify for. He broke down my current policy that I was switching over to a better policy that would be best for my family. He was there every step of the way with getting all our documents over to him making the process so easy. I totally wouldn’t have expected this much involvement from an agent you can tell Tony loves what he does and takes pride in his job and values his clients. 10/10 Highly recommend !

user_reviews.Name: Aaron Yee
user_reviews.Description: Justin and Simon are truly one of a kind.  I’m a brand new client and this has been the single best customer service experience I’ve ever had. I whole heartedly felt that they had my best interest and they were really looking out for me.  I have a couple very difficult cars to insure and they got it done.  I highly recommend you at least give these guys a call because you will realize quickly that they go above and beyond.

user_reviews.Name: Tom Pan
user_reviews.Description: Justin and his associates at Farmers Insurance are fantastic. They always respond to my inquiries promptly and provide exceptional service. They are detailed oriented in handling policies and claims. Recently I was able to reduce my insurance premium after reviewing the policy with them. They are a reliable partner for all insurance needs.

user_reviews.Name: Michael Aldea
user_reviews.Description: Thank you Tony, Justin and the rest of the team! Tony was able to find the right insurance plan for me. He answered all my question understood my situation. I genuinely felt he was felt he was working on my best interest and not just trying to sell me an off the shelf product.

user_reviews.Name: Lake Hu
user_reviews.Description: Simon was very patient in explaining everything to me. He was able to find the product I needed. Very response in answering emails and calls which was exactly what I needed. Highly recommended!

user_reviews.Name: Michelle Tran
user_reviews.Description: It’s my partner and I’s first time moving out together and Simon L. made the process so seamless. He helped a family member before and that’s how we were referred. It was a pleasure working with Simon L. and we were in great hands.

user_reviews.Name: Daniel Zilberman
user_reviews.Description:
Always a high quality insurance services from Jake Ng and associates - great communications, comprehensive coverage and generally budget friendly.
Personal touch when communicating with customers and prospects alike and very professional attitude  at the same time.
StateFarm of course is one of the top insurers nationwide and in CA as well.
Certainly recommend for consideration!

user_reviews.Name: Dwight O
user_reviews.Description: I've had wonderful service from this State Farm agent, and special attention from Nicholas Ly, who was extremely personable and thorough in his care to my requests!

user_reviews.Name: Richard Jacobs
user_reviews.Description: The staff at the Jake Ng Agency is responsive, cordial, knowledgeable and always helpful.  When you ask for information or to make a change in your policy it is taken care of in a single call expeditiously.  On this occasion I was helped by Nicholas Ly but every encounter has been pleasant one.

user_reviews.Name: Shelton Fong
user_reviews.Description: Been doing business with this office for over 20 years and they always take good care of me and my family! More than  good neighbor!

user_reviews.Name: Alex Kwong
user_reviews.Description: Nicolas from Jake Ng has been very responsive and helpful over text message. Fanny is nice too but less responsive maybe just busy but she used to be more responsive. Regardless both of them are very good.

user_reviews.Name: Ms Wong
user_reviews.Description: Team here is readily available and helpful. I had questions regarding coverage for test drive, (covered), and transitioning from one leased car to a new lease car, Fanny was terrific, immediately provided temporary insurance card.  She answered my questions regarding roadside assistance as well.  I was able to send payments electronically through my bank, super easy. Great service.  Thank you.

user_reviews.Name: Neil Kerr
user_reviews.Description: Thanks so much to Nicholas and Fanny at State Farm for all their help with auto and renters insurance while I lived in California 2016-2024. Having now moved to the UK, they were even able to help with a couple of account closure issues after I left - perfect customer service!

user_reviews.Description:

Example: IT'S A SIMPLE THING. I asked him today to have his colleage Fanny to call me. He would make it very complicated. I told him is for a potential new policy. He would try to give me some attitude... HE ALWAYS SEEM TO HAVE A LOT OF ATTITUDE PROBLEMS!

user_reviews.Name: Hui G
user_reviews.Description: Sunnie is very meticulous, patient, and responsible in her work. I'm so glad to have met her. She worked very late today without complaining. The boss here is lucky to have her.

user_reviews.Name: Wayne Wu
user_reviews.Description: Always got prompt replies from my agent Ms Qiu. Highly recommend her professional services.

user_reviews.Name: alexandra bauer
user_reviews.Description: Excellent customer and technical support from Brandon and Simon! This experience lately to receive this level of care as in the past few years in the insurance and health insurance exchange field is, very sale oriented and getting inconsistent. Information on the plans and coverage are confusing, even on Covered California. Simon was able to use information to select the best plan for me that would maximize my financial assistance qualification. Brandon, was able to resolve a serious issue about my coverage.  Please acknowledge Brandon and Simon. I’m so grateful to them.

user_reviews.Name: John Liu
user_reviews.Description: Carmen helped me get on CoveredCA insurance plan.  She is very knowledgeable and very responsive.  Highly recommend her for your insurance needs.

user_reviews.Name: Shiqi Song
user_reviews.Description: My insurance agent was very patient and thorough. Thank you so much! I will continue to recommend them to my friends!

user_reviews.Name: Kunal Punera
user_reviews.Description: Carmen from eHealth-Plans has been invaluable in navigating the complexities and arbitrariness of CoveredCA. I don't think my parents would be able to have sustained health coverage without Carmen's constant help. She is also extremely prompt in her communications and responses, leaving me comforted that I can easily access help in case of future issues.

user_reviews.Name: Mark Flores
user_reviews.Description: There's a lot of places to go to and I was overwhelmed when shopping around. Alot of places don't even offer a call back. Like my business don't matter. Until I called these guys and ran into Carmen. She seemed nice so I decided to chance it. I don't really leave reviews but she went above and beyond her time in a small matter like mine. You don't find that too many places. Go here and ask for Carmen if possible. Word is out and good places hard to find. She's a gem

user_reviews_extended.Name: shalimar isaq
user_reviews_extended.Description: Im not sure how I came across Simon and Brandon Chew but Oh My Goodness!! I am so thankful that I did. I was in a panic because my ex husband was going to kick off my 22 and 24 year old from the health insurance plan beginning the next month. I only had a week to figure out what to do, how expensive, and most importantly how to keep our family doctor because both the kids have health issues. Brandon immediately jumped in to help and kept me posted both by text and email what my options were both budget wise and coverage wise. Within a few days I had both my kids insured. Unbelievable how easy Brandon made this process! I am so grateful for eHealth and Brandon. He was truly a champion. He was so kind, helpful and patient to my fears and concerns. I now tell everyone about eHealth for all health insurance needs and have Brandon's number saved for future needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Christopher Sulots
user_reviews_extended.Description: Really great customer support from Brandon! Covered California. Brandon was incredibly helpful at helping me weigh my options and find coverage quickly. Super responsive over email and wonderful to work with.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kelsey Kindall
user_reviews_extended.Description: Carmen is amazing to work with, so responsive and answers any questions I have. Reliable & I will continue to work with them!

user_reviews_extended.Description: They are a great team to work with and help us establish our insurance system. thank you. Carmen.

title: Curtis Lee - State Farm Insurance Agent
address: 648 Stanyan St, San Francisco, CA 94117, United States
plus_code: QGCW+4J Haight-Ashbury, San Francisco, CA, USA

owner.name: Curtis Lee - State Farm Insurance Agent (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: R Lee
user_reviews.Description: Have been with State Farm for about 5 decades and have been with Curtis for over 3 decades.  His office has always been an important part of my life in providing the insurance products that protected me from the all unexpected through out the years.  His staff is extremely helpful and no questions go unanswered.  I have always received 5 star service at his office and I am going to be a "lifer" for sure.

user_reviews.Name: Conor Owens-Walton
user_reviews.Description: The folks at Curtis Lee's State Farm are really wonderful to work with. New to US auto-insurance, but they made the process seem clear and manageable for me.

user_reviews.Name: Ronald Lee D.D.S
user_reviews.Description: Have been using Curtis for all my insurance needs for many decades now.  I don't usually leave many reviews, but I feel it is time that I give him and his team at State Farm the recognition that they well deserve.  Always service with a big smile is how I would describe their quick and efficient care they have provided me over the years.  A special thank you for team member Ginger who has been taking care my car insurance needs since I started driving.  Curtis and his team is what I consider a good neighborhood place of business that are all too rare in today's world.  Thank you Curtis and team!

user_reviews.Name: Amy Lazarus
user_reviews.Description: I don't usually leave reviews but these folks deserve 18 stars! Stanley and the whole team at Curtis Lee provide the best customer service. I can call or email and always get a helpful and quick response that makes my life easier and informs timely decisions. Stanley is a strong communicator, knowledgeable about insurance options, and always advises me well. Other insurance companies may provide slightly better quotes but the ease and accuracy of working with State Farm can't be beat. I discovered this office when I first moved to San Francisco and literally walked into their storefront. I'm so glad I'm still with them seven years later.

user_reviews.Name: Scott E
user_reviews.Description:
I have been a customer of Curtis Lee since 2005, and I currently have multiple lines of insurance through him. I have worked extensively with his office, including Paul and Stanley, for more than a decade. The TL;DR is that you simply will not find a better, more responsive, or more trustworthy agent than Curtis and his staff.

Let me expand. Insurance is a funny thing, most of the time you don't think about it until you need it, and then--if you've failed to plan ahead--it's too late. My family has a long history with State Farm, and my grandfather was a State Farm agent. I have been with State Farm since I had my first car, and I have been with multiple agents in four states. I have never had a bad experience with State Farm--not with the agents, their staff, the customer service people, the adjusters--no one. If my experience is an indicator, State Farm should be high on your list of companies.

All that said, you will now understand that if State Farm, in general, sets my bar for excellence--and it does!--then Curtis Lee consistently exceeds my expectations. There's not a single person in his office that I wouldn't trust to handle any of my needs. I know that if I have a question, any one of them will answer it competently. I know that I won't be sold products and services that I don't need. I know that when it comes to my property, my family, and my savings, they will give me the best advice possible.

If you are looking for a great agent who has an excellent staff of trained professionals; or if you want products and services that you can have faith in and where you can receive a comprehensive explanation for every aspect of your policy, stop reading this and go see Curtis Lee.

Highest recommendation.

user_reviews.Name: Gus Ellis
user_reviews.Description: I've been a customer of Curtis Lee and State Farm Insurance for four years and I can highly recommend them. They are always professional and responsive and generally a pleasure to work with. Ginger and Constance are particularly great to work with and have always helped take care of our needs. Thanks, State Farm team!

user_reviews.Name: Andrew Kravetsky
user_reviews.Description: Baffled this place has such a high rating. I used them for 2 years over which they made mistakes I have never experienced with any other insurance broker I have used. They made incorrect changes to my policy on 2 different occasions one of which caused me to be without insurance for 2 months. Their customer service was abysmal, never seemed to understand the issue or take responsibility, non responsive, and honestly just rude. I am so thankful I don't need to use this office anymore. Whenever I called State Farm corporate they were extremely helpful, this office specifically is just terrible. I cannot express how much I dislike this office, I had to waste nearly 6 hours over 3 phone calls because of errors this office made. Anyway good riddance, hopefully someone more competent takes over so this office can run properly.

user_reviews.Name: Thomas Doherty
user_reviews.Description: I have been using State Farm, Curtis Lee office for over 15 years now and I am delighted with the service this office provides for me. They are always happy to help with my insurance needs. They always follow up and give me a courtesy call on things coming up. I highly recommend these guys for all your prized possessions. Reach out to Conny or any of her other coworkers.

His office has always been an important part of my life in providing the insurance products that protected me from the all unexpected through out the years.  His staff is extremely helpful and no questions go unanswered.  I have always received 5 star service at his office and I am going to be a "lifer" for sure.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tiffany Montesano
user_reviews_extended.Description: They are advocates for their clients. If you are having problems with your claim or not getting responses in a timely fashion they are on it! Ginger is a total gem! She actively follows up on claims for you if she notices it has been sitting for some time. She literally is like your personal assistant in handling these situations and doesn't give up. I wish I had her in my daily life! She helped me resolve some frustrating issues that I couldn't have had the patience for if it wasn't for her. Having someone like Ginger as part of your team for insurance says a lot about Curtis Lee.  She has been working for Curtis for a very long time and speaks highly of the office and the services Curtis provides. Curtis Lee clearly values his customers and puts Ginger in charge of handling the difficult situations. Smart! You will feel safe in their hands

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shirley Rexrode
user_reviews_extended.Description: Not only is Curtis Lee  a consummate professional, he is incredibly caring, responsive, reliable, friendly, and supportive. We have been working with Curtis for decades and he has always provided us with excellent advice especially when we are in a difficult situation. This permeates to the excellent crew  (i.e. Stanley, Paul, and Ginger) that work at his office and have been with him for many years. Thank you, Curtis and team, for keeping us covered.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kali T
user_reviews_extended.Description: It’s unusual to find an insurance office which treats every customer as if they were family! I had such an experience when I was rear ended and needed advice in how to manage my claim. While I am a long time State Farm client, the Curtis Lee office is not my home office, but you would think I was one of their own. I was given my options and wished well by the compassionate person on the phone.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Willie Lee
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a client of Curtis Lee and his office for two decades and they handle all my insurance needs across home and auto.  Curtis and everyone on his team have always been extremely helpful, thorough, and courteous, everything a client can ask for.  They follow up on all my inquiries and always willing to provide consultation whenever I ask.  Curtis and his team are why I stick with State Farm.

user_reviews_extended.Name: E Carmen Torres
user_reviews_extended.Description:
After decades with an alternative automobile insurance agency, I decided to visit the agents at the local State Farm office.

Kelsey Lee was warm and helpful. She gave me excellent customer service. We compared the proposed policy with the current policy "apples to apples". The savings and payment method exceeded my expectations. This experience was a pleasure, and I am delighted to be a new State Farm client with my neighbor.

user_reviews_extended.Name: vRavi
user_reviews_extended.Description: Been with State Farm and Curtis' office since 2016 and my experience has been nothing but positive. The office staff is very responsive, friendly and you don't have to beat around the bush if you need your questions answered or get things done. Recommend them to anyone looking for their next insurance agent.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Althea Middleton-Detzner
user_reviews_extended.Description: Customer service with Curtis Lee's team is EXCELLENT! Constance was prompt and thorough with helping me move my insurance from another state. She went above and beyond to answer all of my questions and provided me with personalized suggestions knowing I was new to the city. It isn't often that life admin like this is actually an enjoyable experience; I'm so glad to be working with this team for my insurance needs in SF!

user_reviews_extended.Name: jack hayes
user_reviews_extended.Description: We had a recent claim after an encounter with a big rig. My car was totaled but no one was injured. Ginger Forslund was an extraordinary"guide" through the whole process and the many communications with State Farm claims personnel. We've been working with Ginger for over forty years and NEVER once has she let us down. She is a great support through any problem we have ever had with claims, with communication with State Farm. Articulate, personable, caring, thoughtful, highly intelligent, VERY responsive, great follow through. She's a tremendously effective representative for State Farm. Ginger is THE reason we have all our insurance with State Farm!!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Alumbaugh
user_reviews_extended.Description: Curtis Lee has been our agent for all our insurance needs for decades. We initially engaged Curtis and his office when we lived in the Upper Haight. When we moved to Oakland, we kept our business with them and are glad we did so. They are incredibly helpful, remarkably responsive, offer beyond-competitive prices, and are an absolute pleasure to work with. We couldn't be happier with them.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Matt Wolf
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been with Curtis's Team for around 10 years and they've been consistently great to work with. Across multiple policies anytime I have questions they take the time to discuss my question and I feel like a valued customer.  They are quick / responsive every time. I've been very happy to stay with them and highly recommend this team.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Diana Starcher
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have done business with State Farm in San Francisco for over 25 years.    My account for several policies is managed so well I don’t often connect with the office but when I do Ginger immediately takes care of any question or problem.   She is friendly, knowledgeable and efficient……a pleasure to do business with.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mas Mar
user_reviews_extended.Description:
This office is great! Every single agent I spoke to over the 10y i been with them was so helpful. And always on top of my requests!
Recommend statefarm's and Curtis Lee's office!
Thanks Stanley, Ginger and Kelsey👌🏽

user_reviews_extended.Name: Wilson Li
user_reviews_extended.Description: Curtis and team, especially Ginger, are fantastic people over there that pay a lot of attention to making sure you’re covered properly and resolving any issues or accidents you may have. After an auto accident, Ginger would call with genuine concern and help with the process. We also built a honest relationship over the years which makes you feel like a family! Totally recommend working with this genuine team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: B_H
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been using the services from Curtis Lee's State Farm office for almost 20 years for my business, my personal auto insurance as well as renters insurance. The staff is very competent and helpful. Stanley is my go-to guy and has been taking care of me for over a decade.

user_reviews_extended.Name: TAKU
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a client of Curtis Lee for at least 15 years now. He and his team go above and beyond consistently to deliver the best customer service I have experienced. I highly recommend them for all of your insurance needs

user_reviews_extended.Name: Diane Liu
user_reviews_extended.Description: I recently transferred to Curtis Lee’s office due to bad costumer service with my last agent, so I was thrilled with the great service I’ve received recently from one of Lee’s agent, Brittany Ng.  She was warm, professional, and efficient with helping me get what I needed to be done.  If Brittany is a representation of how Curtis Lee’s office is run, I feel I’m in good hands.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Adam Fullerton
user_reviews_extended.Description: It’s really amazing to be able to have an actual person that can help you with random insurance things, like quickly getting a new policy set up for a wedding ring before going on a honeymoon, or showing proof of insurance for a refinance, etc. This whole staff is super professional and really friendly. I enjoy going to the office when it’s needed, and also the quick response times over email. Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kathy Mai
user_reviews_extended.Description: Customer service and subject matter expertise are top-notch. Stanley and Ginger were very helpful every step of the way. Great advice and quality service!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nathan Krah
user_reviews_extended.Description: This State Farm Brach was awesome. They are very professional and easy to work with. There is always someone willing to help by phone or email. They gave prompt responses to any issue. They are very thorough and offer low cost rental policies. Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jennifer Dever
user_reviews_extended.Description: Although Curtis may be a nice person the company he works for is not. State Farm has decided that if any rental policy holder for less than one year files a claim their policy will be automatically cancelled after the claim. I purchased the rental insurance in March and my bicycle was stolen in November of the following year. They did cover the bike but this January I received a letter saying my policy will not be renewed. So, if you are going to get renter's insurance from State Farm- don't plan on using it until you have had the policy for at least seven years ( regardless if someone steals your stuff or you have a fire, or whatever) because State Farm wants to make money up front! Period. Because they did take care of my claim relatively quickly I have given them two stars rather than one.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ken Fair
user_reviews_extended.Description: I moved to San Francisco 20 years ago. Soon after arrival the local police said change your plates and insurance or PAY. I walked into Curtis Lee State Farm and began a 20 year relationship that has protected my vehicles, health  and home. His team has always had my best interests in mind.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shushana Gefen
user_reviews_extended.Description: I am so happy to have Curtis Lee and all his staff help me and I would recommend him to anyone and everyone. I've been with State Farm for 40 years. Recommend them 100%.

user_reviews_extended.Description: Curtis Lee has been our insurance agent for years now.  Always quick to respond to any inquiries or help we need.  Would highly recommend his office.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kay Dryden

user_reviews_extended.Description: Curtis Lee and his team has made realize the value of having a relationship with a local insurance office. In my experience, they have helped me make informed decisions about what coverages I need (or don't need!)

user_reviews_extended.Description: When I had an accident , my agent, Ginger Forslund, helped me navigate thru rentals, claims, and fixing  my Prius. user_reviews_extended.Description: Great experience working with Curtis Lee and his office. Always felt welcomed, respected, and they even sent holiday cards! 100% recommend to anyone looking.

user_reviews_extended.Description: Called Curtis Lee's office about my wife's rates increasing. Lizzie answered my questions very professionally and also looked into the policy to find a way to lower the premiums. Now, my wife's premium is even lower than before the increase all thanks to Lizzie.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mariclare D Ballard

Mariclare Ballard

Thank you Curtis and Stanley for your home insurance expertise and customer service!   I can’t thank you both enough for your time, assistance and patience with my detailed insurance questions.
Also, I’m very happy with the quote compared to other insurance companies!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mark Dinh
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been with Curtis for over 15 years.  I've shopped around some (shhh!) but was never swayed enough to switch.  We've got two houses, two cars, and a scooter covered with State Farm.

user_reviews_extended.Description: Great support and service for over 6 years while living in San Francisco. Curtis and his team were always quick to respond and provided great customer service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: karen mason
user_reviews_extended.Description: Curtis lee and his staff do a wonderful job. Even with Covid they were able to handle all my insurance needs. Thank you Curtis.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ginny Lamini

user_reviews_extended.Description: I cannot explain how helpful Curtis, Ginger and the entire office has been dealing with these crazy times. I don’t know what I would do without them. Do yourself a favor and don’t go anywhere else for insurance help!

title: Mary Zell Spellman - State Farm Insurance Agent
address: 26 W Portal Ave UNIT 1, San Francisco, CA 94127, United States
plus_code: PGRM+7C West of Twin Peaks, San Francisco, CA, USA

owner.name: Mary Zell Spellman - State Farm Insurance Agent (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Ashley White
user_reviews.Description:
Toni was incredible to work with. We needed urgent updates to our renters insurance in order to move into our new place, and she handled everything right away. She updated our policy, added the required additional interest, and made sure all renter requirements were met without any delays.

She was fast, responsive, kind, and extremely helpful throughout the whole process. I am so grateful for her support and would absolutely recommend her to anyone who wants an insurance agent who truly shows up for their clients.

user_reviews.Name: Dave Williams
user_reviews.Description: I've been a long time and happy customer of Mary Spellman State Farm Agency for well over a decade. During that time, I've mainly worked directly with Cheryl Rock as my main point of contact on any issue that have come up. I recently was confronted with a very challenging insurance coverage situation and, once again, Cheryl was absolutely amazing to work with. Her knowledge and long time insurance industry experience with every type of insurance product becomes evident immediately when you're talking to her. And, the best part is that Cheryl always puts herself in the customers shoes and tries everything in her power to find the best and most affordable solution to address your issue. So, thanks again Cheryl for being such a huge help !! I truly appreciate it for my peace of mind !!

user_reviews.Name: Roberto Chicas
user_reviews.Description:
Dealing with insurance companies can often be a frustrating experience. I was recently rear-ended on the highway during traffic, and to make matters worse, the other driver didn’t have a valid license. I was sure the situation was going to be a major headache.

When I called State Farm, Cheryl was exactly what I needed to ease my anxiety. She walked me through how to handle the other driver’s insurance company and clearly explained what my next steps should be. She even encouraged me to call back after a few days so she could help me follow up and offer additional guidance.

Since then, I’ve spoken with her a couple more times, and she has consistently made this entire process much easier. My car is now repaired, and while I’m still waiting for the other insurance company to get their act together, I truly appreciate the support I received.

Thank you, Mary Spellman, and thank you, Cheryl!

user_reviews.Name: Raphy Avakian
user_reviews.Description: Andrew in the office of Mary Speelman did such an amazing job with my insurance so I was recently using GEICO and I was paying way too much for my car insurance so that commercial that says save a bunch of money on your car insurance not Tru this office was able to cut $150 off my monthly payment for auto insurance and they blew my Homeowners insurance out of the water and ended up saving me about $330 per month for the same coverage. I’m absolutely tickled with the job that they did and I would highly recommend you call Andrew for any of your insurance needs. I’m not on the payroll. I’m just super happy the competitive quotes like this Still exist when it seems like All other companies were still going up and didn’t wanna ensure me again. They were able to hit the Mark. Thanks again Andrew you man.

user_reviews.Name: pat bolger
user_reviews.Description: Toni was very helpful and responsive when I needed some paperwork taken care of. She made the process easy and smooth, and I really appreciate her professionalism and quick assistance. Highly recommend!

user_reviews.Name: seth ford
user_reviews.Description: Cheryl R at Mary Zell Spellman is the best insurance agent I've ever worked with. A true partner to help get the best and most efficient coverage for my family. Couldn't ask for a better insurance team.

user_reviews.Description: I wanted to express my appreciation for Andrew Severaid he is amazing! He helped my friend find a great car insurance plan within her budget and he made the whole process super easy. He was patient, answered all her questions, and made sure she understood everything before moving forward. You can tell he genuinely cares about helping people. If you’re looking for great coverage at a good price, definitely reach out to Andrew! Thanks again Andrew!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Andrea Leon
user_reviews_extended.Description: I am so grateful to have stumbled across an ad for Mary Zell Spellman’s office. FINALLY a true San Francisco business that works with honesty and integrity. What a TREAT! If you are tired of dealing with all the bullshit and run-arounds—do yourself a favor and call and ask for CHERYL. She’s 27 years deep in to the game and cannot be played with! She spent HOURS on the phone with me, coaching me and setting me up with the best deals. Whatever it is that you need—a new policy? Advice? A good conversation? CHERYL IS YOUR GIRL! she’s magical. Thank you for your kindness and empathy ❤️❤️

user_reviews_extended.Name: Margarita
user_reviews_extended.Description: Mary and her team are amazing to work with. This time I spoke with Toni and he helped me the documentation I needed and Cheryl was always responsive and informative. I appreciate all the help you’ve extended. Thank you

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tena Hilleren
user_reviews_extended.Description: I can't say enough about what a great experience it is working with State Farm.  Cheryl provides excellent customer service on every encounter. She goes above and beyond to make sure my  insurance needs are met and questions answered. I appreciate  an agent who’s there when I need them.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Corky Henderson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Toni was awesome! She was very responsive and proactive in making sure I am getting the best bang for my buck! She was also very considerate of my busy schedule!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Samanthia Aiken
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Thank you so much, Andrew with State Farm! You have been an incredible help throughout this entire process. I truly appreciate the time you took to explain everything in detail — not just what you were doing, but what it meant for me personally. You broke down the plans step-by-step and made sure I was completely comfortable with each one.
It was clear that you were doing your best to get me the best possible deal, and that level of care did not go unnoticed. Talking with you felt more like chatting with family than a formal insurance call, and for that, I just want to say a heartfelt thank you. Your kindness, patience, and professionalism made all the difference!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Fernando Lisboa
user_reviews_extended.Description: Cheryl was a pleasure to work with. She worked hard to make my inter state move a breeze and was extremely helpful every step of the way. I would highly recommend working with her!

user_reviews_extended.Name: CJ Branca
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been working with Cheryl Rock for decades and can't recommend her and Mary Spellman State Farm Insurance highly enough! She truly embodies exceptional service and professionalism. Cheryl’s hands-on approach makes you feel like you are her top priority, which is incredibly comforting during the stressful time of handling an insurance claim. Cheryl’s attentiveness and genuine concern provides a much-needed sense of relief in challenging situations.  Cheryl’s customer service skills are beyond exceptional and set the bar that no one else can beat.  I would give more stars if I could, as her outstanding service deserves to be recognized!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jay S
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Very Professional and Polished Agency with Great Service and Deep Industry Knowledge:

The team is great and Cheryl Rock truly ROCKS! Very helpful, dilligent and on it. She knows the business and her customers extremely well. I felt she's quicker and more efficient than the all the tech and Ai that others insurance giants use to herd you along...but you truly can't replace personality and experience.

Would recommend to give them a shot.

Thanks!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Grand Prix
user_reviews_extended.Description: Being with Mary Zell Spellman State Farm for over 10 years.  Got home, life and insurance and very happy with the services.  Thank you Cheryl for your expertise.  You ROCK!

user_reviews_extended.Name: amy fong
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Our family has been with State Farm for generations.  We can't imagine working with anyone else. There are situations where you need to jump on the phone and have your call answered within three rings.  Yes, there are agents out there with these types of work standards and yes, it's the norm.

Cheryl Rock is my go to person whenever I have a question with my policies. Having a wise and seasoned professional with 25 years experience to support my main agent is crucial-it's the only way to conduct business. She's efficient, responsive, and fast; all adjectives apply via phone, email, and text-depending on your current needs.

Mary Spellman is a local agent who has a system that works. Her ability to help is dependent on your ability to communicate.  No matter what the situation, her office is able to extrapolate your needs after a brief and effective conversation.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alice Guidry
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Cheryl Rock really rocks!!!
Cheryl truly goes above and beyond in delivering excellent customer service. Her friendly demeanor and extensive knowledge make every interaction a positive experience. She worked diligently to restore our insurance, consistently following up and reassuring us throughout the process. Thanks to her efforts, everything turned out well. If you need assistance with your insurance, I highly recommend reaching out to Cheryl !!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Vincent
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ms. Shyrle Rock was simplest the best agent I ever encountered in decades with State Farm! Courtesy, patience with details, ...give her the highest bonuses if there's system!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Richard Branca
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I am very happy with the service and the attention to detail with the Spellman Agency . I have had the pleasure to have been working with Cheryl Rock for over 25 years . Her response time and availability is second to none and it's been that way for each and every year. Her knowledge of the State Farm product helps me navigate the needs that suite me. It's because of her all my insurance needs are under one roof which makes it very simple.
I have been a client  of  the State Farm Insurance Company  for over 35 years . Thank you Cheryl for making life less complicated. GREAT JOB!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Seth Maslowski
user_reviews_extended.Description: Cheryl Rock was incredibly helpful in my time with State Farm in SF. On numerous occasions over the last few years she’s gone out of her way to assist me and to help save me money - she even was willing to help me maintain my loyalty discounts as I moved to a new state by working directly with my new rep to ensure I got the best deal possible. She is incredibly well versed in the policies and is willing to go above and beyond for her clients.

user_reviews_extended.Name: JAB
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had an abrupt life change that Cheryl Rock handled with incredible empathy and competence. She knew how to handle my insurance change and was patient with me through the process. Most customer service agents in businesses rush through transactions but Cheryl was intuitive and knew to be patient. Thank you Cheryl!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tommy Johnson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Andrew did an outstanding job finding me a better home and auto policy. He helped me increase my coverage while actually lowering my costs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dwayne Reynolds
user_reviews_extended.Description: “I’ve been with State Farm for a few years now and Cheryl’s service has always been outstanding. She has consistently gone above and beyond to make sure my auto insurance needs are met, whether it’s explaining policy updates, helping with claims, or making sure I’m getting the best rates available. It’s rare to find someone so dependable and trustworthy in this industry, and I truly appreciate the peace of mind that comes with having an agent who’s always there when I need them.”

user_reviews_extended.Name: Paterson W
user_reviews_extended.Description: Andrew has helped me for years with my car and condo insurance. Just when I think I understand insurance, the laws change and he always explains things in a way I understand and even helped me with properties in other states. Whenever it’s time to get a new quote I always call Andrew first. I trust him and really appreciate how he always looks out for me without over selling me.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shameran Anderer
user_reviews_extended.Description: Cheryl Rock is my "ROCK"! She is knowledgeable, courteous, professional, and really looks out for her clients' best interests!​ I never feel rushed when I call with any questions. The sense of security of knowing that she knows all about my policies and what I need is very reassuring.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chloe Stafford
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had a great experience with Andrew, he’s extremely helpful and understanding. He was super informative and worked with my circumstances while also making sure we cover all of the bases I wanted to. Awesome people to work with.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joanna Yim
user_reviews_extended.Description: Mary and her team have been very helpful in always getting what I need in terms of insurance. They are friendly, caring, knowledgable, and quick to provide. I highly recommend anyone looking for insurance to check out Mary and her team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: C K
user_reviews_extended.Description: Toni has been very helpful in my transition to State Farm. She is very responsive and professional. Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: C C
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have done business off and on at this location for many years. Each time, I was met with friendly, welcoming employees who made the daunting task of 'car insurance' stress-free and hassle-free. The employees were always professional and knowledgeable, answering all of my questions.  I was taken care of promptly and felt confident walking out the door knowing I had the coverage I needed at a rate I was happy with.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tishia Bouchez
user_reviews_extended.Description:
My husband has been with Statefarm since he was 16 years old and will be turning 62 this year. His prior agent had passed away suddenly and his associate Cheryl who was who we work with most of the time had to find a new place to land and our whole family would be following her where ever she ended up.
Mary Zell Spellman State Farm became her new home. Cheryl is one of those agents who literally goes above and beyond for you , always gets right back to you and walks me through any of my concerns.  She’s our #1 and always will be. Our whole family is so thankful for her!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ginny Pizzardi
user_reviews_extended.Description: Cheryl, who is an office executive, has continued to be helpful with all my insurance needs over the years. She is smart, upbeat and looking out for our interests (yes, even in this culture)!

user_reviews_extended.Name: O.D. Welch
user_reviews_extended.Description:
My family has had the pleasure of knowing Cheryl Rock from State Farm for over three decades, and our experience with her has been nothing short of exceptional.

Over this extended period, Cheryl has consistently exemplified an unwavering commitment to excellence, consistently going above and beyond to ensure that our personal insurance needs are not only met but surpassed.

Cheryl possesses a profound understanding of the evolving complexities of insurance policies, coupled with a rare level of empathy and professionalism. Her ability to address our concerns, provide clear explanations, and proactively offer solutions has transformed every interaction into a positive and reassuring experience.

Beyond her professional competence, Cheryl has actively sought to build a lasting personal relationship with us. Her consistent courtesy, friendliness, and willingness to assist have not only met the highest standards of customer service but have also cultivated a foundation of trust and loyalty over the years.

It is precisely Cheryl's remarkable dedication and personalized service that have kept us loyal to State Farm, following her to whatever agency she dedicates herself to support. We are grateful for the peace of mind she has provided and look forward to continuing our longstanding relationship.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Good Time Warriors fan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Cheryl has been great help understand the things that I need to get done gives me the cheapest and best price with good quality Most importantly, she understands what she’s doing and how to serve you correctly. Just want to say thank you and I appreciate all the things you have done for me.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Linda Barmaper
user_reviews_extended.Description: Our family has been a loyal client of St. Farm for over 40 years.  I'm sure there are competitive rates out there, but the service that we have received in the past and currently cannot be replaced by a less expensive rate.  Cheryl Rock has always made us feel like we were her only client.   She is knowledgable, honest, trustworthy and has always given us great advice.   We have our home and autos insured with St. Farm and will continue to be loyal to them.  Thank you for taking such good care of our insurance needs.  You are truly "Like a Good Neighbor".

user_reviews_extended.Name: Antoni Choudhuri
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Been with Mary and Statefarm since 2016 and they have been very responsive and helpful.

Recently I worked with Toni Serio and it was a seamless exchange to get my new policy setup and running. Really appreciate the help!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lisa Brende
user_reviews_extended.Description: Cheryl Rock from State Farm has been my insurance agent for almost 20 years and is absolutely wonderful to work with.      I will always recommend her to all my friends, family and clients as she’ll give exceptional customer service and attention to all. She’s simply the best!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Wil Von Der Ahe
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Cheryl is my agent for over 30 years!
She has been so wonderful, helpful and anticipates any issues before they appear!
Highly recommend!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gabrielle Kozlowski
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been a customer for ~10 years now and I'm always so pleasantly surprised with how EASY they always make everything.  Everything is handled so quickly and every single person i've chatted with is extremely friendly and helpful.  Cheryl specifically has helped me with a move and adding a new vehicle in the last year alone and both times I got off the phone feeling 100% supported and taken care of.  Five out of five, highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Andrew
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve had the chance to work with Toni in the past year, and it has been a pleasure. She provides ample information, the right level of detail, and most importantly she listens. Great team and great support.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Hannah Wolf
user_reviews_extended.Description: Toni Serio was a huge help when our renewal was significantly delayed in State Farm's central processing system - she responded promptly and cheerfully to our calls/emails, and followed up to ensure that the process was completed!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mary B Flynn
user_reviews_extended.Description: Cheryl has been my go to insurance lady for 4 years now and  we are super happy with everything she does for our insurance needs . Customer service is amazing I highly recommend working with Cheryl

user_reviews_extended.Name: cyrus kouandjio
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had a fantastic experience working with Mary.  She was incredibly knowledgeable and patient, taking the time to explain all the policy details and answer my questions. Mary's professionalism and dedication to finding the right coverage for me were truly impressive. I also appreciated her prompt responses and willingness to go the extra mile to ensure my needs were met. I highly recommend Mary to anyone.  She made the process easy and stress-free. Thank you, Mary, for your exceptional service!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nicole McGrath
user_reviews_extended.Description: They provide great customer service always checking all angles to help you save on your insurance.  Shout out to Cheryl who is incredibly experienced and knowledgeable.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rock Star Marketing Bookkeeping Services Department
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have personally used Mary and her excellent staff for my personal insurance needs, as well as referring her to my clients. I highly recommend her!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kathleen Balch
user_reviews_extended.Description: As a loyal 30 year+ State Farm customer I couldn’t be more impressed by the level of service from this office! My accounts which include 4 cars and a single family home are managed and cared for by Cheryl Rock at Mary Spellman’s office and she’s top notch! I’ve never had an agent be so on top of my coverages and watching out for us in every way as things happen in life! ! Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Vicki Aime
user_reviews_extended.Description: “I’ve worked with a lot of insurance people, and to be honest, I wasn’t expecting much. But Andrew followed through on everything he said he would. He saved me money, got me the right coverage, and didn’t try to oversell me anything. I actually walked away understanding my insurance better, which rarely happens. If you want someone who’s reliable and cares about you. he’s your guy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Susan Meisinger
user_reviews_extended.Description: This office of State Farm has always been accommodating, helpful and very professional.  Cheryl Rock, with whom I have worked for many years, is the ultimate professional and could not possibly be more helpful or diligent.  I would not change insurance companies for anything.  I cannot imagine anyone handling our insurance needs better.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Francisco Esquivel
user_reviews_extended.Description: Spoke with Cheryl Rock to get a policy for a new car and she helped me tremendously. Explained things where it made sense and had quick turnaround time responses. Thank you Cheryl for helping me navigate this portion of my journey. You rock

user_reviews_extended.Name: Aimee Huang
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’m extremely satisfied with my insurance from Mary and her team. It’s reassuring to know that my assets are well-protected with this insurance provider. I highly recommended them for peace of mind and excellent service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Staycee Gordon
user_reviews_extended.Description: Best insurance company and agent, Cheryl Rock. I normally don’t like dealing with insurance companies but they have been amazing. Cheryl is responsive to all my needs and it’s always available if I have a question. If I could give them 10 stars I would.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Allen Harrison
user_reviews_extended.Description: Every interaction with Mary and her team is extraordinary. She is extremely prompt in her responsiveness to our messages or questions. user_reviews_extended.Name: Deidre Von Rock
user_reviews_extended.Description: Mary is an incredible professional and I cannot recommend her highly enough. I have  referred Mary to a number of friends and clients, and she has charmed and supported each and every one of them. user_reviews_extended.Description: Mary and her team are fantastic! I recently needed homeowners insurance quickly and they were fast and responsive. They helped me evaluate the coverage that I needed and got me covered in no time. From beginning to end a smooth and easy experience!

user_reviews.Name: Andy Yang
user_reviews.Description: Incredible service, breadth of offerings and knowledge.   We've been extremely satisfied with DiNicola insurance, our insurance broker for many years now.  They have a wide breadth of offerings, are incredibly responsive and have top notch customer service.  We are a consulting company and have a wide variety of policies that help us not only with risk management but also help us be competitive in the marketplace.  One surprising plus has been in deal situations with prospects who have strict insurance requirements - DiNicola's team has been incredibly responsiveness in deal situations, helping us answer questions and providing insurance certificates in a timely fashion that helps us close deals.   Everyone that we have interfaced with from DiNicola has been wonderful - fast, friendly knowledgeable and delivers incredible value.

title: Deborah McArdle - State Farm Insurance Agent
address: 2444 Lombard St, San Francisco, CA 94123, United States
plus_code: QHX5+Q5 Marina District, San Francisco, CA, USA

owner.name: Deborah McArdle - State Farm Insurance Agent (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Jessica Smith
user_reviews.Description: I can’t say enough great things about Stephanie! She went absolutely above and beyond to help me with everything I needed. From the moment we connected, she was incredibly knowledgeable, patient, and thorough—making sure I fully understood all of my options. She took the time to answer every question and didn’t stop until I had all the information I needed to feel confident in my choices. Her professionalism and dedication truly set her apart. If you’re looking for top-notch service and someone who genuinely cares, ask for Stephanie—you won’t be disappointed!

user_reviews.Name: Emily Huang
user_reviews.Description: Deborah and her team are very knowledgeable and supportive. They have been our insurance agent since 2017 and were recommended to us by our previous insurance agent who retired. I am very satisfied with our insurance policies and coverage. Christian Bowers is quick and responsive. This is a company of caring people. I highly recommend them!

user_reviews.Name: Madeleine Thibault
user_reviews.Description: I recently established my State Farm insurance policy with Deborah McArdle's office in San Francisco from a previous State Farm agent based in the East Bay and it has been nothing but incredible. Christian Bowers has been my main point of contact and he has been SO helpful and answered all my questions. He's super knowledgeable about car insurance and gave me great recommendations. When I was looking to find a new insurance agent local to San Francisco I read the reviews for Deborah's office and they were super positive which was the deciding factor for me. I would highly recommend getting your insurance needs through her office. Thank you again for all your help, Christian, you're the best!

user_reviews.Name: Property Manager
user_reviews.Description: After decades of dealing with insurance agents, I can say Christian Bowers is the most responsive and helpful agent I have ever used.  He typically answers inquiries within hours with highly professional and detailed responses.  He takes care of problems very quickly.  I always feel like he is trying to get the coverage that best suits my needs and suggests adjustments when the price/coverage seems too high.   Overall him and Deborah Mccardle are excellent in explaining coverages so we can make the right decisions.  For them, servicing clients truly seems like their #1 goal.

user_reviews.Name: Meighan Leibert
user_reviews.Description: We've been working with Deborah McArdle State Farm for several decades. When it comes to insurance, we love agents who are detail oriented, available and eager. This is our experience with Christian Bowers. He responds to our emails and phone calls immediately. In today's world this is an exceptional quality. We highly recommend this company to meet your insurance needs!

user_reviews.Name: Sam Rabinowitz
user_reviews.Description: Working with Christian Bowers at Deborah Macardle’s office is absolutely fantastic.  Christian is extremely helpful, knowledgeable, and thoughtful.  He has helped me through claims, new policies, and existing policies - and has even helped me save in doing so!   Thank you to the entire Macardle team, especially Christian!

user_reviews.Name: Chris B
user_reviews.Description: We live in Los Angeles and were in need of a comprehensive review of our numerous insurance policies. We are thrilled to have connected with Christian Bowers at the Deborah McArdle State Farm office in SF. He took the time to understand our needs, identify gaps, and provide thoughtful solutions.  His follow up and attention to detail were excellent.  We feel much more comfortable knowing we are adequately covered and someone is looking out for our best interests.

user_reviews.Name: Jim Milligan
user_reviews.Description: Deborah and Christian were fantastic to work with. They each were very personable, responsive and helpful. Christian also went out of his way to identify additional multi-line savings we were entitled to receive. First class service!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dawn Wilkes
user_reviews_extended.Description: Stephanie was a pleasure. Very helpful and efficient . She will listen and work for you. Thank you for all the hard work.  Very appreciative. Rates may have gone up but the service is worth it!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Peter Rizko
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have multiple policies through Deborah’s office and am always impressed with their level of detail and knowledge. I’ve worked with Christian many times to update my policies. He always takes the time to help me understand my coverages and find the right policy for me.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lew Brown
user_reviews_extended.Description: My family has been working with Christian Bowers for all our insurance needs and we are absolutely thankful for that.  He is extremely helpful, patient and always follows through. He is an asset to the whole team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alex Humphrey
user_reviews_extended.Description: Mrs. Beasley went above and beyond to help and assist me with an insurance quote. She provided additional information to meet my budget for car insurance as well. Definitely would recommend her.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Elle Celinski
user_reviews_extended.Description: Debbie is outstanding. She is not only incredibly knowledgeable about every type of insurance, she works tirelessly to make sure you are getting the best pricing and safest policy for your family and needs. She goes above and beyond and is a pleasure working with. No hard selling, just pure genuine care and support. I would recommend her to anyone looking for a reliable, smart agent who provides the best support. Elle

user_reviews_extended.Name: Paulina Cox
user_reviews_extended.Description: Hello I have dealt with State Farm Insurance for a while now and bought our renters insurance through Zach and and our Life Insurance through Christian.   I have found both guys extremely helpful, friendly and knowledgeable.  It is really great to have them nearby with great customer service with  reasonable and competitive prices too a double bonus!  Cheers guys!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Corrina
user_reviews_extended.Description: I am so happy with Zach and State Farm. They saved me a ton of money. I was adding a new teenaged driver and my current insurance was not offering to do anything but take my money.  I shopped around and State Farm was the best for me. Thank you for making this easy. Zach was friendly, patient, knowledgeable and professional. I am very happy with my decision. If this was a commercial Zach would be getting a few cheesecakes for the Corrina Rate. Thanks for the great service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alan Wong
user_reviews_extended.Description: For our homeowner policies, Stephanie Beasley helped us to secure discounts for having active monitoring home security systems.  She handled the process efficiently and obtained a refund for us from State Farm.  Thank you, Stephanie!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gigi Harrell
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I would like to thank Deborah for her generous advice.  We are not currently customers, but I was referred to Deborah by a friend.
I had several questions about our current homeowner's policy and Deborah took a great deal of time to not only answer my questions but provide sound advice.  She gave me 5-star service as a courtesy.  I can only imagine how great her service is for customers!!!  Thank you, Deborah.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alma E
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jessica has been great to work with.  I was able to get life insurance from her and she set myself and kids up for our future. She was also fun to work with and made things very easy! Highly recommend this office!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Louise Bea
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have recently contacted Deborah for insurance needs, and I absolutely could not be happier.  I have had other agents in the past, but none with the dedication and understanding of Deborah.  Deborah, along with her team, are simply the best.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Paolo Bicchieri
user_reviews_extended.Description: Christian Bowers helped me out in a serious pinch! He is effective, quick, kind, and thoughtful. I recommend him, and the whole team, for any of your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jessica Posey
user_reviews_extended.Description: Stephanie is a gem! She diligently got to the bottom of a billing issue, navigating multiple internal departments.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Loti Bowman
user_reviews_extended.Description: This is a fun office. Debbie and her staff are all great to work with. I no longer call for Jake from State Farm, I call for Zach from State Farm! Thanks Zach and Debbie and team for all you do!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael Guina
user_reviews_extended.Description: Christian was helpful and patient with all my questions and was able to give me several coverage options to choose from. He was responsive to all my emails and followed up with the information promised. I appreciate all his help.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Danny Higa
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very positive experience. Christian was very organized and helped me get the most out of my renters and life insurance policies.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nico Taylor
user_reviews_extended.Description: I started out with just my renters insurance policy and now have everything including life insurance for myself and my fiancé with Christian and his office. Couldn't recommend them higher to anyone who asks.

user_reviews_extended.Name: zhao jie
user_reviews_extended.Description: I live in Fillmore center and it is really close. Deborah is very friendly and explained the details about the policy, she is very professional! By the way, they also have good student discount!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brianán Kiernan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very positive experience working with Christian to get my auto insurance in place. Responsive and easy to work with. Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nick Kuroczko
user_reviews_extended.Description: Christian was very helpful, patient, and knowledgable in working with us on our State Farm policies. We appreciate it!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joan Vivaldo
user_reviews_extended.Description: Stephanie has been very helpful over the years.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mariah Baracamontes
user_reviews_extended.Description: Christian and this office have been amazing since day one! Always so helpful!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ronnie Pfeffer
user_reviews_extended.Description: Whenever I call with an issue I get a quick and accurate response.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mateo Fabbri
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great service from great people.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Taylor Jones
user_reviews_extended.Description: Super great to work with!

title: Kristopher McArdle - State Farm Insurance Agent
address: 2446 Lombard St, San Francisco, CA 94123, United States
plus_code: QHX5+P7 Marina District, San Francisco, CA, USA

owner.name: Kristopher McArdle - State Farm Insurance Agent (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: James Salvante
user_reviews.Description: I’ve been with State Farm for years, and the only reason I stayed with this office is because Charlotte Johnson moved here. She’s the kind of agent you don’t want to lose—knowledgeable, reliable, and always bringing the best attitude to every interaction. Charlotte takes the time to explain everything clearly, makes sure I feel confident in my coverage, and consistently goes above and beyond. She’s truly a great person and an outstanding agent. I couldn’t ask for better support, and I highly recommend her to anyone looking for an insurance agent who genuinely cares.

user_reviews.Name: Greg Ogarrio
user_reviews.Description: What impresses me about this firm is their quick and knowledgeable responses to insurance queries, even detailed financial ones: our coverage, our premiums, why costs may be going up and what we can do to bring them down. That relieves a lot of uncertainty and unnecessary stress over such matters. Agent Charlotte Johnson, in particular in this office, deserves kudos for having a "can-do" attitude and disposition when explaining auto and homeowners insurance policies. Hence, a 5-star review, happily given.

user_reviews.Name: Sarah Singleton
user_reviews.Description: We've worked with Kristopher and his team for several years and the service has always been excellent. They are consistently responsive, attentive, and committed to securing the best solutions tailored to their clients' unique needs.

user_reviews.Name: Martin Yee
user_reviews.Description:
Their agents are very helpful in person or over the phone.
They helped me acquire an auto plan that fits my needs and at an affordable cost.
State Farm claims are also very smooth and no hassle.
Highly recommended!

user_reviews.Name: Heidi Oelman
user_reviews.Description: Charlotte Johnson reached out to let me know that my family might qualify for a good student discount. She assisted me in getting the discount which is greatly appreciated! She made it easy and I appreciated working with her on it.

user_reviews.Name: Johnny Guan
user_reviews.Description:
Kris and his team are very responsible and helpful! I've had the pleasure to work with both Tengis and Charlotte over the past couple years and they're always proactive in both helping you save and making sure you get the right coverage for your needs.

Don't hesitate to reach out for your insurance needs! Highly recommend!

user_reviews.Name: Matthias de Graaf

user_reviews_extended.Description:

user_reviews_extended.Description: Super-competent, empathetic and responsive, Charlotte May at Kris McArdle's State Farm office has been a revelation.  We feel fortunate to have met her.

user_reviews_extended.Name: elleek
user_reviews_extended.Description: Charlotte Johnson, who now works in this office, makes all the difference in the world. She is always at the ready to get you the information you need and want  and help you in any way she can.  She also has become a dear friend.  I highly recommend the office.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Martin Cobarrubiss

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nakaylor Robertson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Stephanie Beasley is top tier ! Excellent customer service and personable! She assisted me with all my questions, concerns, and needs! The best insurance agent I have had hands down!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lawrence Tang
user_reviews_extended.Description: I mainly have worked with Tengis and Kyle from Kris’s office. They are helpful and responsive in helping to answer my questions and identify the appropriate coverages. I also more recently worked with Bethany who was tremendous help in answering my many questions and helping me update my coverages.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Calvin Lau
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Kyle at this State Farm office very efficiently and quickly took care of a clerical error on our homeowner’s policy.    The clerical error was just that but you don’t want these things to perpetuate.   He also reviewed our policy and made some great recommendations.
We definitely agreed with him and had no issues with the slight premium increase.    You feel like this office has your best interests in mind.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Claudio Mariotta
user_reviews_extended.Description:
The only reason I am still  with State Farm is because of the excellent service I get from Charlotte Johnson.

Claudio Mariotta

user_reviews_extended.Name: Hector
user_reviews_extended.Description: Charlotte was helpful, informative, and professional with all my insurance questions and concerns. I was very pleased with my experience. Cheers!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Karen Kass
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kris and his office are amazing to work with. I especially liked working with his office manager, Jessica McArdle. She was friendly, knowledgeable and easy to work with. She was very helpful explaining life insurance plans and figuring out what worked best for our family.  They have always been responsive and there when I needed them. I highly recommend Kris and his office!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Amanda McCormick
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jessica was confidently able to explain complex policy options in a way that was clear and simple for me to understand. She was prompt and made some excellent suggestions based on my needs. Her knowledge base was outstanding - she answered all of my questions and concerns, and I felt completely taken care of. Highly recommend working with this fabulous team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stephanie Ting
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jessica is awesome and both her and Kristopher make a great team! They’re responsive and helpful and will always take the time to help you understand your policy and get you the best coverage. All of my vehicle and home policies are through State Farm and I couldn’t be happier with their services. I’d give ten stars if I could.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Carlos Estrada
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jessica was super informative and took care of me in all my insurance needs! She addressed some concerns that my wife and I had with our insurance policies. She made great suggestions and made the whole move to State Farm very simple. At the end of our appointment she brought the agent Kristopher on the line and gave us their family story which really related to us. Highly recommend giving this office a call!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chinsanaa Batbayar
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tengis Bayaraa was a truly friendly and supportive guy. He assisted me with both my auto and life insurance. I had to get insurance quickly because I had an important business downtown. He communicated effectively, swiftly, and receptively at all times. Life made simpler thanks to this guy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Penalope Hsu-Prapuolenis
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tengis Bayarraa, Account Manager with Kristopher McArdle's State Farm office, has become my go-to choice for our insurance coverage questions and concerns, which is saying a lot since a number of his co-workers, particularly Jessica and Kyle, have excellent client support skills as well.  Over the years, Tengis has proven himself to be well versed in even the most minor technical aspects of State Farm's various insurance products.  The promptness with which Tengis responds to phone calls and emails, as well as the efficiency with which he has always resolved any concerns raised, has been consistently first-rate.  His help with and successful followup support for a recent very confusing claim related to our daughter's car, was invaluable.  In my experience as a client who has worked with different State Farm offices over the years, Tengis is the first Account Manager whose reliability, support, customer service, and communication skills have been remarkable enough to warrant my writing a review like this.  Simply put, Tengis is a consummate professional and a pleasure to work with.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Helen Toy
user_reviews_extended.Description: After my former agent passed away, i wanted to still work with Charlotte, a beloved member of Thierry's team - so requested to have my policies moved to her new agents office. Charlotte is stellar!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Abrhim Ali
user_reviews_extended.Description: I been with them more then 10 years there awesome especially Charlotte Johnson

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jabrina Meeks
user_reviews_extended.Description: I would just love to say, I’ve been working with Stephanie Beasley to get everything set for my son and she has been amazing! She is patience, kind, good listener and really gets the job done. I appreciate her dedication to her client's! Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dale Parks
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Since Mr McArdle and his team took over my State Farm Insurance Office roughly 4 to 5 years ago (a guesstimate) I realized he arrived with the highest of credentials, including far more in the esteemed financial world having held quite significant career positions. Why?Because no matter where I have lived from San Francisco to the Bay Area outer suburbs I have stayed loyal to this one particular office for about 40 years. Immediately I began to learn exactly how the insurance office should really be managed impeccably and run with outstanding excellence. He and is entire team have, one, provided services across the board, my first experience that Agent McArdle demonstrated precisely how the office should be run correctly. Two, he and the entire office team broadened services available, offered time to review my policy to make sure I had adequate coverage which had never been done before. Three, everyone is to be thanked, commended and know your outstanding level of excellence providing such caring customer service is beyond reproach. I thank you all and Mr McArdle, Agent for everything.
Warmest Regards. - Dale

user_reviews_extended.Name: Delgerzaya Namjil
user_reviews_extended.Description: I got great customer service from Tengis! He helped me get the best rates on my auto insurance. He was very fast, reliable and patient! Also thankful for Tushge too! He was nice and kind! I recommend this location to anyone who needs fast and genuine service. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been with Kris and his team for many years, they are very helpful and are happy to provide you with the best support. And I just talked to Tengis, he is very kind and helped me out with my concerns. Highly recommend them.

Jessica, who also works in the office, was at the presentation as well and she is very knowledgable and they make a great team!  They will go above and beyond for you and your family - I highly recommend them for any and all of your insurance (and beyond) needs!

I always feel that they have my family's best interest at heart and don't look at us as just a number. They check in, answer all of our questions, and are genuine. Anytime we call the office the staff is always so pleasant. We could not be happier with our decision and highly recommend putting your trust in Kris and Jessica!

I would recommend this agency to anyone feeling overwhelmed with insurance decisions, Carlos immediately put me at ease and I am happy I went to them.
