title: King & King Insurance Solutions
address: 1956 Lombard St, San Francisco, CA 94123, United States
plus_code: RH28+5F Marina District, San Francisco, CA, USA

user_reviews.Name: George King
user_reviews.Description: I always hesitate to consider changing insurance coverages, but when Gary King showed our family how to increase coverages and save money I willingly came on board.  He did all the work necessary to make the transition easy, and I have recommended him to friends who have had the same experience as I did and have been grateful for his help in saving them money and time.  I recommend his agency without hesitation and encourage you to make the call.  Gary's interest in his clients will be obvious from the first moment you speak with him.

user_reviews.Name: D C.
user_reviews.Description: Gary King deserves 5 stars. He helps me and gives his opinion how to hand the claims of my car accident during the hard time losing my car. I have insurance agents through my life. Gary is the best insurance agent. He is extremely experienced and  has been very helpful.

user_reviews.Name: Bantha 34
user_reviews.Description: When I switched my insurance over to Gary King at King & King, he found me better coverage and I saved $2200/year on my family home/auto coverage. Since then, I've been recommending Gary to family & friends. More often than not, he finds them equal or better coverage for significantly less, but when he can't deliver a better or equal product for less, he honestly tells them. He's earned my recommendation!

user_reviews.Name: Jeanne Ballard
user_reviews.Description: I highly recommend King and King Insurance Solutions. Gary King is wonderful! He is experienced, knowledgeable, professional and personable. He came to our home and reviewed our current policies, and thoroughly explained all details. We saved hundreds by moving our insurance to King and King: both auto and home insurance! A really good experience!

user_reviews.Name: Marilyn Astore
user_reviews.Description: Gary King has provided my husband and me with outstanding service!  He has saved us several hundred dollars a year on both our homeowners' and our automobile insurance policies.  He is very knowledgeable, thorough and conscientious.  I would therefore recommend him without reservation.

user_reviews.Name: Marilee Irwin
user_reviews.Description: Gary King is a true professional in his field of insurance with a high level of commitment, integrity and knowledge.  Immediately after my car accident, he minimized my stress and patiently guided me with the pertinent information required to begin the claim process.  EXCELLENT client service!

user_reviews.Description: I can't stand talking about insurance but Gary King at King &King Insurance Solutions made the process easy and understandable!  If you buy insurance (and who doesn't?) you ought to chat with Gary and find out if he can save you some money in the process.

title: Walter Li - State Farm Insurance Agent
address: 4428 California St suite a, San Francisco, CA 94118, United States
plus_code: RH2F+QR Marina District, San Francisco, CA, USA

owner.name: Walter Li - State Farm Insurance Agent (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Eric Y
user_reviews.Description:
I wanted to give a big shout out and thank you to Walter Li and his buddy Edward. I made a stop on highway 1 to check out the scenery and then I made an idiot move and locked my phone and my car key inside my car. With no ways to reach out to get help through digital means I had to flag down random drivers down for help.

Walter and his buddy Edward stopped by to help right away and I was extremely lucky that they did. The sun was setting and it was getting very cold and dark so I was in a very concerning situation.

Walter and Edward are very well versed in car work. They made a stop to pick up some tools and went back to work on my car. They were working on my car for 2 hours in the cold and they were able to get me back in my car!

At this day and age, stopping by to help a stranger is not as common of an occurrence any more. Who knows how long I would have been waiting for help if they didnt stop by? I REALLY appreciated their help, they definitely saved my butt that day. They are both modern day heroes. Thank you both!

user_reviews.Name: Devon Perry
user_reviews.Description: Walter & Karen were very attentive to our needs and always friendly

user_reviews.Name: monica paz
user_reviews.Description: Very professional and courteous

user_reviews.Name: Rachel Williams
user_reviews.Description: scam

user_reviews.Name: Veronica Ligne
user_reviews.Description: Clarence and Alex have been so wonderful and professional while we were clients of theirs. They exceeded our expectations of compassion and sympathy as we maneuvered through our insurance situation. I would definitely recommend their team/services. Thank you so much!

user_reviews.Name: Alma F Sandejas-Agtane
user_reviews.Description: Speechless been working with him since 1996 no complaint. I am pleased to refer him to all my clients and to hear positive remarks for them assured me that I did the right thing.  I can contact him no matter where I am to deal with my sudden issue and goes for my client and he has always prevail. I have no regrets having him as my agent.

user_reviews.Name: LINDA ARENAS
user_reviews.Description: Clarence Castillo has been my insurance agent with Farmers for almost 20 years. I have several homes and auto insurance policies with him. He is always helpful thorough and gives me his expert advice to make sure I am properly insured and advises me on how to save money. I have recommended him to my family and friends.

user_reviews.Name: Danilo Trance
user_reviews.Description: Nice place to insure car & homes; they have very knowledgeable staffs to answer questions & reasonable rates for quote coverage.

user_reviews.Name: Andrea Wotan
user_reviews.Description: I have worked with Clarence Castillo for more than 25 years! He and his team have been fantastic. They have been right at my side every time I have needed them (an auto accident, auto repair, questions about my policies, etc.) and have handled everything with professionalism and efficiency. Every single time I have ever called Clarence's office, the team member who answered the phone immediately knew who I was and had my policies up and ready to answer questions. I have always felt more like a member of Clarence's family than simply a customer. I recommend Clarence to anyone looking for a fantastic insurance agent. You will be in capable and caring hands.

user_reviews.Name: LeLe Cee
user_reviews.Description: My experience with AutoNation Acura was wonderful.  From my first contact with Roberto, who placed me in the very competent hands of the salesperson, Catherine, the customer service was stellar.  I was very specific about my monthly & down payment limits and not once did they make me feel like my requirements were unreasonable.  In fact, it was quite the opposite, The GM, Mike, and the FM, Kyle worked very hard and not only provided the terms I wanted but also helped get the upgrades on my wish list that i thought would exceed my budget. Though I've been a loyal Honda customer for 10 years, I never thought an Acura could fit my budget but they made it happen.  Thank you AutoNation Acura in Sanford, FL, you are simply the BEST!

user_reviews.Name: Michael Glenn
user_reviews.Description: I just bought a new F150 from Sheehy Ford and they referred me to Michael with AutoComplete for my insurance.  Michael was great start to finish and answered all my questions.  In the end, I cancelled my current home/auto and umbrella policy and switched to AutoComplete. They saved me over $1200 per year and the process was smooth.  Couldn't be happier.

user_reviews.Name: Alissa Camacho
user_reviews.Description: I purchased a new vehicle at Concord Honda, and it was the easiest transaction ever! Autocomplete also helped me get the best rate for my new vehicle to make sure I was covered without having to break the bank. 10/10 experience.

user_reviews.Description: The whole process was great! From purchasing my new car through Massey Cadillac Dealer to obtaining an affordable insurance with Mercury Insurance.

user_reviews.Description: Excellent experience getting my auto insurance policy set up. The process was fast, straightforward, and very professional. I was able to secure coverage within an hour, and the representative made everything simple to understand. Highly recommend their service.

user_reviews.Description: I bought a 2018 Hyundai Santa Fe sport on Thursday 102/25. Andre was my salesperson. The vehicles and the team at Gettle Hyundai in Lakewood Ranch are stellar. I will definitely continue doing business with them. I already have my next vehicle picked out and I will be back in a few years from now. Thank you Gentle Hyundai and Thank you to Auto Complete for finding me the best Insurance rate and outstanding customer service

user_reviews.Name: John Taylor

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tony Borhani
user_reviews_extended.Description: I don’t really leave reviews. However, I think this is worthy of doing one. I purchased a car from AutoNation Subaru in Carlsbad. Which in itself was an amazing experience. I’m 58 years old. I have purchased more than a dozen cars in my lifetime. And The Gentleman Matt, who was my sales person just absolutely out of this world. No nonsense, no hours of waiting, just a great experience from a genuine salesman (a rarity) and an amazing car at a price we couldn’t believe. As I began looking for an insurance company. GEICO (which I had for the past 6 years) quoted me a very high price for adding this Maxima to my portfolio of vehicles. I began searching online and by accident I opened a email that was sent to me by an unknown source which I mistakingly thought was Hartford from AARP. Long story short; I needed up speaking to a live agent in matter of 2 minutes (I had tryed getting an agent in the phone from GEICO for 57 minutes holding prior to this call) a young man named Nick very pleasant and straight to the point professional as they come. I have no patience for BS.. he got me 14 quotes of which the third one he offered I took $110 dollars a month less than the other company and I went for it. He accommodated me with payments as I wanted to use a car and a bank account fur the remaining balance. It was just a pleasure to do this. Such pleasure that I write this essay on the best insurance sales experience I had. My brother was in the vehicle and listened to the whole experience and before Nick hung up, he asked Nick to send him Nick’s info because he wants to explore switching his two vehicles.

user_reviews_extended.Name: De'Shawn
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I recently purchased my vehicle from EchoPark Automotive, and I couldn’t be happier with the entire experience! From start to finish, everything exceeded my expectations.

Coco was absolutely incredible — professional, knowledgeable, and welcoming from the moment I walked in. His hospitality truly made me and my family feel valued as customers, and he went above and beyond to ensure the buying process was smooth and enjoyable.

EchoPark Automotive also impressed me with their wide selection of high-quality vehicles. Every car I looked at was clean, well-maintained, and competitively priced. The entire staff was friendly, attentive, and genuinely interested in helping me find the perfect fit for my needs.

What really stood out was how seamlessly EchoPark worked with their third-party partners at Auto Complete Inc. They connected me with Andrew, who helped me save over $300 on my insurance — something I truly didn’t expect but greatly appreciated!

Overall, this was one of the best car-buying experiences I’ve ever had. I’m extremely grateful for Coco, Dre, and Andrew, and of course! the entire EchoPark team for making it such a positive, stress-free, and memorable experience. I highly recommend EchoPark Automotive and Auto Conplete Inc. to anyone looking for great cars, great service, and great people!

My experience at Howdy Honda was nothing short of exceptional, thanks to the outstanding team of salesman Will Moss, FNI manager, and sales manager Curtis Matt Cole. Purchasing my 2026 Honda Passport Elite was a breeze, as they went above and beyond to ensure the process was smooth, quick, and fair. Will’s genuine enthusiasm and knowledge made selecting the perfect vehicle effortless, while Curtis and the FNI manager worked seamlessly to finalize everything with transparency and care. Their professionalism and dedication to customer satisfaction turned what could have been a stressful process into an enjoyable one, leaving me confident in my purchase and thrilled with my new Passport.

I was particularly impressed with the Auto Complete insurance services, which saved me well over $1,000 annually through their auto-complete option—a game-changer I hadn’t expected. The entire team at Howdy Honda demonstrated a level of commitment and personalized attention that is rare to find. I wholeheartedly recommend Howdy Honda to anyone in the market for a new vehicle; ask for Will Moss and Curtis Matt Cole, and you’ll be in great hands. Their exceptional service and unbeatable deals make them the go-to dealership for a stress-free and rewarding car-buying experience!

user_reviews_extended.Description:
A++++
Top-Tier Service and Major Savings — Thank You AutoComplete & BMW of Nashville!

We recently bought a 2025 BMW X7 from Diego at BMW of Nashville, and from start to finish, the experience was exceptional. As part of the process, they introduced us to Clarissa at AutoComplete, and I genuinely can’t believe how easy they made everything.

Not only did Clarissa help us save thousands on our insurance, she also went the extra mile and even helped facilitate the phone call to cancel our existing USAA policy. It was seamless, fast, and completely stress-free—exactly what you'd hope for when you're making a major purchase.

The partnership between BMW of Nashville and AutoComplete made the entire buying and transition process feel personalized and high-end. Between the premium vehicle, the outstanding customer service, and the unexpected financial savings, we couldn’t be happier.

If you’re buying a car and want real, hands-on support that actually saves you money and time, BMW of Nashville and AutoComplete are the dream team.

– Gary A

user_reviews_extended.Description:
5-Star Review for Tamboura and Progressive Insurance on My New Cadillac Lyriq

I recently had the pleasure of working with Tamboura while setting up my insurance policy for my brand-new Cadillac Lyriq through Progressive Insurance, and I couldn’t be happier with the experience! From the very beginning, Tamboura demonstrated exceptional professionalism, knowledge, and patience. They took the time to walk me through all my coverage options, ensuring I understood each detail and felt confident in my choices. Tamboura’s attention to detail and commitment to customer satisfaction truly set them apart.
What impressed me most was how seamless and stress-free the entire process was. Getting insurance for a luxury electric vehicle like the Cadillac Lyriq can sometimes feel overwhelming, but Tamboura made it feel effortless.
If you’re looking for someone who combines expertise, efficiency, and genuine care for their customers, Tamboura is the one to trust. Thank you for making this experience so smooth—I’m now driving my Lyriq with peace of mind, knowing I’m well-covered with Progressive Insurance.
Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: M J
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Do NOT, under any circumstances, sign up for Autocomplete Insurance when buying a car at a dealership.

The entire process feels like a scam. They don’t listen to your needs and instead push the bare minimum coverage, making it sound like you’re saving money — you’re not. Once you’re signed up, you’re essentially stuck, and none of the major insurance companies involved will communicate with you directly anymore.

Every time you try to get help, your call is routed back to Autocomplete. Their representatives can’t answer basic questions or resolve issues. Instead, they put you on hold to set up a three-way call with the actual insurance company — which, by that point, shows little interest in helping. Expect to spend 1–3 hours on the phone with zero resolution.

Meanwhile, the dealership gets a commission for signing you up, and you’re left dealing with poor service, confusion, and unnecessary stress.

Save yourself the headache — stay far away. Call your precious insurance company while at the dealer and get your new car insured.

user_reviews.Name: Anil Yildirim
user_reviews.Description: I was trying to get insurance in California on my own, but I couldn’t figure it all out. Then I reached out to Javier. He was incredibly helpful, went over every detail step by step, and made sure I understood everything. He also got me a great deal with insurance . It’s a fantastic place to get insured, and I’ll definitely leave him a positive review on Google Maps. Highly recommended!!!

user_reviews.Name: Shelly Estrada
user_reviews.Description: Tim was very prompt at getting back to me, within 10 minutes.   He accommodated my work schedule and set up a phone appointment.  He was able to help me with my concerns in a very efficient manner.  I was completely happy with the outcome and would highly recommend  his services.

user_reviews.Name: Patti Scott
user_reviews.Description:
Tim has helped me renew my Covered Calif for the past 5 years. With his help, it's so easy to get the correct information entered with just a phone call.
Before when I tried doing it on my own and talking to someone at Covered CA - there were always mistakes. He is very professional and SUPER nice and knows his stuff. All my friends I refer to him report the same experience. I feel super fortunate to have found him.

user_reviews.Name: Shannon Latta
user_reviews.Description: I worked with Tim to find the right Covered California plan for me and my family. I am a freelance consultant and he helped me map out my scenario, review and compare plan options for my specific needs and preferred doctors. He spent time with me over 2-3 calls to help me select exactly the right plan for my unique situation and took care of all of the application and set up. I was so pleased with his service and support. I will definitely work with Tim and his team again for my upcoming renewal. I trust that he will be informed about new rules and options and that he’ll help me find the most affordable plan for the coverage I want.

user_reviews.Name: Owen Arnoff
user_reviews.Description: I don't often give a five star rating for anyone, but in this case, I'll make an exception: Tim Proctor. He is my go-to person for all things related to individual health insurance. I am a tax advisor and preparer and recommend Tim to all of my clients who have health insurance needs or are confused by the insurance requirements of Covered California (aka ObamaCare). He treats all of them with courtesy and professionalism and every single one of the clients I have referred to Tim come away with an excellent experience and are well positioned to acquire the best and most appropriate choice. I highly recommend Tim Proctor for all your health insurance needs.

user_reviews.Name: Bianca Toledo
user_reviews.Description: I had a great experience with Tim. Today he helped me with some important health insurance questions I really needed support with. He was patient, professional, and explained everything clearly. I truly appreciate his help and highly recommend him to anyone looking for a knowledgeable and reliable insurance agent.

user_reviews.Name: Isaac Farris
user_reviews.Description: Tim Proctor has been amazing, and helped my wife and I out at a time when we needed help most. I was about to give up on the whole health insurance thing, but thankfully we met Tim and he helped us get on a plan that fit our budget, and im so thankful he did this, because about a week after getting on our plan, i got really sick and had to make several visits the urgent care and eventually to the ER, and since we had a great plan, it covered most of my expenses, (It would have been impossible without the plan Tim helped us to get) Tim is very kind, and listens to your needs and wants. I recommend him 10 out of 10 from my wife and I.

user_reviews.Name: Michelle Harris
user_reviews.Description: First I will say, I cherish good customer service. With that said, I called my state farm agent concerning my bill, as it had increased and I could not understand why. I spoke with Esther who took her time and provided a reasonable explanation for the increase.  Prior to calling, I was considering other insurance need options. Needless to say, with Esther's professional knowledge and expertise, I've decided to stay with SF. Shout out to Esther for the great customer service.

user_reviews.Name: Diana Soto
user_reviews.Description: Needed some specific changes made to my policy and Bev was super helpful. She took time to research and give answers to my needs. Pleasant experience and great customer service! Thank you so much!

user_reviews.Name: Jacob Wilson
user_reviews.Description: I've never had a bad experience here with getting insurance and asking questions to compare pricing. Esther has been a huge help with changing my plan when needed and always has the answers to my question. I definitely recommend this business.

user_reviews.Name: Patrick Sykes
user_reviews.Description: The customer service and helpfulness is great at this State Farm agency.  Esther had a sense of urgency to help me the same day with something I needed.  It was much appreciated.  I would recommend the Debra O'Farrell State Farm agency to anyone.

user_reviews.Name: Christine Chatwell
user_reviews.Description: I have insurance policies with Statefarm for both my residence and my rental property.  Since I have trouble keeping track of the due dates and amounts due for each policy, I call Beverly Colton frequently to inquire about this and ask her to pay online for me. Beverly always makes herself available and is helpful and friendly.  My properties have been insured with Statefarm for over 30 years and I’ve so much appreciated the knowledge and professionalism of all the employees.

user_reviews.Name: florence babbitt
user_reviews.Description: I have been with State Farm for over 20 years.  I have stayed with them through the ups and downs of the Insurance industry and rate increases because of the incredible people who have been by my side and on my side for all these years.  Debra O'Farrell and her team Bev Colton and others are always responsive, helpful and knowledgeable about the many different type of accounts I have with them.  They respond quickly with answers to my questions or rate requests and have walked me through some rather difficult processes.  I have great respect for Debra and how she handles any and all situations.  Grateful!!!

user_reviews.Name: K H
user_reviews.Description: Excellent, excellent service. I had been thinking about obtaining life insurance for years, and kept procrastinating. I finally reached out to Debra, who impressed me with not only her knowledge, but her compassion, and patience. She took the time to review my situation and assess my needs to recommend the insurance that would fit me and my family's needs best. The process (phone call assessment and physical) was professional and very efficient. I would have done this years ago if I knew it was such a smooth process. Debra held my hand through everything, which I am so appreciative of. I highly recommend Debra O'Farrell for anyone's insurance needs and am more than satisfied!

user_reviews.Name: Sheng Moua
user_reviews.Description:
Debra O'Farrell and her team are simply amazing. We have a few policies with her and she and her staff have done a fantastic job at managing our account while incorporating changes whenever we requested them.

They are always patient and have been an anchor during stressful times. They have been there when my husband and I got our first apartment, when we married, bought a new car and when we moved. All which required updating/adding policies!

Please don't hesitate to work with Debra O'Farrell. You are in trusted hands!

user_reviews_extended.Name: SJ Geisse
user_reviews_extended.Description: Debra O'Farrell has been my stellar State Farm insurance agent for many years. She and her staff have always attended to my family's needs promptly, thoughtfully and effectively. Most recently, Debra worked tirelessly over many weeks, leveraging her strong professional relationships with her State Farm colleagues, to save us $1000 in premiums, implementing the full range of premium discounts to which my husband and I are entitled.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rob Goren
user_reviews_extended.Description: I am so happy with the outstanding service from Bev Colton, who is knowledgeable, responsive and helpful. She helped me get the best rate on our homeowners insurance. She was able to get us an additional discount by moving our auto insurance to State Farm as well. I was very impressed by Bev’s strong communication, fast follow up and proactive recommendations. I highly recommend working with this office for exceptional service and the best insurance rates.

user_reviews_extended.Name: susan rasmussen
user_reviews_extended.Description: Esther Limon from State Farm was extremely helpful. She provided great advice and valuable information as I was settling the estate for my mom. Esther was patient and always kept me informed! Thank you Esther!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kip Steinberg
user_reviews_extended.Description: I rarely write reviews, but when a business provides such superior service it should be known.  Debra O'Farrell and her team are not only professional but they go beyond the extra mile to make sure everything is done right whether it is writing insurance, answering questions, or processing a claim.  It is a pleasure to recommend Debra O'Farrell State Farm Insurance.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dana Baker
user_reviews_extended.Description: We cannot thank Debra and Bev enough for all of the incredible hard work that they do to keep us running smoothly for all of our insurance needs at Ryan Scott 2 Go Catering. They are kind, diligent, responsive, knowledgeable, thorough, and very personable. They are true experts in their field and their customer service is top notch. Their services mean so much to our small business!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Siatta Adama
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Debra is amazing! She is very knowledgeable about life insurance policies and helped me get the right one to fit my needs.

She explained everything very well and made the whole process easy. I felt extremely comfortable with her.

user_reviews_extended.Name: OE
user_reviews_extended.Description: I want to sing high praises about this company. I’ve worked with multiple staff members including the owner Debra who is absolutely amazing. Today I spoke with Bev about an issue with my car. Bev was super helpful in helping me navigate next steps to address the issue; Bev was also kind and reassured me everything was gonna be okay (which is what you need in stressful situations!). 10/10 service each time I call, super happy to be insured with this agency!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dena Son
user_reviews_extended.Description: Reached out to Debra to get a quote on Insurance. Within minutes, her colleague Bev, responded to my text and provided excellent service. Bev, explained immediately that she was busy, but promised to get back to me later in the day. As promised, she followed up, and provided exceptional service. She was professional, quick, knowledgeable, and even went the extra mile to contact a third party I was working with. Highly recommended. Thanks for your help Bev.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Pierre Combes
user_reviews_extended.Description: The Debra O'Farrell team was incredibly helpful! The people in the office went above and beyond to help me with insurance matters following a recent death in the family. Highly Recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mackenzie Stone
user_reviews_extended.Description: My 5 star review is for the Customer Service Representative, Beverly Colton. I have car and renters insurance with this agency. I had a recent situation where I was trying to sell a car and buy a new one- however I needed proof of coverage of insurance to finalize the car registration in order to sell the car. I only had a very short time to do this and Beverly was awesome! She listened to my story and took it into her own hands to make sure it all got done. She updated me through the whole day with texts and emails and got me the paperwork I needed to get the car I always wanted! So grateful for her! Thank you, Bev!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Goyo
user_reviews_extended.Description: Debra and her staff are the best, they explain the in and outs of the policy’s we have and they suggest different options to protect all our assets.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lee Abramavage
user_reviews_extended.Description: Have been insured with State Farm for years...the best. Friendly, professional and claims always processed in a timely manner.Thank-you.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jessie Mark
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have worked with Bev Colton through the office of Debra O'Farrell for the last few years. Bev is knowledgeable, proactive, gives thoughtful advice, and always finds time to answer questions so that we can proceed confidently. Thank you, Bev!

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Nale
user_reviews_extended.Description: Debra and her team are very attentive.  I appreciate their professional approach.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Black Lamb Media
user_reviews_extended.Description: Bev is incredible to work with! She is patient, thorough, and organized. I would highly recommend working with this branch for your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marc G
user_reviews_extended.Description: This is a great office with amazing customer service. Responses are always timely, explanations are always communicated clearly, and everyone is always patient. They make you feel truly valued and cared for.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jay Bolds
user_reviews_extended.Description: Been doing business with this office for years! Very prompt & professional!

user_reviews_extended.Name: James Dillard
user_reviews_extended.Description: Impossible to get a hold of. When I moved, I wanted to keep my insurance but update some of the details. It was impossible to get a hold of anyone from the office in a timely manner. I’d call during business hours and get a machine and not get a call back for hours or possibly the next day. They were not reliable over email either. As someone with a job, the inability to schedule, get someone relatively quickly, or coordinate digitally makes this office too difficult to work with.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Neil Adit
user_reviews_extended.Description: Esther was patient while explaining the process of getting a Personal mobility policy. It was a smooth process overall!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kendal Willis
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have had nothing but positive interactions with Ester Limon! She is clear, very helpful, reassuring, and follows through on her commitments. Thank you so much for all that you do and who you are, Ester!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alex Lewis
user_reviews_extended.Description: Debra and her team (specifically Esther) have been wonderful to work with. I would highly recommend.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Zhongdi Liu
user_reviews_extended.Description: Esther was very professional and super helpful! She helped me understand all the documents and terms meaning, which I had no idea before I visited. Huge shoutout 5 star

user_reviews_extended.Name: Amaury Durieux
user_reviews_extended.Description: We had the opportunity to be helped by Beverly and she was absolutely incredible. We couldn't be happier with the service and support. Thank you so much for going above and beyond for us.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Josephine T
user_reviews_extended.Description: Always take care of things on time , great customer service. Go and beyond with the service. I am highly satisfy with my experience.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Paul Rambaud
user_reviews_extended.Description: I work with Bev. She's excellent and always timely! Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marilou Conel
user_reviews_extended.Description: Excellent service.  Thank you for taking care of our insurance needs.  We really appreciate it.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Darnell Chapman Jr
user_reviews_extended.Description: Needed car Insurance, Got it, saved money now im Happy. Nice people and nice building downtown SF.

title: Ben Carr - State Farm Insurance Agent

owner.name: Ben Carr - State Farm Insurance Agent (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: M MBc
user_reviews.Description:
I had an excellent experience working with Philip at Ben Carr State Farm Insurance. What really stood out was that he proactively reviewed my auto policy. Given my mileage driven, he helped get my premium lowered by approximately 50% without me even asking. That level of honesty and customer care is rare.
Philip was knowledgeable, responsive, and took the time to explain everything clearly. The entire process was smooth, efficient, and genuinely stress-free. It’s clear Ben Carr State Farm is focused on doing what’s best for the clients, not just selling a policy.
Highly recommend Philip and the Ben Carr State Farm team if you’re looking for top-notch service and a team who truly looks out for you for all your insurance needs.

user_reviews.Name: Paul Race
user_reviews.Description:
I have insurance coverage for my 2011 Toyota Prius.  I appreciate VALUE for goods and services I consume.  It is well known that State Farm is not the least expensive service provider.  For me, value is a combination of cost vs. benefit.
I feel that State Farm's claim procedure makes the benefit of their services makes their cost to me worthwhile. It provides me reliable and consistent process to deal with auto collisions, I don't need to worry about being treated fairly.

user_reviews.Name: Jamit Singh
user_reviews.Description:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
I’ve had an excellent experience with Ben Carr Insurance! The team are professional, responsive, and genuinely care about finding the best coverage options for their clients. They took the time to explain everything clearly and made the entire process easy and stress-free.

What really stood out was their personal touch — I never felt rushed, and every question was answered with patience and expertise. It’s rare to find such friendly and reliable service these days. I highly recommend Ben Carr Insurance to anyone looking for trustworthy, knowledgeable, and dedicated insurance support!

user_reviews.Name: Loma Flowers
user_reviews.Description: Ben Carr and his staff have been great to work with around insurance, which can be very stressful to deal with. They are extremely knowledgeable and unfailingly responsive to my requests for information, discussion and questions, and always professional and attentive to my concerns over the years. Ben and Philip are both a pleasure to deal with.

user_reviews.Name: Janet Shea
user_reviews.Description: I’ve been a customer of several State Farm agencies over the years due to moving between states, and this agency has been by far the best experience I’ve had. I worked with Andres, who was incredibly knowledgeable and patiently answered all of my questions. He also helped my partner and me secure a very competitive price. I’m very happy I chose State Farm and highly recommend this agency!

user_reviews.Name: Gabino Soberanes
user_reviews.Description: Andres is an incredibly knowledgeable and attentive professional. He takes the time to thoroughly explain every detail of your insurance options. I’ve personally seen how much he truly cares about his customers. He carefully walked me through a life policy for my daughter, something I wouldn’t have considered if it weren’t for his guidance and helpfulness.

user_reviews.Name: Tristan Salazar
user_reviews.Description: I've had a great experience with Oscar as my car insurance agent. He's very responsive, explains everything clearly, and always handles requests quickly and on time. He made getting coverage simple and hassle-free. I definitely recommend him.

user_reviews.Name: Nadine Kessler
user_reviews.Description: Well, first of all, Ben bailed us out when our former agent failed to notify us that our policy had expired.  Ben was open on a Saturday and was able to reissue a policy! Since then, Ben's been our agent and doing a great job taking care of our home and auto needs.  His office staff are super helpful and stay on top of things.  Minus one star though for State Farm (not Ben's fault) who tried to cancel our policy because our house was under construction.

user_reviews_extended.Description:
I want to express my gratitude to this great team for all the help they have given me. They have always been attentive to my needs and have offered me a quality service, with the best price and attention that really makes a difference.

In a special way, I want to thank Don Oscar, who on every occasion has supported me with patience, dedication and an exceptional treatment. Your commitment and willingness to solve my doubts and guide me have been of enormous value to me.

Thank you all for your excellent work and for maintaining a level of attention that feels close and human. I sincerely appreciate everything you have done.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lynn Garrett
user_reviews_extended.Description: I recently had the pleasure of working with Philip Pierce to obtain an insurance policy for a recently purchased car. He was unfailingly cordial, answering my many questions as he provided options and explained conditions for the insurance. I have interacted with other employees here as well, and highly recommend this branch location.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Robert Rigg
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Andres did an incredible job quoting me for a new insurance policy with State Farm. He was informative, knowledgeable and compassionate about what he does. I was astounded by his customer service abilities. Thank you for having totally authentic agents in your agency.

Sincerely,
Robb Rigg

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sabino R
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ben, Oscar & Philip have so helpful over the years. With my first & second car, they’re always easy to reach out to. Will keeping doing business with them & recommend them to anyone looking for auto insurance

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kelsang Labsum
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I like to say thank you to Philipe for helping me with my insurance policy.He took his time and explained very kindly to me.
Thanks so much - has been a pleasure doing business with your office.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Monica H.
user_reviews_extended.Description: My daughter was in a pinch to get car insurance asap after her current carrier was negligent. Ben Carr already carried car insurance for my younger daughter and Andres was able to get my older daughter added same day. He was great communicating everything quickly! Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Donovan Brill
user_reviews_extended.Description: Andres from Ben’s team was great to work with. Clearly laid out options for me and talked through the ins and outs patiently. Was very relatable and easy to talk to. Great experience switching over my insurance to Ben’s team.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Thomas Hudson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great insurance agent and staff! Always willing to go above and beyond. Truly professional people. I would not normally even  write a review about an insurance agent. That is, until Ben Carr (and his staff) and because I believe people truly deserve to know that he is a super professional and knowledgeable guy!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cyan Chang
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ben Carr’s office really helped me out with getting me on insurance same day! Andres helped me greatly and made sure I was all set up with my reinstated insurance making sure all the paperwork went through. They really care about each one of their clients and I would recommend Ben’s office for the SF area!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mohamedene
user_reviews_extended.Description: My experience at this agency was truly excellent. Andreas was a wonderful and extremely helpful person, and he clearly knows his job well. He explained all the insurance options to me clearly and patiently, and he genuinely helped me choose the best one. Many thanks and appreciation to him for his outstanding work, and also for the quick cup of coffee that I didn’t know I needed.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Steve Nuzzo
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I've been working with Ben Carr and Philip for over ten years; with State Farm for almost 40.
Ben and Philip I have always found to be extremely helpful and well versed in all the ins and outs of home and car insurance.
Above all I trust them to be honest, with great intergity

user_reviews_extended.Name: Barb Kinney
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've had auto insurance with Ben Carr for that last ten years and home owner's insurance since purchasing a condo two years ago. Very personal service, Philip is always nice to reach out by phone when there are changes or updates to my policies - very responsive and helpful!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Breanna Capuchino
user_reviews_extended.Description: Andres is wonderful! He was very thorough, detailed, charismatic, helpful, and genuine. He covered through the entire process of my insurance and all questions were answered significantly. Definitely deserves that raise, mister Carr! Thank you, Andres! You are awesome! 💯☺️

user_reviews_extended.Name: Eddie Jackson
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had a great experience with this young agent he was very good explaining everything to me an helping me find discounts on my plan that I was eligible for, he explained some things to me that I wasn't even aware of. I appreciated his patience with me. Andres you did a great job helping me, Happy Holidays to you an family.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Leidi Arias
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ask for Andres! He helped transition my old renters insurance policy to a new policy with a better rate. He was very helpful.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Danielle Bakman
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been working with Ben’s team for years now and would absolutely recommend them! They are so helpful and responsive. The service whenever I call or email is great. Highly recommend for anyone shopping for insurance!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alan Rosenzweig
user_reviews_extended.Description: Terrific service from Luis. He took excellent and prompt care of my needs. Emailed me my insurance cards within minutes of me asking for them. I was at a car dealership purchasing a new car today and needed my proof of insurance. Quick response. Very pleased

user_reviews_extended.Name: Len Q
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ben Carr and team has been very helpful with all of of needs and has always found ways to save us money with our policies. Very happy with team Ben Carr!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Charlie B
user_reviews_extended.Description: Amazing service! Andres was very kind, patient, and answered all my questions. I never felt rushed. It’s nice to work with someone who really cares about their clients.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Julianne irving
user_reviews_extended.Description: Andres was amazing and truly went above and beyond. He took the time to talk with me about insurance and explained everything clearly. Even though they don’t offer renters insurance, he still went out of his way to help me, which I really appreciated.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jhonatan P
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great experience working with Andres. He explained everything clearly and made the process very easy. I felt supported. Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Robert Weisblatt
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Ben, whose agency this is and Philip who works there are a great
duo for giving insurance advice and getting things done in a timely matter. I highly recommend this State Farm agency.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Amber Love
user_reviews_extended.Description: State Farm is really great. I added my mother on my insurance with me. I have been nothing but nice. I got a life insurance policy too and since I’ve been with State Farm they have been nothing but wonderful to me so I am greatly thankful to have State Farm I go in and pay my insurance. Everybody is nice And give me the most respect this is a great company to choose because I love State Farm and State Farm have the best staff and Philip, is one of the nicest people but if you ask me, the team is all nice and great team Best experience ever

user_reviews_extended.Name: Patrick Ogden
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I enjoyed the pleasure of establishing  a new car insurance policy with
Luis Almador. Together with his knowledge, professionalism and positivity Luis revealed State Farm policies clearly and succinctly. What a pleasure he was. I highly recommend State Farm and  Luis Almador for a winning combination.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gavin Patterson
user_reviews_extended.Description: I was able to get supplemental health insurance from Ben's office. It has been a huge boon to me as I am between permanent health coverages. The whole team treated me with respect and they went out of their way to find solutions for me even when I am not eligible to get on their nonowner auto policy.  Totally recommend Ben's State Farm office !

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cinthya Lopez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Been working with them for a few years now. They work great gives me the best price with everything. Towing and rental car everything. Went through the process already before and it was a fast process paid me out ASAP ! Love it

user_reviews_extended.Name: James Wang 007
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kim provided some of the best customer service I’ve ever experienced. He was quick to respond and answered every question clearly. If you want an insurance agent who actually cares about helping clients and goes the extra miles, Kim is the one to call.

user_reviews_extended.Name: katrina jones
user_reviews_extended.Description: Andres was super amazing and extremely helpful!! He made sure to answer every question I had and to make sure I was content with my concerns. I can tell this is gonna be a great decision switching over to State Farm. Thank you again Andres! 🙂

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marisol sandoval
user_reviews_extended.Description: Andres is a very pleasant guy who helped me find discounts on my car insurance. He explained me everything very detailed in a way that I can understand it. I would come back to him again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Aurélie de Waziers
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ben Carr and his team are always helpful and friendly. They made the process of getting my car insured very easy and are always working to get me the best rates. I’m so grateful!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jack Sale
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Ben and Philip are the real deal. If you’re looking for car insurance in San Francisco, stop your search now! These two go above and beyond. They treated me like family—super kind, clear, and genuinely committed to helping me find the right coverage without any pressure.
I’m really happy I switched to State Farm through them. Not only did I get a great auto insurance policy, but I also finally feel like I have agents who know me, not just my file. That kind of personal service is hard to find!
If you want local agents who actually care, and who will walk you through everything with patience and honesty, Ben and Philip are the gold standard. Can’t recommend them enough. Thanks guys!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Esha Edgerton
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ben Carr and his team by far are the most consistent thorough personable insurance agents I’ve ever encountered. I can always depend on everyone in the office from Phillip to Oscar to of course Ben who is always ready to step in at any moment to provide superb customer service excellent clear concise pricing and detail information to ensure the client understands thier plan options. This office has ensured that I stay covered with continuous text messaging and calls upon the last minute to make sure I meet my deadline. If you are looking to get your hands on great coverage at a fair price look no further have Ben or one of his team members hook you up!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Carole Brandmeyer
user_reviews_extended.Description: I want to give a excellent recommendation for Ben Car and staff State Fan Agents , there are three staff Ben Philip and Oscar. All three staff have consistently given me the help I need and ask for in a timely manner  usually in the same day I make the  request.  My requests  are completely  taken care of, to my satisfaction.. The staff from this agency are very caring for and about the people they provide insurance for, Again i highly recommend them, Carole Brandmeyer

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shonnece Hill
user_reviews_extended.Description: I told him my situation and he listened to me even if it was a little off topic, he still stayed very professional letting me know he understood my needs. And I was happy with what he came up with . Thank you so much

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marietta Tanqueco
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a client for more than two years now and I am still very satisfied with everyone’s customer service and friendliness of Ben Carr’s staff. I am so grateful to every single one of you! Keep up the great work! 😇💐

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mark McGee
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ben and Philip proactively reach out when there are changes in California regulation and rates, take time to answer all my questions and advise on the optimal policy for my personal situation.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Julia Stankiewicz
user_reviews_extended.Description: Philip Pierce is great! Not only did he help me with my auto insurance, but he also took the time to leave a personalized birthday message. Such a thoughtful touch. The staff at Ben Carr State Farm SF is always friendly and helpful. Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jen Eik
user_reviews_extended.Description: Oscar has been a great agent to me and my family with very affordable prices offered and easy communication. Thank you Oscar!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jason Huyck
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I recently switched to Ben Carr and I couldn’t be happier with the experience. From the very first interaction - he was incredibly responsive, knowledgeable and genuinely attentive to my needs. As a new customer, I appreciated how his team made the transition from my previous insurer seamless and hassle-free.
Their expertise and willingness to walk me through every step gave me confidence in my coverage choices. I can’t recommend Ben enough!

user_reviews_extended.Name: MrBolts4life
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been with State Farm Insurance for 7 years and they’re the best Insurance Company I’ve ever worked with. Ben Carr and Philip Pierce have been professional and trustworthy since day one. I couldn’t be happier with my Car Insurance, and Home Insurance. Anytime I needed to ask a question about something they’ve always taken care of me and given me some good advice that’s really been helpful. I appreciate you both. Ron Chukes

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brian Johnson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ben Carr is a true professional and is an expert in the State Farm Insurance arena.  I’ve been a customer of Ben’s for over a decade and I can always trust that he is going to give me the best advice on all my insurance needs.  He is trustworthy, reliable, responsive and kind.   Highly recommend Ben, and his team, for all your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: SL Soma Lead Flex
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great service! I really appreciated that they took the time to let me know my insurance rates were going to be lower. Super helpful and transparent experience.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ellen DiGiacomo
user_reviews_extended.Description: Working with Ben and Luis is always a great experience.  They take care of everything and are really quick in responding.  Highly recommended!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ozzie-Yuka
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Update review:
I have been with this State Farm agency since 2017 for my rental insurance, and since 2020 for my anuto insurance. I cannot recommend them highly enough! Ben, my agent, and Philip, the account manager, have always been there to support me and help me through any situation.
As someone whose first language is not English, I felt particularly anxious and unsettled when I recently experienced my first-ever car damage incident. However, I knew I could rely on Ben and Philip for advice, so I reached out to them. Despite his busy schedules, Ben made time to speak with me the very next afternoon and followed up with clear and helpful advice over email. Their professional support helped ease my anxiety, and I felt reassured knowing I had someone I could trust to guide me.
My husband and I are so grateful for their outstanding service. While the State Farm insurance may be on the higher end price-wise, the peace of mind and confidence we gain from Ben and Philip’s support are absolutely priceless.
Thank you for everything, Ben and Philip! We look forward to continuing to work with you in the future.

Previous review:
We were lucky to get introduced Ben Carr from our leasing office 7 years ago. Since then, he helps us with renters and auto insurance. Ben and Philip are very responsive and helpful that I can rely on! Fortunately I've never filed a claim but I'm glad I have such peace of mind knowing I have Ben and his team whenever I need help.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rute Bailey
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I recently had the pleasure of working with Ben Carr at State Farm for my insurance needs and I can't recommend him enough! Ben was incredibly knowledgeable and patient, taking the time to thoroughly explain all of my options. He made sure I understood every detail of my policy and helped me choose the best coverage for my lifestyle and budget.

Ben's professionalism and dedication to customer service were evident in every interaction. He went above and beyond to ensure that all of my questions were answered and that I felt comfortable and confident with my decisions. It’s rare to find someone so committed to genuinely helping others and providing such a high level of service.

If you're looking for an insurance agent who truly cares about your well-being and works hard to provide the best possible service, then Ben Carr at State Farm is your go-to person. I am thoroughly impressed with his expertise and the personalized attention he provided. Thanks to Ben, I feel secure in my insurance choices. Highly recommended!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Arthur Feinstein
user_reviews_extended.Description: The folks at Ben Carr have always been extremely helpful in assuring us a fair price and just keeping in touch so we know there are real folk ready to help us.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kevin O
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have had both my home and car insurance with Sate Farm for at least 30 years, with different brokers. I switched to Ben Carr’s office  several years ago and I am so pleased I did. Mostly because I appreciate the friendly and efficient service from their rep Philip.He is always responsive to any questions or document needs I have. He’s the guy who usually answers the phone, so I recommend you give him a call right now!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Patricia Wright
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have worked with Ben Carr for over 20 years and his team, including Phillip do a tremendous job.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shani Simpson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ben Carr's office is fantastic. They are always available when I need them, and they also proactively reach out regarding home and auto insurance issues ... super happy!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: JD Jackson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ben Carr is a good business man, honest and loyal. Service is impeccable handsdown!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Linda Ono
user_reviews_extended.Description: Just informed my monthly car insurance premium will adjust down, yay!  Thx for keeping track of ways to save.  Appreciated 😊

user_reviews_extended.Name: Josh Oba (VeryDangerousMan)
user_reviews_extended.Description: Spoke with Andres and he was able to take care of me with an affordable insurance plan. He was also very mindful of my time which was very much appreciated.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael Duffy
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ben Carr Phillip Pierce have been a great team and have serviced our Homeowner's Policies for the last 20 years

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brittany Brown
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great experience working with Ben & Philip. I've had my auto insurance with them for several years. They made the process very easy and they are super responsive to any questions or concerns I have.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stephen Morton Werner
user_reviews_extended.Description: My experience with the Ben Carr State Farm agency has been uniformly positive. Recently, my 2015 Prius was totalled in accident caused by another driver. After State Farm settled my claim, I purchased a new 2025 Prius. Staff in the agency were friendly and helpful as I went through this process.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Patrick Tainter
user_reviews_extended.Description: A terrific agent.  We came to Ben Carr when our previous agent retired.  We could not be happier.  We've had minor claims and needs over the years and Ben and his staff give us fast, efficient and dedicated service.  When rates have increased they have proactively called us to recommend ways to economize but still keep good protection.  They are also very pleasant to work with.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Crash Anova
user_reviews_extended.Description: Always good service, friendly phone reminders and timely follow up. They also work with me to find solutions for my various needs. I especially appreciate Philip's excellent customer service. Much appreciated!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alan Goldfein
user_reviews_extended.Description:
For quite a long time, Ben Carr has been our trusted insurance specialist. At the beginning of our relationship, half a decade ago, he helped us to understand the specific characteristics of the home, liability and car insurance business in California and how to close the gaps left by our former German and US coverage.

Ben is open to challenging questions and very patient when explaining legal and insurance issues and terms. On top of that, it is easy to contact him and we always got quick replies to whatever we asked.

Fortunately, we never had any damage that needed insurance coverage, but we trust him and his office to assist us in the best way possible. We definitely can recommend him for all insurance needs!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Revius Dessman
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have dealt with a few insurance companies in my time but I have finally found one that I feel comfortable with. The people at Ben Carr Insurance Agency are very professional and also knowledgeable and courteous. I had many questions about the policy I had with my prior insurance company. They took the time and answered every one of them. They were very friendly and gave me some great advice. I knew I was in the right place when my account manager called me on my birthday. He wished me happy birthday before any of my family members did. That made my day.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dominique Roberts
user_reviews_extended.Description: I would highly recommend Ben Carr he listened. He gave great insights to the products that State Farm offers. He was very professional very attentive very timely and I will do it all over again. Thanks for the wonderful service you provided.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cash
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I recently had the pleasure of working with Luis Amador, who took the time to understand my insurance needs and explored a variety of options to find an incredibly low premium tailored to my requirements. He also went above and beyond to help beat my partner's old rate while providing her with even more coverage!
His professionalism, in-depth knowledge, and dedication to finding the right solutions made the entire process seamless and stress-free. I truly appreciated how he prioritized our needs and ensured we felt confident in our coverage.
I highly recommend reaching out to Mr. Amador. He exceeded my expectations, and I'm sure he can do the same for you!
Thank you, Luis, for your exceptional service!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brandon Abrams
user_reviews_extended.Description: I recently contacted Ben Carr in order to discuss life insurance policy options, among some other financial services, which may be available to me. Ben’s commitment to his client and knowledge within his field is simply unmatched. His tireless dedication to finding a policy which best suited my needs, and his degree of accessibility and willingness to answer any questions and guide me through the entire process truly made me feel as though I personally mattered to him. I will undoubtedly be returning to Ben with any coverage needs that I may require moving forward. I sincerely suggest you do the same. You will be in truly competent, capable,  and caring hands.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sean Mira
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ben Carr has been taking care of multiple homes for our family. Professional personalized service over the years is highly valued and appreciated! Shout out to Phillip who I’ve really enjoyed working with the past few years. Always a pleasure dealing with them to handle all our insurance needs🙏🏽

user_reviews_extended.Name: Teresa
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had the pleasure of working with Luis Chamorro - he was referred to me. Had a really great experience overall. He was patient and thorough in explaining the coverages and deciding which types of coverage was best for my vehicle. He was very friendly and honest - didn’t pressure me to get coverages as rates I didn’t feel I needed. Definitely recommend him if you are looking for a good agent! Jake from Statefarm who?? Lol

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jason Hu
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ben has been my trusted insurance agent ever since my home ownership and buying a new car. Ben and his team have been informative, detail oriented and timely whenever I have questions or inquires, and more importantly, they get stuff done. I would highly recommend Ben to anyone that lives in the Bay Area

user_reviews_extended.Name: Carolyn Shin
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ben, Philip, and all their colleagues at the office with whom I've spoken have provided the highest degree of service and professionalism that I have probably encountered anywhere. Ben is so knowledgeable and communicates all the insurance options available in a way that is easy to understand and value.  I first went to them for my home insurance, and ended up bundling my car insurance and an umbrella policy with them. I am confident that Ben ensured that I was getting all of the discounts available as well. He and his office are very proactive about communication. I thought I had all of my plans on autopay but I didn't and ended up missing a payment. Ben himself immediately called to notify me so I didn't have a lapse in coverage. Most recently, when insurance rates were going up everywhere, Philip personally called me to give me a heads up. I know it sounds crazy to say this about an insurance company, but I actually do think that Ben and his colleagues really care about what they do.  I highly recommend Ben's office to anyone looking for any type of insurance. Oh I should also mention that I found him through several friends who had referred him to me after also being highly satisfied with this service!  10 out of 10 recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Diana Naparst
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ben Carr is very knowledgeable, professional, patient, and friendly to boot!  I've had various insurances with him for several years and he's always worked hard to get me the best deal possible.  Plus, his support staff are wonderful as well!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Britt Gardner
user_reviews_extended.Description: I went into their State Farm office to add a new driver, my daughter, to my policy. Ben Carr’s team was friendly, fast and knowledgeable. We were out of there within 30 minutes, but just enough time unveil a few unexpected discounts - they were small, but…every little bit counts. Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: John Collette
user_reviews_extended.Description: Shopping for insurance can be overwhelming but Ben Carr makes it easy. I have life, renters, earthquake, and non-owned auto from Ben. Each time I’ve come to Ben with questions he takes the time to patiently and review all my options with great detail. I took a few weeks to select the best life insurance policy and Ben was supportive and attentive each step of the process. Ben was very professional. He showed me several policies until I picked the perfect one. The team in office is friendly and warm. The state farm app is easy to use and is an all in one shop for me to stay up to date with my policy. I will continue to use Ben Carr’s agency and strongly recommend him to others.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Julianna Ricard
user_reviews_extended.Description: I'm incredibly pleased with the service provided by Ben Carr for my home and auto insurance. Ben's knowledge is impressive, ensuring I have the right coverage, while Philip's responsiveness and helpfulness make the entire process seamless. This team goes above and beyond, and I highly recommend them for their expertise and excellent customer service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Regina Fisher
user_reviews_extended.Description: Excellent service. I used State Farm in another state, when I moved to CA and needed to transfer my insurance to a local agent I just called this office and got immediate attention to my needs. Everything was done in a matter of a few hours. Luis was knowledgable and quick to reposed. I would highly recommend them!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Judy Cordon
user_reviews_extended.Description: Can't say enough words about how I feel and how wonderful doing business with this wonderful company, that knows how to run a business, and how to talk with people, in a way that makes you glad you're doing business with them,  and not somebody else.  State Farm Insurance Agent Ben Carr and Philip, and the rest of the staff, have been dealing with me for 10 years, and I appreciate all the help they have given me. Thank you,  you guys are the best.  I really, really mean that, from the bottom of my heart.

user_reviews_extended.Name: ANNAYANCY GORDILLO CASTILLO
user_reviews_extended.Description: Andrés is helpful and professional.He helped me find the right coverage quickly. Thank you.

user_reviews_extended.Name: JR
user_reviews_extended.Description: We're so lucky that Ben Carr opened his office right around the corner from our house. Before that, State Farm was just a faceless insurance company that sent us a bill once a year. Now we get friendly, personal, proactive service with a neighborly feel. My husband also uses them for auto insurance. Love these folks!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kamal Russell
user_reviews_extended.Description: Regrettably we had to sell our car.  Ben Carr's State Farm Agency and in particular Philip Pierce handled the policy cancellation professionally and ensured that we received our refund check in a timely manner.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Wanda Rodriguez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Excellent customer services and availability to talk to someone on the phone when you needed.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Art Wong
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been insured with State Farm Insurance for many years for both auto and house insurance and have been with different agents until they retired.  My current agent, Ben Carr's office,  has been very supportive, follow up with me if there are any changes with my accounts, and addressed any questions or concerns that I had promptly.  Very deserving of 5 stars!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alex Drake
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ben Carr and his team at State Farm are great. Ben is thorough, experienced, quick to respond, and transparent as an insurance agent. I have condo, auto, and umbrella with him personally and a commercial HOA policy. In a challenging insurance market, I would recommend him and his team to treat customers fairly, and to explain why premiums and rates are the way they are.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Hilary Going
user_reviews_extended.Description:
My experience with Ben Carr and his team has been stellar. They are all extremely professional and responsive and go above and beyond to ensure their customers have the best experience, superior products, and best rates.

They’ve been excellent helping me with my auto insurance and I would absolutely recommend them.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael Pudhorodsky
user_reviews_extended.Description: Working with Ben Carr and his team has been amazing. They have made me feel like I am part of their family and made sure that all my insurance needs have been met. I can think of no other agent that takes such a personal role in making sure their clients are well taken care of and insured properly. Thank you to the Ben Carr Team for your continued guidance and service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Susan Rutberg
user_reviews_extended.Description: Nobody likes dealing with insurance companies. But Ben, and the people who work with him, are responsive and knowledgeable and improve  the experience immensely. When I reported a recent accident (a garage door malfunctioned and hit my car), Philip Pierce went out of his way to help. I recommend  this office wholeheartedly.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lesley
user_reviews_extended.Description: I needed some support with an Auto insurance claim today, and Ben and Philip carved out a few minutes to help me out, even though their day was super booked. The staff was exceptionally friendly, helpful, and affable! Ben himself took photos of my document, and emailed it out for me. Thanks!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Yan Ju Zhang
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kim has helped me with consulting insurance and explained various insurance options to me without making it complicated!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Maurice Osei
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ben and his team have been nothing short of amazing since I've begun using their services.  They always go above and beyond with any questions I may have and also when providing updates to my service.  Would highly recommend to anyone who is thinking of switching insurance providers or just starting out.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ivory Santos
user_reviews_extended.Description: I decided to change my insurance due to the rising cost with my previous insurance company. I had the pleasure of speaking with Philip Pierce, who helped me find the perfect plan for my business as well as Auto insurance. Once the deal was locked in Ben Carr followed up with an email confirming all the details. I am very happy with the customer service I received.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chitvan Gupta
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I'd recommend Ben Carr to anyone looking for an agent at Statefarm. He is very knowledgeable on how the company policies work, is reachable in a timely manner, is humble when asked basic questions from new customers like me and works with empathy when dealing with any loss/damage discussion. Ben Carr is the best agent that you can find at StateFarm. I feel really blessed to work with him.
Additionally the staff at this office is very friendly and always responds to phone calls!

user_reviews_extended.Name: TJ Brandreth
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ben Carr has been the best auto insurance provider! He is always working to get me the best rate and discounts, even when I don’t ask! He is very professional and always willing to help in any way he can. I highly recommend him and his team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chee Sazzy
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have been with StateFarm for many years, but what really keeps me going.....when I call in and I speak with Philip...HE IS AMAZING!!!  HIS SENSE OF HUMOR makes me want to call in and ask questions that have nothing to do with insurance.
He is GREAT at getting back to you as soon as you hang up the phone.

Thank you Philip for always making my DAY/AFTERNOON/EVENINGS.

Mz. C'Rise'
From the BAY!
February 1,2025

user_reviews_extended.Name: Russell Cohen
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ben has been an outstanding partner for our auto insurance needs and other lines. Great customer service from his team, especially Philip. They always have our interests at heart.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bahman Nazari
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ben Carr and his team, Philip and Eduardo are very easy to work with and they provide excellent and timely customer service. It has been a great experience working with them and highly recommend them to everyone. Thank you all for support.

user_reviews_extended.Name: dwayne charles
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been a customer for over 20 yrs..  I always get great service & help I need. Eduardo goes above & beyond.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Trenton Nascimento
user_reviews_extended.Description: Wow, where do I even start with the Carr team? They are truly an amazing and outstanding team that goes above and beyond. Ben helped me get all squared away and made sure I had all the coverages I needed! He even helped my set up my life insurance policy! It was so easy and quick, and not to mention thorough. I would recommend the Carr team to anyone and everyone! Thanks again Ben and team!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Long Rochelle
user_reviews_extended.Description: “I had a great experience working with Ben at State Farm . He was professional, knowledgeable, and took the time to explain everything clearly. He made the whole process easy and stress-free, ensuring I understood all my options. I really appreciate his patience and dedication to finding the best coverage for my needs. Highly recommend!”

user_reviews_extended.Name: Paul Carlisle
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ive been with Ben Carr State Farm since moving back to California in 2019. Ive had a great experience thus far. The staff is super friend, efficient,  & knowledgeable.  I'd recommend this State Farm office to family & friends seeking great coverage for they're vehicle at a good price.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Diane Hidalgo
user_reviews_extended.Description:
We have been with StateFarm Insurance for many, many years.  We have our rental properties covered by State Farm in San Francisco as well as our home, cars, and umbrella policies covered by StateFarm Arizona.

Ben Carr is our agent in San Francisco and has been very helpful in navigating the insurance world and fulfilling our insurance needs at a very fair cost.

Contact Ben if you need help with your insurance needs in California; he can definitely help you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: William Caldwell
user_reviews_extended.Description: This Agency has been for coverage of our motorhome and umbrella policy. The Agent; Ben Carr has been informative and professional.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Andrew Olivarez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Luis Helped get a great Policy over the phone! Very well communicated and also very polite. 5/5 star rating. I am not insured and joined the State Farm family with full coverage on my vehicle.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Seán Pierce
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have both a life insurance policy and a renters insurance policy through this office. Whenever I have had questions, the staff (Philip Pierce and Ben Carr, in particular) have been very helpful in answering them. I feel assured that I will continue receiving great customer support and great rates by sticking with them.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joan Pierce
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ben Carr and his team of professional and friendly staff helped me find the best auto insurance policy available, which suits my needs perfectly.  I also have my life insurance policy with them and highly recommend their services.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ray S
user_reviews_extended.Description: Convenient Location, Friendly, Polite  Staffs.  I stopped by to take care of some insurance claims paper work.  Philip and another staff made the process very smooth. They pulled up a chair and offered me to sit down while I waited for them to look at my paper work. It didn't take long for them to pull up and look up information to complete my request.  I think they have a very good team going to take care of my needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Arnold Lerner
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ben's assistant, Phillip, was thoroughly knowledgeable in explaining how the rates on my policy were based and it helped me understand the billing.  Philip helped me put this period's policy payment on a monthly plan which is very helpful for me at this particular time. Much appreciated.

user_reviews_extended.Name: doug johnsonson
user_reviews_extended.Description: The staff at  Ban Carr are reliably helpful --  always patient to answer questions.  They are friendly and a pleasure to work with.  I highly recommend them for your auto  insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Anna G
user_reviews_extended.Description: Thanks Andres.Excellent customer service, very responsive, knowledgeable, and easy to work with.

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Nesbet
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very happy with the service we have received from Ben and Phillip!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nicole Mullicane
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been with State Farm for a year now and Ben is amazing. His assistant Philip is incredibly lovely. The follow up is top notch. I’m never worried about getting ahold of someone or being called back. I appreciate the attention to detail and the care they provide.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Will Hayworth
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ben and his team are friendly, knowledgeable and prompt--I'm really grateful to have found him, and we moved my partner's policy to his office because we like them so much. When I recently needed last minute auto coverage for a rental car, they made it happen with proof of insurance in less than half an hour. Highly recommended!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael Ray

I stopped in to my agent's office yesterday to ask a few questions about some subtleties of my policies.
