user_reviews_extended.Name: Denisse Gonzalez
user_reviews_extended.Description: I was extremely happy with the service I received from State Farm agent Chris Serrano located in San Francisco Ca. He was very efficient and knowledgeable. Highly recommend you reach out to him if interested in life insurance. He is very professional, very patient, friendly & courteous. He was able to explain the different plans as well as guide me through the application process. I loved that he took time to explain every detail step by step and made sure I understood everything. He went above & beyond making sure my needs were met. Thank you Chris for all your help & support. 10/10 strongly recommend 👍🏻👍🏻 - Leticia Villagómez

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nancy
user_reviews_extended.Description: Andres Sandoval is a very professional and personable agent.  He answered all my questions directly and gave good advice.  I am so glad I chose State Farm for my car insurance needs🙂

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tolteco Cano
user_reviews_extended.Description: Andres Sandoval was very professional, helpful, An overall made this experience easy. Would give them 10 stars if I could, Whoever is in charge should give this employee a raise. Would definitely recommend more people to switching over to State Farm because of him.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Frederick Kung
user_reviews_extended.Description:
If you ever need a home, auto, or both insurance needs, please talk to Chris S from Ed Hidalgo State Farm insurance agency. The entire office team was very genuine and willing to help their
clients, but Chris stands out the most. He will do above and beyond his responsibility to help your insurance needs that will fit your budget. He will navigate the complicated insurance policies and explains all options available to you. He has an incredible personality and very easy to work with. I wish that I can give10 stars to Chris , but 5 stars was the maximum set by the google review. Thanks to Chris for his outstanding help.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Pat Walker
user_reviews_extended.Description:
The State Farm office on Cornwall street in San Francisco is a bright,  light filled, sparkling clean office that is dog friendly -- and people friendly --and when you walk in you get the feeling they really care about their customers. It has a good vibe.

So I was not all surprised to receive such great customer service from Chris S. when I went in to talk to them about switching my car insurance from AAA to Sate Farm.  It was so easy and so fun!  Chris explained things to me in a way that I could understand -- he made it a quick and easy process to switch.  I highly recommend if you want to change from your current insurance company to State Farm — do it.   Have fun and know you will be treated right.

user_reviews_extended.Name: malcolm johnson
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I give Ed Hidalgo's State Farm team two thumbs up for being prompt and responsive. Mr. Andres Sandoval was very professional and attentive to our needs, and got us a great deal.
Thank you State Farm!🙂

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nick W
user_reviews_extended.Description: Andres was beyond helpful. I was definitely in over my head and had several confusing and contradictory requests. He took every one of my calls, sometimes several in a single day, and was always very helpful and helped me find the policy and price that worked best for me and my situation. He easily made a hectic situation easier for me and left me assured that sticking with state farm was the right call. I couldn't give a stronger recommendation to have these guys on your side.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael Barnard
user_reviews_extended.Description: Chris was so helpful with my insurance needs.  He was polite, professional, and courteous.  With out his guidance and knowledge I am not sure I would have insurance given the climate in today's market.  I appreciate his time and patience he took to walk me through my policy and help me understand it.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Selena Santiago-Cruz
user_reviews_extended.Description: Andres was a wonderful agent. He helped me get a great rate for car insurance and he explained everything thoroughly. Truly appreciate the customer service and his assistance.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ian Moore
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have worked with Ed Hidalgo's office for years (second generation) for primary residence home owners, investment property building insurance and auto insurance.  They are extremely helpful in all regards.  We also recently purchased a collector car that required occasional use insurance and Andres Sandoval worked that our for us with great efficiency.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Diane Wallis
user_reviews_extended.Description: I recently received a letter from my auto insurance company (Farmer’s) that they would no longer offer auto insurance in CA. Luckily, I found Ed Hidalgo’s State Farm office in SF and had the good fortune to be helped by Andres Sandoval. Andres clearly has the knowledge and experience to help clients with a range of insurance needs. He set me up with a very comparable auto insurance policy and took the time to explain different facets of the coverage and gave me choices about what to include in my policy. I highly recommend Andres and the whole staff at Ed Hidalgo’s office located in the Richmond district in SF. Many thanks to Andres for his outstanding service !

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ianthia Mack
user_reviews_extended.Description: Andreas is the best! Good listener when listening to a very frantic person on the other end of the phone. He helped to calm my nerves after he really listened and took time to answer questions and thoroughly explained the process. He let me know everything was just fine. I felt like I was in very good hands! Thank you Andreas!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Edna L
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have been a loyal customer of State Farm auto insurance for over 20 years. There are no words to describe how grateful I am for Chris Serrano and Ed Hidalgo. Chris went above and beyond following up on an automotive claim I had made. He called the claims division every single day to ensure that there was progress made on my behalf. I am very appreciative for the amazing support Chris has given me throughout the entire process and couldn't have asked for more.

If you are looking for an agent, or perhaps considering switching, you could not find a better one than Ed Hidalgo and his amazing team.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kim Workman
user_reviews_extended.Description: Highly recommend Andres from State Farm in SF! After my partner’s car was burned by an arsonist, Andres has been there every step of the way, answering all of our questions and graciously checking in with us to make sure things stay on track. Life gets hectic and we really appreciate Andres’ proactive approach and excellent customer service and support!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Wayne G Seto
user_reviews_extended.Description: Andres S is great to work with. He is friendly, professional, and extremely helpful get my concerns solved. He is highly recommended for any insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: mikasguitar
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I wanted to take a moment to provide feedback on the outstanding service I’ve received from you as my State Farm Insurance agent.

the professionalism and dedication of Andrea Sánchez in excepcional. You consistently explain my insurance options clearly, making it easy to make informed decisions. Your prompt responsiveness and support, have been invaluable and reaffirmed my trust in State Farm.

Thank you for your exceptional service. I look forward to continuing our relationship.

Sincerely,

Walter Glass

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nick Waligorski
user_reviews_extended.Description: Andres helped me out with not only answering a question about my multiple car discount. He was able to make sure it was set up correctly and he was able to help me save money per month. I also was impressed that I sent a message through my State Farms app and received a call the next morning! To the team at Ed’s location I really appreciate you guys for all that you do! 🤙🏻

user_reviews_extended.Name: Linda McLean
user_reviews_extended.Description: Andres Sandavol is exceptionally helpful and takes a personal interest in the customer. Talking and corresponding with him over the last few days has restored my belief that someone at State Farm actually knows who I am, understands my circumstances, and will give me helpful, meaningful advice about changes in my coverage I am considering. I would highly recommend him.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Amanda Richard
user_reviews_extended.Description: I could not have had a better experience with my State Farm agent Seth. I contacted State Farm for a quote on auto insurance after some horrible customer service with my former insurance company and a ridiculous price increase. The quote from State Farm was immediately better than what I had been paying and then once I started talking to Seth it became clear that not only could they reduce my overall insurance cost, but I was able to speak to an actual human being that was willing to answer all of my questions and help me figure out what was best for me. I am a loyal customer and I had been with my previous insurance company for 27 years.  Of course cost is important, but I had had a good experience with the former insurer for many years so moving to a new company was not something I had considered before. The lower cost was helpful in deciding to make the switch but it really was dealing with Seth that sealed the deal. I ended up switching 3 of my 4 policies to State Farm and will switch the 4th as soon as I can.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Treva Davis
user_reviews_extended.Description: Andres was very helpful and explained everything. I was lil upset at the beginning of the phone call but hearing all the discounts cheered me up and I'm happy to have coverage once again. Thanks again Andres keep up the good work 👏 🙌 👍

user_reviews_extended.Name: Steven Perez
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I would like to recognize the great customer service provided by our State Farm Agent Andrea Sánchez.

Ever since we switched from another insurance company to State farm; every single time we had a question or concern or needed to make changes for our policy, she is always there to assist and support , once again thanks for all knowledge and support, highly appreciated .

Sincerely the Perez Family

user_reviews_extended.Name: lana braswell
user_reviews_extended.Description: Chris is the ultimate personable professional. Knowledgeable and thorough yet patient and kind. He made the experience seamless and got me better coverage then I've had in years at a great price. This is the first time I've had my insurance brokers phone number and name in my phone index. I feel like I can call him if I have any questions or problems anytime and he would be happy to take my call. I have a feeling that everybody else in the office works the same way. Im certain i will stay with State farm for the foreseeable future.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Niveda Natarajan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Spoke with Seth regarding a car insurance policy and came out a very satisfied customer. Seth is very professional and knowledgeable. A great communicator and truly looking out for his clients and helps you save money! Highly recommend Ed and his team at this State Farm location!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Evan Chang
user_reviews_extended.Description: Andrea has been very attentive with my account. I am pleased with the service so far as I was transferred over after my old agent retired. She called to inform me of a rate increase and assisted in lowering my rates as I do not put very many miles in. It was convenient to take a picture of my  mileage and text it to her. Glad to have worked with her and look forward to having her manage my account going forward.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Victoria Pelman
user_reviews_extended.Description: My mom was in a rush to find insurance for her students recital and she came by State Farm and was helped by Andres Sandoval. She had such a lovely experience and is very grateful for his help finding her the right insurance. We highly recommend Andres! Thank you for helping my mom on such short notice!

user_reviews_extended.Name: steve lum
user_reviews_extended.Description:
On a colleague's advice, I contacted Seth DeFonseka at the State farm office of Ed Hidalgo to inquire about rental insurance for an apartment where my wife and I are moving to start a family and to settle for my new job.

Seth is very courteous and professional and made sure to understand my needs. After he explained my options, we found the perfect policy and within an hour I had the exact  coverage I needed.

Seth followed up the next day to tell me my policy was in place and notice of insurance had been sent to the property owners. Done.

I was impressed with my interaction with Seth and State Farm so I inquired about other needs. With our first child coming in five months, I
was thinking about life insurance for both me and my wife. Creating security for my new family is my first priority.

Seth again found just what I needed. A strong policy at affordable rates for our budget. My wife and I are so much happier knowing our family has  financial security to cover life's uncertainties.

I switched our cars over too because State Farm offers great coverage
and I now much prefer to have a personal relationship with a caring, professional agent like Seth rather than the "convenient" online access
offered by other insurance companies.

Call Seth.
Call State farm.
I'm glad I did.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Hayley Lee
user_reviews_extended.Description: I always receive exceptional service from Andres. He’s very patient, understanding, knowledgeable and answers all my questions. Andres explains things in a way that I can easily understand to make the right choices/decisions. He’s never ever in a rush to get off the phone and never makes me feel like I’m taking too much of his time. Andres really wants to help people.  He is an asset to me and my family and State Farm is very lucky to have Andres.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Antonio White
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ed’s team is amazing. Andreas helped us today and he’s is a star! Super helpful, creative and supportive. Really appreciated the time and care he took to explain everything to me.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Doris Kuang
user_reviews_extended.Description: I am very pleased with the service provided by State Farm agent Andres Sandoval. He is very knowledgeable and professional. He helped me to find the right types of coverage and made sure my needs are met. I am grateful for the advice you have given and helping me to get my car insurance so quickly:)

user_reviews_extended.Name: jesse barraza
user_reviews_extended.Description:
State Farm Insurance company is the best insurance company out of them all!!!!!! Just bought a new home and needed home insurance that would provide home insurance coverage for my home. I own Pit Bull Breed dogs. Home insurance coverages that I was inquiring with would not insure my home due to owning and having my pit bulls on the property, even though my dogs are loving, and raised with an abundance of love. They are not mean or  vicious. State Farm provides home owners insurance for homes that have Pit Bull Breed dogs.

I spoke with Branch Manager Christopher Serrano, I was very satisfied with his outstanding 5 star, A rating customer service, about my needs and he was very informative about the coverage options for my home, and how my home and myself would be covered, and protected.

Chris and I spoke about bundle packages including my two vehicles and life insurance coverages. After being informed about the high amounts of coverages provided with the low cost rates, not only did my Fiancé and myself feel protection from the insurance coverages, we felt and seen the difference in cost per month and year. We decided to switch to State Farm Insurance coverage and bundled up with Home, Vehicle, and Life insurance coverages.

If you’re looking for top quality and inexpensive Insurance coverage options. And you’d like to feel like you and your precious time is respected. All of your curious questions answered. Feel free to inquire with Branch Manager Chris Serrano. You will not be disappointed. Thank you again Chris Serrano.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kareem Abulaban
user_reviews_extended.Description: Chris Serrano was amazing to work with. I consulted with him over 1.5 years ago but sadly due to some pandemic business issues I couldn't work with him at the time. However, his professional and easy to work with personality always stuck with me. When the opportunity to get a new insurance policy came up he was the first person I thought of. He quickly pieced together a custom policy that addressed all my needs and concerns while answering the plethora of questions I had. Overall, Chris not only gave me great policy coverage at a killer price, but was just super easy to work with. Hopefully, I'll be a Chris Serrano/State Farm family member for years to come.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Manu Emmanuel
user_reviews_extended.Description: Andres is awesome! He was able to save me over $80 per month on car and motorcycle insurance while providing better coverage, so thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: MICHAEL RYAN
user_reviews_extended.Description: This office is awesome!  I spoke with Seth the other day regarding my policy.  He was prompt and took the time to answer all my questions.  Insurance can be overwhelming sometimes but this team truly enjoys what they do, and it shows.  I'm happy to be a part of Ed Hidalgo's State Farm Insurance Agency.

user_reviews_extended.Name: kym s
user_reviews_extended.Description: 5 Stars! Chris was amazing! He helped me get my life insurance policy and explained everything down to the last detail. After discussing with him, I felt very confident with my decision. I highly recommend speaking to him if you are interested, he will make sure all of your needs are taken care of.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Angel Sanchez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ed Hidalgo and team are very Professional and very responsive company. Ed, took the time to go over our home insurance policy to make sure we are getting the best rate. He even was able to bring our rate down. If you are looking for a good insurance company that are very personable and have good value and quality, Ed Hidalgo and team is who to contact! thanks Ed and to your team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: davis arthur
user_reviews_extended.Description: Andres Sandoval was very professional and well informed about Insurance. He went above and beyond to help me secure a quote for my car. Bravo 👏 i would recommend if you call state farm for a quote, request for Andres Sandoval.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ima Ang
user_reviews_extended.Description: I never write a review about anything or anyone but Chris Serrano was exceptional! I told him I needed a renters insurance months ago when I move out and gave him a date to call me back. Surprisingly, he did! I thought he would forget since it was months ago that I told him I needed insurance. In additional, he was very professional and made sure everything was done timely and correctly. He listens and executes in a fast and timely manner and I believe that he should be recognized for this. Thanks Chris for a great customer service!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brian Jones
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I worked with Ed Hidalgo's agency first when we bought a new car.  The team provided great advice on not only the car insurance, but my other needs.  This was done in a productive, risk-mitigating manor, not a sales pitch.  I had other risks that did need protection, my motorcycle was uninsured, and I didn't have an umbrella policy.

When we purchased our first San Francisco home a few months later there was no doubt we would work with them again.  Seth DeFonseka was incredibly helpful and worked seamlessly with my mortgage provider.  State Farm has exceptional resources to help size the policy appropriately.  As a result of the bundle the overall price was much less than I had budgeted for.

Exploring insurance options often feels tedious and uncertain, but Seth, Ed, Chris and the rest of the team do it the right way.  They help you understand your risks and needs rather than pushing policies.  Would absolutely recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: T G
user_reviews_extended.Description: Seth,  Really went above and beyond to help me with my new policy as well as explained everything to me in full detail so that I would understand what everything meant as well as to what I would be getting. I have never in my life had my policy explained to me. It was nice to hear what I needed for a change and not just hear the amount of my deductible and the payment for the insurance. I really have a great policy and as well a great agent.  Thank you Seth and State Farm for such great service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kelly Gabriel Lee

user_reviews_extended.Name: Anthony Virey
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Although my review is based on an interaction with Mr. Hidalgo many years ago, this moment will forever be my most memorable insurance story.

As a New Yorker visiting family in the Bay Area, I took a day trip to do some good ol' SF shopping – being a recent college grad at the time, I decided to buy into the hype and reward myself with my first iPhone purchase.

Later that day after meandering around to see my favorite sneaker and streetwear boutiques (RIP Huf, Mishka, Purist, etc.), I popped into this State Farm location and asked a friendly-looking fellow for directions to the nearest Philz Coffee Shop. I thanked him and as I turned around, he asked if I had insurance on my newly purchased phone. Bewildered, I looked back and asked him, "Huh? You mean... I can have insurance... on a phone?"

Mr. Hidalgo smiled and patiently took the time to present me with State Farm's mobile device coverage policies, fielding all my ignorant questions about how insurance works, what each policy would cover, and whether or not it mattered that I lived in New York. Less than 10 minutes later I took up Mr. Hidalgo on an offer – spending a couple bucks a month to insure one of my biggest young adult purchases seemed like a no-brainer.

Fast forward to 11 months later. At my friend's Lakehouse birthday getaway, my phone tragically falls to the bottom of a lake like a sunken battleship (anyone who's ever broken or lost their phone knows the gut-wrenching feeling). After a group search effort came up unfruitful, I called Mr. Hidalgo's office in panic and inquired about my policy – he graciously connected me with a claims agent, and amazingly my payout came within a week.

They say State Farm agents act like good neighbors, but from my experience they act more like awesome family members. Thank you Ed and all the wonderful people at his San Francisco State Farm location!

user_reviews_extended.Description: Ed Hidalgo and his team provided great advice and made the insurance process seamless. I walked away feeling reassured my family and I are protected in the event of something unlikely happena. Very nice, brand new office in San Francisco. Go check him out! Thanks Ed and team. Will refer my family and friends.

In addition, the gentleman that helped me was the friendliest, kindest throwback to classic customer service I can remember. Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lisa Li
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a AAA member since 2010. I enjoy the services provided here. The office is clean, welcoming and efficient. Highly recommend.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Hannah Arcilla
user_reviews_extended.Description: These guys are so fast!!! Came in for an IDP. Patrick is the man! (Patrick’s boss if you’re reading this give him a raise) He’s helpful, quick, kind, knowledgeable, and had lots of funny jokes. Lol. The other staff were super nice too and you can tell the work environment is very positive. Highly recommend for all your AAA needs!

user_reviews_extended.Name: EB Grubb
user_reviews_extended.Description: Patrick was excellent and knowledgeable and knew exactly how to deal with my application for temporary disabled placard.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Emily Gifford
user_reviews_extended.Description: The service here was absolutely above and beyond. Patrick was super helpful and friendly (Give him a raise!). Would 100% recommend this office. Office was also clean and organized.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Daniela Nuñez Zurita
user_reviews_extended.Description: I went in to get my international driver's license and they were so very fast with it! I brought my own passport pictures but you can actually get them done there. They'll provide you the necessary form and will answer all your questions. It was all done within 5 minues. I was afraid for some DMV-ish vibes but luckily their staff was super friendly and helpful.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nicki Yang
user_reviews_extended.Description: Amazingly efficient. Walked in for IDL, filled out paperwork, paid, took the free photo and was out in 15-20min. Right now members get free passport photos and your kids get passport photos for free too.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Colleen McKenzie
user_reviews_extended.Description: An employee named Patrick helped me handle a complex chicken-and-egg problem around getting an unregistered car legal to drive, and I think Patrick might be the most competent person I've ever encountered in dealing with my car. He not only solved my problem, but also prevented other problems I hadn't even considered yet, and didn't waste a minute in doing so -- turned an initially terrible day into a routine paperwork task. Going to do all my DMV work at this AAA location going forward.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Connie Yang
user_reviews_extended.Description: My husband and I came here to get international driving permits before our trip to Japan and the service was extremely speedy and organized. In under 15-20 min we filled out some forms, got our passport photos taken, and got our permits. Thanks for the efficient service!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Julien Baeza
user_reviews_extended.Description: Best experience I’ve had at aaa. Hats off to all the employees who make it so great!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jason Martial
user_reviews_extended.Description: This might be one of the most well run customer-facing service offices in existence. Any organization from the DMV to a Sweetgreen should do a field trip here to see how it's done. Friendly, helpful, fast, and super clear about next steps and wait times. Keep it up!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Eliana Gala
user_reviews_extended.Description: Patrick helped me out with a title transfer and was extremely friendly, knowledgeable, and expedient with the process. I've never had DMV services be so hassle-free and I doubt I ever will again. 5/5

user_reviews_extended.Name: Wayne Sze
user_reviews_extended.Description:
On 2/18/2025 I went to AAA SF Clement Street  Richmond District Office.  I met my AAA assigned agent "Amy".  I told her I wanted to update my auto insurance policy and I want to know about the Umbrella policy.  First thing she told me to call the AAA toll free phone number to update my auto policy and other things.  I asked her "Aren't you my assigned agent?  I am sitting in front of you, if you cannot help your assigned customer, what kind of agent are you?  I never had this kind of treatment from AAA."  I told "Amy" you are  "fire" and you are no longer my agent!!
I brought this incident to the Office Manger "Maria" she promised me she will assigned a new agent to me.  "Amy" is a low performer and no customer service at all !

DMV Section staff always treat customers with respect and courteous. DMV Section staff earned my 5 stars rating.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jeanette Jin
user_reviews_extended.Description: Went to AAA with my partner to get international drivers licenses and was delighted by the friendly customer service. Upon entering we were immediately greeted and directed to the correct line. Pomp took care of us and he was great. He was extremely detail oriented and noticed and helped us correct mistakes in our application. We got our photos here and it was quick and breezy. He also helped me get a membership and gave me all the information that I needed to make the call.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kaitlyn Rhoades
user_reviews_extended.Description: Patrick and the team on Clement street were amazing to work with. As a new car owner, they were amazing, kind and helpful with the process of getting my out of state vehicle registered in CA. I cannot thank them enough, they truly made my week. Thank you Patrick!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marissa de La Viez
user_reviews_extended.Description:
AAA > DMV
I needed to deal with some car registration issues, but was scared to go to the DMV.  I'm so glad I made the choice to come to AAA! Patrick made the experience very easy and stress free by walking me through everything I needed and assisted me with my forms. He is a star employee! I will definitely come back for my future registration needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rose
user_reviews_extended.Description: Came in without an appointment mid-morning on a Monday and only waited 5 minutes. Staff was very friendly and professional.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Anthony “Tony” Flores
user_reviews_extended.Description: Everyone was very nice, but I had to wait behind a couple people for DMV services. Then, 3 or 4 more people lined up about half an hour before closing. I know the staff stayed a little past closing, but I didn't stay long enough to see whether everyone was taken care of. Except for one issue that the system said I needed to see the DMV, CSAA was able to do everything I needed. That's the reason for taking off one star.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Beth Perry
user_reviews_extended.Description: I made an appointment by phone and arrived on time. Only had to wait a few minutes while the team finished up with other customers. Everyone in the office was super nice and friendly. My DMV transaction was complicated, so it took about an hour to complete. I feel certain I would have been at the DMV for a lot longer. Wouldn’t hesitate to come back here if I need more DMV help in the future.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lorenzo Taylor
user_reviews_extended.Description: Patrick and Pomp helped with my out of state registration. They were amazing, funny and kind. I would give 20 stars if I could because of them. Will be revisiting for my renewal

user_reviews_extended.Name: Anthony Deggelman
user_reviews_extended.Description: Super nice people and fast service. Got my international driver's permit same-day.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Megan Jones
user_reviews_extended.Description: Patrick made what would normally be a complete headache of a process into an enjoyable one. I'm not sure I've ever left a review before, but he made my move to CA much easier and sorting out getting my out of state car registered was a breeze with him. Patrick's knowledge and kindness is 100% the reason why I will continue to use AAA, I'd recommend him and this branch to anyone with a vehicle.

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Wang
user_reviews_extended.Description: I bought a AAA membership specifically for the dmv services and I am extremely satisfied. I came in to do an out of state title transfer and instead of waiting who knows how long at the dmv, Patrick was able to help me out pretty quickly and explained to me the whole process and answered any other questions I had. I will definitely be going back for any other dmv related tasks I need to do

user_reviews_extended.Name: Phumiphat Chatwiriyakul
user_reviews_extended.Description: Amazing service! The employees are very friendly and helpful! I was there for the international driving permit and it took only 10-20 minutes to get everything done. If you are looking to do an IDP on some random websites, don’t do it. This place is what you need!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Valerie Miller
user_reviews_extended.Description: So here's the thing. If you are dealing with DMV issues during COVID but you can't get an appointment (or the only appointment time is 6 weeks from now in West Hollywood, CA and you live in San Francisco, CA which was my case) this is where you want to go. I joined AAA today because it was simple and easy (and cheaper than a flight to LA for a "vacation" using my PTO at the DMV) and I spoke to people who are kind and caring.THANK YOU! Thank you for my same-day appointment. Thank you for knowing my name when I walked through the door, thank you for your short lines, and thank you for just being human. Sidebar, if I ever need a tow, I've already got that covered cus now I'm a member.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jason Arellano
user_reviews_extended.Description: The staff there is fantastic! Excellent customer service, and Lily (insurance agent), even when busy makes time to quickly answer our questions.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jackson Michalak
user_reviews_extended.Description: Came here to get another IDP since my current one is expiring in less than half a year. They handled the process quickly, including the person I worked with quickly taking the photos since the usual photographer was on a break. I'm very satisfied with the experience. :)

user_reviews_extended.Name: Antonio (Techguruji)
user_reviews_extended.Description: Didn't have a good experience. Felt like the male agent here was barking at us like a dog! Had a table between himself and us along with plexy glass barrier. He was  unmasked. The guy offered one seat to the both of us. Don't know what is wrong with dude, but he has an issue and needs customer service training.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Anya Ovcharenko
user_reviews_extended.Description: Super friendly staff and very efficient service! I went to get my international driver license done, was in and out + had a nice chat with one of the employees and he was checking my paperwork! 😃

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sarah Trissel
user_reviews_extended.Description: Seriously, people!  Where would you be without AAA or more importantly CALIFORNIA TRIPLE A.  They even managed to keep me from killing my handyman, who got a little zealous with the company credit card.  (he paid my outstanding tickets that I was already taking care of with Project 20 but what is 780.00 between me, the handyman and the DMV? But I digress).  CA Triple A employees become trusted members of the communities they serve,  And they sometimes even save lives.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nate Akers
user_reviews_extended.Description: Nice people! Helped with DMV services. Quick and easy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marcus Caceres
user_reviews_extended.Description: Highly recommend for DMV services. Great people who know their stuff. Very welcoming and friendly.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alex Funk
user_reviews_extended.Description: DMV appointments save so much time here. Walk-in or appointment you’ll be helped about 100x faster than if you went to a DMV office.

user_reviews_extended.Name: pink L
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Emailed Agent lifen to cancel my home insurance. She forward email to Christina and Patrick for handle cancellation. The reason is she cannot sure which product is auto or home. The funny thing is No one help me cancel the insurance and Christina and Patrick didn’t give any respond in two days.
I had to call AAA customer service to cancel. If you cannot cancel my insurance, you can let me know and tell me I have to customer service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Debbie Guardian
user_reviews_extended.Description: I never realized that we could avoid the DMV and have our needs serviced at AAA. This branch was terrific -- friendly, knowledgeable, efficient, professional and helpful all the way around.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Emily Bays
user_reviews_extended.Description: Car registration was so easy. Much more pleasant experience than the DMV.

user_reviews_extended.Name: michael soncuya
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great Service and Staff was very helpful and thoughtful. AAA has great service - you can do all your DMV services if you are a member of AAA!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Christian Alexander
user_reviews_extended.Description: If you have a reason to visit the DMV regarding your boat vehicle then you should be a member of AAA   No long lines and a knowledgeable staff that are efficient and make it stress free.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Denise Dang
user_reviews_extended.Description: Patrick is the best! Got our International driving permits here for $20 each. Very quick service and awesome customer support!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Susie Felix

Very nice and professional staff.
Short wait lines.
Got what I had to do done quickly and easily. They are very friendly and AAA really is the best

user_reviews_extended.Name: Edge Wise
user_reviews_extended.Description: Patrick was incredibly helpful today! During the pandemic my technology was limited but the customer service provided today exceeded my expectations. Much appreciated!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Richard Harty, J. Jr
user_reviews_extended.Description: Worth the membership fee to avoid DMV in San Francisco. Also the staff are friendly and very safe with their COVID precautions and such.

user_reviews_extended.Description: The AAA Magazine advertises a vacation and says go to your local office for booking. The guy looked at the ad  and said they can't help us. Go to another branch. user_reviews_extended.Name: Kevin Rucker

title: Rich Machado - State Farm Insurance Agent
address: 6908 Geary Blvd, San Francisco, CA 94121, United States
plus_code: QGH4+XH Outer Richmond, San Francisco, CA, USA

owner.name: Rich Machado - State Farm Insurance Agent (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Judy Tan
user_reviews.Description: Frances Brunell at Rich Machado - State Farm Insurance, responded promptly to our request for a Home Owner's Insurance Quote. Within the same day, we were able to get a quote with further instructions to obtain a supplement.  This is not the first time where Frances has helped us immediately with any questions we have.  Always offering detailed information for us to make the best informed decision.

user_reviews.Name: George Macaluso
user_reviews.Description: Frances has been a very helpful and informative with our multiple accounts for homes & cars.  She has advised us on tailoring our accounts to maximize our coverage and also taking advantage of discounts to lower our premiums.

user_reviews.Name: Scott Armstrong
user_reviews.Description: Our family has trusted Rich Machado's office for many years and we appreciate their partnership. They have always served us with professionalism and good information about our policies.

user_reviews.Name: Leann James
user_reviews.Description: I was reluctant to call the office asking for assistance with an unclaimed funds question.  Tom was professional and very helpful.  He couldn't answer my question right away and promised to call me back the next day, once he got all the information.  Of course I didn't expect to hear from him again and to my surprise he called and had good news for me.  This was the best customer service I've had in a long time, and it was nice to be able to talk to a person and not a robot.  Tom Gaffney was very, very helpful.  He deserves a raise or at least some praise.  He's a great employee.

user_reviews.Name: maureenbook
user_reviews.Description: Responded to my call immediately when i received an email declining my payment! I had updated my new chase card but it didn’t come up! Gave new card# - all is well

user_reviews.Name: Donald Hansen
user_reviews.Description: State Farm has been our trusted home insurance provider for many years, and the experience has been consistently excellent—thanks in large part to Frances Brunell and Rich Machado. They are incredibly friendly, knowledgeable, and always quick to respond whenever we have questions or need support. We highly recommend State Farm—and especially this outstanding team—for dependable coverage and outstanding service.

user_reviews.Name: Philippe Lewis
user_reviews.Description: Françoise was amazing! Fast, courteous, and immensely helpful! Very happy with working with.m State Farm!

user_reviews.Name: Leah Chapnick
user_reviews.Description: I received compassionate and informed advice from Frances Brunell regarding an accident where my car was totaled due to another driver running a stop sign.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Judy Tan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Frances Brunell at Rich Machado - State Farm Insurance, responded promptly to our request for a Home Owner's Insurance Quote. Within the same day, we were able to get a quote with further instructions to obtain a supplement.  This is not the first time where Frances has helped us immediately with any questions we have.  Always offering detailed information for us to make the best informed decision.

user_reviews_extended.Name: George Macaluso
user_reviews_extended.Description: Frances has been a very helpful and informative with our multiple accounts for homes & cars.  She has advised us on tailoring our accounts to maximize our coverage and also taking advantage of discounts to lower our premiums.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Scott Armstrong
user_reviews_extended.Description: Our family has trusted Rich Machado's office for many years and we appreciate their partnership. They have always served us with professionalism and good information about our policies.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Leann James
user_reviews_extended.Description: I was reluctant to call the office asking for assistance with an unclaimed funds question.  Tom was professional and very helpful.  He couldn't answer my question right away and promised to call me back the next day, once he got all the information.  Of course I didn't expect to hear from him again and to my surprise he called and had good news for me.  This was the best customer service I've had in a long time, and it was nice to be able to talk to a person and not a robot.  Tom Gaffney was very, very helpful.  He deserves a raise or at least some praise.  He's a great employee.

user_reviews_extended.Name: maureenbook
user_reviews_extended.Description: Responded to my call immediately when i received an email declining my payment! I had updated my new chase card but it didn’t come up! Gave new card# - all is well

user_reviews_extended.Name: Donald Hansen
user_reviews_extended.Description: State Farm has been our trusted home insurance provider for many years, and the experience has been consistently excellent—thanks in large part to Frances Brunell and Rich Machado. They are incredibly friendly, knowledgeable, and always quick to respond whenever we have questions or need support. We highly recommend State Farm—and especially this outstanding team—for dependable coverage and outstanding service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Philippe Lewis
user_reviews_extended.Description: Françoise was amazing! Fast, courteous, and immensely helpful! Very happy with working with.m State Farm!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Leah Chapnick
user_reviews_extended.Description: I received compassionate and informed advice from Frances Brunell regarding an accident where my car was totaled due to another driver running a stop sign.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Louise Blasi
user_reviews_extended.Description: This office, especially Frances, is very responsive.   She talked me through the process of home insurance with so much patience!  So friendly, knowledgable and professional. Very comfortable process.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Monica Salomon
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tom was extemely helpful in securing auto coverage for my brother. Thank you Tom!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Paul Gross
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have worked with this State Farm office for 16 years and Frances Brunell has always provided me with the best service.  Her can do approach has always resolved my issues efficiently and quickly.  Many thanks to Frances, Rich and the team.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Teresa Bright
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have been with State Farm for over 20 years and have always found the representatives to be helpful, responsive, and really nice! Our questions always get thorough responses and the few times we've had to put in a claim (car insurance; flood insurance) we have been helped at each step, which we greatly appreciated, and gotten fair outcomes.  We are very happy with State Farm.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Allison Delman
user_reviews_extended.Description: Rich, Frances and the rest of the staff have been very helpful, responsive and caring.  We recently contacted them for a complicated issue and Frances handled it quickly and accurately. They do go the extra mile.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Donna Fletcher
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had the pleasure of working with Thomas, beginning with needing a bond for my business to helping me navigate a traffic accident that resulted in my car totaled and needing to deal with the aftermath. He was a proactive communicator, responsive, and caring. Happy to write a 5-star review!  Donna F.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lina
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have had multiple policies with State Farm, via the local office of Rich Machado, for over 20 years. Throughout this long time, his office staff have been always helpful, pleasant, and competent. Highly recommended!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jon Woods
user_reviews_extended.Description: Continue list for tom. I never am able to talk to rich, always provides excellent customer service

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lee Bender
user_reviews_extended.Description: These guys are really wonderful, reliable and trustworthy— have offered me excellent advice over many decades of our association!

user_reviews_extended.Name: laurensit23
user_reviews_extended.Description: Rich & team are always very quick to get back to me on questions that I have. His team is thorough and I appreciate their fast and reliable service!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marina F
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ab Fab customer service! Thanks kids!

user_reviews_extended.Name: mikey1sf
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great service! All they've done for me has gone without a hitch, and quickly.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sharon P
user_reviews_extended.Description: I am a long time customer and have never had a negative experience with Rich and his crew.    I highly recommend this agency for their knowledge, support and courtesy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lora Smith
user_reviews_extended.Description: Marcel and Thomas in the office are great with their customer service. Always responsive and take care of you! Rich is very reputable and professional. Highly recommended.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Pennisula Guy
user_reviews_extended.Description: Excellent service every time I call, And sound advice regarding what Add-ons to skip and to buy

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ivan Resnikoff
user_reviews_extended.Description: Rich and staff are careful, yet assertive, when giving advice.  They've protected our family for over 20 years.

Always very helpful and responsive!
Their Client gor 35+ years 👍

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stephen Lewis
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very good insurance agency with nice people who have helped me for about 30 years.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Richard Jetton
user_reviews_extended.Description: Excellent team of agents! Frances is great; extremely knowledgeable.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kimo Bailey
user_reviews_extended.Description: Has always been there for me and office staff is wonderful !!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sue Saperstein
user_reviews_extended.Description: I received detailed information about my insurance options

user_reviews_extended.Name: Omar Negrete
user_reviews_extended.Description: Rich and his team have been great to work with!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Perrin Belway
user_reviews_extended.Description: Always pleasant and very helpful.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michele Dana
user_reviews_extended.Description: always get quick and good service

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jane Creed
user_reviews_extended.Description: i love these people. a company is only as good as its people. i have always, always received above and beyond service here. like a family to me!  as a widow. this is so important ro me -- to know they are always in my corner and looking out for my interests. i want to give a real shout out to Gina!  She is Rich's right hand person and is such a treasure!  Caring, warm and wonderful to work with. Thank God for these rare people in today's world !

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stephen Lewis
user_reviews_extended.Description: Prompt, friendly, competent service by Gina Johnson and Frances Brunell during my more than 10 years of relying on this agency.

user_reviews.Name: Shao Lau
user_reviews.Description: Been having Jing and her team for my Life and car insurance policies for long time. She always answer and responded back quickly if I have questions. She is most reliable agent I have known. Thank for looking out Jing and her team. Many thanks

user_reviews.Name: Bella Chen
user_reviews.Description: Jing is one of the best State Farm insurance agents you can work with. She always is on top of answering any questions that you have and making sure you have the best service possible. I would recommend her to anyone else who wants to receive insurance with her assistance.

user_reviews.Name: Phoebe
user_reviews.Description: Jing is phenomenal and goes above and beyond with her services. My family and I have been customers with her for many years and will continue to have her as our agent. Not only is she kind and helpful, she always makes herself available if I ever need to ask a question. Thank you again Jing, happy holidays!

user_reviews.Name: Gang Xiao
user_reviews.Description:
We have been with Jing Lee State Farm agency for 15 years. We had great support from
Jing and her team. Prompted response and good follow-ups. Jing is very experienced and knowledgeable, she always provides us the best insurance advise. We are very happy Jing is our State Farm agent.

user_reviews.Name: J R
user_reviews.Description:
Google can be a hit or a miss most of the time. In this case, a hit! For commercial and residential insurance needs,  I have been a long time customer of Jing for many years.  From her front office to back office to middle office, Jing Lee truly cares about her clients especially at getting you the best possible deals depending on your insurance scope and needs.

Possibly one of the first, in a huge, wide insurance sector and industry, her firm stands out by far by being very reliable, consistent, very transparent, and straight forward.  Throughout the years, communication is still on target and open to reviewing policies to ensure you're aligned with your current needs.

Whether it's a holiday or your birthday, you get a card from her team to show that she cares.

Thank you Jing Lee, Amy and the rest of the staff for all your servicing over the years!

user_reviews.Name: Robert Lindsey
user_reviews.Description:
I've been working with Jing for over a decade. She is extremely knowledgeable and helpful with all of my insurance needs. She works her hardest to secure the best possible prices. I was even surprised with a substantial policy refund for bundling my services!
I would highly recommend her.

user_reviews.Name: Maria Vivanco
user_reviews.Description: Jing Lee is hands down the best insurance agent in town.  She's efficient, friendly, and get's things done quickly. I've referred all my family to her and are very pleased with the quotes and ability to help us solve all our insurance issues.

user_reviews.Name: Kelly Ryan
user_reviews.Description: Jing is awesome! She has helped us with insurance policies for our home, cars, and businesses over the year. She is very communicative, available, and reliable and we have appreciate knowing that we are in good hands with her.

user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been working with Jing for so many years I lost count. Jing and her staff are amazing! Super responsive and friendly no matter what the call is for. Makes it easy and gives us piece of mind having the right insurance coverage. Highly recommend.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Greg Melkumyan
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've been working with Jing Lee and team for many years for all of my insurance needs. They are always available to answer any questions, assist with discounts and promotions, and provide me with better service than I ever thought possible from an insurance company :). They will be there for you and respond promptly when you need them. If you need insurance for anything and are reading this, do not hesitate and call them now!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ju Li Wang
user_reviews_extended.Description: My family and I have been State Farm customers for the last few years with Jing Lee’s team and been very happy with the service/level of responsiveness. Jing and her team are informative and helpful. I've consistently had a great experience with the team at JING LEE STATE FARM  - highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cynthia Miyashita
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jing Lee State Farm insured my house and my car for 23 years. I sold both recently because I moved overseas. They're responsive, polite and offer excellent rates. And a real person always answers the phone! I give them my highest recommendation.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Doug Chan
user_reviews_extended.Description: An auto burglar blew out my passenger side window on the eve of an atmospheric river-rain event. I e-mailed Jing's office to inform them of the incident and sent photos.  Words can't express my delight at being called within an hour of my e-mail transmission -- by Jing herself. She was sympathetic and super helpful, providing advice and information about claims filing and processing. Now, that's service.  I highly recommend her insurance agency without hesitation.

user_reviews_extended.Name: A Ng
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Jing Lee is a responsive and professional agent.  She always answered her phones and emails.
I am surprised to learn that State Farm offered very competitive homeowners insurance premiums with high property coverage than those online insurance carriers.

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Golden
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jing and her staff are super responsive to my email inquiries and has answers at their fingertips. For example, I asked if anything I can do to prevent catalytic converter theft. Jing recommended that I keep the deductible for my comprehensive low (mine is $100) as catalytic converter replacement is covered under the comprehensive policy, and that policy is relatively inexpensive.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sophia Chew
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love my State Farm agent, Jing Lee, and her staffs. Always reachable and goes above and beyond my expectation. Always looking after my well beings and reviewing my policy to make sure I’m getting a most bang out of my buck. Recommend 100%.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Trang Luu
user_reviews_extended.Description: My experience with Jing has been great--she's been very professional and courteous. Recently she walked me through my existing policies to review current circumstances for changes and updates. It was a smooth process.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Terry Forgette
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jing Lee, runs a great state farm insurance office. They handle my home auto and office policies they are very attentive and call me when anything is changing or is due. I'm a happy customer and I appreciate their professionalism.

user_reviews_extended.Name: SIMIN HUANG
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jing is the best and most welcoming agent I have ever met. When I had a problem, she was the first one to help me and give me a plan. She is very conscientious and efficient.

user_reviews_extended.Name: james wei
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jing has been my agent for over 10 years. She is always there when you need her. Very attentive and caring. More like a friend than an agent.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Josina Fang
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jing is very responsive and thorough.  If she can’t get to it right away, someone on her team is there to assist.  They are all very professional and helpful.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Judy Chan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Maggie Ruan was very helpful with all my questions and concerns. She handled everything swiftly and efficiently. Great experience!

Always a Pleasant Trust Full Experience

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joseph Selva
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a client for many years. This office offers top notch customer service. I would recommend them to anyone.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ping He Zhou
user_reviews_extended.Description: Jing and her team are the BEST! Jing is experienced and knowledgeable. Highly recommend!!!!!!

user_reviews_extended.Description: Five stars! Efficient, patient, energetic! They always help and take work seriously.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alan Tsui
user_reviews_extended.Description: Yoki is helpful and professional. Great customer service. Thank you

title: Phil Bertetta - State Farm Insurance Agent
address: 3524 Geary Blvd, San Francisco, CA 94118, United States
plus_code: QGJV+M4 Laurel Heights, San Francisco, CA, USA

owner.name: Phil Bertetta - State Farm Insurance Agent (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Jan Little
user_reviews.Description: Phil Bertetta has been my State Farm agent for over 30 years.  Throughout that time I have always received excellent service from Phil and his staff.  They are responsive and caring and effective.

user_reviews.Name: susan green
user_reviews.Description: For decades Phil Bertetta has been my State Farm agent for my office liability insurance. He and his staff have always guided me through any related issues I've encountered.  It is such a relief in this day and age, to pick up the phone and know there is going to be someone on the other end of the line ready, and seemingly happy to help. I am forever grateful for the personal service they provide.

user_reviews.Name: G K Edlin
user_reviews.Description: Phil and his team have been taking care of my family’s insurance needs for over 30 years. We’ve had more than a dozen policies for different vehicles and homes and will continue to choose them for the next one. All of the agents go the extra mile to make sure we have the right coverage at the best rate possible. I can’t think of any other business relationship that has been this consistent and dependable over the years.

user_reviews.Name: Richard F. Oliver II
user_reviews.Description: Phil Bertetta has been my "Good Neighbor" Agent for since the 1980's. He has covered us with our Home ,Cars, Motorcycles & Rentals. Phil and his awesome.team has always been there with patience and assistance, making sure I was always covered for whatever came next… Thanks, Phil

user_reviews.Name: Saul Cristales
user_reviews.Description:
What a  great service Stephanie
Great customers service always polite and have an answer for everything. Because of her I still member of State Farm.  Great job Stephanie.  You ate the best.

Saul

user_reviews.Name: Pei Feng Sun
user_reviews.Description: We have been with Phil Bertetta's  team for over 30 years. The staff is always personable and attentive. Every time I call, they are always happy to assist, and they respond to our request (however trivia) right away. Thank you everyone  in that office!

user_reviews.Name: Paul Baker
user_reviews.Description: Phil and his team have been my insurance carrier for years now. I especially like how i get both a Safe Driver or Minimal Miles discount,  AND one for combo'ing home and auto. Big Plus--their office is on Geary, only a 10 min walk from my apt. I go down and chat w/ Phil or his staff any time I have questions. Ha ha--try *that* w/ some of these online-only places! You are lucky if anyone answers the phone. If not, you are STUCK with a) some 15-level phone selection tree (none of which steps actually match what you want to do) or b) an AI Chat "Assistant" that is dumber than a rock and seems not to've been trained on any English used in the past 100 years (Yes, OK..I'm sure it does well when you speak in Elizabethan English like Shakespeare). Your choice! Tip---go with Phil.

user_reviews.Name: Hilda De la Rosa
user_reviews.Description:
We have been with StateFarm for 14 years.

My husband and I decided to transfer to another agent recently, and had the pleasure of working with DIAN KWONG.

Dian was a real delight to work with. Her customer service is second to none. She made the insurance transfer process a walk in the park. Dian is very friendly, knowledgeable, reliable, responds with urgency and always helpful and ready to address our questions and concerns.

We were completely impressed with her professionalism and customer service.  We highly recommend her to anyone looking for an insurance agent who puts customers first.
It was definitely a great experience from the start and we are delighted that we made that switch!
