user_reviews_extended.Description: I HIGHLY recommend Phil Bertetta and his team in San Francisco! I have been working with them for 20 years and I am so impressed with every agent. Karen, Stephanie, and Dian are outstanding women and they have taken amazing care of our family and insurance needs. They are hard working, friendly, smart and efficient! If you are looking for an OUTSTANDING insurance policy and support, please contact Karen, Stephanie and Dian at Phil Bertetta in San Francisco!

user_reviews_extended.Name: gowtham2403
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I’ve had a great experience with State Farm so far. The customer service is friendly, helpful, and easy to reach. Setting up my auto insurance was quick and smooth, and they explained everything clearly. I especially appreciate how easy it is to manage my policy online and through the app.

Although I didn’t need to file a claim, they were always responsive to my questions and very transparent about coverage and costs. Definitely one of the more reliable and trustworthy insurance providers I’ve worked with. Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mary McCutcheon
user_reviews_extended.Description: Phil, Dian and the rest of the team are extremely responsive, knowledgeable and focused on getting us the right product.

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Bass
user_reviews_extended.Description: Stephanie and the team are super helpful at State Farm. I have been a customer of Phil Bertetta's office for over 20 years. They are very focused on providing the best options for my homeowners insurance coverage. I recommend them all the time.

user_reviews_extended.Name: jan walli
user_reviews_extended.Description: Working with  State aFarm Insurance through the Offices of Phil Bertetta has been a wonderful experience.  We had car insurance and life insurance for a number of years… Phil and his staff were always professional, knowledgable, and easy to work with!

user_reviews_extended.Name: D Schumm
user_reviews_extended.Description: Phil Bertetta's office is friendly, always accessible, prompt with their replies and always, always very helpful answering insurance questions.  They were proactive on a recent insurance claim and were able to reach a decision in my favor. I was not not expecting it and am very grateful.  The staff in this insurance office are the BEST that I ever worked with. 5 stars for them!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joanne Sutro
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I feel fortunate to have had Phil Bertetta as my insurance agent for more than twenty years. He and Dian
are knowledgeable, professional, kind, and very responsive. They stay on top of changes in the industry as well as at State Farm, and just identified a way to update my homeowners policy to increase my coverage, while significantly lowering my cost!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Peter Storm
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have been working with the Phil Bertetta State Farm office for a few decades now.  (yes I did mean decades). The quality of the service I get from Phil and his staff is excellent.  I use them for a multitude of insurance needs and they are always there for me.
I have a special shout out to the staff.  Their attention to detail is excellent.  Additionally they continually keep me up to date on my insurance needs.  No need to shop anywhere else!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tim Fender
user_reviews_extended.Description: Before moving out of state I was a customer with Phil's office going back to 1996. In that time, Phil and his staff were always friendly, helpful, and attentive to all of my insurance needs. They conducted regular policy reviews to insure my coverage was appropriate and helped me save countless dollars on premiums. If you need insurance in the Bay Area, I strongly recommend giving State Farm and Phil Bertetta a call. 5 stars!

user_reviews_extended.Name: MITCHELL MERRICK
user_reviews_extended.Description: This office is so caring.  I love Diana, Karen and Stephanie.  They always go the extra mile.  I was a client of Dick Russell's and when he retired I moved over to Phil Bertetta.  I have been with this office since moving here in 1991.  They have helped me with all accidents, renter's insurance and most things keeping me up-to-date with my car insurance.  If you join them you will love them.  Nothing, but great service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brian Carr
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been insured through Phil Bertetta's State Farm agency for over 20 years now. They work with me to ensure I get the fairest rates for coverage and I feel like they truly know me as a person. Even though we don't talk often, I am on a first name basis with everyone in the office because they are so friendly and helpful. You want an agent that has your back and Phil Beretta's office has shown that with me through the years. They have earned my respect and loyalty and I think you'll be rewarded if you decide to use them as your insurance agent.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chris Kenton
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been a customer of Phil and team for more than 20 years, through some small mishaps and one certified disaster. They’ve always had my back, always answer the phone with a real person, and are always knowledgeable about how we should adjust our coverage to current events and circumstances. “Pundits” say you should change your insurance company every few years to save a few bucks. I would never trade small savings for the kind of service and support Phil, Stephanie and Dian have delivered consistently for decades.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Suzan Rowland
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a client of Phil Bertetta's since 1981.  All of my insurance coverage is through his office.  Through the years, Phil, his son Nick and his staff (Karen Martinez) have worked with me to resolve a variety of claims.  They are very knowledgeable, supportive and responsive.  They have always worked to achieve the best result for me and my family.  I cannot recommend Phil and his team highly enough.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Erik Terreri
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Phil Bertetta and his team, including Karen, Stephanie, and Diane are absolutely the best insurance agents.
I’ve been a client of Phil’s for more than 20 years and they have provided an array of coverages for me and my family. From auto, life, home, umbrella, and investment property insurance Phil’s team have been creative and come up with ways to insure some complex situations. Thank you Phil, Karen, Stephanie and Diane for everything that you’ve done and continue to do to provide the best service possible!
I highly recommend Phil Bertetta State Farm Insurance.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Christopher Ketcham
user_reviews_extended.Description: These folks are the real deal! I've worked with Phil, Karen and Stephanie for years and they are like family. They take care of our business and personal insurance policies. The business side keeps them the busiest as they are having to adjust our policy to the needs of our clients. On our personal policy side they provide everything from our auto to umbrella, and everything in between. Seriously, there's not a better firm in San Francisco to attend to your needs! They are so attentive that Phil has even been to our flat to meet us in person! That level of service is unmatched in virtually every industry! Given the option, you should one stop shop here and call it a day!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jeffrey Cole
user_reviews_extended.Description: Phil Barretta State Farm insurance has been a great companion to me as I navigate through the housing insurance world.  Most of my life I have been been living Overseas and therefore trust them to make the right decisions for me. For the last decade, they have done just that.  I highly recommend his agency to anyone looking for a reliable and helpful Insurance agent.  Special thanks goes to Stephanie Lai who also does a fantastic job at the agency.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Felicia Yee
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve had the pleasure of working with Stephanie and her team for many years. They are consistently responsive and helpful, and over time, they have become more than just my insurance providers—they’ve become trusted friends. They always take the time to answer all of my questions and ensure that I’m thoroughly protected in every way possible.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Richard S
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been with Phil’s office for a while now (Dian and Stephanie are great!), and am happy to recommend this office for their personal and professional service and commitment to my varied insurance needs.    If you’re shopping around for insurance, give ‘em a call.  I’m glad I did.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rachel Goodwin
user_reviews_extended.Description: Phil Bertetta and his office have handled our auto insurance for 31 years, and our home owners insurance for 23 years. He and his office staff are professional, caring, and always helpful.  I highly recommend them! Stephanie has always been quick to reply and help us with claims and changes to our policies.

user_reviews_extended.Name: arnold oji
user_reviews_extended.Description: My wife and I have been client's of Phil's for over 30 years. The few times when we had to submit a claim for broken sewer line water damage to our garage or the couple auto fender benders, the experience  working with Phil and his team was/is been extremely pleasant and efficient. One always remembers bad service but in this instance, it is the great service and attention that stand out.  I've not experienced anything less in the more than 3 decades.   I would recommend Phil and his team for your insurance needs.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Roger Mason
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a customer of Phil Bertetta since 1982 when I was a student with one automobile.  I now insure three automobiles, two homes, and a condominium.  I also have an umbrella policy.   Phil and his staff have always been there for me.   Their response time is the best.   The service is incredible.   After 41 years I can honestly say that I have never had a complaint.   Shout out to Dian!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bruce Seidel
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a client of State Farm for over 30 years. When we moved to Northern California, in 2018 we moved all our insurance to Phil Beretta's agency. He and ALL his team have been wonderful, professional and delightful to deal. They have anticipated our needs and delivered competitive rates. I have recommended his office to a friend who recently moved to Sonoma.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mary Schneider
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Phil Bertetta and his San Francisco/Bay Area team are awesome!!
They are on it ...when ever I call for help, advise, questions, he and his team are "Johnny on the spot" with returning my calls, emails and website inquiries.
They genuinely care about you as a person. They want to make sure you have the appropriate amount of coverage and at the best value available. Specifically Dian made an excel spreadsheet for my auto insurance payment plan accounts, and Karen has emailed with me numerous times regarding all our policies. I rely on State Farm to protect our home, personal articles, umbrella coverage and our auto insurance. I encourage anyone looking for an insurance agent to contact Phil Bertetta.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kerrie Malone
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have worked with Phil and his team for 20 years. They help us with our primary residence, rental homes, vehicles and umbrella policy. Everyone at the office is amazing to work with - friendly, well informed, super responsive and extremely diligent. They don't miss a detail! We work with Stephanie on most of our projects – she's always available to answer any question we might have and/or discuss ideas and the various options. She truly cares that we get what we need in a timely manner.

user_reviews_extended.Name: antoinette Badra
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been with phil State Farm insurance for more than 32 years. The whole office group are excellent Phil, Stephany, Karen  and Diane  are excellent very pleasant and helpful .

user_reviews_extended.Name: Zach Hauser
user_reviews_extended.Description: The staff at this office (in particular, Stephanie and Dian!) are amazing. It's profoundly reassuring to know that if I ever have a question or need help navigating the complexities of insurance, they're just a phone call away. They're generous with their time and are happy to take as long as you need to explain details and offer sound advice.

user_reviews_extended.Name: John Hansen
user_reviews_extended.Description: Phil's office and entire team have served my insurance needs for over two decades.  The entire office is incredibly responsive, and has fielded questions and sent required documents (e.g., proof of insurance for home and auto) whenever needed.  I know I can always count on Phil's group for sound advice on getting the right coverage and excellent service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Liam Adelman
user_reviews_extended.Description: Phil's office has been a reliable partner providing my family  insurance services for many years. Everything from renters, auto coverage and home insurance.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jonathan T. Smith
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been with State Farm my entire life.  When my previous agent retired I transferred to Phil Bertetta.  Phil's entire team have been very professional and provide fast and accurate answers to my questions regarding my auto and home accounts.  While costs have been going up (due State Farm corporate decisions) , I continue to remain with State Farm PRIMARILY due to Phil Beretta and his team.....especially nowadays when good service is difficult to find.  I highly recommend Phil Beretta!

user_reviews_extended.Name: El Scott
user_reviews_extended.Description: Phil and his team effectively mange our multiple policies and ask questions or suggest changes to keep rates at realistic levels. They know our needs and are very responsive when we have questions or concerns. We have been with them for decades because others can't match the quality of coverage.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Susan Tognotti
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have been with Phil for over 30 yrs. He is great!  Always helps with getting you a policy that saves you money. Will even come to your house to go over your choices and policy.  Also Stephanie is so helpful. She always there to help and answer your questions. You  can always count on State Farm. 👍

user_reviews_extended.Name: Neal Snyder
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have a history with Phil’s office going back to 1988, and have stuck with him because of the quick, responsive, detailed help and advice I’ve received. I have fond memories of my kids being encouraged with a light touch to be responsible drivers when they turned 16
Advice and choices are always laid out with clarity. I recommend them unconditionally.

Second entry a year or two later: Still great , thoughtful, experience

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shannon Murray
user_reviews_extended.Description: Phil Bertetta and his associate Dian are awesome. We've been with them 20+ years and are very happy with how responsive they are.

user_reviews_extended.Name: kelly niland
user_reviews_extended.Description: Highly recommend Phil Bertetta and his excellent staff. Since I bought my house in 1997, I've received only incredible service from them. They're responsive, pro-active, and will bend over backwards to offer great options. And so friendly: no question is too big or too small. That's the kind of stuff that form long-term relationships.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nicole Harper
user_reviews_extended.Description: Phil and his team have been fantastic to work with.  As it is becoming increasing difficult to get insurance in California, it was refreshing to work with a group that was helpful, efficient and proactive in working towards an insurance solutions that met our needs and was understandable.  Tremendous thanks to Phil for quickly getting us a quote and to Stephanie who made sure we understood it!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stacey Henderson
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have had the best service from them! When I first got my car insurance, I lived in San Francisco, and his office was just down the street from my apartment. In 1985 I bought my house in Marin and was glad to keep him as my agent. He and his office staff has always been there for me. It's almost 40 years now! If there were 6 stars instead of 5, I'd give that!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael
user_reviews_extended.Description: A warm and thoughtful customer service experience from our State Farm representative that handled our family’s death benefit payout. Thank you Dian

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mark Vega
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have been working with Phil and his team for over 35 years.  As we have gone though different parts of our life journey we feel that they have been a valuable partner to help protect us us navigate various life experiences.  We highly recommend working with Phil and his stellar team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bruce Schatzman
user_reviews_extended.Description: My family has been working with Phil Bertetta's State Farm office for many years. The staff there are among the most responsive, knowledgeable, and professional people you can find. When it comes to purchasing or managing insurance, they have always worked in my best interests, not their own.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dave Hanson
user_reviews_extended.Description: My wife & I have been with Phil Bertetta and his team for more than 25-30 years. Stephanie in particular goes above & beyond the call of duty and has never let me down with a claim or a time sensitive deadline. With customer service like they provide we wouldn’t think of taking our business anywhere else. We appreciate all they do to make us feel safe and covered in case of any accident or emergency🙏🏻

user_reviews_extended.Name: Thomas Raffetto
user_reviews_extended.Description: Phil Bertetta and his office staff have always been very helpful to us for over 30 years.  They return calls within the same day and are pro-active in looking for ways to help us save money and still ensure we are covered with the right level of insurance whether it is for our cars, home, or life insurance.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael Belmessieri
user_reviews_extended.Description: The staff at the State Farm agency have been absolutely great in all of my insurance needs for an excess of 40 years.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ron H
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been working with this team for many years.  Yes, have had a couple of claims.  Each and every time Phil's office solved claims issues at "central" and got payment to me within a few days.  A special shout out to Stephanie!  Happy to have such a responsive team to work with.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tom Hicks
user_reviews_extended.Description: Stephanie and the State Farm team are very capable and professional. They made the process of purchasing a new auto policy simple and easy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shannon Wing
user_reviews_extended.Description:
We've worked with the agents here for years and they have always been super responsive and helpful.

I want to give a shout out to Dian especially for giving me the heads up before any rate changes and helping to keep rates as low as possible. It is very clear when talking to her that she has a lot of empathy for customers, and is very pleasant to work with!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cynthia Tom
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have been with Phil, Stephanie and Karen since my 20's. I am now in my 60's and they have been like family through the years. How great is it to know someone knows eho you are and will speak to you by phone, especially in times of crisis or ne
ed.
It makes all the difference to our health to know there is someone that cares beyond their bank book. Kind of like Cheers, the TV show. Where everyone knows your name.
Thanks to Phil for keeping his staff intact
So rare and should be celebrated as high consciousness.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kevin Swisher
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been very pleased with this State Farm agency. We moved to San Francisco three years ago, and one of the first things I did was meet with Phil to transfer our coverage from Texas. He was knowledgeable and made the process easy. Since then, I have worked with Dian Dai-Kwong in his office: She has handled the day-to-day aspects with professionalism, whether that has been coverage questions or claims. I give this State Farm agency my highest recommendation.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bob Hill
user_reviews_extended.Description: Dian listens well, responds promptly with good ideas!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Glenn Snyder
user_reviews_extended.Description: Phil Bertetta and his team has always been highly responsive to our needs regarding new policies, modeling coverage options of policies, and assistance at times of claims. We’ve been working with them for nearly 30 years!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rob Knox
user_reviews_extended.Description: Phil's office has been exceptional and on top of all of our insurance needs (renters, homeowner, earthquake, cars, etc) and issues over the past decade without fail. Highly recommend!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Christopher Keele
user_reviews_extended.Description: Phil's office jumped-in to help move a significant auto claim forward.  Dian acted as liaison between State Farm home office claims dept. and me and was very efficient and effective in completing claims processing and payment.  Much appreciated!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tim Smith
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been a client of this State Farm Insurance office since 1975. The staff are always friendly and knowledgeable. My wife and I insure our home and automobiles with confidence that we will be treated fairly and honestly.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jamie Sur
user_reviews_extended.Description: Phil and his staff provide excellent service.  We have been with Phil for many years - too many to count! ;)  Our questions are always answered in a timely manner and the staff is efficient and always courteous.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Karinn Casey
user_reviews_extended.Description: Stephanie helped me set up a liability insurance for my acupuncture business, so grateful and feel so confident working in my field knowing I’m insured by Phil and his team! They pick up and handle all my requests fast. Super grateful!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cathy Rice
user_reviews_extended.Description: The entire staff at this office respond quickly, answer questions thoroughly and offer guidance and support with policies and claims.

user_reviews_extended.Name: K Rowe
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very helpful! All staff members provided detailed information with very quick response!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Eleanor Lew
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have been working with this State Farm office for well over a decade. Stephanie, Dian, and Phil are all a pleasure to work with and cannot recommend them enough.

user_reviews_extended.Name: John Morgan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great experience with Dian, walked me through a complicated sequence of steps, and was very patient and helpful.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Erik T.
user_reviews_extended.Description: I highly recommend Phil Bertetta State Farm. Their customer service has always been exemplary.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stephanie DeLucca
user_reviews_extended.Description: Karen Martinez is amazing, she helped me get my car insurance with no hassle at all. She was so patient with me and got me what I needed without any overpricing I loved it. Thank you so much, Karen and State Farm.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Amanda Reid
user_reviews_extended.Description: Switched from another insurance company to State Farm. The cost has been lower and the service has been so much better. Dian is my main contact and she is extremely helpful and responsive.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Iris Fluellen
user_reviews_extended.Description: Dian Dai-Kwong is wonderful to work with. She is extremely patient in explaining how insurance polices and makes it so one understands how insurance policies work. I highly recommend her and State Farm!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brian Purchia
user_reviews_extended.Description: We've had the pleasure to work with Stephanie and the team for years! Such wonderful customer service. Recommend the team highly!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Derek Scherer
user_reviews_extended.Description: Always a pleasure working with Phil and his team.  Quick response times, friendly staff and the best price quotes.  We will be using them for years to come.  Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Katy Oberdiek
user_reviews_extended.Description: Phil Bertetta and his team have been my go-to insurance team for over 15 years. No matter what the question or situation they always were knowledgeable, answered instantaneously, and provided great service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lisa Willis
user_reviews_extended.Description: Phil and his staff are wonderful to work with. Any time I had an issue with any of my policies, they were there to guide me. I highly recommend them!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Robyn Purchia
user_reviews_extended.Description: Phil and his team are always quick to answer our questions and provide us the personal attention we need from time-to-time. We feel like we're in good hands with Phil and highly recommend him!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Leigh Hudson
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I’ve been a loyal client for over 20 years. The whole team is highly responsive, the best in the industry and can offer very competitive pricing. Can’t ask for more! Thank you Stephanie, Nick, Karen, and everyone there.

Leigh

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mandar Borkar
user_reviews_extended.Description: We have been working with Phil and Stephanie for over a decade now.  They have been very responsive and a delight to work with. Highly recommend them.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Arnie Malin
user_reviews_extended.Description: These people are outstanding! I’ve been with them for over 20 years!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Laurie Trainer
user_reviews_extended.Description: My husband and I have been clients of Phil Bertetta’s agency for over 30 years. We have always been extremely satisfied with the assistance that we get.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ron Chan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Karen & Stephanie are always very responsive to my questions.  My family and I have been with Phil for over 40 years!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michelle Quach
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been with Phil for almost 30 years. Love the team and service they provide. They’ve been great, reliable and fast. Highly recommend Phil Bertetta and his team.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cynthia Hoo
user_reviews_extended.Description: Thank you, Dian, for doing a recalculating of my car’s mileage and lowering my premium. You went that extra mile (no pun intended) for me and it’s much appreciated.

user_reviews_extended.Description: Worked with Phil and his team for over 15 years.  The team has always been very responsive and personable when needed.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chris Power

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jeffrey Laffranchini

user_reviews_extended.Description: I've had a great experience working with State Farm agent Phil Bertetta and his team. Karen went out of her way to meet with me on a saturday to review and advise of policy coverages to keep everything current.
